We study pre-release mirage detection: given an image-question pair, the goal is to determine whether a VLM should answer or abstain before producing a response. We propose Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment (TC-LIA), a model-agnostic method that probes patch-token representations across the layers of a CLIP ViT-H/14 vision encoder. TC-LIA projects layer-wise image patch tokens into the final CLIP embedding space and measures their similarity to the question embedding, allowing the method to track whether question-relevant visual evidence emerges across vision layers. The resulting alignment trajectory is summarized using final image-text cosine similarity, late-layer top-k patch-text alignment, early-to-late gain, and layer-wise slope. These features are combined with pixel-statistic blank/noise detection, zero-shot domain routing, and structured VLM self-assessment in an ensemble. Across five VQA domains, three input conditions, and twelve VLM backbones, the best systems achieve approximately 94.6-94.7% three-class detection accuracy with mirage rates below 3%, while baseline mirage rates range from 21.7% to 66.6%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TC-LIA方法，通过探测CLIP视觉编码器中patch-token与问题嵌入的对齐轨迹，实现VLM在缺乏视觉证据时主动拒答（mirage检测），在多个VQA领域达到94.6-94.7%的三类检测准确率，mirage率低于3%。
AI.motivation: VLMs即使缺乏相关视觉证据也会产生自信但无根据的答案（mirage现象），尤其在医疗和文档VQA等关键领域，这种错误可能被误认为基于图像的证据。因此需要在生成回答前检测mirage，决定VLM是回答还是主动拒答。
AI.method: 提出Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment (TC-LIA)，一种模型无关的方法：在CLIP ViT-H/14视觉编码器各层提取patch token，投影到最终CLIP嵌入空间，计算与问题嵌入的相似度，追踪视觉证据是否在层间涌现。对齐轨迹通过最终图像-文本余弦相似度、后层top-k patch-text对齐、早-后层增益和层间斜率四个特征进行总结。结合像素统计的空白/噪声检测、零样本域路由和结构化VLM自评估，构成集成系统。
AI.result: 在5个VQA领域、3种输入条件和12个VLM主干上，最佳系统达到约94.6-94.7%的三类检测准确率，mirage率低于3%，而基线mirage率范围为21.7%-66.6%。
AI.conclusion: TC-LIA通过探测视觉编码器内部对齐轨迹，能够有效识别VLM是否缺乏回答所需视觉证据，在多种条件下实现高准确率的mirage检测，显著降低VLM产生无根据答案的风险。

title: French parsing enhanced with a word clustering method based on a syntactic lexicon
summary: This article evaluates the integration of data extracted from a French syntactic lexicon, the Lexicon-Grammar (Gross, 1994), into a probabilistic parser. We show that by applying clustering methods on verbs of the French Treebank (Abeillé et al., 2003), we obtain accurate performances on French with a parser based on a Probabilistic Context-Free Grammar (Petrov et al., 2006).

AI.tldr: 本文评估了将法语句法词典（Lexicon-Grammar）数据集成到概率解析器中的效果，通过对法语树库动词进行聚类分析，在基于概率上下文无关语法的解析器上取得了良好性能。
AI.motivation: 探索将结构化的句法词典（Lexicon-Grammar）数据与统计解析方法相结合的可能性，以提高法语解析的性能。
AI.method: 从Lexicon-Grammar句法词典中提取数据，对法语树库中的动词应用聚类方法，然后集成到基于概率上下文无关语法（PCFG）的解析器中。
AI.result: 集成方法在法语解析任务上取得了准确的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 将Lexicon-Grammar词典数据与概率解析器相结合是有效的，能够提升法语解析的准确性。

title: MOSAIC: Modular Orchestration for Structured Agentic Intelligence and Composition
summary: Automated data science is a structured model-selection problem. A solution must choose data transformations, feature representations, architecture, training procedure, evaluation protocol, and refinement strategy for a task. AutoML systems automate parts of this process, but typically search within predefined pipeline, model, and hyperparameter spaces. LLM-based agents offer greater flexibility through retrieval, code generation, and execution feedback, yet their modelling decisions are often unstructured, difficult to verify, and hard to reuse. We introduce \textsc{MOSAIC} (Modular Orchestration for Structured Agentic Intelligence and Composition), a structured agentic framework for memory-grounded model selection and workflow construction. Given a task and dataset, \textsc{MOSAIC} builds a semantic task profile, retrieves prior cases and source-code modules, and constructs a blueprint: an intermediate representation specifying selected modelling components, composition, interface constraints, and execution requirements. This blueprint turns model selection into a staged, context-grounded search and grounds LLM-based code generation in retrieved evidence rather than unconstrained synthesis. Candidate models are validated by execution and refined using diagnostic feedback, training traces, task metrics, and a failure-aware reinforcement learning policy. We instantiate \textsc{MOSAIC} on financial time-series forecasting and generation, where models must satisfy predictive accuracy, distributional fidelity, execution reliability, and downstream financial criteria such as risk and tail behaviour. Experiments against AutoML and agentic baselines show that \textsc{MOSAIC} improves task performance, execution success, and decision traceability, demonstrating the value of treating automated data science as structured, reusable, and execution-grounded model selection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOSAIC框架，将自动化数据科学建模转化为结构化的、基于记忆的模型选择过程，通过语义任务画像、案例检索和蓝图构建，结合执行反馈和强化学习策略，在金融时间序列任务上优于AutoML和基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有AutoML系统搜索空间受限，LLM智能体虽然灵活但建模决策缺乏结构化、难以验证和复用。需要一种兼顾结构化与灵活性的框架，将数据科学自动化视为可重用、可追溯、基于执行的模型选择过程。
AI.method: MOSAIC框架包含三个核心步骤：(1) 构建语义任务画像，检索历史案例和代码模块；(2) 生成蓝图（Blueprint）作为中间表示，指定建模组件、组合方式、接口约束和执行需求；(3) 通过执行验证和诊断反馈（训练轨迹、任务指标、失败案例等），结合强化学习策略进行精细化调优。
AI.result: 在金融时间序列预测和生成任务上，相比AutoML和基于LLM的基线方法，MOSAIC在任务性能、执行成功率和决策可追溯性方面均有显著提升，验证了结构化、可复用、基于执行的模型选择范式的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自动化数据科学应被视作结构化的模型选择问题，MOSAIC通过蓝图机制和检索增强的代码生成，在灵活性和结构化之间取得平衡，为构建可靠、可复用的AI系统提供了新思路。

title: Drift Q-Learning
summary: Offline reinforcement learning requires improving a policy from fixed data while avoiding out-of-distribution actions with unreliable value estimates. Diffusion and flow policies handle this trade-off by modeling the behavior distribution to regularize the RL objective, but they require iterative denoising, solver integrations, and in more efficient variants, distillation or other approximations at inference. We propose DriftQL, which combines a drift-based behavioral regularizer with critic-driven policy improvement. The value signal biases the policy toward high-value regions of the data support, while attraction and repulsion together keep generated actions near the data and prevent collapse onto a single mode. DriftQL is implemented as a single network with a unified training objective and generates actions in a single forward pass. On D4RL and OGBench, DriftQL consistently outperforms diffusion and flow methods, advancing the state of the art. Under degraded data quality, where the baselines visibly struggle, DriftQL remains close to its clean-data performance, positioning it as a promising alternative to diffusion and flow-based methods while maintaining the simplicity and efficiency of deterministic approaches. Project page: https://driftql.github.io/

AI.tldr: DriftQL 提出了一种基于漂移的行为正则化方法，结合评论驱动的策略改进，在离线强化学习中通过单次前向传播生成动作，在 D4RL 和 OGBench 上持续优于扩散和流方法，且对数据质量退化具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习方法（扩散策略、流策略）虽然能通过建模行为分布来正则化 RL 目标，但需要迭代去噪、求解器集成、蒸馏等复杂操作，推理效率低。本文旨在设计一种兼具扩散/流方法的正则化效果和确定性方法简单高效性的新方法。
AI.method: 提出了 DriftQL，核心包括：(1) 基于漂移的行为正则化器，结合吸引和排斥机制，使生成动作靠近数据分布且避免坍缩到单一模态；(2) 评论驱动的策略改进，通过价值信号将策略偏向数据支撑中的高价值区域；(3) 单网络结构，统一训练目标，推理仅需单次前向传播。
AI.result: 在 D4RL 和 OGBench 基准上，DriftQL 一致优于扩散和流方法，达到新 SOTA。在数据质量退化场景下，基线方法明显性能下降，而 DriftQL 仍保持接近干净数据下的性能。
AI.conclusion: DriftQL 在保持确定性方法简单高效的同时，实现了媲美甚至超越扩散/流方法的性能，特别是在数据质量退化时的鲁棒性使其成为离线 RL 中有前景的替代方案。

title: Physical Object Understanding with a Physically Controllable World Model
summary: A central challenge in visual intelligence is learning the physical structure of scenes from raw videos: how regions form objects and the laws that govern their interactions. Solving these tasks requires world models capable of inferring distributional states of the world from partial observations - capabilities that current architectures do not provide. We introduce a new class of probabilistic world models that support estimation of the probability of any visual variable, such as appearance and dynamics, conditioned on any other variables. Here, we identify that these models can be trained efficiently with autoregressive sequence modeling, yielding world models from which rich object understanding emerges. First, we demonstrate that our model captures the physical laws governing how objects move by generating multiple plausible future states of the world through sequential inference. Then, by analyzing motion correlations across these futures, we extract objects and articulated object subparts. Having discovered these objects, we show that our world model can manipulate them in 3D. Finally, we demonstrate how physical relationships between objects can be computed from the world model, enabling applications such as Visual Jenga.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一类新的概率世界模型，通过自回归序列建模高效训练，能够从原始视频中学习场景的物理结构（如物体形成、交互规律），支持基于任意视觉变量（外观、动态）的条件概率估计，并展示了物体发现、3D操作、物理关系计算（如Visual Jenga）等能力。
AI.motivation: 视觉智能的核心挑战是从原始视频中学习场景的物理结构（物体如何形成及其交互规律），现有架构无法从局部观测中推断世界的分布状态。
AI.method: 提出一类概率世界模型，支持基于任意视觉变量的条件概率估计，并通过自回归序列建模进行高效训练。
AI.result: 模型能够：（1）通过序列推理生成多个合理的未来状态，捕捉物体运动物理规律；（2）分析未来状态的运动相关性，提取物体和关节子部分；（3）在3D空间中操作发现的物体；（4）计算物体间的物理关系，应用于Visual Jenga。
AI.conclusion: 概率世界模型结合自回归序列建模可有效学习场景物理结构，实现物体发现、3D操作和物理关系推理。

title: LinguIUTics at PsyDefDetect: Iterative Imbalance-Aware Fine-tuning of Qwen3-8B for Psychological Defense Mechanism Classification
comment: Accepted at PsyDefDetect, a shared task at the 25th BioNLP Workshop (BioNLP 2026), co-located with ACL 2026 in San Diego, CA, USA
summary: Detecting psychological defense mechanisms in conversational text remains a challenging clinical NLP problem. For the PsyDefDetect 2026 shared task (nine-class utterance classification evaluated via macro F1), our team LinguIUTics achieves a macro F1-score of 0.3917 on the official positive-class leaderboard, ranking 4th out of 21 registered teams and improving over the Ministral-8B task baseline (31.48 macro F1) by 7.7 absolute points (24.4 percent relative). BERT-family encoders and zero-shot LLMs proved ineffective on rare classes due to severe class imbalance, leading us to QLoRA fine-tuning of Qwen3-8B. We leverage three key strategies: grouped stratified cross-validation (preventing leakage), minority-class round-robin lexical augmentation, and a post-processing pipeline with logit bias tuning and ensemble blending. Together, these components close much of the validation-to-leaderboard gap and substantially improve minority-class recall, driving the critical "Unclear" class (Level 8) from near-zero performance to an F1 score of 0.797.

AI.tldr: 本文针对心理防御机制检测这一临床NLP难题，通过QLoRA微调Qwen3-8B模型，结合分组分层交叉验证、少数类轮转词汇增强和后处理流水线（logit偏置调优+集成融合），在PsyDefDetect 2026共享任务中取得宏F1=0.3917，排名第4/21，相比Ministral-8B基线提升7.7个绝对点。
AI.motivation: 心理防御机制检测是临床NLP中的挑战性问题，现有BERT编码器和零样本LLM在稀有类别上因严重类别不平衡而效果不佳，亟需更有效的检测方法。
AI.method: 采用QLoRA微调Qwen3-8B作为基础模型，结合三种关键策略：1）分组分层交叉验证防止数据泄露；2）少数类轮转词汇增强缓解类别不平衡；3）后处理流水线包括logit偏置调优和集成融合。
AI.result: 宏F1分数达到0.3917，在21支注册队伍中排名第4，相比Ministral-8B基线（31.48宏F1）提升7.7个绝对点（相对提升24.4%）。"Unclear"类别（Level 8）从近乎零性能提升至F1=0.797。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的策略组合有效缩小了验证集到测试排行榜的差距，显著提升了少数类的召回率，证明了针对类别不平衡问题的系统工程方法在心理防御检测任务中的有效性。

title: LLM-Driven Co-Evolutionary Automated Heuristic Design for Bi-Component Coupled Combinatorial Optimization
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently shown promise in Automated Heuristic Design (AHD), existing methods typically generate and evolve heuristics as a single operator or search strategy, limiting their ability to model strong coupling among multiple decision substructures in problems such as the Traveling Thief Problem (TTP) and the Traveling Purchaser Problem (TPP). In this work, we propose CoEvo-AHD, an LLM-driven dual-population co-evolutionary framework for automated heuristic design in coupled combinatorial optimization. Unlike prior methods that evolve individual heuristics in isolation, CoEvo-AHD leverages LLMs to co-evolve two closely related operator populations. A cooperative evaluation mechanism explicitly captures interactions between route and selection operators, while pairwise scoring and synergistic joint crossover help discover complementary operator logic for joint improvement across coupled decision subspaces. We further design a tool-invocation environment library that encapsulates frequently used core operations, such as local-search delta computation, into callable functions, enabling LLM-generated operators to use standardized interfaces instead of reimplementing inefficient and error-prone problem-specific loops. Experiments on TTP and TPP show that CoEvo-AHD automatically discovers cooperative heuristic combinations and achieves competitive solution quality against traditional heuristics.

AI.tldr: 提出CoEvo-AHD，一种LLM驱动的双种群协同进化框架，用于耦合组合优化问题的自动启发式设计。通过LLM协同进化两个相关算子种群，配合协同评估机制和联合交叉算子，以及工具调用环境库，在TTP和TPP上取得有竞争力的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动启发式设计方法通常将启发式作为单一算子或搜索策略进行生成和进化，难以建模旅行窃贼问题(TTP)和旅行采购问题(TPP)等多决策子结构之间的强耦合关系。
AI.method: 提出CoEvo-AHD框架：(1) LLM驱动的双种群协同进化，同时进化路线算子和选择算子两个种群；(2) 协同评估机制显式捕获路线和选择算子之间的交互；(3) 成对评分与协同联合交叉算子发现互补算子逻辑；(4) 工具调用环境库封装常用核心操作（如局部搜索增量计算）为标准接口。
AI.result: 在TTP和TPP上的实验表明，CoEvo-AHD能够自动发现具有协同效应的启发式组合，并在解质量上与传统的启发式方法相比具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 双种群协同进化框架能够有效解决耦合组合优化问题中的多决策子结构耦合问题，工具调用环境库有助于生成更高效、更可靠的启发式算子。

title: GLENS: Global Search via Learning from Solver Iterates with Diffusion Models
summary: We consider the problem of generating a large collection of initial guesses for local minima of multimodal non-convex continuous optimization problems. The goal is for these initial guesses to be high-quality (i.e., a numerical solver converges quickly) and diverse (i.e., represent many different local minima). Identifying multiple locally optimal solutions enables flexible downstream decision-making, but typically requires expensive global search. Existing data-driven methods predict initial guesses using only the final converged optima from offline solver runs, which discards information about the local neighborhoods of solutions and limits the available training data. We propose GLENS (Global Search via Learning from Solver Iterates), a data-efficient global search method that leverages intermediate solver iterates as free data augmentation. GLENS consists of two components: a neighborhood structure model that uses diffusion models to learn the local geometry around optima conditioned on problem parameters, and a solver behavior model that learns refinement directions to further guide samples towards nearby optima during diffusion sampling. Experiments on modified non-convex benchmark problems and a two-robot obstacle-avoidance navigation problem show that GLENS generates high-quality initial guesses while preserving the multimodal distribution of diverse local optima. The resulting initial guesses lead to faster solver convergence across different problem settings and solvers. We also analyze how key hyperparameter choices affect the performance.

AI.tldr: 提出GLENS方法，利用求解器中间迭代数据训练扩散模型，为多模态非凸优化问题生成高质量且多样化的初始猜测，以加速局部最优点搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动方法仅利用最终收敛最优点预测初始猜测，忽略了局部邻域信息且训练数据有限；需要一种数据高效的方法来生成高质量且多样化的初始猜测，以支持下游决策。
AI.method: GLENS包含两个组件：1）邻域结构模型——使用扩散模型学习最优解附近关于问题参数的局部几何结构；2）求解器行为模型——学习精炼方向，在扩散采样过程中引导样本向邻近最优点靠近。核心思想是将求解器中间迭代作为免费数据增强。
AI.result: 在修改的非凸基准问题和双机器人避障导航问题上，GLENS生成的初始猜测质量高且保持多模态分布多样性，在不同问题场景和求解器设置下均能加速收敛。
AI.conclusion: GLENS通过利用求解器迭代数据，实现了数据高效的全局搜索，生成的初始猜测兼具高质量与多样性，是解决多模态非凸优化问题的有效方法。

title: Real-Time Physics Simulation with Dynamic Mesh-Gaussian Reconstructions
summary: Integrating dynamic 3D reconstructions into physics simulation requires fixed mesh topology for efficient collision detection, but state-of-the-art methods like DG-Mesh produce varying topology optimized for geometric quality. We investigate whether topology conversion can enable physics integration while preserving reconstruction fidelity. We propose a dual-representation framework combining fixed-topology meshes for physics with Gaussian splatting for rendering, achieving 4.65$\times$ speedup over varying-topology baselines through runtime vertex buffer updates. We evaluate two conversion strategies, temporal correspondence tracking and template-based projection, against native fixed-topology methods (MaGS) on the DG-Mesh dataset. Our evaluation reveals that both conversion approaches incur 65-80% geometric degradation, producing results inferior to MaGS despite DG-Mesh's superior initial quality. This demonstrates that high-quality reconstruction and physics-compatible topology represent fundamentally distinct objectives that cannot be reconciled through post-processing. Our findings inform future development of physics-aware reconstruction methods and our framework enables real-time simulation with any fixed-topology approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出双表征框架将变拓扑的DG-Mesh动态3D重建转换为固定拓扑用于物理仿真，尽管渲染方面有加速，但两种拓扑转换策略均导致65-80%的几何退化，证明高质量重建与物理兼容拓扑是根本不同的目标，无法通过后处理调和。
AI.motivation: 现有动态3D重建方法（如DG-Mesh）为追求几何质量产生变拓扑网格，但物理模拟需要固定拓扑以实现高效碰撞检测，两者之间存在矛盾。
AI.method: 提出双表征框架：固定拓扑网格负责物理模拟，3D高斯泼溅负责渲染；探索了两种拓扑转换策略——时间对应跟踪和模板投影。
AI.result: 双表征框架相比变拓扑基线获得4.65倍加速；但两种转换策略均导致65-80%的几何退化，效果不如原生固定拓扑方法MaGS。
AI.conclusion: 高质量重建与物理兼容拓扑是根本不同的目标，无法通过后处理转换来调和；未来应发展物理感知的重建方法。

title: FineVerify: Scaling Test-Time Compute with Fine-Grained Self-Verification for Agentic Search
summary: Agentic search requires language model agents to explore many sources and answer complex information-seeking questions. Scaling test-time compute is a promising way to improve these agents, but current approaches can fail, because correct answers are often sparse and score-based selection depends on model calibration. We propose FineVerify, a fine-grained self-verification framework that decomposes each question into checkable sub-questions, verifies sampled candidates against each sub-question, and selects the candidate with the highest aggregated score. This per-check structure turns selection into simpler local judgments and produces scores under the same explicit criteria. Across four agentic search benchmarks and two models, FineVerify consistently outperforms standard scaling baselines. With only four sampled trajectories, it improves GPT-5-mini by 8.2 accuracy points and Gemini-3-flash by 5.6% on average. With 12 samples, FineVerify enables GPT-5-mini to surpass frontier GPT-5 on BrowseComp-Plus. Beyond accuracy, FineVerify produces interpretable verification traces that help audit benchmark errors, suggesting broader applications for inspecting agentic search systems. Code and data are available at https://github.com/XuZhao0/fineverify

AI.tldr: 提出FineVerify框架，通过将问题分解为可核验的子问题，对候选答案进行细粒度自我验证，在多个智能搜索基准上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有智能搜索代理在测试时扩展计算时，因正确答案稀疏且基于分数的选择依赖模型校准而容易失败。
AI.method: FineVerify将问题分解为可核验的子问题，对每个采样候选答案进行逐子问题验证，聚合分数后选择得分最高的候选。
AI.result: 在4个基准和2个模型上一致优于基线；仅4个采样轨迹即提升GPT-5-mini平均8.2个准确点、Gemini-3-flash 5.6%；12个采样使GPT-5-mini在BrowseComp-Plus上超越GPT-5。
AI.conclusion: FineVerify不仅提升准确性，还生成可解释的验证轨迹用于审计基准错误，在智能搜索系统检测方面有更广泛的应用前景。

title: Latent Reward Steering: An Adaptive Inference-Time Framework that Implicitly Promotes Cognitive Behaviors in Reasoning LLMs
summary: Strong reasoning depends not only on model knowledge but also on how effectively cognitive behaviors are deployed during generation. Existing methods often rely on explicit behavior-level control, making them insufficiently adaptive when failures and required corrections vary across reasoning states, tasks, and models. To this end, we propose Latent Reward Steering (LRS), an adaptive inference-time framework that promotes cognitive behaviors by optimizing the sparse-autoencoder (SAE) latent states that implicitly carry them. Rather than relying on predefined cognitive behaviors or steering directions derived from them, LRS trains a latent reward model on reasoning traces by final answer correctness to estimate the quality of intermediate latent states. During inference, reward gradients provide state-specific correction directions for fragile latent states, while a reward and confidence gate restricts intervention to states the reward signal flags as fragile. Experiments on multiple reasoning LLM backbones and benchmarks show that \ours consistently improves performance over various baselines, and post-hoc analyses further indicate that \ours implicitly promotes good cognitive behaviors that fix the original reasoning errors. Code is available at: https://github.com/jiakanglee/Latent-Reward-Steering.

AI.tldr: 提出Latent Reward Steering (LRS)，一种通过优化稀疏自编码器隐状态来隐式促进推理过程中认知行为的自适应推理框架，在多个LLM和基准上表现优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖显式的行为级控制，无法适应不同推理状态、任务和模型下失败类型和所需修正的多样性。
AI.method: 在SAE潜在空间上训练奖励模型（基于最终答案正确性），推理时利用奖励梯度为脆弱隐状态提供修正方向，并通过奖励与置信度门控机制限制干预范围。
AI.result: 在多种推理LLM和基准上持续优于各类基线，后验分析表明LRS隐式促进了良好的认知行为并修正了原始推理错误。
AI.conclusion: LRS通过隐式调控SAE潜在状态来增强推理能力，避免了显式行为定义的限制，是一种更自适应、泛化性更强的推理时干预框架。

title: Reinforcement Learning with Pairwise Preferences in Long-Term Decision Problems
summary: Reinforcement learning problems typically define the goal as maximizing the expected value of a scalar reward function. But, pairwise preferences are often easier to specify than scalar rewards, and they express certain goals that scalar rewards cannot. Methods for reinforcement learning with pairwise preferences have thus received growing interest. Unfortunately, these methods are inefficient in problems with long time horizons, and they lack guarantees on the performance of Markov policies relative to history-dependent policies, which bridge the theory and practice of reinforcement learning. We therefore propose the \textit{Markov decision contest} as a new problem model for reinforcement learning with pairwise preferences. We prove that stationary Markov policies are optimal among all history-dependent policies, that solving a Markov decision contest exactly is in P, and that a simple iterative algorithm converges to an optimal policy at a sublinear rate. Lastly, in a set of high-dimensional decision problems with long time horizons, we show that our approximate algorithm is significantly more learning-efficient than prior work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"马尔可夫决策竞赛"（Markov decision contest）作为强化学习中用成对偏好替代标量奖励的新模型，证明平稳马尔可夫策略在历史依赖策略中最优、求解该问题属于P类复杂度，并提出一个亚线性收敛的迭代算法，在高维长时域问题中显著优于先前方法。
AI.motivation: 成对偏好比标量奖励更容易指定，且能表达标量奖励无法捕获的目标，但现有方法在长时域问题中效率低下，且缺乏马尔可夫策略相对于历史依赖策略的性能保证。
AI.method: 提出了马尔可夫决策竞赛（Markov decision contest）模型；从理论上证明平稳马尔可夫策略在历史依赖策略中的最优性；证明了该问题的精确求解属于P复杂度；设计了简单迭代算法并以亚线性速率收敛到最优策略。
AI.result: 理论上：平稳马尔可夫策略在历史依赖策略中是最优的；求解精确解属于P；迭代算法以亚线性速率收敛。实验上：在高维长时域决策问题中，近似算法相比先前工作显著提升了学习效率。
AI.conclusion: 马尔可夫决策竞赛为成对偏好强化学习提供了坚实的理论基础（最优性保证、计算复杂度可解）和高效的实用算法，弥补了理论和实践之间的鸿沟。

title: DarkVesselNet: Multi-Modal Remote Sensing and Trajectory Reasoning for Dark Vessel Detection
summary: Dark vessel detection requires fusing what vessels report through AIS with what satellites observe through radar and optical sensors. DarkVesselNet is a multi-modal remote sensing stack that combines Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 optical imagery, geospatial foundation model backbones, AIS trajectory reasoning, TGARD-style gap detection, and a Pi-DPM-inspired anomaly head. The repository exposes the system as a tested Python package and a public Hugging Face Space. The paper presents the sensor stack, backbone abstraction, fusion path, anomaly head, and current validation. The evidence currently available is software-grounded: tests for SAR speckle filtering, optical band ratios, Haversine distance, TGARD gap emission, sensor coregistration, backbone token shapes, and differentiable anomaly scoring.

AI.tldr: DarkVesselNet是一个多模态遥感系统，融合AIS数据与Sentinel-1 SAR及Sentinel-2光学影像，用于暗船检测。系统提供Python包和Hugging Face Space，当前验证基于软件层面的单元测试。
AI.motivation: 暗船（不报告AIS的船只）对海事安全构成威胁，需要融合AIS报告数据与卫星遥感观测（雷达+光学）来实现有效检测。
AI.method: 多模态融合架构：地理空间基础模型骨干 + Sentinel-1 SAR + Sentinel-2光学 + AIS轨迹推理 + TGARD间隙检测 + Pi-DPM异常检测头。系统以Python包和Hugging Face Space形式发布。
AI.result: 当前验证为软件层面的单元测试，涵盖SAR散斑滤波、光学波段比、Haversine距离、TGARD间隙发射、传感器配准、骨干token形状及可微异常评分。
AI.conclusion: 论文呈现了完整的传感器栈和融合路径设计，但当前仅完成软件功能验证，尚缺乏真实场景下的端到端检测性能评估。

title: OCC-RAG: Optimal Cognitive Core for Faithful Question Answering
summary: Recent progress in the development of language models has been defined by scale, with each generation absorbing more of the world's knowledge into its weights. However, many practical applications benefit more from robust reasoning than from extensive parametric knowledge. In this setting, task-specialized small language models (SLMs) offer a principled design choice. We introduce Optimal Cognitive Core (OCC), a family of SLMs built around this premise. As a variant of OCC, we present OCC-RAG, optimized for faithful question answering (QA) grounded in the provided context. This task directly aligns with the OCC design approach, requiring multi-hop reasoning over supplied passages while ignoring memorized knowledge. To train OCC-RAG, we implement a novel pipeline for synthesizing multi-context, multi-hop QA data at scale, producing a corpus of over three million examples targeting multi-hop reasoning, strict context faithfulness, and calibrated abstention. We release OCC-RAG-0.6B and OCC-RAG-1.7B, both mid-trained on this corpus. The models produce structured reasoning traces with source citations grounded in literal quotes from the context. Through OCC-RAG, we demonstrate that compact, task-specialized SLMs can match or exceed general-purpose models 2 -- 6x their size across multi-hop reasoning (HotpotQA, MuSiQue, TAT-QA), faithfulness (ConFiQA), and refusal (MuSiQue-Un) benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Optimal Cognitive Core (OCC) 系列小语言模型，其中 OCC-RAG 专为基于上下文的忠实问答而设计，通过合成超三百万多上下文多跳 QA 数据训练，在多项基准上以 0.6B 和 1.7B 参数匹配或超越大 2-6 倍的通用模型。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽不断扩展参数规模以吸收世界知识，但许多实际应用更需要稳健推理而非海量参数知识，因此任务专用的小语言模型成为更合理的设计选择。
AI.method: 提出 OCC-RAG 系列，采用新颖的数据合成流水线生成超三百万多上下文多跳 QA 样本，训练模型进行结构化推理轨迹生成，并基于上下文字面引用进行来源引用，同时实现严格上下文忠实性和校准拒答。
AI.result: OCC-RAG-0.6B 和 OCC-RAG-1.7B 在多跳推理（HotpotQA、MuSiQue、TAT-QA）、忠实性（ConFiQA）和拒答（MuSiQue-Un）基准上，以比通用模型小 2-6 倍的参数量匹配或超越其性能。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑且任务专用的小语言模型能够在特定推理任务中超越规模更大的通用模型，证明了通过针对性训练数据和架构设计可以弥补参数量的不足。

title: AI Sovereignty as National Learning Capacity: A Human-Centered Learning Mechanics Viewpoint on France, the United States, and China
summary: Artificial Intelligence is often discussed in France in terms of investment, compute capacity, regulation, employment, sovereignty, and education. These dimensions are usually treated separately. This viewpoint paper proposes a unified interpretation: France should be understood as a \emph{national AI learning system}. Building on Human-Centered Learning Mechanics (HCLM), recently formulated as a dynamical framework for entropy-regulated representation learning, we interpret national AI development as a controlled balance between information injection and entropy dissipation. Information injection corresponds to compute, data, talent, research, capital, industrial deployment, and institutional experimentation. Entropy dissipation corresponds to organizational complexity, coordination frictions, energy constraints, regulatory uncertainty, talent mobility pressures, and opportunities to strengthen industrial absorption. The central claim is that AI sovereignty does not emerge from scale alone but from a country's capacity to regulate its own information dynamics. This paper connects HCLM with neural scaling laws, endogenous growth theory, creative destruction, and game theory. It argues that the French AI debate should move beyond the binary opposition between techno-optimism and regulation-first caution. A competitive and human-centered AI strategy requires a controlled regime in which information injection grows faster than institutional dissipation, while avoiding unstable, unequal, or energy-intensive expansion. We provide a mathematical model, measurable policy indicators, game-theoretic propositions, illustrative simulations of national AI regimes, and concrete policy implications for France. The proposed viewpoint reframes AI policy as the governance of an open, strategic, non-equilibrium learning system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将法国视为一个"国家AI学习系统"，基于人类中心学习力学（HCLM）框架，将AI发展理解为信息注入与熵耗散之间的动态平衡，主张AI主权取决于国家调控自身信息动态的能力，并提供了数学模型和政策指标。
AI.motivation: 当前法国AI讨论将投资、算力、监管、就业、主权和教育等维度割裂处理，缺乏统合视角。作者希望突破技术乐观主义与监管优先的二元对立，为法国AI政策提供统一的理论框架。
AI.method: 基于人类中心学习力学（HCLM）框架，结合神经缩放定律、内生增长理论、创造性破坏和博弈论，构建数学模型、可测量政策指标、博弈论命题，并进行国家AI体制的仿真模拟。
AI.result: 提出了信息注入（算力、数据、人才、资本等）与熵耗散（组织复杂性、协调摩擦、能源约束、监管不确定性等）之间的平衡模型；证明AI主权不来自规模本身，而来自调控信息动态的能力；提供了具体政策指标和仿真结果。
AI.conclusion: 法国AI战略不应陷入技术乐观主义与监管优先的对立，而应追求信息注入增长快于制度耗散的可控体制，避免不稳定、不平等或高能耗的扩张。AI政策本质上是开放、战略、非均衡学习系统的治理。

title: How Much Orthogonalization Does Muon Need?
summary: Muon optimizers improve neural-network training by replacing ill-conditioned momentum updates with approximately semi-orthogonal updates. This motivates a practical question: how much orthogonalization does Muon actually require? We study this question using a relaxed cubic Newton--Schulz schedule derived directly for Muon's low precision singular value band. The resulting five-step cubic construction uses ten dominant matrix multiplications, compared with fifteen for five quintic Newton--Schulz iterations. The cubic schedule is not intended as a more accurate polar solver; instead, it is a principled low-cost variant that lets us probe the relation between polar accuracy, spectral shaping, and training quality. Across synthetic diagnostics, NanoGPT ablations, and training experiments on hybrid MoE/Mamba models, we find that training quality is not governed monotonically by polar-decomposition accuracy: truncated Polar Express, Muon-Jordan, cubic Newton--Schulz, and an explicit FP32 SVD polar factor can reach nearly indistinguishable final loss on GPT-2 Small, and cubic5 matches the Muon-Jordan quintic update within about $10^{-3}$ validation loss on hybrid MoE/Mamba models with one billion to four billion parameters. These results support cubic5 as a practical low-cost Muon orthogonalization variant, with empirical evidence of training-quality parity in the settings tested.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Muon优化器中正交化程度与训练质量的关系，提出了一种五步三次牛顿-舒尔茨调度（cubic5），该调度仅需10次矩阵乘法（相比五次五次牛顿-舒尔茨迭代的15次更高效），并在多种模型上验证了训练质量与极分解精度并非单调相关，cubic5可作为低成本的实用Muon正交化变体。
AI.motivation: Muon优化器通过近似半正交更新来改善神经网络训练，但具体需要多少正交化是一个未解决的问题。本文旨在通过设计低成本的极分解变体，探究正交化精度与训练质量之间的关系。
AI.method: 推导了一种针对Muon低精度奇异值带的松弛三次牛顿-舒尔茨调度，使用五次迭代（cubic5），仅需十次主导矩阵乘法；并与五次五次牛顿-舒尔茨迭代（15次矩阵乘法）、截断Polar Express、Muon-Jordan、FP32 SVD极分解等方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: 在合成诊断、NanoGPT消融实验以及混合MoE/Mamba模型（1B-4B参数）训练中，各种正交化方法（包括cubic5、截断Polar Express、Muon-Jordan、FP32 SVD）在GPT-2 Small上达到几乎无法区分的最终损失；cubic5与Muon-Jordan的五次更新在混合MoE/Mamba模型上的验证损失差异约为10^{-3}。
AI.conclusion: 训练质量并不由极分解精度单调决定；cubic5可作为低成本的Muon正交化实用变体，在测试条件下能达到与更精确正交化方法相当的训练质量。

title: GeoSAM-3D: Geodesic Prompt Propagation for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Segmentation from Monocular Video
summary: Open-vocabulary 3D scene segmentation usually assumes RGB-D video, calibrated multi-view imagery, or a reconstructed mesh. GeoSAM-3D studies a lighter setting: a user uploads a short monocular video, clicks or names an object in one frame, and receives a propagated 3D mask over a Gaussian scene. The implementation combines frozen image and video foundation models with a monocular 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstruction and a differentiable graph-geodesic propagation kernel over Gaussian centroids. The central design choice is to propagate prompts by heat-kernel distance on the reconstructed scene graph, rather than by Euclidean nearest neighbors in 3D. This preserves continuity around curved surfaces and reduces leakage across nearby but disconnected objects. This paper describes the repository state, the mathematical kernel implemented in geosam3d.propagate, the feature head trained from Segment Anything masks, and the validation already present in the codebase. The evaluation protocol separates implementation validation, graph propagation quality, leakage control, and interactive latency.

AI.tldr: GeoSAM-3D是一种基于单目视频的开放词汇3D场景分割方法，用户通过点击或命名物体即可获得传播的3D掩码，核心创新是使用热核距离在重建的场景图上进行传播而非欧氏距离。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇3D分割通常依赖RGB-D视频、多视角图像或重建网格，设置较重。作者希望探索更轻量的设定：仅需单目视频和用户一次标注即可实现3D分割传播。
AI.method: 结合冻结的图像和视频基础模型与单目3D高斯泼溅重建；核心设计是在重建的场景图上使用热核距离（heat-kernel distance）进行提示传播，而非3D欧氏最近邻；可微分的图-测地线传播核作用于高斯质心上。
AI.result: 通过热核距离传播保持曲面连续性，减少近邻但分离物体间的掩码泄漏；代码库中已集成Segment Anything掩码训练的特征头。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在更轻量的单目视频设定下实现了有效的3D开放词汇分割，图测地线传播策略优于传统欧氏传播，代码库包含了实现验证、传播质量、泄漏控制和交互延迟的评估协议。

title: EPIC: Efficient and Parallel Inference under CFG Constraints for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Controlling language model outputs is essential for ensuring structural validity, reliability, and downstream usability, and diffusion language models are no exception. Recent advances in diffusion language model decoding have extended output control beyond regular constraints to context-free grammar (CFG) constraints. Existing methods, however, can be up to four times slower than unconstrained decoding. More importantly, they substantially diminish one of the key advantages of diffusion language models over autoregressive models, namely parallel decoding. This slowdown arises because sequential validity checking introduces significant overhead during parallel generation. We propose an efficient CFG-constrained decoding framework, EPIC, that addresses this limitation. Our method improves decoding efficiency by combining lexing memoization, validation using Earley-style parsing instead of deterministic automata, and relaxed compatible subset selection for parallel commit. It reduces repeated lexing and validation overhead while allowing multiple compatible tokens to be committed together. Experiments on three benchmarks using four models show that our method reduces inference time by up to 67.5% and decreases the additional overhead by up to 90.5% compared with existing CFG-constrained decoding methods. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/hyundong98/EPIC-Decoding.git .

AI.tldr: 提出EPIC框架，通过词法分析记忆化、Earley解析和松弛兼容子集选择，在扩散语言模型中实现高效上下文无关文法约束解码，推理时间最多减少67.5%，额外开销最多降低90.5%。
AI.motivation: 现有CFG约束解码方法在扩散语言模型中比无约束解码慢最多4倍，且严重削弱了扩散模型并行解码的核心优势，因为顺序有效性检查带来了大量开销。
AI.method: 结合三种技术：1) 词法分析记忆化减少重复词法分析；2) 使用Earley解析替代确定性自动机进行验证；3) 松弛兼容子集选择允许在一次提交中并行提交多个兼容token。
AI.result: 在四个模型三个基准上，推理时间减少高达67.5%，额外开销降低高达90.5%。
AI.conclusion: EPIC框架有效恢复了扩散语言模型在CFG约束下的并行解码能力，大幅提升了解码效率。

title: SHARP: Sleep-based Hierarchical Accelerated Replay for Long Range Non-Stationary Temporal Pattern Recognition
summary: Learning long-range non-stationary temporal patterns remains a core challenge for modern sequence models, particularly in strict streaming settings. In these settings, data arrive sequentially and must be processed in a single pass without simultaneously revisiting past observations. Standard architectures, including recurrent neural networks and transformers, are constrained by either truncated backpropagation through time horizon or explicit input window length for long range credit assignment. To address these limitations, we propose SHARP (Sleep-based Hierarchical Accelerated Replay), a framework that decomposes temporal learning into two complementary components: a memory module that accumulates a structured history of past inputs, and a pattern-recognition module that operates over this memory. This separation enables resource- and compute-efficient adaptation to non-stationary dynamics by eliminating the need for backpropagation through time across many steps for long-range credit assignment. Inspired by the accelerated replay observed in rodents during slow-wave sleep, SHARP incorporates offline (sleep) phases in which temporally structured memory traces are replayed in an accelerated form and integrated into higher-level memory representations, improving long-range context retention. Through controlled simulations and ablation studies, we characterize the key properties of the proposed framework. In benchmark datasets such as text8 and PG-19, we demonstrate that SHARP improves over recurrent baselines by retaining next-token predictive performance on previously seen data while continuing to learn from the current stream and generalizing to future unseen data. These gains are enabled by its hierarchical structure, which yields an exponentially increasing effective temporal context with only linear-time computational cost.

AI.tldr: SHARP是一个受啮齿动物慢波睡眠期间加速回放启发的框架，通过将时间学习分解为记忆模块和模式识别模块，在流式设置中无需跨大量时间步反向传播即可实现长程非平稳时间模式学习，在text8和PG-19数据集上优于循环基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有序列模型（如RNN和Transformer）在严格流式设置中受限于截断BPTT时间窗或显式输入窗长度，难以高效地进行长程信用分配和处理非平稳动态。
AI.method: SHARP将时间学习分解为两个互补组件：1) 记忆模块，积累结构化历史输入；2) 模式识别模块，在此记忆上操作。引入离线"睡眠"阶段，将时间结构化的记忆痕迹以加速形式回放并整合到更高层次的记忆表示中。
AI.result: 在text8和PG-19基准数据集上，SHARP在保持对已见数据预测性能的同时，持续从当前流中学习并泛化到未来未见数据，优于循环基线方法。其层次结构实现了指数级增长的有效时间上下文，而计算成本仅为线性时间。
AI.conclusion: SHARP通过生物启发的睡眠回放机制和模块化分解，有效解决了流式设置中的长程非平稳时间模式学习问题，为未来序列模型设计提供了新思路。

title: CRMA: A Spectrally-Bounded Backbone for Modular Continual Fine-Tuning of LLMs
comment: 38 pages, 10 figures. Patent-pending construction details deferred to companion technical report (in preparation)
summary: Sequential fine-tuning of large language models forces a choice: let the shared substrate keep learning and accept catastrophic forgetting, or freeze it after task one and foreclose cross-task refinement. Per-task adapter methods (LoRAHub, AdapterFusion, PackNet, Progressive Networks) take the second path. We introduce CRMA (Constrained Residual Mixing Adapter), a residual adapter whose internal mixing matrix M is doubly-stochastic at every forward pass via Sinkhorn normalization, so by Birkhoff's theorem ||M||_2 <= 1 holds by construction -- a structural bound, not a penalty. CRMA's spectrally bounded backbone provides a continuously trained shared substrate that earlier modular methods could not, while preserving their forgetting guarantees. On Mistral-7B across 5 sequential domains and 3 seeds, modular per-task LoRA on a CRMA backbone reduces loss-relative drift from +42.96% +/- 5.5 (naive sequential fine-tuning) to -0.17% +/- 0.17, with disjoint per-seed ranges, and improves prior-task holdout loss by 1.99% +/- 0.54 over a matched frozen-substrate baseline. Three independent experimental setups (Mistral-7B 4-domain controlled ablation, TinyLlama 3-domain contamination-controlled replication, Mistral-7B cross-domain probes at 7B) all show positive backward transfer -- without replay buffers, without growing per-task memory, and without distillation. An inference-time ablation on Gemma-2-9B confirms CRMA mediates access to sequentially trained knowledge: 98/100 vs. 38/100 on the same weights and same questions with only CRMA injection toggled. 867 logged training steps verify ||M||_2 = 1.0 within float32 precision (max deviation 1.2 x 10^-7). The forgetting-prevention effect holds across 1.1B-9.2B parameters and four architecture families.

AI.tldr: 提出CRMA（约束残差混合适配器），通过Sinkhorn归一化确保适配器内混合矩阵M为双随机矩阵，从而在结构上约束谱范数||M||₂≤1。该方法允许共享主干持续训练而无灾难性遗忘，在Mistral-7B等模型上实现负漂移（-0.17%）和正向反向迁移，无需回放缓冲区或内存增长。
AI.motivation: 现有顺序微调面临两难：让共享主干持续学习会导致灾难性遗忘，冻结主干则阻碍跨任务优化。基于适配器的模块化方法（如LoRAHub等）选择了后一条路径，牺牲了跨任务精炼的可能。CRMA旨在同时实现主干持续训练和遗忘预防。
AI.method: 设计残差适配器CRMA，其内部混合矩阵M通过Sinkhorn归一化在每个前向传播中强制为双随机矩阵（行和列和均为1）。根据Birkhoff定理，这保证||M||₂≤1是一个结构性约束（而非惩罚项）。CRMA作为谱界约束的主干，允许共享基座在多个任务上持续训练。
AI.result: 在Mistral-7B 5域3种子实验中，CRMA将损失相对漂移从+42.96%降至-0.17%；先验任务保留损失比冻结基线提升1.99%。三个独立实验（含TinyLlama和Gemma-2-9B）均显示正向反向迁移。CRMA注入开关控制下，推理准确率98/100 vs 38/100。867步训练中||M||₂=1.0（偏差≤1.2×10⁻⁷）。效果覆盖1.1B-9.2B参数和4种架构。
AI.conclusion: CRMA通过结构化的谱约束解决了顺序微调中持续学习与遗忘预防的矛盾，实现了无需回放、内存增长或蒸馏的正向反向迁移，验证了受约束的残差混合是一种有效且高效的持续学习范式。

title: Optimizing 3D Gaussian Splatting via Point Cloud Upsampling
comment: Accepted in Journal of Computational Vision and Imaging Systems (JCVIS)
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is a technique for creating and rendering 3D scenes, however its performance depends heavily on the quality of initial seed points. To improve 3DGS initialization, this study presents and evaluates several point cloud upsampling approaches: linear interpolation, triangular interpolation, spline-based surface reconstruction, moving least squares surface fitting, and Voronoi-based point generation. Additionally, this research introduces a depth-guided point lifting method that leverages depth maps to maintain geometric consistency with Structure-from-Motion (SfM) reconstructions. Through extensive experiments on the Mip-NeRF360 and Replica datasets, the proposed methods demonstrate improvements in reconstruction quality across diverse scene types. Results indicate that different upsampling strategies excel in different scenarios: surface reconstruction methods perform better with organic, detailed scenes, while simpler interpolation approaches are more suited for scenes dominated by piecewise-smooth geometries. In comparison, the depth-guided approach shows promise for adding geometry-aware points across the entire scene, importantly in texture-less regions. These findings, which provide preliminary practical guidelines for selecting appropriate upsampling methods based on scene characteristics and computational constraints, advances the understanding of how point cloud initialization affects 3DGS quality.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多种点云上采样方法（线性插值、三角插值、样条曲面重建、移动最小二乘曲面拟合、Voronoi点生成）以及一种深度引导的点提升方法，用于改善3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的初始化质量。实验表明，不同上采样策略在不同场景下各有优劣：曲面重建方法适合有机、细节丰富的场景，简单插值适用于分段平滑几何场景，深度引导方法则能在纹理缺失区域有效添加几何感知点。
AI.motivation: 3DGS的性能高度依赖初始种子点的质量，因此需要探索更好的点云初始化方法来提升重建质量。
AI.method: 提出了五种点云上采样方法（线性插值、三角插值、样条曲面重建、移动最小二乘、Voronoi点生成）和一种深度引导点提升方法，在Mip-NeRF360和Replica数据集上进行实验评估。
AI.result: 不同上采样策略在不同场景中表现各异：曲面重建在有机、细节丰富的场景中更优；简单插值在分段平滑几何场景中更合适；深度引导方法在纹理缺失区域表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 研究为根据场景特征和计算约束选择合适的上采样方法提供了初步实践指南，增进了对点云初始化如何影响3DGS质量的理解。

title: WaveFilter: Enhancing the Long-Context Capability of Diffusion LLMs via Wavelet-Guided KV Cache Filtering
summary: Diffusion Large Language Models (DLMs) have demonstrated significant advantages across various tasks. However, constrained by their multi-step iterative inference mechanism, their computational overhead and inference latency in long-context tasks have become core bottlenecks restricting their large-scale deployment. When processing long sequences, existing Key-Value (KV) caching mechanisms often face a dilemma where generation quality degrades drastically, where the core challenge lies in precisely and efficiently filtering critical tokens within ultra-long contexts. Inspired by the human reading process, we propose \textbf{WaveFilter}, a universal and training-free caching framework. This framework innovatively introduces the wavelet transform for decomposition of long sequences to achieve precise identification of key tokens, based on which a sparse KV Cache is constructed to compute the final contextual representation. Experimental results demonstrate that WaveFilter, as a plug-and-play generic framework, significantly enhances the performance of existing mainstream KV Cache methods in complex long-context tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出WaveFilter，一种基于小波变换的无训练缓存框架，通过分解长序列精确定位关键token并构建稀疏KV缓存，从而提升长上下文任务中现有KV缓存方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型在长上下文任务中受限于多步迭代推理机制，计算开销和推理延迟成为核心瓶颈，现有KV缓存机制在处理长序列时生成质量严重下降，亟需高效的关键token过滤方法。
AI.method: 受人类阅读过程启发，提出WaveFilter框架，引入小波变换对长序列进行分解，精确识别关键token，并基于此构建稀疏KV缓存以计算最终上下文表示。
AI.result: WaveFilter作为即插即用的通用框架，显著提升了现有主流KV缓存方法在复杂长上下文任务中的性能。
AI.conclusion: WaveFilter是一种训练无关的通用框架，有效解决了扩散语言模型在长上下文场景中的效率与质量问题。

title: CoMIC: Collaborative Memory and Insights Circulation for Long-Horizon LLM Agents in Cloud-Edge Systems
summary: Deploying lightweight Large Language Model (LLM) agents on edge servers can reduce latency and move agentic services closer to users, but resource-constrained edge models often struggle with long-horizon tasks that require persistent memory, subgoal tracking, and reflection. Fine-tuning edge models after deployment is costly and difficult to scale across heterogeneous nodes, while purely local memory leaves agents with isolated experience and growing prompt context. We propose \textsc{CoMIC}, a parameter-update-free cloud-edge framework for Collaborative Memory and Insights Circulation. \textsc{CoMIC} follows a \textit{Centralized Reflection, Decentralized Execution} design: edge agents execute locally using subgoal-oriented hierarchical memory and selective re-expansion of relevant histories, while a cloud-side LLM critic asynchronously evaluates completed trajectories, filters reusable experience, and aggregates cross-agent guidance keyed by semantic subgoal identifiers. Across five long-horizon agent tasks spanning symbolic planning and text interaction, \textsc{CoMIC} improves progress rate and action grounding for weak edge agents and yields task-dependent success-rate gains without updating model parameters.

AI.tldr: CoMIC是一个无需参数更新的云-端协同框架，采用"中心化反思、去中心化执行"设计。端侧智能体通过子目标导向的分层记忆和选择性历史扩展执行任务，云端LLM异步评估轨迹、过滤可复用经验并聚合跨智能体指导。在五个长周期任务上，CoMIC提升了弱端侧智能体的进展率和动作基础，并取得任务相关的成功率提升。
AI.motivation: 轻量级LLM智能体部署在边缘服务器上可降低延迟，但资源受限的边缘模型在需要持久记忆、子目标追踪和反思的长周期任务中表现不佳。端侧模型微调成本高且难以跨异构节点扩展，纯本地记忆导致智能体经验孤立且提示上下文不断增长。
AI.method: CoMIC采用"中心化反思、去中心化执行"设计：1) 端侧智能体使用子目标导向的分层记忆和选择性相关历史扩展进行本地执行；2) 云端LLM评论器异步评估完成轨迹，过滤可复用经验；3) 按语义子目标标识符聚合跨智能体指导。
AI.result: 在五个涵盖符号规划与文本交互的长周期智能体任务上，CoMIC提升了弱端侧智能体的进展率和动作基础，在不更新模型参数的情况下取得了任务相关的成功率增益。
AI.conclusion: CoMIC通过无需参数更新的云-端协同机制，利用云端反思能力增强边缘智能体的长周期任务表现，避免了昂贵的模型微调，为资源受限场景下部署智能体提供了一种实用且可扩展的方案。

title: Detector-Evasive LLM Paraphrasing via Constrained Policy Optimization
summary: AI-text detectors are vulnerable to paraphrasing and detector-guided paraphrasing attacks, but existing detector-evasion methods often lack precise control over semantic preservation. In particular, optimizing directly for detector evasion can degrade fine-grained semantics, whereas scalarized reward designs provide only indirect, weight-sensitive control over the evasion-semantics trade-off. We address this limitation by formulating detector-evasive LLM paraphrasing as a Constrained Markov Decision Process, where detector evasion is the primary objective and semantic preservation is enforced as an explicit constraint. We propose Detector Evasion Policy Optimization (DEPO), a Lagrangian primal-dual reinforcement learning algorithm with a novel GRPO-style group-based policy update. DEPO adaptively balances semantic preservation and detector evasion during training, enabling the policy to improve attack success within a prescribed semantic-preservation region. Experiments on MAGE, M4, RAID, and peer-review datasets, evaluated against MAGE, RoBERTa, RADAR, Binoculars, and Fast-DetectGPT detectors, show that DEPO achieves strong detector evasion while precisely satisfying the semantic preservation constraint. DEPO also exhibits cross-domain, cross-detector, and prompt-level robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DEPO方法，将检测器规避的LLM改写建模为约束马尔可夫决策过程，使用拉格朗日原始-对偶强化学习算法在保证语义保留的前提下实现高效的检测器规避。
AI.motivation: 现有AI文本检测器规避方法在语义保留上缺乏精确控制：直接优化规避会损害细粒度语义，而标量化奖励设计仅提供间接、权重敏感的权衡控制。
AI.method: 将检测器规避的LLM改写形式化为约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP），以检测器规避为主目标、语义保留为显式约束；提出DEPO算法，采用拉格朗日原始-对偶强化学习结合GRPO风格的组基策略更新。
AI.result: 在MAGE、M4、RAID和同行评审数据集上，针对MAGE、RoBERTa、RADAR、Binoculars和Fast-DetectGPT检测器，DEPO在实现强检测器规避的同时精确满足语义保留约束，并展现出跨领域、跨检测器和提示级别鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DEPO通过约束优化范式有效平衡了检测器规避与语义保留，为生成对抗性文本提供了更可控、更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Beyond Static Gaussians: An Empirical Investigation of Architectural Paradigms for Dynamic 3D Scene Reconstruction
comment: Accepted in Journal of Computational Vision and Imaging Systems (JCVIS)
summary: Dynamic scene reconstruction via 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a compelling approach for representing evolving environments, yet understanding trade-offs between methodologies remains crucial. This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of dynamic 3DGS methods, categorizing them into two paradigms: structure-guided methods employing auxiliary representations (deformation fields, canonical spaces, grids) to model temporal changes, and gaussian-centric methods encoding dynamics directly into primitives via continuous functions or 4D representations. We evaluate representative methods from both paradigms on the D-NeRF benchmark. Our findings reveal that structure-guided methods achieve superior reconstruction fidelity and compact model sizes, while gaussian-centric approaches demonstrate significantly higher rendering speeds enabling real-time performance, though with greater quality variability and potentially substantial storage overhead. This analysis highlights a fundamental trade-off between reconstruction quality/compactness versus rendering speed, providing insights to guide future research and application development in dynamic scene reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了动态3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）方法的两种范式：结构引导方法（使用变形场、规范空间等辅助表示）和高斯中心方法（将动态直接编码到原语中）。在D-NeRF基准上评估发现，结构引导方法重建质量更高、模型更紧凑；高斯中心方法渲染速度更快、可实现实时性能，但质量波动大、存储开销高。两者存在质量/紧凑性与渲染速度之间的根本权衡。
AI.motivation: 动态场景重建中3DGS方法日益重要，但现有方法之间存在关键权衡尚不明确，缺乏系统性的比较分析来指导方法选择与未来研究。
AI.method: 将动态3DGS方法分为两类：(1) 结构引导方法——使用变形场、规范空间、网格等辅助表示建模时间变化；(2) 高斯中心方法——通过连续函数或4D表示将动态直接编码到高斯原语中。在D-NeRF基准上进行代表性方法评估。
AI.result: 结构引导方法在重建保真度和模型紧凑性上更优；高斯中心方法渲染速度显著更高，支持实时性能，但质量变异性大且存储开销可能很高。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了重建质量/模型紧凑性与渲染速度之间的根本权衡关系，为动态场景重建领域的未来研究和应用开发提供了指导性见解。

title: From Empathy to Personalized Empathy: Adapting Empathetic Strategies to Individual Users
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in long-term interactions with users, empathy has become an increasingly important capability. However, existing research overlooks the influence of users' personality traits on empathetic strategies during long-term interactions. To address this gap, we introduce the task of personalized empathy, which focuses on adapting empathetic strategies according to users' personalized characteristics derived from history. To study and enhance this capability, we construct PersonaEmp, a personalized empathy dataset built from long-term user-AI interactions, featuring rich user histories, persona information, and empathy-seeking queries. We further propose PereGRM, a reward modeling framework that combines the empathy evaluation structure with dynamic evaluation criteria generation for fine-grained reward modeling. Experimental results across different settings and multiple judge models show that PereGRM consistently achieves the strongest performance improvements, indicating its effectiveness for enhancing personalized empathetic capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出个性化共情任务，构建PersonaEmp数据集，并设计PereGRM奖励建模框架，通过动态评估标准实现个性化共情能力增强。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视用户人格特质对长期交互中共情策略的影响，缺乏个性化共情的研究。
AI.method: 构建PersonaEmp数据集（含用户历史、画像、共情查询），提出PereGRM框架，结合共情评估结构与动态评估标准生成。
AI.result: PereGRM在不同设置和多个评判模型下均取得最强的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: PereGRM能有效增强大模型的个性化共情能力。

title: FALAT: Tracing Failures in LLM Agent Trajectories via Dependency-Guided Search
summary:
LLM-based agents increasingly solve complex tasks through long trajectories involving reasoning steps, tool calls, and inter-agent communication. However, when these agents fail, it is often unclear which agent caused the failure and which step introduced the decisive error. This attribution problem is challenging because mistakes can propagate across the trajectory: later actions may appear incorrect, but only because they depend on an earlier corrupted state. Therefore, failure attribution cannot be treated as independent step-level classification.
  We propose FALAT, a diagnostic framework for failure attribution in LLM agent trajectories. FALAT frames attribution as a dependency-guided search problem. It first constructs an expectation of how the task should be solved and uses this expectation to identify suspicious regions in the trajectory. It then traces dependencies among decisions, tool outputs, and agent messages to distinguish error-introducing steps from steps that merely inherit or propagate prior mistakes. Finally, FALAT evaluates whether correcting a candidate step would be sufficient to recover the expected outcome, allowing it to identify both the responsible agent and the decisive failure step.
  We evaluate FALAT on the Who&When benchmark, which includes both algorithm-generated and hand-crafted multi-agent failure trajectories. The results show that FALAT consistently improves responsible-agent and decisive-step attribution. Its best configurations achieve 46.0% step-level accuracy on algorithm-generated trajectories and 29.1% on the more challenging hand-crafted trajectories, outperforming specialized attribution baselines and direct prompting with standalone LLMs. These findings suggest that dependency-aware reasoning is essential for reliable failure diagnosis in LLM agent systems.

AI.tldr: 提出FALAT框架，通过依赖引导的搜索、异常区域识别和因果验证，解决LLM智能体轨迹中错误归因问题，在Who&When基准上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在长轨迹中失败时，难以定位是哪个智能体、哪一步引入了决定性错误，因为错误会沿依赖链传播，不能简单做独立步骤分类。
AI.method: FALAT将归因构造为依赖引导的搜索问题：1) 构建任务期望解法；2) 识别轨迹中的可疑区域；3) 追踪决策、工具输出和消息间的依赖关系，区分错误引入与错误传播；4) 验证修正候选步骤是否能恢复期望结果。
AI.result: 在Who&When基准上，算法轨迹步骤级准确率46.0%，手工轨迹29.1%，优于专门归因基线和直接LLM提示方法。
AI.conclusion: 依赖感知的推理对LLM智能体系统的可靠故障诊断至关重要。

title: PR2: Predictive Routing Replay for MoE-Based LLM Reinforcement Learning
summary: Mixture of Experts (MoE) Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance at scale. However, reinforcement learning (RL) on MoE-based LLMs often suffers from training instability. A root cause is router drift, i.e., expert activations can change drastically across model updates and differ between disaggregated rollout and training phases, causing large rollout--training mismatch and unstable importance sampling weights in PPO-style RL algorithms. Routing replay mitigates this issue by freezing the replay route within each reasoning trajectory, but it ignores how the router evolves under off-policy updates and thus causes router staleness. To address this limitation, we propose Predictive Routing Replay (PR2), which augments each router with a lightweight evolution predictor that learns to anticipate short-horizon router evolution. During the rollout phase, we use the predictive routing distribution to apply top-$k$ routing, enabling gradients to reach experts that are likely to become active after updates. During the training phase, we replay the resulting predicted route to retain consistency for stable importance estimation. Theoretical analysis and experiments support that PR2 reduces routing-induced mismatch, improves RL stability, and yields stronger performance across various reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Predictive Routing Replay (PR2)，通过轻量级路由器演化预测器缓解MoE大模型在强化学习中的路由漂移问题，提升训练稳定性和性能。
AI.motivation: MoE大模型在强化学习中存在训练不稳定性，根源在于路由漂移（router drift）：专家激活在模型更新间剧烈变化，且解耦的rollout阶段与训练阶段之间存在路由不一致，导致PPO风格算法的importance sampling权重不稳定。
AI.method: 提出PR2方法：为每个路由器配备一个轻量级演化预测器，学习预测短时间内的路由器演化。在rollout阶段，使用预测的路由分布进行top-k路由，使梯度能够到达更新后可能激活的专家；在训练阶段，回放预测的路由以保持一致性。
AI.result: 理论分析和实验表明，PR2能减少路由引起的不匹配，提升RL训练稳定性，并在多种推理基准上获得更强的性能。
AI.conclusion: PR2通过主动预测路由器演化而非被动回放，有效解决了路由漂移问题，相比Routing Replay方法更优，为MoE+RL的训练稳定性提供了新思路。

title: An explainable hierarchical self attention-based approach for tremor detection in the time domain
summary: Tremor is a common movement disorder associated with conditions like Parkinson's disease and Essential tremor, traditionally diagnosed through expert clinician assessment. Current automated detection methods rely on frequency-domain features informed by clinical expertise. In this work, we present an explainable, two-stage hierarchical framework for tremor detection in the time domain that learns tremor patterns directly from 3D kinematic marker time-series data across entire tremor-provoking trials. Our framework combined a deep convolutional and long short-term memory network to learn tremor representations from short, discrete, non-overlapping time segments of kinematic time series data from trials, which are then processed by a vision transformer that models their long-term temporal dynamics of time segment features for trial (session) level classification. Evaluated across nine body parts, the framework achieved F1-scores of 0.594 - 0.947 depending on body parts (average: 0.765), falling short of the frequency-domain state-of-the-art performance (0.909) while requiring minimal preprocessing. Attention weights and gradient-based class activation maps (Grad-CAM) identified time-domain features of tremor across body parts. This proof of concept demonstrated the feasibility of data-driven time-domain modeling for tremor detection across anatomically diverse body parts, while reducing reliance on expert-engineered spectral features and providing posthoc interpretability of temporal and anatomical patterns of tremor.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的两阶段层次化时间域震颤检测框架，结合深度卷积-长短期记忆网络和视觉transformer，直接从3D运动学标记时间序列数据中学习震颤模式。在9个身体部位上评估，F1分数为0.594-0.947（平均0.765），虽不及频域最优方法（0.909），但减少了预处理需求并提供了可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化震颤检测方法依赖临床专家知识提取的频域特征，需要大量预处理和专家参与。作者希望开发一种直接从原始时间序列数据中学习、减少对专家工程特征依赖、同时具备可解释性的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 两阶段层次化框架：第一阶段使用深度卷积-长短期记忆网络（Conv-LSTM）从短时、离散、非重叠的时间段中学习震颤表示；第二阶段采用视觉transformer（ViT）对时间段特征的长时序动态建模，实现试验（会话）级分类。后处理使用注意力权重和Grad-CAM进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: 在9个身体部位上评估，F1分数范围为0.594-0.947，平均0.765，低于频域方法的0.909。但方法只需最小预处理，且通过注意力权重和Grad-CAM识别出了不同身体部位的时域震颤特征。
AI.conclusion: 该概念验证表明，数据驱动的时域建模方法在解剖学多样化的身体部位上进行震颤检测是可行的，减少了了对专家设计的谱特征的依赖，并提供了震颤时间和空间模式的事后可解释性。

title: I-WebGenBench : Evaluating Interactivity in LLM-Generated Scientific Web Applications
summary: Recent advances in visual language models have enabled autonomous agents for complex reasoning, tool use, and document understanding. However, existing document agents mainly transform papers into static artifacts such as summaries, webpages, or slides, which are insufficient for technical papers involving dynamic mechanisms and state transitions. In this work, we propose a Paper-to-Interactive-System Agent that converts research papers into executable interactive web systems. Given a PDF paper, the agent performs end-to-end processing without human intervention, including paper understanding, system modeling, and interactive webpage synthesis, enabling users to manipulate inputs and observe dynamic behaviors. To evaluate this task, we introduce a benchmark of 19 research papers paired with expert-built interactive systems as ground truth. We further propose PaperVoyager, a structured generation framework that explicitly models mechanisms and interaction logic during synthesis. Experiments show that PaperVoyager significantly improves the quality of generated interactive systems, offering a new paradigm for interactive scientific paper understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PaperVoyager，一种将研究论文自动转化为可交互网页系统的智能体框架，通过端到端处理实现论文理解、系统建模和交互页面合成，让用户能动态操作输入并观察系统行为。
AI.motivation: 现有文档智能体只能将论文转化为静态摘要、网页或幻灯片，无法呈现技术论文中的动态机制和状态转换，缺乏交互式理解手段。
AI.method: 提出Paper-to-Interactive-System Agent，端到端处理PDF论文；并构建PaperVoyager结构化生成框架，显式建模论文中的机制和交互逻辑，再合成可交互的网页系统。
AI.result: 在19篇研究论文的基准测试上，PaperVoyager相比基线方法显著提升了生成交互系统的质量。
AI.conclusion: PaperVoyager提供了一种交互式科学论文理解的新范式，证明结构化建模机制与交互逻辑能有效提升动态系统的生成质量。

title: Interaction-Centered Intelligence: Toward Interaction as the Primary Unit of Analysis in Co-Creative AI and Human-AI Systems
summary: Traditional artificial intelligence has largely conceptualized intelligence as isolated computation occurring within bounded agents. Across classical AI, machine learning, and many generative systems, the dominant unit of analysis remains the individual model or autonomous system evaluated through outputs, benchmarks, prediction accuracy, or optimization performance. While these approaches have produced major advances, they often under-theorize the role of interaction in the emergence of intelligence, creativity, meaning, and adaptive behavior. This paper proposes interaction as the primary unit of analysis for co-creative AI and interaction-centered intelligence more broadly. Drawing from distributed cognition, embodied cognition, enaction, participatory sense-making, human-computer interaction, and computational creativity, the paper traces a historical progression toward increasingly relational accounts of intelligence. Building upon prior work in Creative Sense-Making, quantified co-creation, and co-creative systems such as the Drawing Apprentice and AI Drawing Partner, it argues that intelligence emerges through evolving interaction dynamics among agents, environments, and socio-technical systems rather than solely through internal computation. The paper introduces Interaction-Centered Intelligence as a framework for understanding human-AI co-creation, collaborative emergence, adaptive participation, and interactional dynamics. Rather than evaluating intelligence solely through generated outputs, the framework emphasizes interaction trajectories, coordination patterns, participatory engagement, adaptive regulation, and interactional drift unfolding through time. Implications for explainable co-creative AI, hybrid intelligence, enactive AI, and future human-AI systems are discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文提出以交互（Interaction）作为共创AI和交互中心智能的基本分析单元，认为智能产生于动态交互过程中，而非孤立计算。通过回顾分布式认知、具身认知、参与式意义建构等理论，并结合Drawing Apprentice等共创系统实践，提出了“交互中心智能”框架，强调交互轨迹、协调模式、参与式调节等动态过程，而非仅关注输出结果。
AI.motivation: 传统AI（包括经典AI、机器学习和生成式系统）大多将智能视为有界智能体内部的孤立计算，忽视了交互在智能、创造力、意义生成和适应性行为涌现中的作用。
AI.method: 通过整合分布式认知、具身认知、生成认知、参与式意义建构、人机交互和计算创造力等多学科理论，梳理出朝向关系性智能的历史演进脉络；并在Creative Sense-Making、量化共创以及Drawing Apprentice和AI Drawing Partner等共创系统的实践基础上，提出Interaction-Centered Intelligence框架。
AI.result: 提出了以交互为中心的分析框架，核心关注点从输出结果转向交互轨迹、协调模式、参与式参与、适应性调节和交互漂移等随时间展开的动态过程。
AI.conclusion: 该框架对可解释共创AI、混合智能、生成式AI以及未来人机交互系统的发展具有重要启示意义。

title: Multi-Objective Reference-Aligned Machine Unlearning
comment: Accepted as a short paper at Canadian AI 2026. Author version with an added framework overview figure for clarity
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove the influence of specific training samples while preserving the model's utility. Existing single-objective approaches, such as gradient ascent or random relabeling, often induce catastrophic forgetting due to conflicting optimization dynamics and unbounded forgetting objectives that cause the model to drift from its pre-trained knowledge. We propose Reference-Aligned UnLearning (RAUL), a multi-objective framework that jointly optimizes forgetting and retention by replacing unbounded loss maximization with a bounded KL alignment of predictions on forgotten samples toward a reference distribution representing unseen data, instantiated either as a uniform distribution or an empirical distribution from a held-out reference set, which constrains the forgetting objective and reduces gradient conflict with retention. The resulting multi-objective optimization (MOO) problem is solved via Jacobian descent, which aggregates multiple gradients into a direction that does not conflict. Our results demonstrate that RAUL achieves the closest gap compared to full retraining.

AI.tldr: 提出RAUL框架，通过多目标优化和参考分布对齐来解决机器遗忘中的灾难性遗忘问题，实现接近完整重训的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有单目标遗忘方法（如梯度上升、随机重标）因优化冲突和无界遗忘目标导致灾难性遗忘，需要更稳定的遗忘框架。
AI.method: 提出RAUL：用有界KL散度将遗忘样本预测对齐到参考分布（均匀分布或保留集经验分布），通过雅可比下降求解多目标优化问题，聚合非冲突梯度方向。
AI.result: RAUL达到最接近完整重训的遗忘效果，优于现有单目标方法。
AI.conclusion: 有界对齐目标与多目标优化有效缓解了遗忘与保留的冲突，是机器遗忘的有效范式。

title: MUSCLE-NET: Predicted-Multiscale-Aware Network for Pedestrian Trajectory Forecasting
comment: This manuscript has been accepted to the IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems as a regular paper
summary: Accurate pedestrian trajectory prediction is essential for safe navigation in autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems. Despite substantial progress made by recent methods, most existing approaches are limited in fully exploiting diverse observations and often overlook the scale dependency of future motion, treating multiscale features uniformly regardless of underlying motion dynamics. This limits their robustness across diverse pedestrian behaviors. To address these challenges, we propose a Predicted-MUltiSCale-Aware Network (MUSCLE-NET) for Pedestrian Trajectory Forecasting that integrates complementary multimodal cues with scale-adaptive prediction mechanisms. The proposed framework is built upon a Multiscale Multimodal Feature Extraction (MMFE) module, which combines multiscale representation, modality-aware recalibration, and directional cross-modal fusion to construct semantically aligned representations from bounding boxes, velocities, and pose information. Building on these features, a Multiscale Enhanced Hierarchical Prediction (MEHP) module performs prediction-aware future-motion refinement via a probabilistic coarse predictor, scale-aligned fusion, and progressive refinement, adaptively selecting scale-relevant cues to mitigate spatial drift. Extensive experiments on the JAAD and PIE benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed MUSCLE-Net achieves competitive performance and consistent gains compared with state-of-the-art trajectory prediction methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多尺度多模态融合的行人轨迹预测网络MUSCLE-Net，通过MMFE模块融合边界框、速度和姿态信息，再经MEHP模块进行预测感知的尺度自适应细化，在JAAD和PIE数据集上取得先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分利用多模态观测，且忽略未来运动的尺度依赖性，对多样化行人行为的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出MUSCLE-Net，包含两个核心模块：1) MMFE模块，融合多尺度表示、模态感知重校准和方向性跨模态融合；2) MEHP模块，通过概率粗预测器、尺度对齐融合和渐进式细化实现预测感知的未来运动细化，自适应选择尺度相关线索以缓解空间漂移。
AI.result: 在JAAD和PIE基准数据集上，与SOTA方法相比取得了具有竞争力的性能和一致的提升。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度感知和多模态融合策略能有效提升行人轨迹预测的鲁棒性和准确性。

title: Internalize the Temperature: On-Policy Self-Distillation as Policy Reheater for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards improves the reasoning ability of large language models, but often suffers from entropy collapse, in which increasingly concentrated policies reduce rollout diversity and useful learning signals. Existing remedies either constrain the RL objective (e.g., entropy regularization) or adjust sampling temperature during rollout collection, but these interventions remain external to the model parameters. We propose Temperature-Scaled On-Policy Self-Distillation (TS-OPSD), a lightweight policy reheating method that internalizes the exploratory effect of temperature into model parameters. Starting from an entropy-collapsed RL checkpoint, TS-OPSD constructs a self-teacher by applying high-temperature scaling to the model's own logits, then distills the resulting smoother distribution back into the student. This policy reheating requires no external teacher, privileged data, or additional inference cost. Experiments on Qwen3-4B-Base and Qwen3-8B-Base show that policy reheating yields a stronger initialization for continued RL than both standard continued RL and rollout-level temperature reheating. Further analyses show that TS-OPSD mainly reduces output sharpness while preserving intermediate representations, top candidate sets, and reasoning capability. These results suggest that entropy restoration can serve as a simple post-collapse intervention for extending reasoning-oriented RL.

AI.tldr: 提出TS-OPSD方法，通过对熵坍缩后的RL检查点施加高温缩放并自蒸馏，实现策略"重新加热"，恢复探索多样性，提升推理能力，且无需额外推理成本。
AI.motivation: RL训练大语言模型推理能力时，策略趋于熵坍缩（entropy collapse），导致 rollout 多样性降低，有效学习信号减少。现有方法（如熵正则化、调整采样温度）均未内化到模型参数中，缺乏轻量级、参数级别的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出TS-OPSD（Temperature-Scaled On-Policy Self-Distillation）：在熵坍缩的RL检查点基础上，对模型自身logits施加高温缩放构造自教师（self-teacher），再将平滑后的分布蒸馏回学生模型，实现策略"重新加热"（policy reheating）。无需外部教师、特权数据或额外推理代价。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-4B-Base和Qwen3-8B-Base上实验，TS-OPSD作为继续RL的初始化优于标准继续RL和rollout级别温度加热；主要降低输出锐度（sharpness），而保留中间表示、top候选集和推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 熵恢复（entropy restoration）可以作为推理导向RL中一个简单有效的后坍缩干预手段。

title: NBQ: Next-Best-Question for Dynamic Profiling
summary: Many real-world conversational settings for knowledge discovery, including podcasts, hiring screens, and marketplaces, require a purpose-driven understanding of a person. We study the Next-Best-Question (NBQ) problem: at each turn, an interviewer should ask the question with the highest expected information gain given what has already been learned and the conversation goal. We propose NBQ, a plug-and-play framework that seeds a diverse pool of candidate questions, maintains a compact and continuously updated user state, adaptively selects the next question within a turn budget, and distills the resulting free-form dialogue into a structured vector-based user profile. As a demanding application, we instantiate NBQ for reciprocal matchmaking, where compatibility must be mutual and each person is modeled by both self-description and counterpart-preference representations. To support large-scale matching, we further introduce QuickMatch, an efficient retrieval layer that recasts reciprocal matching from quadratic pairwise scoring to approximate vector search. Experiments show that NBQ improves user profiling quality by up to 13.6% and 14.0% in AC@T and AR@T, respectively, while QuickMatch accelerates retrieval by up to 22.9x with recall up to 0.989.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NBQ框架，用于对话式知识发现中的下一最佳问题选择（NBQ）问题，并引入QuickMatch加速双向匹配检索。实验表明NBQ提升用户画像质量达13.6%-14.0%，QuickMatch加速检索22.9倍且召回率高达0.989。
AI.motivation: 现实中的对话式知识发现场景（如播客、招聘面试、市场匹配）需要针对特定目标进行对人的理解。现有方法缺乏在有限轮次内自适应选择最具信息增益问题的能力。
AI.method: 提出NBQ框架：1）种子候选问题池；2）紧凑且持续更新的用户状态表示；3）在轮次预算内自适应选择下一最佳问题；4）将自由对话蒸馏为结构化向量用户画像。针对双向匹配任务，进一步提出QuickMatch，将二次型成对匹配转化为近似向量检索。
AI.result: NBQ在用户画像质量上提升AC@T达13.6%、AR@T达14.0%；QuickMatch加速检索22.9倍，召回率高达0.989。
AI.conclusion: NBQ框架能有效提升对话式知识发现中的用户建模质量，QuickMatch则在保证高召回率的同时大幅加速双向匹配检索，具有良好的实用价值。

title: Dynamic Proxy-Mixing: Transferring Replay Controllers from Small to Large Models for Continual Instruction Tuning
summary: Continual instruction tuning updates a language model through a sequence of new domains, yet each update can progressively erode previously learned capabilities and alignment behavior. Replay is the standard mitigation, but fixed replay ratios are inherently limited because the optimal mixture varies with the current domain, the training stage, and the evolving vulnerability of prior behaviors. We propose PROX-YMIX, a framework that learns a dynamic replay controller on a small proxy model and transfers the frozen controller to a larger target. The controller never observes future tasks and constructs its state from normalized validation losses and their temporal dynamics, producing a masked mixture over the current task and accessible replay buffers. Our core empirical hypothesis is forgetting mirroring: task vulnerability rankings remain largely consistent across model scales even when absolute loss magnitudes differ. We validate this assumption empirically before transferring controllers across scales. On LLaMA-3-8B across five continual instruction tuning sequences, PROXYMIX improves average accuracy by 3.4 points, reduces final forgetting by 3.5 points, and raises safety score by 5.8 points over the strongest non-oracle baseline, at roughly 50x lower policy learning cost than Oracle Target RL. The framework is leakage free and architecture independent at the interface level, and we also identify settings where the proxy assumption breaks down, highlighting limitations for robust deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出PROXYMIX框架，通过在小型代理模型上学习动态回放控制器，再迁移到大型目标模型上，有效解决了持续指令微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，在LLaMA-3-8B上平均准确率提升3.4分，遗忘降低3.5分，安全评分提升5.8分。
AI.motivation: 持续指令微调中，固定回放比例无法适应不同领域、训练阶段和先前行为脆弱性的动态变化，导致灾难性遗忘问题难以有效缓解。
AI.method: 提出PROXYMIX框架：在小型代理模型上学习动态回放控制器，利用归一化验证损失及其时间动态构建状态，生成当前任务与回放缓冲区的掩码混合；基于"遗忘镜像"假设（任务脆弱性排名在不同模型规模下保持一致）将冻结的控制器迁移到大型目标模型。
AI.result: 在LLaMA-3-8B的五个持续指令微调序列上，平均准确率提升3.4分，最终遗忘降低3.5分，安全评分提升5.8分，策略学习成本仅为Oracle Target RL的约1/50。
AI.conclusion: PROXYMIX框架在无信息泄露、架构无关的前提下有效缓解了持续微调中的遗忘问题，同时指出了代理假设失效的边界情况，为鲁棒部署提供了重要见解。

title: CodeCytos: AI-assisted spatial molecular imaging analysis via code-augmented agent action space
summary: Conventional tissue image analysis software provides foundational capabilities for cellular analysis, including segmentation, basic morphological feature extraction, and spatial organization analysis. However, these tools often require manual intervention and are not well integrated with code-driven automation, limiting efficiency and scalability for complex spatial tissue studies. In addition, they offer limited flexibility for custom analyses, as they typically support only a fixed set of pre-implemented spatial cellular features. To address these limitations, we propose CodeCytos, a coding-based reasoning agent framework that enables dynamic, programmable interaction with spatial molecular imaging data to improve automation and customization. CodeCytos is designed to streamline the exploration of custom spatial cellular features and adapt to diverse research needs. We demonstrate its utility through case studies on four expert-curated datasets from distinct tissue types: frontal cortex, non-small-cell lung cancer, pancreas, and tonsil. We evaluate CodeCytos under a realistic minimal prompt setting, where bioscientists pose simple questions without task-specific instructions or contextual information about spatial cellular analysis, and benchmark multiple LLM backbones with strong coding capabilities. We further show that incorporating tailored, domain-agnostic few-shot in-context coding-reasoning examples (randomly sampled demonstrations outside the spatial analysis domain) can substantially improve performance without requiring costly, expert-crafted in-domain demonstrations. Overall, CodeCytos outperforms baseline approaches, highlighting the potential of code-action agents to assist with custom feature exploration in spatial molecular imaging and to accelerate biomarker discovery.

AI.tldr: 提出CodeCytos，一个基于编程的推理代理框架，通过动态可编程交互实现空间分子成像数据的自动化分析，在四个不同组织数据集上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统组织图像分析软件需人工干预、自动化程度低、灵活性差，仅支持固定预设的空间细胞特征，难以满足复杂空间组织研究的高效性和定制化需求。
AI.method: 构建CodeCytos编码推理代理框架，支持动态可编程交互；采用最小提示设置，结合领域无关的少样本上下文编程推理示例（随机采样非空间分析领域的示例），以提升性能。
AI.result: 在额叶皮层、非小细胞肺癌、胰腺和扁桃体四个专家精选数据集上，CodeCytos优于基线方法；领域无关的少样本示例能显著提升性能，无需昂贵的人工标注领域内示例。
AI.conclusion: 代码行动代理在空间分子成像中辅助自定义特征探索、加速生物标志物发现方面具有巨大潜力。

title: Not All Flips Are Conformity: Decomposing Stance Convergence in Multi-Agent LLM Debate
summary: Multi-agent debate (MAD) is a promising strategy for improving LLM reasoning, but when agents converge on a shared answer, it is unclear whether that convergence reflects genuine deliberation or social compliance. We show that the conventional answer flip rate conflates three distinct mechanisms: spontaneous instability, stance-induced conformity, and reasoning-induced persuasion. Our three-source decomposition framework isolates each through controlled counterfactual conditions. In the primary MMLU-Pro setting, 37% of agent-question observations change under self-reflection alone, while robustness tests show substantial model-dependent instability across GPQA-Diamond and three model families; strict conformity is 29% in the primary setting and remains predominantly harmful across model replications (57-77% correct-to-wrong). A controlled information-gradient experiment reveals that even vacuous reasoning is associated with 20-39% error adoption among resistant agents, with reasoning-like presentation carrying substantial persuasive weight. Harmful conformity can be predicted from Round 0 features (AUC = 0.79), and risk-targeted intervention reduces it by 13.6 percentage points (p < 0.001). However, without correctness labels or self-reflection controls, reducing peer adoption does not improve accuracy, because harmful and beneficial influence cannot be distinguished.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了多智能体辩论中答案收敛的三种机制：自发不稳定、立场从众和推理说服。研究发现，37%的观测存在自我反思不一致性，29%存在有害从众行为，即使是空洞推理也会导致20-39%的错误采纳。有害从众行为可通过Round 0特征预测(AUC=0.79)，针对性干预可降低13.6个百分点，但若无正确性标签，减少同伴采纳并不能提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 多智能体辩论中，当多个LLM代理收敛到相同答案时，无法区分这是真正的推理共识还是社会从众行为。现有指标（答案翻转率）混淆了三种不同的机制，因此需要分解这些机制来理解MAD的真实效果。
AI.method: 提出三源分解框架，通过受控反事实条件隔离三种机制：自发不稳定（自我反思）、立场从众（严格从众）和推理说服（信息梯度实验）。在MMLU-Pro、GPQA-Diamond和三种模型家族上进行测试，并构建预测模型和针对性干预策略。
AI.result: 1) 37%的观测在自我反思下发生改变；2) 严格从众率为29%，且57-77%是有害的（正确→错误）；3) 空洞推理导致20-39%的错误采纳；4) 有害从众可预测(AUC=0.79)；5) 针对性干预减少13.6个百分点有害从众，但无标签时无法提升准确率。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体辩论中的答案收敛很大程度源于从众行为而非真正的推理说服。没有正确性标签和适当的控制，无法区分有益与有害影响，减少同伴采纳本身并不能保证性能提升。

title: Mitigating Hallucinations in Large Language Models Via Decoder Layer Skipping
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance across diverse natural language tasks, yet their outputs often suffer from hallucinations -- content that is misaligned with factual information. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive layer-wise analysis of the decoding process and reveal that hallucinations tend to originate from deeper decoder layers. To address this issue, we introduce \textbf{DeLask} (\textbf{De}coder \textbf{La}yer \textbf{Sk}ipping), a novel decoding framework that dynamically skips layers prone to producing hallucinations. DeLask leverages the theoretical insight that the forward computation of an $L$-layer Transformer is conditionally equivalent to $L$ steps of gradient descent. We define a \emph{driftance value} by computing the cosine similarity between gradients derived from consecutive decoder steps, identifying problematic layers when the descent direction reverses. Rather than discarding such layers entirely, DeLask partially aggregates their hidden states with preceding layers, thereby preserving consistency while suppressing erroneous signals. Extensive experiments across diverse LLMs and benchmarks demonstrate that DeLask consistently mitigates hallucinations and enhances overall reliability, providing a lightweight and generalizable decoding framework for improving the robustness of large-scale language models.

AI.tldr: DeLask是一种通过动态跳过易产生幻觉的深层解码层来减轻大语言模型幻觉的轻量级解码框架。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在推理时经常产生幻觉（即与事实不符的内容），现有方法缺乏对解码过程逐层分析，需要一种有效且通用的方法来定位和抑制幻觉产生的根源。
AI.method: 首先通过逐层分析发现幻觉主要来自深层解码器层；然后基于L层Transformer前向计算等价于L步梯度下降的理论，定义漂移值（driftance value）计算相邻解码步梯度的余弦相似度来识别下降方向反转的问题层；最后对这些层采用部分聚合前层隐藏状态的方式，而非完全丢弃。
AI.result: 在多种LLM和基准测试上的广泛实验表明，DeLask能够持续减轻幻觉，提升模型输出的整体可靠性。
AI.conclusion: DeLask提供了一种轻量级、可泛化的解码框架，有效提升了大规模语言模型的鲁棒性。

title: Auditing Near-Optimal Policies Can Be Exponentially Hard: Conditional Query Lower Bounds via Occupancy Rashomon Capacity
summary: When many reinforcement-learning policies achieve near-optimal return, a post-hoc auditor may have to distinguish among many behaviorally distinct but return-equivalent policies. We formalize this phenomenon through an occupancy-measure analogue of Rashomon capacity: the metric entropy of the near-optimal occupancy region, computed relative to an audited deployment class. Because occupancy measures identify behavior only up to occupancy equivalence, we formulate auditing at the occupancy-class level and distinguish exact local-query oracles from noisy sample-query oracles. Our main exact-query result is conditional: if the audited class contains a $2/H$-separated near-optimal packing whose local signatures are $b$-sparse, then exact local-query auditing requires $Ω(M/b)$ queries; when the packing realizes deployment-class capacity and $b=O(1)$, this becomes $Ω(2^{\Hopt^\cF(\eps)})$. We give a finite discounted hidden-branch MDP attaining this bound and show the exact Bayes success law. For noisy hidden-trigger testing, we prove a mixture lower bound of order $M/β$, where $β$ is the per-sample KL signal, yielding $Ω(2^{\Hopt^\cF(\eps)}/(ρ^2Δ^2))$ for capacity-order packings with $β=O(ρ^2Δ^2)$. We also provide a static target-recognition information lower bound, a transcript-compatible oracle-cover verification upper bound, and a canonical occupancy regularizer whose regularized audited capacity collapses when a trusted reference occupancy is available. Controlled benchmarks distinguish positive sparse-signature instances from high-capacity negative controls where exact auditing is easy, and map the noisy-trigger law to post-processed continuous-control and visual-RL auditing regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文形式化了强化学习中"行为多样但回报等价"策略的审计困难问题，通过占用测度的Rashomon容量（度量熵）来刻画近优占用区域的结构复杂度，并分别研究了精确查询和噪声查询两种审计场景下的样本复杂度下界。
AI.motivation: 在强化学习中，许多策略能达到接近最优的回报，但行为上却存在显著差异。事后审计者需要从这些回报等价但行为各异的策略中区分出目标策略，这一问题的理论基础尚不清晰。
AI.method: 论文使用占用测度的Rashomon容量（度量熵）来形式化近优占用区域的复杂性，提出在占用类层面进行审计，区分精确局部查询与噪声样本查询两种设置，并给出了相应的查询复杂度下界证明。
AI.result: 精确查询场景下证明了Ω(M/b)的下界（b为局部签名稀疏度），噪声查询场景下证明了M/β的混合下界（β为每样本KL信号），并构建了有限折扣隐藏分支MDP达到该边界，同时还提供了静态目标识别信息下界、转录兼容的覆盖验证上界和正则化审计容量坍塌结果。
AI.conclusion: 论文系统建立了RL策略审计的统计复杂度理论，揭示了稀疏签名实例与高容量负控制实例之间的根本区别，并展示了噪声触发律在连续控制和视觉RL审计中的适用性。

title: 3D Segment Anything Model with Visual Mamba for Diagnosing Placenta Accreta Spectrum
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP2026). More modifications may be performed
summary: Placenta Accreta Spectrum (PAS) is a rare but highly dangerous obstetric disease. Early and accurate PAS diagnosis is critical for maternal health.
