Existing mitigations either require costly retraining, infeasible for the closed-source backbones that dominate consumer products, or rely on fixed demographic templates that ignore cultural context. We present KG-FairDiff, a model-agnostic, inference-time framework that formalises fairness-aware prompt refinement as a constrained optimisation problem and operationalises it as a closed-loop pipeline: a knowledge graph of ~1,200 culture- and bias-related triples retrieves structured context, an LLM rewriter proposes refinements, and a validator accepts only prompts that reduce a divergence-based fairness loss while preserving semantic fidelity to the user's original intent. We prove a finite-termination bound for the refinement loop, contribute a mathematically consistent evaluation suite linking Bias-P/Bias-W to divergence from target distributions and ENS to KL divergence, and audit eight widely-deployed backbone generators. KG-FairDiff substantially reduces gender, race, age, and intersectional disparities while preserving prompt semantics, offering a practical, deployment-ready route to more equitable generative AI.

AI.tldr: 提出KG-FairDiff，一个模型无关、推理时的公平性框架，通过知识图谱引导的提示词优化循环，在不重新训练模型的前提下减少文本到图像系统中的群体偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有TTI系统在部署规模上对人口统计和文化群体造成系统性伤害，而现有缓解方法要么需要昂贵的重新训练（对闭源模型不可行），要么依赖忽略文化语境的固定模板。
AI.method: 将公平感知的提示词优化形式化为约束优化问题，通过包含约1200个文化与偏见三元组的知识图谱获取结构化上下文，LLM重写器生成改进提示，验证器基于散度公平损失和语义保真度筛选，形成闭环流水线。
AI.result: 显著减少了性别、种族、年龄和交叉性差异，同时保持了提示语义，并证明了优化循环的有限终止界，建立了与KL散度等相一致的数学评估套件。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一种实用、可部署的路径，使生成式AI在无需修改底层模型的情况下更加公平。

title: Scaling Agentic Capabilities via Grounded Interaction Synthesis
summary: General agentic intelligence hinges on the ability to interact with diverse real-world tools to complete complex tasks, a capability fundamentally tied to the quality of interaction data. To bypass the prohibitive costs of human annotation, prevailing paradigms depend entirely on Large Language Models (LLMs) to scale the synthesis of agentic environments and tasks. However, such unconstrained generation often degenerates into biased random sampling of LLMs' internal priors, failing to capture the diversity and difficulty of real-world domains or construct high-fidelity, long-horizon tasks. In this work, we introduce Grounded Agentic Interaction Synthesis (GAIS), a framework that automates the scalable construction of diverse environments and complex tasks via a two-phase grounding mechanism. Specifically, we construct protocol-anchored environments derived from real-world Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to ensure functional diversity and difficulty. Subsequently, we employ structure-guided planning to navigate these environments, actively enforcing logical dependencies and adversarial policies to generate complex tasks. Experiments on BFCL, $τ^2$-Bench, and ACEBench demonstrate that GAIS-synthesized data significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, enabling base models to match or even surpass their official instruction-tuned counterparts. Furthermore, GAIS exhibits superior data efficiency and scalability, achieving exceptional capabilities with significantly less data while maintaining continuous growth where baselines stagnate. Our code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/Eric8932/GAIS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GAIS框架，通过两阶段接地机制（协议锚定环境+结构引导规划）自动合成高质量的智能体交互数据，显著提升了模型在BFCL、τ²-Bench和ACEBench上的表现，数据效率和可扩展性均优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有依赖LLM合成智能体数据的方法存在有偏随机采样问题，无法捕捉真实世界的多样性和难度，也难以构建高保真、长程任务。人工标注成本又过高，因此需要自动化、可扩展的高质量数据合成方法。
AI.method: 两阶段接地机制：(1) 协议锚定环境——基于真实世界的模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器构建环境，确保功能多样性和难度；(2) 结构引导规划——在环境中主动施加逻辑依赖和对抗策略，生成复杂任务。
AI.result: 在BFCL、τ²-Bench和ACEBench上，GAIS合成数据显著优于SOTA基线；基础模型使用GAIS数据后性能匹配甚至超越官方指令微调版本；GAIS数据效率更高，用更少数据实现卓越性能，且持续增长而基线停滞。
AI.conclusion: GAIS通过接地机制有效解决了数据合成中的偏差问题，为智能体系统提供了高质量、可扩展的训练数据来源，展示了在真实世界工具交互场景中的巨大潜力。

title: Learning When Not to Act: Mitigating Tool Abuse in Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Agentic reinforcement learning can induce tool abuse, where models overuse external tools even for queries solvable by internal reasoning. Existing approaches mitigate this issue with uniform tool-use penalties or hard limits, which reduce tool frequency but may also suppress useful tool-assisted exploration. We propose EAPO, an Efficient Agentic Policy Optimization framework that learns selective tool use. EAPO introduces tool-free trajectories into each rollout group, applies difficulty-aware reward shaping to penalize redundant tool calls mainly on easier queries, and uses confidence-aware token reweighting to improve policy learning. Across nine mathematical and knowledge-intensive reasoning benchmarks, EAPO consistently improves the accuracy efficiency trade-off on Qwen2.5-3B, Qwen2.5-7B, and Llama3.1-8B. Compared with GRPO, EAPO improves average performance by 10.45%, 7.27%, and 9.69%, while reducing average tool calls by 18.33%, 18.33%, and 24.59%, respectively. These results show that agents can learn when not to use tools without compromising tool-integrated reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出EAPO框架，通过引入无工具轨迹、难度感知奖励塑造和置信度感知token重加权，让智能体学会选择性使用工具，在提升推理性能的同时显著减少不必要的工具调用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过统一惩罚或硬限制来抑制工具滥用，但可能抑制有用的工具辅助探索，需要一种能学习选择性使用工具的方案。
AI.method: EAPO框架包含三个关键组件：1）在每个rollout组中引入无工具轨迹；2）难度感知奖励塑造，对简单问题上的冗余工具调用施加惩罚；3）置信度感知token重加权以改进策略学习。
AI.result: 在9个数学和知识密集型推理基准上，相比GRPO，Qwen2.5-3B/7B和Llama3.1-8B平均性能提升10.45%/7.27%/9.69%，工具调用减少18.33%/18.33%/24.59%。
AI.conclusion: 智能体可以在不牺牲工具集成推理能力的前提下，学会何时不使用工具，实现准确率与效率的更好权衡。

title: Soft-NBCE: Entropy-Weighted Chunk Fusion for Long-Context
summary:
The quadratic complexity of self-attention remains a bottleneck for Large Language Models (LLMs) processing ultra-long contexts. The Naive Bayes Cognitive Engine (NBCE) parallelizes long-context inference by chunking documents and routing to the lowest-entropy chunk at each decoding step. This hard-selection strategy causes semantic fragmentation during cross-chunk reasoning, as abrupt routing changes between adjacent tokens disrupt the model's contextual grounding.
  We present Soft-NBCE, a lightweight extension that replaces discrete chunk selection with soft entropy-weighted chunk fusion. A temperature-scaled Softmax over predictive entropies assigns continuous weights to all chunks, enabling log-space aggregation across chunk-conditioned distributions. To partially compensate for the conditional independence assumption introduced by chunking, we propose Consistency Distillation, a LoRA-based self-distillation that constrains the chunked logit distribution toward a full-context teacher via KL-divergence. On LongBench multi-hop benchmarks, Soft-NBCE with Consistency Distillation improves consistently over NBCE-style baselines (MuSiQue F1: 0.310 vs.\ 0.275 for Vanilla NBCE; HotpotQA F1: 0.479 vs.\ 0.427) while maintaining retrieval accuracy (NIAH-32K: 0.909) at O(L^2/n) peak memory.

AI.tldr: Soft-NBCE 通过软熵加权融合替代硬选择，结合一致性蒸馏训练，在保持低内存开销的同时提升了长上下文推理中的跨块语义连贯性。
AI.motivation: 解决 NBCE 硬选择策略导致的语义碎片化问题——相邻 token 间路由突变会破坏模型的上下文基础，阻碍跨块推理。
AI.method: 1) 用温度缩放的 Softmax 对块预测熵做软加权融合（Soft-NBCE）；2) LoRA 自蒸馏（Consistency Distillation）约束块级分布逼近全上下文教师分布，补偿条件独立性假设。
AI.result: LongBench 多跳推理：MuSiQue F1 0.310 vs 0.275；HotpotQA F1 0.479 vs 0.427；NIAH-32K 检索准确率 0.909；显存复杂度 O(L²/n)。
AI.conclusion: 软加权融合+蒸馏能有效缓解硬选择的语义断裂，是轻量级、可落地的长上下文推理改进方案。

title: Knowledge-Intensive Video Generation
summary: Text-to-video generation has advanced rapidly in visual quality, but remains under-evaluated for factuality and practical usefulness. We introduce knowledge-intensive video generation (KIVI), where models generate videos from short information-seeking prompts that ask for explanations, procedures, or demonstrations. To evaluate this setting, we construct KIVI-Bench, a benchmark of 1,080 prompts, and propose automatic metrics for factuality and helpfulness. Human evaluation shows that our metrics significantly better align with human annotations than existing alternatives. Experiments on seven state-of-the-art video generation models show that current systems still lag behind human performance, especially on visual properties, procedural operations, and clear information presentation. These results highlight KIVI as a challenging direction for factual and instructionally useful video generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出知识密集型视频生成（KIVI）任务，要求模型根据简短信息查询生成事实准确且实用的视频。构建了包含1080个提示的KIVI-Bench基准，并提出评估事实性和有用性的自动指标。实验表明现有模型在视觉属性、操作流程和信息呈现方面仍远落后于人类表现。
AI.motivation: 当前文生视频模型在视觉质量上进步显著，但对生成内容的事实性和实际有用性的评估严重不足，缺乏系统性的评测基准。
AI.method: 提出KIVI任务设定（模型需根据解释、流程或演示类查询生成视频）；构建KIVI-Bench基准（1080个提示）；设计面向事实性和有用性的自动评估指标，并通过人类评估验证其有效性。
AI.result: 提出的自动指标与人类标注的一致性显著优于现有替代方案；评估7个SOTA模型发现，当前系统在视觉属性、操作流程、信息清晰呈现三个维度上远不及人类水平。
AI.conclusion: KIVI揭示了文生视频在事实性和指导性实用价值方面极具挑战性的方向，现有模型在此任务上仍有巨大提升空间。

title: Machine Learning for Coding Retail Product Names to Consumer-Price Categories: A Rule-plus-Bag-of-Words Pipeline with Reliability-Weighted Human-in-the-Loop Labeling
comment: 11 pages, 3 tables. Methodology paper; illustrative experiments only, no proprietary data
summary: Consumer-price measurement increasingly draws on alternative data sources -- scanner, web-scraped, and transaction/receipt data. A recurring obstacle is that product descriptions in such sources are short, noisy, and abbreviated, with no standard product code, so each item must first be mapped to a consumption classification (e.g., the UN COICOP scheme) before prices can be compared. This paper studies that mapping as a general, reproducible method. The pipeline is: (i) text normalization and tokenization of noisy item names; (ii) a prefix-tree (trie) rule-based pre-classifier driven by per-category key-phrases and stop-phrases; and (iii) a per-category binary confirmation model deciding whether an item belongs to a tentatively assigned category. For labels at scale we use a human-in-the-loop protocol in which annotators give a binary valid/reject judgment, aggregated by a dynamically updated reliability weight; the model joins the same rule, enabling continual fine-tuning. Our empirical finding is deflationary: in a controlled, leakage-free study (one category, real positives vs. hard negatives, five seeds), bag-of-words models essentially saturate the task (F1 about 0.99) -- a linear classifier matches a multilayer perceptron, explicit word-order (n-gram) features add nothing, and about 67 labeled examples already suffice. A Monte-Carlo study of the labeling protocol shows the reliability-weighted vote barely beats plain majority (its additive weights saturate) while Dawid-Skene recovers labels markedly better. We also discuss price-level quality control and design lessons for statistical offices considering transaction data. All figures are illustrative; no confidential data, code, or documentation is reproduced.

AI.tldr: 本文研究将嘈杂、简短的产品名称映射到消费分类体系（如COICOP）的通用可复现方法，使用前缀树规则预分类+二元确认模型流水线。经验发现令人"通缩"：词袋模型在该任务上几乎饱和（F1≈0.99），约67个标注样本即足够，线性分类器与多层感知机表现相当，词序特征无增益。标注协议方面，可靠性加权投票几乎不优于简单多数投票，而Dawid-Skene方法显著更优。
AI.motivation: 消费价格测量越来越多使用扫描仪、网页抓取和交易/收据数据等替代数据源，但这些来源中产品描述简短、嘈杂、缩略，缺乏标准产品代码，需要将每个项目映射到消费分类体系（如UN COICOP）后才能进行价格比较。这是一个普遍存在的障碍，亟需一种通用可复现的映射方法。
AI.method: 提出三阶段流水线：(i)对嘈杂商品名称进行文本归一化和分词；(ii)基于前缀树（trie）的规则预分类器，利用每类关键词和停用词；(iii)每类二元确认模型，判断商品是否属于暂定类别。使用人在回路标注协议，标注者给出二元有效/拒绝判断，通过动态更新可靠性权重聚合；模型可加入相同规则进行持续微调。
AI.result: 经验发现：在受控无泄漏研究中，词袋模型F1约0.99已达到任务饱和；线性分类器与多层感知机表现相当；显式词序（n-gram）特征无增益；约67个标注样本已足够。标注协议蒙特卡洛研究显示：可靠性加权投票几乎不优于简单多数投票（加性权重饱和），而Dawid-Skene方法显著更优地恢复真实标签。
AI.conclusion: 该任务比预期的更简单——简单词袋模型即可逼近完美表现，且只需要少量标注样本。研究还讨论了价格层面的质量控制以及对统计机构使用交易数据的设计启示。

title: S3TS: Stochastic Scenario-Structured Tree Search for Advanced Planning Under Uncertainty
summary: Effective scheduling in the energy sector is essential to ensure the reliable operation of electrical grids and their connected assets by, for instance, optimizing the dispatch of generation units and storage systems. An effective planning strategy must (a) accommodate advanced and potentially non-linear system models -- exploiting the increasing data availability of modern grids, and (b) explicitly handle uncertainties arising, for instance, from the integration of renewable energy sources. While existing approaches can address either non-linearity (e.g., Monte Carlo Tree Search) or uncertainty (e.g., stochastic mathematical optimization), there is a lack of planning techniques capable of addressing both challenges simultaneously. To bridge this gap, we propose a Stochastic Scenario-Structured Tree Search (S3TS) algorithm that explicitly represents uncertainty through scenario trees while enabling the integration of advanced non-linear models. We evaluate S3TS on a simulated demand response signal publication problem, largely mimicking the imbalance settlement mechanism in Belgium. The results demonstrate near-optimal performance in linear, analytically tractable settings, with costs within 14% of the mathematically optimal solution conditioned to the scenario trees. In highly non-linear scenarios, S3TS significantly outperforms baseline methods, achieving cost reductions of up to 51% and 5.4% compared to a myopic algorithm and deterministic MCTS, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种随机场景结构化树搜索（S3TS）算法，能够同时处理能源调度中的非线性和不确定性挑战，在模拟比利时不平衡结算机制的日前需求响应信号发布问题中，S3TS在线性场景下接近最优（成本差距14%以内），在高度非线性场景下相比启发式算法和确定性MCTS分别降低成本51%和5.4%。
AI.motivation: 现有调度规划方法要么能处理非线性（如MCTS），要么能处理不确定性（如随机数学优化），但缺乏能同时应对两者的技术。现代能源系统既需要非线性模型以利用数据，又需要显式处理可再生能源的不确定性，因此亟需一种能兼顾两方面的规划方法。
AI.method: 提出S3TS算法，通过场景树显式表示不确定性，同时允许集成高级非线性模型，将树搜索与随机场景表示相结合。
AI.result: 在线性、可解析的场景中，S3TS表现接近最优，成本控制在数学最优解的14%以内；在高度非线性场景中，相比贪心算法成本降低51%，相比确定性MCTS成本降低5.4%。
AI.conclusion: S3TS有效弥合了现有方法在处理非线性和不确定性上的鸿沟，在能源调度任务中展现出显著优势，特别适合高非线性场景的应用。

title: LeAP: Learnable Adaptive Permutation for Feature Selection in Heterogeneous and Sparse Recommender Systems
summary:
Modern industrial recommender systems rely on thousands of heterogeneous features -- ranging from low-dimensional scalars (e.g., statistical value) to high-dimensional embeddings (e.g., user-id embeddings, MLP representations) -- to achieve high-precision predictions. Given the immense computational costs associated with training, efficient feature selection is critical. However, existing methods encounter three primary bottlenecks: (1) they typically assume uniform feature dimensions or require costly mapping to a fixed size; (2) they struggle with extreme sparsity, where the majority of features (e.g., 99%+) remain at default values; and (3) traditional permutation-based approaches are computationally prohibitive in large-scale settings.
  To address these challenges, we propose LeAP (Learnable Adaptive Permutation), a novel, model-agnostic plug-in module for feature selection. LeAP transforms the inefficient random permutation process into a learnable mechanism, significantly accelerating the evaluation of feature importance. In addition, we introduce an adaptive regularization strategy tailored for heterogeneous dimensions and extreme sparsity, enabling superior feature importance ranking results across asymmetric input spaces. Experiments on four public recommendation datasets demonstrate that LeAP achieves state-of-the-art performance. Furthermore, LeAP has been deployed in a large-scale industrial search ranking model with over a billion daily requests and a 2TB model parameter scale. In this real-world scenario involving 12,000+ total feature dimensions, LeAP successfully identified and removed over 3,600 redundant dimensions without performance degradation, which is 2 to 10 times the ability of compared baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 提出可学习自适应置换模块LeAP，解决工业推荐系统中异构特征选择的三项瓶颈（维度不均、极端稀疏、排列计算昂贵），在公开数据集和千亿级工业搜索排序模型中均取得SOTA效果。
AI.motivation: 现有特征选择方法假设特征维度统一或需要昂贵的固定尺寸映射，难以处理极端稀疏性（99%+特征为默认值），且基于排列的方法在大规模场景下计算代价过高。
AI.method: 提出LeAP（Learnable Adaptive Permutation），将低效的随机排列过程转化为可学习机制；同时引入针对异构维度和极端稀疏性的自适应正则化策略。
AI.result: 在四个公开推荐数据集上达到SOTA；在大规模工业搜索排序模型（每日超十亿请求、2TB参数、12000+特征维度）中成功识别并移除3600+冗余维度且无性能损失，效果是基线方法的2-10倍。
AI.conclusion: LeAP是一种模型无关的即插即用模块，有效解决了工业级异构特征选择中的三个关键瓶颈，兼顾效率与效果。

title: Beyond Visual Memory: Mechanistic Diagnostics of Latent Visual Reasoning
summary: Recent latent visual reasoning methods achieve substantial gains by inserting continuous latent tokens into multimodal language models. These gains are commonly attributed to the tokens encoding visual evidence; recent analyses, however, reveal a paradox: the tokens are loosely tied to the image and contribute little to the answer. Critically, these analyses treat latent tokens as a single unit, obscuring the true source of the gains. We therefore decompose latent tokens into three testable components: latent slots, boundary markers, and format, and develop a state-of-the-art method as a probe under favorable conditions. Across six method-stage settings and four perception-heavy benchmarks, latent slots fail every prediction of the visual-memory account. Strikingly, retaining only the boundary markers preserves 78 to 100% of the gain in several settings, while the model attends to the image more narrowly at latent positions than at answer positions. The gain therefore comes from boundary markers, format, and this attention pattern, not from latent slots. How each method engages this mechanism depends on its training supervision: at matched accuracy, mechanisms can still differ markedly. Latent visual reasoning thus needs evaluation not only by accuracy but by what the model actually relies on.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分解潜变量为三个可测试组件（潜槽、边界标记和格式），发现潜视觉推理的性能提升并非来自潜槽（视觉记忆），而是来自边界标记、格式以及注意力模式。不同训练监督方式导致机制差异，因此评估应超越准确率，关注模型实际依赖的因素。
AI.motivation: 现有文献将潜视觉推理的增益归因于潜变量编码视觉证据，但近期分析发现矛盾：潜变量与图像关联松散且对答案贡献有限。然而这些分析将潜变量视为单一整体，掩盖了增益的真正来源。本文旨在分解潜变量，揭示其各组分在性能提升中的实际作用。
AI.method: 1. 将潜变量分解为三个可测试组件：潜槽（latent slots）、边界标记（boundary markers）和格式（format）。2. 开发了一种最新的方法作为探针，在有利条件下测试。3. 在6种方法-阶段设置和4个感知密集型基准上进行实验，检验视觉记忆假设的预测。
AI.result: 1. 潜槽（视觉记忆）在所有设置中均未能通过预测检验。2. 仅保留边界标记即可在若干设置中保留78-100%的增益。3. 模型在潜变量位置比答案位置更狭窄地关注图像。4. 增益来自边界标记、格式和注意力模式，而非潜槽。5. 训练监督方式决定了机制差异：即使准确率相同，机制也显著不同。
AI.conclusion: 潜视觉推理的评估不应仅依赖准确率，还需考察模型实际依赖的机制。研究者应关注边界标记、格式和注意力模式等非视觉记忆因素，而非潜槽。

title: Automated Essay Scoring and Language Certification: Assessing Generalizability, Agreement and Validity for French
summary: In Automated Essay Scoring (AES), benchmarking practices have fostered minimalist evaluation practices, in contrast with the broader-view recommendations of evaluation frameworks, such as the argument-based validation framework (ABV), which argued in favor of a multidimensional assessment of systems, especially in the context of high-stakes language tests. In this paper, we introduce an enhanced and more practical version of the ABV framework, incorporating fairness analysis, correlations with linguistic features, prediction error evaluation, and model agreement compared with human raters. Applying this framework to French AES, we compare 8 model architectures on a corpus of 27k exam essays (2 raters each) and a generalization corpus of 961 essays (at least nine raters each). Our analyses illustrate the benefits of applying the ABV framework to better understand the capabilities and pitfalls of AES models, while also advancing the state-of-the-art for French AES.

AI.tldr: 本文针对自动作文评分（AES）领域评测实践过于简化的问题，引入了一种增强版基于论证的验证框架（ABV），该框架整合了公平性分析、语言特征相关性、预测误差评估及与人类评分者的一致性分析。通过在法语AES任务上对8种模型架构在2.7万篇考试作文（每篇2位评分者）和961篇泛化语料（每篇至少9位评分者）上进行实验，展示了该框架在理解AES模型能力与缺陷方面的优势，同时提升了法语AES的当前最优水平。
AI.motivation: 当前AES系统的基准评测过于简化（minimalist evaluation），缺乏对模型多维度能力的全面评估，尤其在高风险语言测试场景下，现有评估框架（如ABV）虽有理论优势但实践性不足。
AI.method: 提出增强版ABV框架，新增公平性分析、语言特征相关性、预测误差评估及模型与人类评分者一致性分析四个维度；在法语AES任务上对8种模型架构进行对比实验，使用2.7万篇考试作文（2评分者/篇）和961篇泛化语料（至少9评分者/篇）进行验证。
AI.result: 增强版ABV框架能够更全面地揭示AES模型的能力与缺陷，同时推动法语AES达到新的最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 多维度评估框架（如ABV）对于深入理解AES模型在实际应用中的表现至关重要，尤其在高风险测试场景中，单一基准评测不足以反映模型的全貌。

title: An Abstract Worlds Semantic Framework for Belief Change Operators
summary: This article proposes a set-theoretic framework for belief change, called Abstract Worlds Semantics, in which no logical syntax is assumed. Inspired by Grove's (1988) results, our approach treats worlds as primitive elements, over which world contraction and world revision operators are defined. This semantic framework enables a unified analysis of belief change models. Within this framework, we unify classical and non-prioritized belief change constructions by defining versatile operators. When classical propositional logic is considered, our framework provides a homogeneous account of AGM, KM, and Multiple Change models. In summary, AWS systematizes belief change frameworks and operators, simplifying and generalizing belief change theory over belief sets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无逻辑语法的集合论信念变更框架——抽象世界语义学（AWS），以世界为原始元素定义收缩与修正算子，统一了经典与非优先信念变更模型，并在经典命题逻辑下同质化AGM、KM及多重变更模型，简化并泛化了信念集上的信念变更理论。
AI.motivation: 现有信念变更理论（如AGM、KM）依赖特定逻辑语法，缺乏统一语义基础；不同变更模型间关系松散，缺乏系统化整合框架。
AI.method: 借鉴Grove（1988）的思想，以"世界"为原始元素构建集合论语义框架，定义世界收缩算子和世界修正算子；设计通用算子统一经典与非优先信念变更；在经典命题逻辑下整合AGM、KM和多重变更模型。
AI.result: AWS框架能够：1）统一各类信念变更模型；2）在经典命题逻辑下同质化呈现AGM、KM与多重变更模型；3）简化并泛化基于信念集的信念变更理论。
AI.conclusion: AWS为信念变更提供了一个更简洁、通用的语义理论基础，无需预设逻辑语法即可系统化分析不同变更模型，具有理论泛化与统一的双重贡献。

title: HASTE: Hardware-Aware Dynamic Sparse Training for Large Output Spaces
summary: Extreme multi-label classification (XMC) involves learning models over large output spaces with millions of labels, making the output layer a memory-compute bottleneck. While sparsity-based methods reduce arithmetic complexity, they often fail to yield proportional speedups due to irregular memory access, poor hardware utilization, or reliance on auxiliary architectural components in long-tailed regimes. We introduce group-shared fixed fan-in sparsity, a semi-structured output-layer design in which semantically related labels share a sparse input pattern while retaining independent weights. This grouping introduces a task-aligned inductive bias -- encouraging related labels to share feature subsets -- while reducing index memory overhead, increasing feature reuse across labels, and enabling efficient GPU execution via custom CUDA kernels that leverage modern accelerator primitives. As an alternative to auxiliary objectives, we exploit the long-tailed structure of XMC by decomposing the output layer into a small dense head over frequent labels and a group-shared sparse tail over the remainder, providing an informative gradient pathway while preserving the memory benefits of sparsity. Through kernel-level microbenchmarking, we show that group-shared fixed fan-in translates arithmetic reductions into practical wall-clock gains, achieving up to $4.4\times$ speedup in the forward pass and up to $25\times$ speedup in backward passes over standard fixed fan-in sparsity, while operating within a few percent of a FLOPs-matched dense bottleneck. Across large-scale XMC benchmarks, our approach matches or improves precision@k over prior sparse baselines, while narrowing the performance gap to dense.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种组共享固定扇入稀疏性方法，用于极端多标签分类中的输出层设计，通过语义相关的标签组共享稀疏输入模式，结合自定义CUDA内核，实现了显著的计算加速（前向4.4倍、反向25倍），同时保持或提升分类精度。
AI.motivation: 极端多标签分类（XMC）的输出层因标签数量巨大（数百万）而成为记忆与计算瓶颈。现有的基于稀疏性的方法虽可降低算术复杂度，但因不规则内存访问、硬件利用率低或在长尾场景下依赖辅助架构组件，难以获得实际加速。
AI.method: 提出组共享固定扇入稀疏性（group-shared fixed fan-in sparsity），将语义相关的标签分组，同一组内共享稀疏输入模式但保留独立权重。输出层分解为：小规模密集头（处理高频标签）和组共享稀疏尾（处理长尾标签），并开发自定义CUDA内核以利用现代加速器原语高效执行。
AI.result: 微基准测试显示，相比标准固定扇入稀疏性，前向传播加速4.4倍，反向传播加速25倍，性能接近FLOPs匹配的密集瓶颈。在大型XMC基准上，该方法匹配或提升了precision@k，缩小了与密集方法的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 组共享固定扇入稀疏性有效将算术复杂度降低转化为实际墙钟加速，同时通过任务对齐的归纳偏置（语义相关标签共享特征子集）保持模型性能，为XMC输出层设计提供了一种高效且实用的稀疏方案。

title: DeblurNVS: Geometric Latent Diffusion for Novel View Synthesis from Sparse Motion-Blurred Images
summary: Novel view synthesis (NVS) is a fundamental problem in computer vision and graphics. Recent advances in neural radiance fields (NeRF), 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), and generative view synthesis have substantially improved its quality. Yet most methods still rely on clean observations, where image structures and cross-view geometric cues are well preserved. Motion blur breaks this assumption by corrupting local details and weakening multi-view correspondences. Such blur commonly arises from camera shake, scene motion, or finite exposure in practical capture. Blur-aware NVS methods address this degradation by modeling image formation, but their reliance on costly per-scene optimization limits efficient and generalizable sparse-view synthesis. To address this, we propose DeblurNVS, a novel framework for synthesizing high-fidelity novel views directly from sparse motion-blurred images, without requiring per-scene optimization. DeblurNVS restores the intermediate geometric representations needed for multi-view reasoning, enabling blurred inputs to recover reliable structure and correspondence cues. The restored representations are then combined with target camera information to synthesize the target-view representation and reconstruct a sharp RGB novel view. To enable the large-scale training, we construct a motion-blurred NVS dataset from DL3DV-10K using interpolation-based finite-exposure blur synthesis. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DeblurNVS outperforms existing baselines on synthetic motion-blur benchmarks and generalizes to real motion-blurred scenes, producing perceptually sharper and structurally more stable novel views while avoiding costly per-scene optimization. Project page: https://github.com/PKU-YuanGroup/DeblurNVS.

AI.tldr: DeblurNVS 提出了一种无需逐场景优化的框架，能从稀疏的运动模糊图像中直接合成高保真新视角，通过恢复中间几何表征来实现高质量渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有新视角合成方法大多依赖清晰图像，运动模糊会破坏局部细节和跨视角几何线索；而现有的模糊感知方法需要昂贵的逐场景优化，无法实现高效、可泛化的稀疏视角合成。
AI.method: 提出 DeblurNVS 框架：首先从稀疏运动模糊图像中恢复中间几何表征（结构和对应关系），再结合目标相机信息合成目标视角表征，最终重建出清晰的 RGB 新视角图像。同时构建了基于 DL3DV-10K 的大规模运动模糊数据集用于训练。
AI.result: 在合成运动模糊基准和真实运动模糊场景上，DeblurNVS 均优于现有基线方法，生成的新视角在感知上更清晰、结构更稳定，且无需逐场景优化。
AI.conclusion: DeblurNVS 实现了从运动模糊图像直接进行高质量新视角合成，有效结合了去模糊与多视角几何推理，具有泛化性强、效率高的优点。

title: PlanarBench: Evaluating LLM Spatial Reasoning via Planar Graph Drawing
summary:
PlanarBench tests whether LLMs can draw planar graphs as ASCII art given only an edge list -- a spatial reasoning task that resists memorization because edge order, edge orientation, and node labels are all permutable.
  We evaluate 91 models on the 199 simplest non-isomorphic connected planar graphs (2 - 7 vertices).
  Edge count is the dominant difficulty predictor ($r = -0.85$) -- a finding not reported in prior LLM graph benchmarks, which use only node count as the difficulty axis.

AI.tldr: PlanarBench通过让LLM根据边列表生成平面图的ASCII图来测试其空间推理能力，并发现边数（而非节点数）是预测难度的主导因素（r=-0.85）。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM图基准测试仅以节点数作为难度轴，忽略了边数等更关键的预测因素，且缺乏对空间推理任务中记忆效应的控制。
AI.method: 构建PlanarBench基准，采用199个最简非同构连通平面图（2-7节点），通过置换边顺序、边方向和节点标签来防止记忆化，评估91个模型的绘图表现。
AI.result: 边数是主导难度预测因子（相关系数r=-0.85），这一发现未被先前LLM图基准测试所报道。
AI.conclusion: PlanarBench揭示了边数对LLM空间推理任务的难度预测作用，挑战了仅依赖节点数的传统评估方式，为设计更有效的图推理基准提供了新视角。

title: From Capability Models to Automated Planning: An AAS-Native Approach for Automatic PDDL Generation
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE 22nd International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2026)
summary: Engineers designing production systems need to verify that a given layout supports all required production sequences. Automated planning techniques can answer such questions, but formulating the required planning problems in the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) demands specialized expertise that production engineers typically lack. Asset Administration Shells (AAS) have emerged as the standardized Digital Twin for industrial assets in Industry 4.0. We show that AAS capability models, structured using four established Industry 4.0 standards (VDI 3682 for process descriptions, IEC 61360-1 for semantic property qualification, IDTA 02011 for type hierarchies, and IDTA 02016 for instance descriptions), contain sufficient information to generate complete PDDL problems automatically. Unlike prior work that introduced PDDL-specific submodels, our approach derives all planning elements from domain-level descriptions of resource functions, so-called capabilities, allowing engineers to model capabilities without any exposure to PDDL syntax or planning concepts. Our extraction algorithm transforms distributed Multi-AAS architectures into complete PDDL planning problems. We validate the approach on AAS models of a laboratory production system, comparing four layout variants using optimal planning to demonstrate how engineers can systematically explore design trade-offs by modifying the AAS model and regenerating the planning domain

AI.tldr: 本文提出从资产管理壳(AAS)的工业4.0能力模型中自动生成PDDL规划问题的方法，使生产工程师无需掌握PDDL专业知识即可验证产线布局。通过从AAS模型中提取资源功能描述，自动转换为完整的PDDL规划问题，并在实验室产线中验证了四种布局变体的优化规划分析。
AI.motivation: 生产系统工程师需要验证产线布局能否支持所有生产工序，但使用PDDL进行自动化规划需要专业知识。现有方案需要引入PDDL专有子模型，工程师仍需接触规划概念。亟需一种从工业领域标准模型中自动生成规划问题的方法。
AI.method: 基于AAS能力模型和四项工业4.0标准(VDI 3682、IEC 61360-1、IDTA 02011、IDTA 02016)，设计了从分布式Multi-AAS架构中提取所有规划元素的算法，自动生成完整PDDL问题，工程师只需在领域层建模能力。
AI.result: 在实验室产线系统的AAS模型上验证了该方法，通过最优规划比较了四种布局变体，证明了工程师可通过修改AAS模型并重新生成规划领域来系统性地探索设计权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该工作实现了从工业标准数字孪生模型到规划问题的全自动转换，消除了工程师学习PDDL的需求，为工业场景下的布局验证提供了可用方案。

title: A Per-Component Diagnostic Protocol for Neural HJB-PIDE Solvers under Control-Dependent Lévy Jumps
summary: We propose a five-step diagnostic protocol for residual-trained neural HJB-PIDE solvers with control-dependent Lévy jumps, targeting a general failure mode of neural PDE methods: a learned solution can match headline scalar diagnostics while miscomputing an operator inside its training loss. The protocol pairs each neural solve with at least one from-scratch independent reference, decomposes the Hamiltonian into drift, diffusion, compensator, and nonlocal-integral components across a u-grid, and compares the value function and its low-order derivatives over a (t,x) grid before any argmax comparison. Applied to a standard CRRA-Merton-Variance-Gamma benchmark, it isolates a missing 1/2-mixture factor in the neural method's importance-proposal density that scaled the nonlocal integral by exactly half - a textbook signature of a constant proposal scale error, invisible to longer training, grid refinement, and truncation sweeps. With the bug corrected, four references - two finite-difference solvers with disjoint discretizations, the neural solver, and a semi-analytic scalar baseline obtained from CRRA homogeneity - agree on the optimal control to within ~2%. The constant-coefficient CRRA benchmark collapses by homogeneity to a scalar maximization, so the scalar baseline is the efficient method here; the contribution is the protocol, applicable in principle to non-homogeneous and higher-dimensional settings where neural HJB-PIDE solvers are genuinely needed. The episode is a concrete instance of a broader neural-PDE verification failure: pointwise agreement of a learned value or control can coexist with a systematically wrong nonlocal operator, so per-component and surface-level checks are needed before trusting the argmax policy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种五步诊断协议，用于检测残差训练的神经HJB-PIDE求解器中的隐藏错误。该协议通过分解Hamiltonian各分量、与独立参考解对比，成功定位了一个将非局部积分缩放一半的"1/2混合因子"缺失错误，该错误在常规训练和网格细化中不可见。
AI.motivation: 神经PDE方法存在一种"隐藏失败模式"：学习到的解在标题级别的标量诊断指标上表现良好，但其训练损失内部的算子计算却是错误的。这种错误在常规验证流程（更长的训练、网格细化、截断扫描）中无法被发现，却会导致最优控制策略的系统性偏差。
AI.method: 五步诊断协议：(1) 每次神经求解至少配对一个独立从头开始的参考解；(2) 将Hamiltonian分解为漂移、扩散、补偿器和非局部积分四个分量；(3) 在u网格上对各分量进行分解比较；(4) 在(t,x)网格上比较值函数及其低阶导数；(5) 最后才进行argmax比较。通过在CRRA-Merton-Variance-Gamma基准上应用，发现神经方法的重要性提议密度缺少一个1/2混合因子，导致非局部积分被精确地缩放了一半。
AI.result: 修正错误后，四个参考解（两个不同离散化的有限差分求解器、神经求解器、通过CRRA齐次性获得的半解析标量基线）的最优控制一致性达到约2%以内。该协议成功识别了一个在长时间训练、网格细化和截断扫描中均不可见的系统性错误。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作提供一个具体实例，证明了神经PDE验证中的一个更广泛问题：学习到的值函数或控制可以在逐点层面上与参考解一致，但非局部算子却存在系统性错误。因此，在信任argmax策略之前，必须进行逐分量和曲面级别的检查。该协议原则上可推广到非齐次和高维场景，这些场景才真正需要神经HJB-PIDE求解器。

title: HOLA: Holistic Multi-Modal Alignment for Open-Set 3D Recognition
summary: Open-set 3D recognition requires models that generalize to rare or unseen categories. Recent approaches address this by distilling language-vision knowledge into 3D encoders, typically relying on heavy 2D ViTs and aligning each point cloud with a single image or caption, thus anchoring representations to partial views. We propose aligning each point cloud with multiple images and textual descriptions to capture a more holistic understanding of 3D objects. To realize this idea, it is essential to design a loss function capable of jointly aligning a 3D instance with multiple matched signals, multi-view images and multiple texts, while separating positive aggregation from negative competition. We introduce such a function, termed the decoupled multi-positive contrastive loss. Our formulation enhances the loss's hardness-aware focus on challenging negatives, avoiding the "spotlight crowding" that occurs when many positives share the same softmax with all the negatives. Complementing this, we present a lightweight text adapter applied only to web captions, reducing the domain gap to curated annotations and enabling effective use of large-scale unsupervised text. Our model demonstrates state-of-the-art open-vocabulary performance on long-tail benchmarks, yielding substantial zero-shot improvements while sustaining high frame rates.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对开放集3D识别的新方法，通过多模态对齐（多视图图像+多文本描述）和去耦多正样本对比损失函数，实现了对3D物体的更全面理解，在长尾基准上达到了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有开放集3D识别方法通常将每个点云与单一图像或文本描述对齐，导致表征局限于局部视角。作者希望通过对齐每个点云与多个图像和多个文本描述，捕捉更全面的3D物体理解。
AI.method: 提出了去耦多正样本对比损失函数，将3D实例与多个匹配信号（多视图图像+多文本）联合对齐，同时分离正样本聚合与负样本竞争，增强了损失对困难负样本的关注。此外，引入轻量级文本适配器来缩小网络描述与人工标注之间的领域差距。
AI.result: 在长尾基准上取得了开放词汇任务的最先进性能，实现了显著的零样本提升，同时保持了高帧率。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态对齐和去耦损失函数设计，有效解决了开放集3D识别中表征片面化的问题，验证了多正样本对齐策略的有效性。

title: Unveiling the Entropy Dynamics of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: This paper investigates the entropy dynamics of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and uncovers a consistent two-phase structure: an Uncertainty Region of exploration transitioning sharply to a Confidence Region of convergence. We demonstrate that the Confidence Region possesses two critical properties: 1) High Reliability -- answers in the confidence region become highly accurate and stable, and 2) High Redundancy -- models generate unnecessary tokens long after reaching the correct answer. These properties unlock more efficient and reliable inference strategies: 1) Early Exit leverages reliability and redundancy to terminate computation safely when returns diminish, and 2)Test-Time Scaling uses the Confidence Region signal to prioritize converged trajectories. To operationalize these insights, we formulate Confidence Region detection as a sequential change-point detection problem, being the first to apply classical change-point methods to monitor CoT reasoning. Using the Cumulative Sum (CUSUM) algorithm, a statistically optimal change-point detector, we develop a training-free framework for real-time inference control. Experiments show our approach establishes a superior Pareto-frontier for early exit. CUSUM achieves 63.06% accuracy with 11.1% token reduction, outperforming DEER and Dynasor by 3.28% and 4.36% in accuracy respectively. For test-time scaling, CUSUM-weighted voting consistently outperforms self-consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文发现CoT推理存在"不确定性区域→置信区域"的两阶段熵变结构，利用置信区域的高可靠性和高冗余性，通过CUSUM变化点检测算法实现无训练的高效推理控制，在早期退出和测试时扩展任务中均取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 当前CoT推理虽然有效但存在大量冗余计算，模型在得到正确答案后仍会生成不必要的token，导致计算资源浪费。作者希望揭示CoT的熵变规律，并据此设计更高效可靠的推理策略。
AI.method: 1) 发现CoT熵变的双阶段结构（不确定性区域→置信区域）；2) 将置信区域检测转化为序列变化点检测问题；3) 采用CUSUM算法（统计最优变化点检测器）构建无训练框架；4) 基于置信区域信号设计早期退出和测试时扩展两种推理策略。
AI.result: 早期退出：CUSUM达到63.06%准确率，11.1% token缩减，分别比DEER和Dynasor高3.28%和4.36%；测试时扩展：CUSUM加权投票一致优于自一致性方法。
AI.conclusion: 置信区域的变化点检测为CoT推理控制提供了统计最优的解决方案，建立了早期退出的新Pareto前沿，且方法无需额外训练。

title: CEON: Circular Economy Ontology Network
summary: Increasing the circularity of resource use in our society has been recognized as a path to sustainability, i.e., transitioning into a more circular economy. There are many different circular strategies to do so, such as reusing products and components, refurbishing and remanufacturing used products, or recycling left-over or used materials. To enable these strategies, it is necessary to share information at the infrastructure level and to communicate between industry sectors along the product life cycle. Enabling semantic interoperability in this information sharing and communication is therefore a key to increasing circularity. However, knowledge representation for the circular economy (CE) domain, which involves many relevant industry sectors related to product life cycles, remains challenging. To bridge this gap, we developed the Circular Economy Ontology Network (CEON) within the Onto-DESIDE project. This ontology network aims to fill gaps in CE by defining cross-sectorial concepts and to enable semantics-aware data documentation. We demonstrate CEON through cross-industry data documentation scenarios spanning construction, electronics, and textile sectors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Circular Economy Ontology Network (CEON)，一个旨在促进循环经济领域跨行业语义互操作性的本体网络，通过建筑、电子和纺织三个行业的数据文档化场景验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 实现循环经济需要跨行业、跨产品生命周期的基础设施级信息共享与通信，但循环经济领域的知识表示面临挑战，缺乏跨行业的概念定义和语义互操作支持。
AI.method: 在Onto-DESIDE项目中开发了Circular Economy Ontology Network (CEON)，定义跨行业核心概念并支持语义感知的数据文档化。
AI.result: 通过建筑、电子和纺织三个跨行业数据文档化场景，验证了CEON的有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: CEON本体网络能够有效填补循环经济领域跨行业概念的空白，为实现语义互操作性、提升资源循环利用提供了基础设施支持。

title: From Reward-Free Representations to Preferences: Rethinking Offline Preference-Based Reinforcement Learning
summary: Preference-based reinforcement learning (PbRL) avoids explicit reward engineering by learning from pairwise human preference feedback. Existing offline PbRL methods typically follow a two-stage pipeline, first learning a reward or preference model from labeled preferences and then performing offline RL on unlabeled data. We revisit offline PbRL through the lens of reward-free representation learning (RFRL) from the zero-shot RL literature, and propose a new training framework that first learns latent successor-measure representations from reward-free offline data, followed by contrastive search and fine-tuning using preference data. Through extensive experiments and ablations, we show that our method achieves superior preference efficiency over offline PbRL baselines. This work is the first to connect RFRL with PbRL, highlighting its potential as a feedback-efficient solution. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/rl-bandits-lab/FB-PbRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将无奖励表示学习(RFRL)与偏好强化学习(PbRL)相结合，通过先学习潜在后继度量表示，再使用偏好数据进行对比搜索与微调，实现了更高的偏好效率。
AI.motivation: 现有离线PbRL方法通常采用两阶段流程（先学奖励/偏好模型，再执行离线RL），效率低下。作者希望将RFRL中的零样本RL思想引入PbRL，以提升偏好数据的利用效率。
AI.method: 提出FB-PbRL框架：第一阶段从无奖励离线数据中学习潜在后继度量表示（继承RFRL思想）；第二阶段利用偏好数据进行对比搜索和微调，避免显式奖励建模。
AI.result: 在广泛的实验和消融研究中，该方法在偏好效率上显著优于现有的离线PbRL基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次建立了RFRL与PbRL之间的联系，证明了RFRL作为反馈高效解决方案的潜力，为未来PbRL研究提供了新方向。

title: ChartArena: Benchmarking Chart Parsing across Languages, Scenarios, and Formats
summary: Charts are a primary medium for conveying quantitative and relational information, yet systematically evaluating chart parsing models remains difficult. Existing benchmarks focus on narrow chart types and leave diagrammatic structures such as flowcharts and mind maps largely unaddressed, while models produce outputs in incompatible formats, and datasets rarely include the printed or hand-drawn images encountered in practice. To address these issues, we introduce ChartArena, a comprehensive bilingual benchmark covering eight chart families spanning both numeric charts and diagrammatic structures, each evaluated across three visual scenarios: digital renderings, printed photos, and hand-drawn photos. The dataset is built via a human-agent collaborative annotation pipeline with multi-stage human verification to ensure annotation reliability. To enable fair cross-model comparison, we further design a format-agnostic evaluation protocol that maps heterogeneous outputs into two canonical semantic spaces, a normalized triple view and a directed graph view, and scores them with structure-aware metrics. Through extensive evaluation of 26 leading MLLMs, we observe three consistent findings: (i) frontier proprietary models such as Gemini 3.1 Pro lead overall, yet the strongest open-source systems are rapidly closing the gap; (ii) document parsing models handle numeric charts reasonably but fall sharply behind on diagrammatic structures; and (iii) expert chart parsers remain limited to narrow chart families. Across all models, radar charts and hand-drawn scenarios stay especially challenging. These findings show that ChartArena exposes clear capability gaps and provides a unified foundation for future progress. ChartArena is publicly available at https://github.com/pspdada/ChartArena.

AI.tldr: ChartArena是一个涵盖8类图表（含数字图表和图表结构）的双语基准，包含数字渲染、打印照片和手绘照片三种视觉场景，通过格式无关的评估协议对26个主流多模态大模型进行评测，揭示了前沿模型间的能力差距。
AI.motivation: 现有图表解析基准局限于窄类型图表，忽略流程图、思维导图等图表结构；模型输出格式不兼容；数据集缺少实际应用中常见的打印或手绘图像。亟需一个统一、全面的评测基准。
AI.method: 构建了ChartArena双语基准，涵盖8类图表家族（数字图表+图表结构），包含数字渲染、打印照片、手绘照片三种场景；采用人机协作标注管线+多阶段人工验证；设计格式无关评估协议，将异构输出映射到规范化三元组视图和有向图视图两个语义空间，并采用结构感知指标评分。
AI.result: 对26个主流多模态大模型评测发现：(i) Gemini 3.1 Pro等前沿商业模型整体领先，但最强开源系统正快速追赶；(ii) 文档解析模型在数字图表上表现尚可，但在图表结构上大幅落后；(iii) 专业图表解析器仍局限于窄图表家族。所有模型在雷达图和手绘场景上尤为困难。
AI.conclusion: ChartArena揭示了模型在图表解析方面的明确能力差距，为未来进展提供了统一基础。

title: SentGuard: Sentence-Level Streaming Guardrails for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models increasingly stream long, reasoning-intensive responses in real time, making when to moderate as critical as whether to moderate. Existing guardrails fall into two unsatisfactory extremes: response-level methods delay intervention until the full output is generated, whereas token-level methods act on incomplete semantics, often producing unstable decisions and excessive guard invocations. To address this challenge, we propose SentGuard, a sentence-level streaming guardrail that operates in parallel with generation. A lightweight waiting buffer groups streamed tokens into sentence chunks and releases only verified chunks to the user, introducing a small offset that enables SentGuard to assess the current prefix while the target LLM decodes subsequent content. To support this, we construct StreamSafe, a benchmark with structured per-sentence annotations across 8 harm categories, capturing the evolution of safety risks across both reasoning and response segments. We further train SentGuard with a coarse-to-fine objective to detect unsafe intent as soon as it emerges at sentence boundaries. Experiments on 5 safety benchmarks show that SentGuard outperforms existing baselines, detecting 90.5% of unsafe cases within two sentences while maintaining a low streaming false-positive rate of 7.41%.

AI.tldr: 提出SentGuard，一种句子级别的流式安全护栏，通过等待缓冲区将流式token组装成句子块并行审核，在保持低误报率的同时实现早期不安全检测。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型流式输出的安全审核存在两难：响应级方法延迟高，token级方法因语义不完整导致决策不稳定和过多误触发。需要一种能在流式生成过程中实时且稳定地检测安全风险的方案。
AI.method: SentGuard构建轻量等待缓冲区将流式token组装为句子块，与目标LLM并行运行。在句子边界处进行审核，已验证的句子才释放给用户。同时构建StreamSafe基准数据集，包含8个危害类别的逐句标注，并采用由粗到细的训练目标。
AI.result: 在5个安全基准上，SentGuard在两个句子内检测到90.5%的不安全案例，流式误报率仅7.41%，优于现有基线。
AI.conclusion: 句子级别的流式审核在实时性、稳定性和准确性之间取得了良好的平衡，是比响应级和token级更优的安全防护方案。

title: POIROT: Interrogating Agents for Failure Detection in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Orchestrating Large Language Models into Multi-Agent Systems (LLM-MAS) has unlocked remarkable reasoning capabilities, yet emergent failures and hallucinations that resist characterisation block their deployment in safety-critical domains -- a gap made legally untenable by emerging AI regulation. Existing evaluation paradigms share a common flaw: centralised judgment creates single points of failure and demands domain-specific expertise. Here we present POIROT, a protocol that repurposes a system's own agents as its diagnostic layer, leveraging the epistemic diversity already present in the architecture. Across evaluated settings, POIROT outperforms single-LLM evaluator baselines, with gains that scale with problem complexity (OR = 1.60, $p = 0.008$), agent count, and fault dimensionality, persisting under compound fault conditions. These results demonstrate that safety oversight need not be externalised: the agents executing a role carry sufficient collective intelligence to audit it. We release POIROT as an open-source library alongside BLAME, a benchmark for fault attribution in safety-critical multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 提出POIROT协议，利用多智能体系统自身的多样认知进行诊断和故障归因，替代传统集中式评估，实验证明其有效性随问题复杂度提升而增强。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在安全关键领域部署受阻，现有集中式评估范式存在单点故障且需要领域专家知识，而新兴法规要求可审计的故障归因机制。
AI.method: POIROT协议：将系统自身的智能体重组为诊断层，利用架构中已有的认知多样性进行分布式故障检测与归因；并发布BLAME基准数据集。
AI.result: POIROT优于单LLM评估器基线（OR=1.60, p=0.008），性能随问题复杂度、智能体数量和故障维度增加而提升，在复合故障条件下依然有效。
AI.conclusion: 安全监督不需要外部化，执行任务的智能体本身具备足够的集体智能来完成审计，证明了内源性安全机制的可行性。

title: STARFISH: faST Accuracy Recovery in pruned networks From Internal State Healing
summary: Pruning is a process designed to reduce the number of weights in a large neural network. This can substantially speed up inference but might cause a considerable reduction in the model's accuracy, and thus it is usually followed by a healing process that regains some of the lost accuracy. In this paper, we propose a new healing method, STARFISH, that can recover (most of) the accuracy of any pruned network efficiently. The main idea of STARFISH is to optimize the pruned network to align with the original network's internal state representations using a tiny calibration set of unlabeled examples. For the common case of removing 50% of the weights, STARFISH healing improves the recovered accuracy by up to 22% over the state-of-the-art methods on ViT-based networks. Its advantage is even more pronounced under aggressive pruning. For example, after eliminating 75% of the weights in a DeiT-B network for ImageNet, STARFISH uses only 0.4% of the number of training images as a calibration set and recovers 82% of the original dense accuracy, whereas competing recovery techniques reach only 40% of the dense model accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出STARFISH方法，通过小规模无标签校准集对齐剪枝网络与原始网络的内部状态表征，高效恢复剪枝后精度，在ViT网络中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 剪枝虽能加速推理但会降低模型精度，现有恢复方法效果有限，需要一种高效且能大幅恢复精度的剪枝后修复方法。
AI.method: 利用少量无标签校准样本，优化剪枝网络的内部状态表征，使其与原始（未剪枝）网络的内部表征对齐。
AI.result: 在ViT网络上去除50%权重时，恢复精度比现有最优方法提升22%；在DeiT-B/ImageNet上去除75%权重时，仅用0.4%训练图像校准，恢复82%原始精度，而对比方法仅恢复40%。
AI.conclusion: STARFISH是一种高效且强大的剪枝后修复方法，尤其在激进剪枝场景下优势显著。

title: Diamonds in the Sky: Pareidolic Animals in Clouds
summary: People often see animal shapes in clouds, a phenomenon known as pareidolia. We propose an AI-based method that aims to predict which animals people are likely to perceive in clouds, even though state-of-the-art recognition methods typically fail to detect such animals. Additionally, we introduce a method to assist individuals in perceiving specific pareidolic animals, even if they did not recognize them initially. Our approach uses a diffusion model to transform cloud segments into an animal shape that visually resemble the original cloud. This diffusion technique is inspired by the observation that the diffusion process succeeds only when the target animal resembles the shape of the cloud, and that subtle visual hints often suffice to help individuals recognize specific pareidolic animals. A generated image, successfully derived from the diffusion model, is then used to predict the pareidolic animal. Additionally, a short morphing video transitioning from the generated image back to the original cloud segment is employed to further enhance the human's perception of the pareidolic animals.

AI.tldr: 提出基于扩散模型的AI方法，预测人们从云朵中感知到的动物（空想性错视），并通过生成类似动物的云图像及变形视频，帮助人们识别原本未察觉的动物形状。
AI.motivation: 人们常从云朵中看到动物形状（空想性错视），但现有AI识别方法无法检测这类主观感知的动物，因此需要一种能预测并辅助人类感知这些动物的方法。
AI.method: 利用扩散模型将云朵片段转化为视觉上与原云相似的动物形状；扩散过程仅在目标动物与云朵形状相似时成功；利用成功生成的图像预测空想性动物；并制作从生成图像回到原云朵的变形视频，增强人类感知。
AI.result: 扩散模型成功生成与原始云朵形状相似的动物图像，并能据此预测人们可能感知的空想性动物；变形视频进一步提升了人类对空想性动物的识别。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种基于扩散模型的空想性错视预测与增强方法，有效弥补了传统识别方法在此主观感知任务上的不足。

title: DFlare: Scaling Up Draft Capacity for Block Diffusion Speculative Decoding
summary: Block diffusion speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by predicting all tokens within a block simultaneously for the target model to verify in parallel. Predicting an entire block at once requires a sufficiently capable draft model and effective utilization of the target model's internal knowledge. However, the state-of-the-art method DFlash constrains all draft layers to share a single fused representation derived from only a few target layers, limiting per-layer expressiveness and hindering further scaling of draft capacity. In this paper, we present \modelname, which flares out the narrow conditioning bottleneck of DFlash through a lightweight layer-wise fusion mechanism: each draft layer attends to its own learnable combination of a broad set of target layers at negligible overhead, simultaneously injecting richer target knowledge and providing every draft layer with a distinct input. This enhanced per-layer expressiveness enables scaling the draft model to deeper architectures with consistent gains. We further scale training data from 800K to 2.4M samples to fully exploit the enlarged capacity. On six benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, code generation, and conversation, \modelname attains average wall-clock speedups of 5.52x on Qwen3-4B, 5.46x on Qwen3-8B, and 3.91x on GPT-OSS-20B, improving over DFlash by roughly 11\%, 8\%, and 5\% respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tencent/AngelSlim.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Flashed模型，通过轻量级逐层融合机制扩展DFlash的窄条件瓶颈，每个草稿层可关注目标模型多个层的可学习组合，实现更丰富的逐层表达，从而扩大草稿模型深度并提升推理速度。在六个基准上，对Qwen3-4B/8B和GPT-OSS-20B分别实现5.52x/5.46x/3.91x加速，相比DFlash提升约11%/8%/5%。
AI.motivation: 现有块级投机解码方法DFlash中，所有草稿层共享一个从仅少数目标层导出的融合表示，限制了逐层表达能力，阻碍了草稿模型容量的进一步扩展。
AI.method: 提出轻量级逐层融合机制：每个草稿层可关注其自身对目标模型多个层的可学习组合，为每个草稿层注入更丰富的目标知识并提供不同的输入，同时几乎不增加开销；并将训练数据从80万扩大到240万样本。
AI.result: 在数学推理、代码生成和对话六个基准上，Qwen3-4B加速5.52x，Qwen3-8B加速5.46x，GPT-OSS-20B加速3.91x，相比DFlash分别提升约11%、8%和5%。
AI.conclusion: 通过增强逐层表达能力并扩大训练数据，Flashed成功扩展了草稿模型深度，显著优于现有方法DFlash，且代码已开源。

title: Repair Before Veto: Repair-Augmented Constraint Learning for Contextual Decisions
summary: Hard constraints are usually treated as terminal vetoes: once a candidate violates a requirement, the learned rule rejects it and any repair is handled outside the decision semantics. This misses a common deployed regime in which the system already knows a finite menu of modifications, such as adding a ticket option, changing a configuration, or requesting an available service upgrade. Existing constraint-learning, soft-relaxation, and recourse methods address nearby problems, but they do not learn whether an option should be repaired before being vetoed. We introduce Repair-Augmented Constraint Learning (RACL), a contextual decision framework that lifts known repair operators into the classifier semantics. A candidate is accepted when an affordable repair makes it feasible and preferred enough; otherwise the system returns a structured rejection credit and, when applicable, a repair plan. This repair-before-veto view strictly generalizes no-repair HASSLE-style semantics, reveals an irreducible false-veto gap for terminal-veto rules, separates binary-label non-identifiability from decision-rule learnability, and gives capacity and calibration bounds for the observed-feasibility shared-weight setting. Across controlled and DB1B-derived benchmarks, RACL recovers the intended credit and repair structure. On the hardest raw-data-derived tier, validation-selected RACL reduces false vetoes to 10/4039 (FVR 0.0025), versus about 1064/4039 for the strongest repair-search black-box baseline, while making the FVR/EDR trade-off explicit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出修复增强约束学习（RACL），将已知的修复操作提升到分类器语义中，实现"先修复再否决"的决策框架，显著降低错误否决率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将硬约束视为终端否决，一旦违反规则就直接拒绝，没有考虑系统已知的有限修改菜单（如添加选项、更改配置等），无法在否决前学习是否应该进行修复。
AI.method: 提出RACL框架，将修复算子提升到分类器语义中：当存在可负担的修复使候选变得可行且足够偏好时予以接受；否则返回结构化拒绝信用及修复计划。严格泛化了无修复的HASSLE风格语义。
AI.result: 在最难的原始数据层级上，验证选择的RACL将错误否决降至10/4039（FVR 0.0025），而最强的修复搜索黑盒基线约为1064/4039，同时显式权衡了FVR/EDR。
AI.conclusion: 修复优先于否决的视角严格泛化了传统终端否决语义，揭示了终端否决规则的不可约错误否决间隙，并分离了二分类标签不可辨识性与决策规则可学习性。

title: Local MixVR: Breaking the Communication-Sample Dependence in Distributed Learning
summary: Communication overhead is a crucial bottleneck in scalable distributed learning. While existing methods aim to efficiently utilize data points, such as Local SGD, Minibatch SGD, and their accelerated variants, they still exhibit communication-round complexity that scales with the total number of samples $N$. In this paper, we introduce Local MixVR, a distributed framework that integrates local updates with variance-reduction techniques to mitigate local noise. We show that Local MixVR is the first distributed method to eliminate the dependence of communication complexity on $N$, achieving a complexity that scales only with the number of workers $M$. In common regimes where $M<O\left(N^{1/4}\right)$, Local MixVR outperforms the state-of-the-art Minibatch Accelerated SGD baseline, bridging a long-standing gap in distributed optimization and establishing a new paradigm for communication-efficient training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Local MixVR，一种将局部更新与方差缩减技术相结合的分布式学习框架，首次消除了通信复杂度对总样本数N的依赖，使其仅与工作节点数M相关。当M<O(N^{1/4})时，该方法优于现有最优的Minibatch Accelerated SGD基线。
AI.motivation: 通信开销是可扩展分布式学习中的关键瓶颈，现有方法（如Local SGD、Minibatch SGD等）的通信轮次复杂度仍随总样本数N增长，亟需一种消除该依赖的方法。
AI.method: 将局部更新（local updates）与方差缩减（variance-reduction）技术相结合，提出Local MixVR分布式框架，通过降低局部噪声来减少通信需求。
AI.result: Local MixVR首次将通信复杂度从依赖N降低为仅依赖工作节点数M，在M<O(N^{1/4})的常见场景下优于Minibatch Accelerated SGD基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法弥合了分布式优化中长期存在的差距，为通信高效的训练建立了新范式。

title: Training-free image inversion for one-step diffusion models
summary: In this work, we introduce a novel training-free inversion (TFinv) framework for one-step diffusion models,addressing key challenges in real image inversion and editing. We first identify two critical factors hamperingreal-image inversion and editing: (1) Initial Latent Editability, which is related to the distance between theinitial noise and the ideal Gaussian distribution, and (2) Caption Gap, which means the alignment betweentext captions and image representations. Both factors influence inversion efficiency and the editability ofone-step diffusion models. Then, we propose two novel techniques: iterative noise alignment (iterNA), whichminimizes the distribution gap to align with the normal Gaussian distribution, and suffix learning (suffL),which enhances text-to-image caption alignment by introducing learned suffix prompt tokens. These techniquesenable precise inversion of input images into their initial noise representations and facilitate image editing.Furthermore, we propose a mask-based editing technique for localized edits while preserving backgroundintegrity. Comprehensive experiments on the PIE-Bench dataset validate that our method TFinv not onlyachieves state-of-the-art performance in one-step diffusion editing, but also significantly outperforms existingmultistep approaches in efficiency. The code is available at https://github.com/tttao-uwu/TFinv.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TFinv框架，通过迭代噪声对齐（iterNA）和后缀学习（suffL）两项技术，实现单步扩散模型的无训练实时图像反演与编辑，在PIE-Bench数据集上达到SOTA性能且效率显著优于多步方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单步扩散模型在真实图像反演和编辑中面临两大关键挑战：(1) 初始潜在可编辑性——初始噪声与理想高斯分布的距离影响反演效率；(2) 描述差距——文本描述与图像表示之间的对齐不足。这两个因素共同制约了反演效率与可编辑性。
AI.method: 提出TFinv框架，包含三项核心技术：(1) 迭代噪声对齐（iterNA）——最小化分布差距以对齐标准高斯分布；(2) 后缀学习（suffL）——引入可学习的后缀提示词，增强文本到图像的描述对齐；(3) 基于掩码的编辑技术——实现局部编辑同时保持背景完整性。
AI.result: 在PIE-Bench数据集上的综合实验表明，TFinv在单步扩散编辑任务中达到SOTA性能，且在效率上显著优于现有的多步方法。
AI.conclusion: TFinv有效解决了单步扩散模型在真实图像反演与编辑中的关键瓶颈，为高效图像编辑提供了新范式，代码已开源。

title: The Role of Ambiguity in Error Prediction via Uncertainty Quantification
comment: 8 pages not including references and appendices, 3 figures
summary: The task of Error Prediction, namely predicting whether a model output is correct, is commonly tackled with Uncertainty Quantification (UQ). However, while uncertainty metrics capture when models lack knowledge or capacity to make a prediction, they also reflect aleatoric uncertainty, which is inherent in the model input and context. This paper presents a method for improving error prediction for Large Language Models (LLMs), by disentangling input ambiguity from UQ signal. We conduct experiments on the task of Question Answering (QA) with six UQ metrics and show that UQ metrics are more predictive of errors on unambiguous instances than on questions with multiple plausible answers. We use Gated Experts and Selective Prediction to incorporate gold and predicted ambiguity labels into the error prediction pipeline. We find that ambiguity information improves error prediction scores across model families, training and evaluation paradigms, datasets (including allegedly unambiguous ones), and sources of aleatoric uncertainty, yielding improvements of over 10 points of PRR for individual UQ metrics on standard datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过解耦输入模糊性与不确定性量化信号来改进大语言模型错误预测的方法，实验表明在问答任务中融合模糊性信息可将错误预测性能提升超过10个PRR点。
AI.motivation: 传统的不确定性量化（UQ）指标虽然能捕捉模型缺乏知识或能力的情况，但同时也反映了输入中固有的偶然不确定性（aleatoric uncertainty），这限制了错误预测（Error Prediction）的准确性。本文旨在通过分离输入模糊性来提升LLM的错误预测能力。
AI.method: 在问答任务中使用六种UQ指标进行实验；采用门控专家（Gated Experts）和选择性预测（Selective Prediction）方法，将真实模糊性标签和预测模糊性标签融入错误预测流程。
AI.result: UQ指标在无歧义实例上的错误预测能力优于有多个合理答案的问题；融合模糊性信息后，在多种模型家族、训练评估范式、数据集（包括声称无歧义的数据集）及偶然不确定性来源上均提升了错误预测分数，部分UQ指标在标准数据集上PRR提升超过10个点。
AI.conclusion: 输入模糊性是影响UQ指标错误预测效果的关键因素，显式建模并解耦模糊性能够显著提升LLM的错误预测性能，且该方法具有跨模型、跨数据集的良好泛化性。

title: Forget Attention: Importance-Aware Attention Is All You Need
summary: Combining attention's global retrieval with the sequential importance signal of state space models (SSMs) is the open challenge of hybrid language modeling. Transformers see everywhere but cannot prioritize; SSMs know what matters but cannot revisit. Existing hybrids -- Jamba (block level) and Hymba (head level) -- place the two in separate compartments, so neither informs the other during the attention computation itself. We propose SISA (SSM-Informed Softmax Attention), which adds an SSM-derived importance term directly inside the attention score and realizes the full operation as a single SDPA call on augmented query/key vectors -- no recurrent state, no custom kernel. At 152M / 5B tokens, SISA reaches LAMBADA-greedy 17.3% (vs. Transformer 13.9 and Mamba-3 15.5) and attains NIAH 100% from step 1K, 7x faster than Transformer's retrieval convergence; at 369M, Mamba-3 leads LAMBADA while SISA preserves perfect NIAH and stock-SDPA execution. SISA thus defines a third design axis for SSM-attention hybrids -- score-level fusion -- beyond the block-level and head-level paradigms that have dominated the field.

AI.tldr: SISA提出了一种新的混合语言模型设计范式——在注意力分数层面融合SSM重要性信号，而非传统的块级或头级分离方案。通过将SSM导出的重要性项直接注入Softmax注意力分数中，并利用增强的Q/K向量通过标准SDPA实现，无需循环状态或自定义内核。实验表明SISA在LAMBADA和NIAH任务上取得优异表现，且检索收敛速度比Transformer快7倍。
AI.motivation: 现有混合模型（如Jamba的块级、Hymba的头级）将注意力和SSM置于独立隔间中，两者在注意力计算过程中相互隔离，无法互相指导。而Transformer全局可见但无法区分重要性，SSM擅长序列重要性但不可回溯，如何真正融合两者优势是开放挑战。
AI.method: SISA将SSM衍生的重要性项直接注入注意力分数内部，通过增强的查询/键向量实现完整的SDPA调用，不需要循环状态或自定义内核，实现了分数层面的融合。
AI.result: 在152M/5B token规模下，SISA在LAMBADA-greedy上达17.3%（超越Transformer的13.9和Mamba-3的15.5），NIAH从第1K步即达100%，检索收敛速度是Transformer的7倍。在369M规模下，Mamba-3在LAMBADA上领先，但SISA保持NIAH完美表现和标准SDPA执行。
AI.conclusion: SISA定义了SSM-注意力混合的第三个设计轴——分数级融合，超越了此前主导的块级和头级范式，提供了一种更细粒度的融合方案，兼具性能优势和实现简洁性。

title: Lagrangian Perturbation Diffusion Steering: Latent Reinforcement Learning for Generative Policies
comment: Accepted as a regular paper at ICML 2026
summary: Behavior cloning with high-capacity generative policies achieves strong imitation performance, but is often limited by demonstration coverage and distribution shift. Direct reinforcement learning fine-tuning can improve performance, but updating large action decoders is frequently unstable and sample inefficient. We propose Lagrangian Perturbation Diffusion Steering (LP-DS), a lightweight adaptation method that improves a frozen generative policy by learning a compact noise-space perturbation before decoding. LP-DS optimizes this perturbation with a Lagrangian trust-region objective, improving downstream value while constraining deviation from the latent prior. Across RoboMimic manipulation, OpenAI Gym locomotion, and Adroit dexterous manipulation benchmarks, LP-DS improves sample efficiency, success, and return while maintaining higher action-space entropy than unconstrained noise-space steering, with return improvements of up to 25% over prior baselines. Additional evaluations with flow-matching backbones, a large vision-language-action model, and physical Franka deployment show that LP-DS is not limited to compact diffusion policies or simulated benchmarks. Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/lp-ds/home.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为LP-DS的轻量级微调方法，通过在冻结的生成策略的噪声空间中学习受拉格朗日信任域约束的扰动，来提升行为克隆策略的性能，在多个机器人操控和运动基准测试中取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 高容量生成策略的行为克隆受限于演示覆盖和分布偏移，直接强化学习微调大型动作解码器不稳定且样本效率低。
AI.method: Lagrangian Perturbation Diffusion Steering (LP-DS)：在冻结生成策略的噪声空间中学习紧凑扰动，通过拉格朗日信任域目标优化，在提升下游价值的同时限制对潜在先验的偏离。
AI.result: 在RoboMimic、OpenAI Gym、Adroit等多个基准上，LP-DS提升了样本效率、成功率和回报，保持更高的动作空间熵，回报相比先前基线提升高达25%。
AI.conclusion: LP-DS是一种轻量级、高效且通用的方法，不仅适用于紧凑扩散策略和模拟基准，还可在流匹配骨干网络、大型视觉-语言-动作模型及真实物理Franka机器人上有效工作。

title: PAI-Studio: Cinematic Video Background Replacement with Camera-Aware Motion
summary: We present PAI-Studio, a new reference-conditioned video synthesis task that addresses a long-standing challenge in cinematic background replacement: generating dynamic backgrounds aligned with foreground motion while preserving foreground identity, matching reference scene appearance, and achieving globally consistent illumination with realistic foreground relighting. Existing open-source systems and commercial APIs cannot simultaneously ensure motion-consistent background generation, high-fidelity foreground relighting and foreground identity preservation, often resulting in static backgrounds, inconsistent boundaries, and noticeable compositing artifacts. To bridge this gap, we build upon a Diffusion Transformer video backbone and reformulate the problem as an in-context conditional generation task. Through bidirectional attention, our model jointly captures foreground dynamics and background reference information within a unified architecture. We further construct a 30K-scale dataset sourced from high-quality films and online videos to support this task. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing open-source and commercial API solutions.

AI.tldr: PAI-Studio提出了一个参考条件视频合成任务，通过扩散Transformer和双向注意力机制，实现动态背景生成、前景重打光与身份保持，并构建了30K数据集，显著优于现有方案。
AI.motivation: 现有开源系统和商业API无法同时保证运动一致的背景生成、高保真前景重打光和前景身份保持，常导致静态背景、不一致边界和可见合成伪影。
AI.method: 基于扩散Transformer视频骨干，将问题重构为上下文条件生成任务，通过双向注意力机制在统一架构中联合捕捉前景动态和背景参考信息，并构建30K高质量电影和视频数据集。
AI.result: 大量评估表明该方法在动态背景生成、前景重打光、身份保持等方面显著优于现有开源和商业API方案。
AI.conclusion: PAI-Studio填补了电影级背景替换中运动一致背景生成与前景重打光的技术空白，为视频合成提供了更高质量的解决方案。

title: PortBERT: Navigating the Depths of Portuguese Language Models
summary: Transformer models dominate modern NLP, but efficient, language-specific models remain scarce. In Portuguese, most focus on scale or accuracy, often neglecting training and deployment efficiency. In the present work, we introduce PortBERT, a family of RoBERTa-based language models for Portuguese, designed to balance performance and efficiency. Trained from scratch on over 450 GB of deduplicated and filtered mC4 and OSCAR23 from CulturaX using fairseq, PortBERT leverages byte-level BPE tokenization and stable pre-training routines across both GPU and TPU processors. We release two variants, PortBERT base and PortBERT large, and evaluate them on ExtraGLUE, a suite of translated GLUE and SuperGLUE tasks. Both models perform competitively, matching or surpassing existing monolingual and multilingual models. Beyond accuracy, we report training and inference times as well as fine-tuning throughput, providing practical insights into model efficiency. PortBERT thus complements prior work by addressing the underexplored dimension of compute-performance tradeoffs in Portuguese NLP. We release all models on Huggingface and provide fairseq checkpoints to support further research and applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 PortBERT，一个面向葡萄牙语的 RoBERTa 模型家族，在大规模数据上从零训练，兼顾性能与效率，在 ExtraGLUE 上表现优异，并公开了模型权重与检查点。
AI.motivation: 葡萄牙语 NLP 中现有模型多关注规模或精度，忽视了训练与部署的效率，缺乏兼顾性能与计算效率的专用语言模型。
AI.method: 基于 RoBERTa 架构，从 450GB+ 的 mC4 和 OSCAR23 数据（经 CulturaX 去重过滤）上使用 fairseq 从零训练，采用 byte-level BPE 分词，支持 GPU 和 TPU 训练，发布 base 和 large 两个版本。
AI.result: 在 ExtraGLUE 基准上，PortBERT 匹配或超越了现有的单语和多语模型；同时报告了训练、推理时间和微调吞吐量，展示了计算效率优势。
AI.conclusion: PortBERT 填补了葡萄牙语 NLP 中计算-性能权衡这一被忽视的维度，为高效语言模型研究提供了实用参考，模型已在 Huggingface 和 fairseq 上开源。

title: Coordination Graphs for Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
comment: Accepted at the Reinforcement Learning Conference (RLC) 2026. 40 pages (12 main + 28 appendix), 5 figures, 16 tables, 7 theorems
summary: Constrained Multi-agent reinforcement learning (CMARL) faces two intertwined challenges: the joint action space grows exponentially with the number of agents, and additional requirements couple agents in ways that reward structure alone does not capture. We introduce Coordination Graphs for Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (CG-CMARL), a framework that addresses both challenges by combining coordination graphs with Lagrangian duality. The system decomposes the joint problem into pairwise regions, each served by a set of shared Q-functions, one for the primary objective and one for each of the constraints, so that the number of learned models is independent of the number of agents. At execution time, Max-Sum message passing coordinates actions across the factor graph, while a Lagrangian multiplier controls the objective--constraint tradeoff, allowing a single trained model to trace a Pareto front without retraining. We provide convergence guarantees under mild conditions, together with a compositional error bound that decomposes into separate interpretable sources, each traceable to a specific design choice and independently controllable. Experiments on cooperative navigation tasks (where teams of up to 10 agents must coordinate to reach target positions while satisfying pairwise constraints) show that our method produces Pareto fronts dominating established baselines trained at fixed reward-shaping ratios, while scaling to team sizes where centralized approaches become intractable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CG-CMARL框架，通过结合协调图与拉格朗日对偶，将约束多智能体强化学习中的联合问题分解为 pairwise 区域，使得学习模型数量与智能体数量无关，并通过Max-Sum消息传递协调动作、拉格朗日乘子控制目标-约束权衡，实现单模型追踪帕累托前沿，在协作导航任务中优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 约束多智能体强化学习面临两个交织挑战：联合动作空间随智能体数量指数增长，以及额外约束以奖励结构无法捕捉的方式耦合智能体。现有方法难以同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 将联合问题分解为pairwise区域，每个区域由共享Q函数集服务（一个主目标、多个约束），模型数量与智能体数无关；执行时用Max-Sum消息传递协调动作，拉格朗日乘子控制目标-约束权衡，单模型即可追踪帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 在最多10个智能体的协作导航任务中，该方法生成的帕累托前沿优于固定奖励塑形比率的基线方法，且能扩展到集中式方法无法处理的团队规模。
AI.conclusion: 提供了温和条件下的收敛保证和可分解的组合误差界，每个误差来源可追踪到具体设计选择并可独立控制，验证了框架的有效性和可扩展性。

title: When Data Is Scarce: Scaling Sparse Language Models with Repeated Training
summary: Scaling laws for dense LLMs under infinite data are well explored, but how sparsity interacts with limited data is not. In this work, we study sparse training in data-constrained regimes where limited unique tokens require multi-epoch training. Our experiments span models up to 1.92B parameters in the fitting set, sparsity up to 93.75%, unique data budgets up to 2.6B tokens, and total training tokens up to 41.6B over 16 epochs; we further validate extrapolation on held-out dense-equivalent models up to 7.68B parameters. We find that: 1. Sparse scaling in data-limited settings: We introduce a scaling law that models loss as a function of active parameters, unique tokens, data repetition, and sparsity, accurately predicting performance across compute and data budgets. 2. Delayed data saturation: sparse training postpones diminishing returns from repeated data, making multi-epoch training more effective. 3. Resource trade-offs: With fixed data, loss-optimal sparsity is moderate ~ 50%, while compute-optimal sparsity is higher and grows with data scale. Overall, sparsity is not just a tool for efficiency, but a mechanism for improving scaling trade-offs under data scarcity. Our code is available at: https://github.com/boqian333/sparse-dc-scaling.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了数据受限条件下稀疏训练（Sparse Training）的缩放规律，发现稀疏性可以延缓数据重复带来的收益递减，并提出了一个适用于有限数据场景的稀疏缩放定律。
AI.motivation: 现有的大模型缩放定律（Scaling Laws）主要针对稠密模型（Dense LLMs）在无限数据场景下进行研究，但实际中数据往往是有限的（需多轮训练），而稀疏性如何与有限数据交互尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过大规模实验（模型达1.92B参数，稀疏度达93.75%，数据量2.6B tokens，总训练tokens达41.6B，最多16个epoch，并在7.68B参数上验证外推），提出一个将损失建模为活跃参数、独特tokens、数据重复次数和稀疏度函数的缩放定律。
AI.result: 1. 提出数据受限下的稀疏缩放定律，可准确预测性能；2. 稀疏训练延缓了数据重复带来的收益递减，使多轮训练更有效；3. 固定数据下损失最优稀疏度约50%，计算最优稀疏度更高且随数据规模增长。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏性不仅是提升效率的工具，更是在数据稀缺条件下改善缩放权衡的机制。

title: Agent Skills Should Go Beyond Text: The Case for Visual Skills
summary: Reusable skills are a key mechanism for extending agent capabilities, allowing agents to accumulate experience and solve increasingly complex tasks. Yet most existing skill-learning methods store reusable experience as text-only assets, such as instructions, reasoning traces, or summarized trajectories. We argue that this text-only paradigm creates a fundamental bottleneck for visual-centric tasks, where reusable knowledge often depends on spatial layout, visual grounding, fine-grained appearance, and localized state changes. To address this limitation, we propose \textbf{\NAME}, a multimodal skill paradigm that combines declarative textual logic with explicit visual support. We distinguish three reusable forms: static priors for stable spatial conventions, dynamic priors for in-situ visual working memory, and interleaved visual skills that bind ordered text steps to the source frames, screenshots, or page regions that justify them. Rather than only describing what to do, visual skills also encode where to look, how to inspect, and how to verify visual outcomes. To scale visual-skill construction, we introduce \textbf{\SYSTEM}, an automatic system that converts agent experience into reusable multimodal skills by preserving textual reasoning, spatial references, visual boundaries, and interaction patterns from task trajectories. Experiments on GUI and other visual-centric tasks show that visual skills consistently outperform text-only skills, particularly when success requires spatial correspondence, visual evidence, and state-aware interaction. These results support our central position: reusable agent skills should go beyond text and become multimodal assets for future multimodal agents.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多模态技能范式，将文本逻辑与视觉支持相结合，以解决传统纯文本技能在视觉中心任务中的瓶颈，并构建了自动化的视觉技能生成系统，实验证明其优于纯文本方法。
AI.motivation: 现有技能学习方法仅将可复用经验存储为纯文本资产（指令、推理轨迹等），但视觉中心任务（如GUI操作）中许多关键知识涉及空间布局、视觉定位、细粒度外观和局部状态变化，纯文本范式无法有效捕捉这类信息，形成了根本性的瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出多模态技能范式NAME，包含三种可复用形式：1) 静态先验（稳定的空间约定），2) 动态先验（原位视觉工作记忆），3) 交错视觉技能（将有序文本步骤与源帧、截图或页面区域绑定）。并构建了自动系统SYSTEM，通过保留任务轨迹中的文本推理、空间引用、视觉边界和交互模式，将智能体经验自动转化为可复用的多模态技能。
AI.result: 在GUI及其他视觉中心任务上的实验表明，视觉技能一致地优于纯文本技能，特别是在需要空间对应、视觉证据和状态感知交互的任务中表现更为显著。
AI.conclusion: 可复用的智能体技能应超越纯文本形式，成为面向未来多模态智能体的多模态资产。

title: A Primer in Post-Training Reasoning Data: What We Know About How It Works
summary: Post-training has become a primary driver of recent progress in large reasoning models, and reasoning data are often the key variable determining whether this stage succeeds. Work on post-training reasoning data has grown rapidly, yet this literature remains scattered across dataset papers, reinforcement-learning recipes, reward-model studies, benchmarks, and frontier system reports. This paper is the first primer to synthesize over 150 key public studies and system reports on post-training reasoning data. We organize the field around four questions: what data objects exist, what makes them useful, how they are constructed, and how they scale. Together, this organization provides an attribution framework for future reasoning-data releases and post-training recipes.

AI.tldr: 本文是首篇系统性综述，整合了150余篇关于大模型后训练推理数据的研究，围绕数据对象、效用、构建方法和扩展方式四个问题组织分析框架。
AI.motivation: 后训练已成为大推理模型进展的主要驱动力，而推理数据是决定成败的关键变量。但相关文献分散在数据集论文、强化学习配方、奖励模型研究、基准测试和前沿系统报告中，缺乏系统性梳理。
AI.method: 综述了150余篇重要公开研究和系统报告，围绕四个核心问题组织：推理数据有哪些对象类型、什么使它们有用、如何构建它们、以及如何扩展它们。
AI.result: 建立了一个归因框架，可用于指导未来的推理数据发布和后训练配方设计。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为后训练推理数据领域提供了首个系统性组织框架，有助于研究者理解该领域的全貌并指导后续工作。

title: SIRI: Self-Internalizing Reinforcement Learning with Intrinsic Skills for LLM Agent Training
summary: Long-horizon LLM agents can benefit from reusable skills, yet existing skill-based methods often rely on external skill generators during training or persistent skill retrieval at inference, increasing engineering complexity, context length, and deployment latency. We propose Self-Internalizing Reinforcement learning with Intrinsic skills (SIRI), a three-phase framework that enables agents to discover, validate, and internalize skills without external skill generators or inference-time skill banks. SIRI first warms up the policy with GiGPO to acquire basic interaction ability and collect successful skill-free trajectories. It then performs self-skill mining, where the current policy summarizes compact skills from its own successful plain rollouts and validates them through paired skill-augmented and skill-free rollouts. Finally, SIRI distills only beneficial skill-guided action tokens into the plain policy using trajectory-level utility and action-level advantage. At inference, the agent runs with the original prompt only. On ALFWorld and WebShop with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, SIRI improves GiGPO from 0.908 to 0.930 on ALFWorld and from 0.728 to 0.813 on WebShop, outperforming prompt-based, RL-based, and memory-augmented baselines. Further analysis shows that our self-mining strategy can achieve performance comparable to distillation with closed-source large model. Our code is available at https://github.com/kirito618/SIRI.

AI.tldr: SIRI是一种三阶段框架，让LLM智能体无需外部技能生成器或推理时技能库，通过自我发现、验证和内化技能来提升长程任务性能，在ALFWorld和WebShop上超越了现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有基于技能的agent方法需要在训练时依赖外部技能生成器，或在推理时持续检索技能库，导致工程复杂度高、上下文长度增加和部署延迟大。作者希望让agent在不依赖外部工具的情况下，自主发现并内化有用技能。
AI.method: SIRI包含三个阶段：(1) 用GiGPO预热策略获得基本交互能力并收集无技能成功轨迹；(2) 自我技能挖掘：当前策略从自身成功轨迹中总结技能，并通过配对的有/无技能轨迹验证技能有效性；(3) 技能内化：利用轨迹级效用和动作级优势，将有益技能引导的动作token蒸馏到无技能策略中。推理时仅用原始prompt。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld上从0.908提升至0.930，在WebShop上从0.728提升至0.813，均优于基于prompt、RL和记忆增强的基线。自我挖掘策略性能接近使用闭源大模型蒸馏的效果。
AI.conclusion: SIRI证明了agent可以在不依赖外部技能生成器和推理时技能库的情况下，通过自我内化技能来显著提升长程任务性能，是一种更简洁高效的技能学习范式。

title: Fairness in two-player zero-sum games with bandit feedback
summary: We study two-player zero-sum games (TPZSGs) with bandit feedback under fairness constraints requiring every action to be played with probability at least $α/m$. Existing instance-dependent results target $\textit{pure}$ Nash equilibria, while fairness generically produces $\textit{mixed}$ equilibria, a harder learning target. Our key technical tool is a reparametrization: every fair strategy decomposes as $p = (α/m)\mathbf{1} + (1-α)\widetilde{p}$ with $\widetilde{p} \in Δ_m$, and substituting into the payoff form yields $p^{\top}Aq = \widetilde{p}^{\top}\widetilde{A} q$ for a fair payoff matrix $\widetilde{A} := (1-α)A + α\mathbf{1} c^{\top}$, where $c_j = \tfrac{1}{m}\sum_i A(i,j)$ is the column-mean vector. The fair game on $A$ is then equivalent to a standard zero-sum game on $\widetilde{A}$, so equilibrium existence, KKT structure, and LP basis stability reduce to classical results applied to $\widetilde{A}$. We derive the fair minimax value, fair Nash equilibrium, fair regret, and a clean dual representation showing the price of fairness is at most $α(1-1/m)$ and vanishes whenever the unconstrained equilibrium already has full support. Our main result is an $\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})$ regret bound for an Explore-Then-Commit algorithm, $\texttt{Fair-ETC-TPZSG}$, applicable to general mixed fair equilibria, together with a discussion of why naive action elimination does not readily improve it. When the fair equilibrium has a single dominant action, equivalently when $\widetilde{p}^{\star}$ is a vertex of $Δ_m$, the bound sharpens to instance-dependent $\widetilde{O}(1/\widetildeΔ(α)^{2})$, where $\widetildeΔ(α)$ is the LP-margin gap.

AI.tldr: 本文研究公平约束下的两人零和博弈（TPZSG），通过重参数化技巧将公平博弈转化为标准零和博弈，推导了公平均衡的存在性与对偶表示，并提出了Explore-Then-Commit算法Fair-ETC-TPZSG，获得了$\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})$的遗憾界，并在特定条件下可改进为实例依赖的$\widetilde{O}(1/\widetildeΔ(α)^{2})$。
AI.motivation: 现有针对两人零和博弈的实例依赖结果主要关注纯纳什均衡，但公平约束（每个动作至少以概率$α/m$被选中）通常产生混合均衡，学习难度更大。因此需要新的理论框架和算法来处理公平约束下的混合均衡学习问题。
AI.method: 提出重参数化技巧：将公平策略分解为$p = (α/m)\mathbf{1} + (1-α)\widetilde{p}$，代入收益函数后得到公平收益矩阵$\widetilde{A} := (1-α)A + α\mathbf{1} c^{\top}$，将公平博弈等价转化为标准零和博弈。基于此推导公平极小极大值、公平纳什均衡、公平遗憾及对偶表示。提出Explore-Then-Commit算法Fair-ETC-TPZSG。
AI.result: 主要结果：$\widetilde{O}(T^{2/3})$遗憾界；公平代价最多为$α(1-1/m)$，且在无约束均衡已全支持时为零；当公平均衡具有单一主导动作时，界可改进为实例依赖的$\widetilde{O}(1/\widetildeΔ(α)^{2})$。
AI.conclusion: 通过重参数化，公平约束下的TPZSG可转化为标准零和博弈问题，从而利用经典理论结果。所提算法在一般混合公平均衡下实现次线性遗憾，并在特定条件下获得更优的实例依赖界。

title: DENSER: Depth-Guided Ensemble with Staged EFA-GS Reconstruction for Soccer Novel View Synthesis
comment: CVPR 2026 SoccerNet Novel View Synthesis Challenge, Rank 1
summary: We propose DENSER, a Depth-guided ENSemble with Staged EFA-GS Reconstruction for soccer novel view synthesis. DENSER extends EFA-GS with three key contributions: (1) camera-height-based loss weighting that prioritises ground-level broadcast views, (2) monocular depth supervision from Depth-Anything-V2 to regularise geometry in textureless regions, and (3) a three-model pixel-average ensemble whose members diverge from a shared base checkpoint by varying training length and Gaussian scale clamping. On five held-out challenge scenes we achieve a mean PSNR of 29.89 dB, SSIM of 0.791, and LPIPS of 0.366.

AI.tldr: DENSER 是一种用于足球比赛新视角合成的深度引导集成方法，通过三方面改进 EFA-GS：基于相机高度的损失加权、单目深度监督、以及三模型集成，在五个场景上达到 PSNR 29.89 dB。
AI.motivation: 现有的新视角合成方法在处理足球比赛场景（尤其是地面广播视角）时，存在纹理稀疏区域几何重建不准、模型泛化性不足等问题，难以生成高质量的虚拟视角。
AI.method: (1) 基于相机高度的损失加权，优先优化地面视角；(2) 引入 Depth-Anything-V2 的单目深度估计作为监督信号，正则化无纹理区域的几何结构；(3) 构建三模型像素级集成，各模型从同一基座出发，通过不同训练轮数和高斯尺度裁剪实现差异。
AI.result: 在五个保留挑战场景上，平均 PSNR 29.89 dB，SSIM 0.791，LPIPS 0.366。
AI.conclusion: DENSER 通过深度引导和集成策略有效提升了足球场景的新视角合成质量，尤其是在地面广播视角方面表现优异。

title: Multilingual Idioms in Sentences and Conversations Across High-, Medium-, and Low-Resource Languages
summary: Idiomatic expressions pose a major challenge for multilingual NLP because their meanings shift between figurative and literal usage, often requiring context for accurate interpretation. Prior work has focused on high-resource languages typically evaluates isolated idiom-meaning questions, overlooking realistic discourse. We introduce MIDI, a multilingual idiom dataset spanning 3 high-, 3 medium-, and 12 low-resource languages, curated by native speakers. Unlike previous datasets, MIDI provides idioms embedded in both sentence-level and conversational contexts, capturing both literal and figurative readings. Benchmarking state-of-the-art models shows that idiom comprehension degrades in low-resource languages and that, in all resource tiers, literal interpretations are substantially harder than figurative ones. Conversational context improves performance but does not eliminate these disparities. Through controlled tests and interventions on hidden representations, we further separate memorization from reasoning, exposing core limitations of current models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MIDI，一个覆盖18种语言（含12种低资源语言）的多语习语数据集，包含句子和对话两种上下文，揭示了当前模型在处理习语时存在的资源差异、字面义理解困难以及记忆与推理的分离问题。
AI.motivation: 现有习语理解研究多聚焦于高资源语言，且通常在孤立的词义判断题上评估，忽略了真实语篇中的上下文信息。
AI.method: 构建MIDI数据集（多语习语数据集），包含3种高资源、3种中资源、12种低资源语言，由母语者标注。数据涵盖句子级和对话级上下文，包含字面义和比喻义两种用法。对SOTA模型进行基准测试，并通过控制实验和隐层表示干预分离记忆与推理过程。
AI.result: 1) 低资源语言上习语理解性能下降；2) 在所有资源层级中，字面义理解比比喻义更难；3) 对话上下文能提升性能，但无法消除差距；4) 模型存在记忆与推理能力分离的局限。
AI.conclusion: 当前多语模型在处理习语时存在显著的资源层级差异和字面义理解困难，对话上下文虽有帮助但不足以弥补差距，模型的习语理解更多依赖记忆而非真正的推理能力。

title: MOC: Multi-Order Communication in LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems
