We present FreqLite, an ultra-lightweight, channel-independent frequency-decomposed linear forecaster: a learnable, lossless, partition-of-unity spectral filter splits the input into bands that are forecast by per-band linear heads and, unlike low-pass-truncation approaches, the high-frequency band is retained and modeled. FreqLite is the best lightweight model on the standard long-term forecasting benchmarks and, at long lookback (L=336), attains a lower average error than a PatchTST Transformer (0.3244 vs. 0.3587 MSE) while using 4x fewer parameters, 2.2x less memory, and 2.2x less time per epoch on a single 4 GB laptop GPU; although modest in magnitude, its improvements are statistically significant under paired Wilcoxon tests across all matched cells (p < 1e-5). We further introduce Adaptive Reversible Instance Normalization (A-RevIN), a regime-adaptive reversible normalization that strictly generalizes RevIN (recovered exactly when its gate is closed), engages under non-stationarity, and reduces to RevIN without harm on stationary data. We validate this on both a real strongly non-stationary dataset (ILI, up to ~5% MSE reduction) and a controlled synthetic drift sweep in which A-RevIN's benefit and its learned gate both rise monotonically with injected non-stationarity. Every component is independently ablatable (Linear and RLinear are special cases of FreqLite), and all results are reproducible on commodity hardware.

AI.tldr: FreqLite 是一种超轻量级、通道独立的频域分解线性预测模型。它通过可学习的无损谱滤波器将输入分解为不同频带，每个频带由独立的线性头预测，并保留了高频信息。在长期预测基准上，FreqLite 以更少的参数和计算资源超越了 PatchTST 等 Transformer 模型。同时提出 A-RevIN，一种自适应可逆实例归一化，在非平稳数据上优于 RevIN。
AI.motivation: 现有的轻量级线性预测模型存在两个问题：(1) RevIN 使用单一回溯统计量对整个预测区间进行反归一化，在非平稳场景下不准确；(2) 时域趋势/季节分解依赖固定且不可自适应的滤波器。本文旨在设计一种更准确、轻量且可自适应非平稳性的时间序列预测模型。
AI.method: 提出 FreqLite，一种频域分解线性预测器：采用可学习的无损谱分解滤波器（partition-of-unity）将输入划分为多个频带，每个频带由独立的线性头预测，且保留高频带信息。同时提出 A-RevIN，一种门控自适应可逆归一化，在非平稳时激活，平稳时退化为标准 RevIN。
AI.result: FreqLite 在标准长期预测基准上是最优的轻量级模型。在长回溯（L=336）下，平均误差低于 PatchTST（0.3244 vs 0.3587 MSE），参数量减少 4 倍，内存减少 2.2 倍，训练时间减少 2.2 倍。A-RevIN 在强非平稳数据集 ILI 上降低约 5% MSE，在合成漂移实验中性能随非平稳性增加而提升。
AI.conclusion: FreqLite 证明了频域分解结合可学习滤波器的线性模型在长期预测中能以极低成本达到甚至超越 Transformer 的性能。A-RevIN 为处理非平稳性提供了自适应且无损的归一化方案。所有组件均可独立消融，且结果可在普通硬件上复现。

title: Goal2Pixel: Grounding Goals to Pixels for Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have become a common foundation for vision-and-language navigation in continuous environments (VLN-CE). Yet most VLM-based methods cast navigation as low-level action prediction, an interface that is ambiguous, tied to short-horizon motion primitives, and inefficient due to repeated VLM querying. We propose Goal2Pixel, a pure pixel-based paradigm that reformulates VLN-CE as navigable pixel grounding. Rather than predicting actions, Goal2Pixel uses the image plane as a unified spatial interface between VLM reasoning and robot motion: the model predicts a visible navigable pixel to the agent, which is back-projected into a 3D waypoint for forward navigation. For non-forward actions, we append auxiliary directive regions to the image plane, where the left/right/bottom regions are interpreted as turning left, turning right, and stopping, respectively. To enable long-horizon navigation, we propose a visibility-aware keyframe memory for compact and informative history representation. To adapt pretrained VLMs to navigable pixel grounding, we introduce semantic embeddings and coordinate-aware auxiliary losses. Goal2Pixel achieves competitive state-of-the-art performance while requiring fewer VLM inference calls than prior methods. On R2R-CE Val-Unseen it achieves 54.1% SR and 52.5% SPL with just 7.75 VLM calls per episode, 6x fewer than the 46.62 required by direct action prediction at 32.9% SR. The same trend holds on RxR-CE.Project Page: https://baobao0926.github.io/Goal2Pixel/.

AI.tldr: Goal2Pixel提出了一种纯像素范式，将VLN-CE重新定义为可导航像素定位任务，通过图像平面作为统一空间接口，将VLM推理与机器人运动解耦，在减少6倍VLM调用次数的同时取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于VLM的VLN-CE方法将导航视为底层动作预测，存在接口模糊、受限于短视运动基元、需反复查询VLM导致效率低下等问题。
AI.method: 1) 将导航任务转化为可导航像素定位，预测可见可导航像素并反投影为3D航点；2) 在图像平面附加左/右/底部区域作为转向和停止指令；3) 提出可见性感知关键帧记忆模块支持长程导航；4) 引入语义嵌入和坐标感知辅助损失适配预训练VLM。
AI.result: R2R-CE Val-Unseen: SR 54.1%, SPL 52.5%, 每轮仅需7.75次VLM调用（对比基线46.62次）；RxR-CE上也表现一致。效果SOTA且调用效率提升6倍。
AI.conclusion: Goal2Pixel通过像素级空间接口有效解决了VLM动作预测范式的效率瓶颈，验证了将图像平面作为统一推理-运动接口的可行性，为VLN-CE提供了更高效、更直观的解决方案。

title: Learning When to Translate for Multilingual Reasoning
summary: Reasoning language models (RLMs) achieve strong performance on complex reasoning tasks, but still exhibit substantial multilingual reasoning gaps, largely due to language-understanding failures in non-English inputs. English translation can mitigate these failures by expressing non-English inputs in a form that RLMs can more reliably interpret, yet translating every input is unnecessary when the model can reason reliably from the original query. To address this challenge, we propose Luar, a Language Understanding Boundary-aware Reinforcement Learning framework that trains RLMs to selectively invoke translation when direct understanding is unreliable. Luar trains the model to choose between solving the original input directly and reasoning over its English translation, encouraging translation only when translator-augmented reasoning is expected to substantially outperform direct reasoning. Across multilingual reasoning benchmarks, Luar outperforms standard GRPO and other training-based baselines, with particularly large gains on low-resource languages. Further analysis shows that Luar avoids unnecessary translation in cases where direct reasoning is sufficient, while extending its translator-call behavior to unseen low-resource languages. Together, our work suggests a selective approach to multilingual reasoning: RLMs can learn to invoke translation only when their direct understanding is unreliable. The project will be made publicly available at https://github.com/deokhk/LUAR

AI.tldr: 论文提出Luar框架，训练推理语言模型在直接理解不可靠时选择性调用翻译，以缩小多语言推理差距。
AI.motivation: 推理语言模型在非英语输入上存在语言理解失败导致的多语言推理差距，而全面翻译所有输入效率低下，需要一种选择性翻译策略。
AI.method: 提出Luar（语言理解边界感知强化学习框架），通过强化学习训练模型在直接解决原始输入与翻译后推理之间做出选择，仅在翻译预期能显著提升性能时才调用翻译。
AI.result: 在多语言推理基准上，Luar优于标准GRPO及其他基线方法，在低资源语言上提升尤为显著；能避免不必要的翻译，并将翻译调用行为泛化到未见过的低资源语言。
AI.conclusion: 推理语言模型可以学会仅在直接理解不可靠时选择性调用翻译，实现高效的多语言推理。

title: Sample Complexity and Decision-Theoretic Guarantees for Bayesian Model Averaging over Decision Trees with Catalan-Exponential Priors
comment: 21 pages, 3 figures, Submitted to the Journal of Machine Learning Research
summary: We ask: when do Bayesian model averaging (BMA) weights over decision trees carry sufficient epistemic information to justify committed exploitation of the averaging distribution? We answer this question in closed form for Bayesian decision trees (BDTs) with Dirichlet-Multinomial leaf models and a Catalan-exponential tree-size prior (Schetinin&Jakaite, 2025), establishing a complete non-asymptotic theory of rational commitment thresholds.

AI.tldr: 本文针对贝叶斯决策树（BDT）的模型平均权重何时足以证明可信利用的问题，给出了封闭形式的答案，建立了理性承诺阈值的完整非渐近理论。
AI.motivation: 探究贝叶斯模型平均（BMA）权重在决策树中何时携带足够的认知信息，以支持对平均分布的可信利用（committed exploitation）。
AI.method: 针对具有Dirichlet-Multinomial叶模型和Catalan-指数树大小先验的贝叶斯决策树（BDT），推导出理性承诺阈值的封闭形式解，建立完整的非渐近理论。
AI.result: 给出了BDT中BMA权重何时足以支持可信利用的封闭形式条件，即理性承诺阈值。
AI.conclusion: 为贝叶斯决策树中的模型平均可信度提供了理论保证，明确了在何种条件下可以放心地基于平均分布进行决策。

title: What to Test Next: Interpretable Coverage Gap Discovery in Driving VLMs
summary: Driving vision-language models (VLMs) must accurately understand scenes across diverse conditions defined by Operational Design Domains (ODDs), yet verification remains sparse: many slices are missing, making empirical failure rates unreliable. We propose SliceScorer, a deterministic scoring rule for missing-slice recommendation that combines (i) an exposure-based coverage prior to prioritize rare, under-tested regions, and (ii) a neighbor-failure prior that propagates risk from similar tested conditions. SliceScorer is deliberately simple - interpretable, auditable, and conservative - properties essential for safety-critical validation. For stress testing beyond the declared ODD, we embed SliceScorer within SliceNav, an LLM-orchestrated verification pipeline where the model interprets developer queries to select relevant operators (triage, scoring, acquisition, evaluation) and vocabulary extensions, composing verification workflows while keeping all scoring deterministic and auditable. Experiments on three driving VLMs (WiseAD, DriveMM, Cosmos-Reason2-2B) show that SliceNav surfaces high-risk coverage gaps more effectively than prior slice-discovery methods while maintaining diverse recommendations across the condition space. Ablations confirm both scoring components contribute, and qualitative analysis demonstrates end-to-end workflows from developer query to targeted evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出 SliceScorer 确定性评分规则和 SliceNav 验证流水线，用于自动驾驶 VLM 在 ODD 条件下的缺失切片推荐与压力测试。
AI.motivation: 驾驶 VLM 在不同 ODD 条件下的场景理解验证严重稀疏，大量切片缺失导致经验性故障率不可靠，亟需系统化的缺失切片推荐方法。
AI.method: 提出 SliceScorer 评分规则，结合暴露覆盖先验（优先稀有欠测试区域）和邻居故障先验（从相似测试条件传播风险）。嵌入 SliceNav 流水线，由 LLM 编排，支持查询解析、算子选择和词汇扩展，保持评分确定性与可审计性。
AI.result: 在三个驾驶 VLM 上的实验表明，SliceNav 比现有切片发现方法更有效地发现高风险覆盖缺口，同时保持推荐多样性。消融实验证实两个评分组件均有贡献。
AI.conclusion: SliseScorer 和 SliceNav 为安全关键的自动驾驶 VLM 验证提供了可解释、可审计且保守的缺失切片推荐方案，支持从开发者查询到目标评估的端到端工作流。

title: Towards Multidisciplinary Summarization of Hospital Stays: Efficient Sentence-Level Clinical Provenance Categorization
comment: 5 pages. Submitted preprint version of a paper accepted to AIME 2026. This version may differ from the camera-ready manuscript and the final Version of Record. The Version of Record will be available from Springer Nature once published
summary: Effective "all-team" summarization in high-complexity settings like the Neonatal Intensive Care Unit (NICU) requires aggregating insights from diverse disciplines (physicians, nurses, therapists) spread across hundreds of clinical free-text notes. Simply pooling heterogeneous text often leads to incoherent outputs. Structured summarization therefore first requires accurate categorization of sentence-level provenance across multi-source notes. This pilot study introduces a clinical provenance categorization pipeline using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of large language models (LLMs). We adapted two Llama-3 models (8B and 70B) to MedSecId, a corpus of 2,002 MIMIC-III (Adult ICU) notes annotated with clinical provenance headers, achieving in-domain Macro F1 scores above 92% for both models. To evaluate cross-domain generalization, we assessed model capacity (8B vs. 70B) and quantization on a gold-standard dataset of 227 sentence-level spans derived from three multi-disciplinary NICU summaries. Experimental results demonstrate a scale-dependent transfer effect: while SFT produced only marginal changes for the 8B model, it substantially improved the 70B model, increasing Macro F1 by 7%. Notably, the quantized fine-tuned 70B model outperformed its full-precision baseline while substantially reducing computational requirements. These findings suggest that sufficient model capacity is critical for preserving semantic flexibility during cross-domain clinical transfer and that efficient quantized adaptation can enable structured provenance modeling for downstream summarization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对NICU多学科临床笔记的结构化摘要方法，通过对Llama-3模型进行监督微调，实现了句子级别的临床来源分类（Macro F1>92%），并发现70B模型在跨域迁移中优于8B模型，量化微调还能在降低计算成本的同时提升性能。
AI.motivation: NICU等复杂医疗场景需要整合多学科（医生、护士、治疗师）的临床笔记进行团队摘要，但简单的文本拼接会导致输出不连贯。因此，准确的句子级别来源分类（provenance categorization）是结构化摘要的前提。
AI.method: 使用MedSecId语料库（2,002条MIMIC-III成人ICU笔记）对Llama-3（8B和70B）进行监督微调，然后在227个句子级别的NICU多学科摘要黄金标准数据集上评估跨域泛化能力，同时比较模型规模（8B vs 70B）和量化策略的影响。
AI.result: 域内Macro F1均超过92%；跨域迁移中，8B模型微调收益有限，而70B模型微调后Macro F1提升7%；量化后的70B微调模型在显著降低计算需求的同时，性能优于全精度基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 模型容量对于跨域临床迁移中保持语义灵活性至关重要，高效的量化自适应方法可以支持下游摘要任务的结构化来源建模。

title: All Models are Wrong, Knowing Where is Useful: On Model Uncertainty in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) infers information about the environment from a learned dynamics model and bears the potential to address open problems such as data efficient and safe learning in robotics. However, inaccuracies of the learned dynamics model are typically exploited by the agent, substantially hampering the capabilities of MBRL methods. We present a framework for dealing with inaccuracies of probabilistic models through targeted handling of uncertainty that effectively mitigates model exploitation. We present recent successes in learning directly on hardware and safe exploration, and discuss future directions for uncertainty-aware MBRL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过针对性处理不确定性来应对概率模型不准确性的框架，有效减轻了模型利用问题，并在机器人硬件直接学习和安全探索方面取得了成功。
AI.motivation: 基于模型的强化学习方法中，学习到的动力学模型存在不准确性，这些不准确性通常会被智能体利用，严重阻碍了MBRL方法的能力。
AI.method: 提出了一个通过针对性处理不确定性来应对概率模型不准确性的框架。
AI.result: 在机器人硬件直接学习和安全探索方面取得了成功。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效减轻了模型利用问题，并讨论了不确定性感知MBRL的未来方向。

title: Pave-GRPO: Beyond Instantaneous Guidance through Principled Average Velocity Decomposition
summary: Post-training via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for aligning flow-based generative models with human preferences. However, the iterative denoising nature of flow models incurs substantial costs when generating group rollouts for policy-gradient updates, compelling existing methods to train with extremely few denoising steps. This temporal sparsity severely restricts preference optimization: reward feedback can only reach a handful of stages per trajectory, leaving the vast majority of intermediate denoising steps without direct supervision and thus compromising alignment granularity. To address this, we propose Pave-GRPO, which reformulates the GRPO objective through Principled average velocity decomposition. Rather than generating expensive high-step rollouts, we maintain efficient few-step group sampling but decompose each coarse transition into an equivalent ensemble of finer sub-trajectories spanning multiple intermediate timesteps. This propagates reward feedback to a denser set of temporal stages for more comprehensive preference alignment without additional generation cost. This design offers two benefits: (i) zero-cost horizon expansion: through the direct reuse of piece-wise group samples and their associated rewards, Pave-GRPO significantly broadens the effective optimization scope under fixed sampling budgets; and (ii) comprehensive temporal supervision: by equivalently decomposing an instantaneous velocity target into a multi-timestep ensemble, it distributes reward signals across more intermediate stages of the denoising process, enabling finer-grained and more thorough preference optimization. Extensive experiments validate that Pave-GRPO effectively advances preference alignment across different reward settings, offering comprehensive performance enhancement.

AI.tldr: 针对流式生成模型后训练中GRPO因去噪步数少导致奖励反馈稀疏的问题，提出Pave-GRPO，通过平均速度分解将粗粒度过渡等值分解为细粒度子轨迹，在不增加生成成本的情况下实现零成本地平线扩展和全面的时间监督，显著提升偏好对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有GRPO方法在流模型后训练中因去噪迭代成本高，只能使用极少的去噪步数，导致奖励反馈仅能覆盖少数阶段，大部分中间去噪步骤缺乏直接监督，对齐粒度严重受限。
AI.method: 提出Pave-GRPO，通过原则性的平均速度分解重新定义GRPO目标。保持高效少步分组采样，但将每个粗粒度过渡等值分解为多个中间时间步的细粒度子轨迹集成，使奖励信号传播到更密集的时间阶段。
AI.result: 在不同奖励设置下，Pave-GRPO有效提升了偏好对齐效果，实现了全面的性能增强。
AI.conclusion: Pave-GRPO通过零成本地平线扩展和全面的时间监督，在固定采样预算下显著扩展了有效优化范围，实现了更细粒度的偏好优化。

title: Not What, But How: A Communicative Audit of LLM Response Framing
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are being increasingly used to answer subjective, information-seeking questions, where users are sensitive to how responses are communicated, not just whether the answers are correct. Existing LLM evaluations for subjective cultural queries largely focus on factual correctness, ignoring how the response is framed. To this end, we introduce FRANZ, an automated FRAmework for respoNse characteriZation to conduct communicative audit of LLM responses along four dimensions: cultural positioning, use of generalizing language, anthropomorphic cues, and adherence to conversational maxims. To enable this evaluation, we contribute SQUARE - a corpus of 376k subjective questions sourced from 57 subreddits, and mapped to 7 countries and 19 question categories. We demonstrate FRANZ's applicability by scoring responses from three open-weight LLMs. We observe that LLMs show statistically significant differences in the frequency with which they employ each response characteristic. Unlike single-dimensional audits, FRANZ reveals that insider positioning and anthropomorphism are positively coupled, with the degree of coupling varying by country, providing a diagnostic lens for identifying framing divergences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FRANZ框架，用于评估LLM在主观文化查询中回答的沟通风格（文化定位、概括性语言、拟人化线索、会话准则），并构建了包含37.6万条主观问题的SQUARE语料库。实验发现LLM在不同回答特征上存在显著差异，且内部定位与拟人化呈正相关，耦合度因国家而异。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估主要关注文化查询的事实正确性，忽略了回答的沟通方式（如语气、定位、措辞）对用户感知的影响，缺乏系统性评估框架。
AI.method: 1. 构建FRANZ框架，从文化定位、概括性语言、拟人化线索、会话准则四个维度自动化分析LLM回答。2. 创建SQUARE语料库（37.6万条主观问题，涵盖57个子Reddit、7个国家、19个类别）。3. 对三个开源LLM的回答进行评分和统计分析。
AI.result: LLM在不同回答特征的使用频率上存在统计显著差异；内部定位与拟人化呈正相关，且耦合度因目标国家而异，揭示了单一维度审计无法发现的框架偏差。
AI.conclusion: FRANZ提供了一种超越事实正确性的诊断工具，能够识别LLM在不同文化背景下回答风格的系统性偏差，为评估和改进LLM的文化敏感沟通能力提供了新视角。

title: BRo-JEPA: Learning Modular Arithmetic in Latent Space
summary: Can neural networks learn abstract algebraic rules, or do they merely memorize training patterns? We investigate this using MNIST digits as states and modular arithmetic operations as actions in a JEPA-style latent world model. Standard supervised baselines and JEPA models with additive operation embeddings fit seen operations but fail to extrapolate reliably to unseen ones. To bridge this gap, we introduce a block-rotation predictor that imposes the circular structure of modulo-10 arithmetic in latent space. This enables strong zero-shot generalization, with the best ResNet-based JEPA block-rotation model achieving 99.46\% zero-shot and 99.46\% rollout accuracy. Our results suggest that latent world models can learn symbolic transformation rules when architecture matches the structure of the problem. Our code can be \href{https://github.com/DL-World-Models/mnist-math}{accessed here}.

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络能否学习抽象代数规则，提出一种块旋转预测器（block-rotation predictor），在JEPA风格潜在世界模型中对MNIST数字进行模10算术运算，实现了99.46%的零样本泛化准确率，表明当架构匹配问题结构时，潜在世界模型可以学习符号变换规则。
AI.motivation: 探究神经网络能否真正学习抽象代数规则，而不仅仅是记忆训练模式，特别是在模块化算术运算的零样本泛化场景下。
AI.method: 采用JEPA风格的潜在世界模型，将MNIST数字作为状态、模10算术运算作为动作。提出块旋转预测器（block-rotation predictor），在潜空间中施加模10运算的循环结构，使操作嵌入具有可解释的循环对称性。
AI.result: 基于ResNet的JEPA块旋转模型在零样本泛化上达到99.46%准确率，在自回归推演（rollout）中也达到99.46%，显著优于标准监督基线和普通JEPA模型。
AI.conclusion: 当模型架构与问题结构（如循环对称性）相匹配时，潜在世界模型能够学习到符号化的抽象变换规则，实现强零样本泛化能力。

title: CanonCGT: Reference-Based Color Grading via Canonical Pivot Representation
summary: Reference-based color grading aims to reproduce the tonal mood and lighting of a reference while preserving color harmony and scene structure. Existing photorealistic and filter-based methods often produce unstable tone mappings -- over-shifting or inconsistently retaining colors -- leading to unnatural results. We propose CanonCGT, a two-stage framework built on a canonical pivot -- a style-neutral intermediate representation for stable color mapping. The first stage canonicalizes the input by removing intrinsic tonal bias, and the second color-grades it to match the reference style. A dual-phase training scheme, DP-CGT, combines supervised preset learning with self-supervised refinement on unpaired photographs. CanonCGT delivers photorealistic and tonally consistent results across diverse datasets, surpassing state-of-the-art methods in stability and visual fidelity. Our codes are available at \href{https://github.com/Jinwon-Ko/CanonCGT}{https://github.com/Jinwon-Ko/CanonCGT}

AI.tldr: CanonCGT是一个两阶段参考图像调色框架，通过引入“规范支点”（风格中性中间表示）实现稳定、自然的色彩映射。第一阶段去除输入图像的色调偏差，第二阶段匹配参考风格。采用DP-CGT双阶段训练方案（监督预训练+自监督精调），在多个数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于照片级渲染和滤波的方法在参考图像调色中常出现色调过度偏移或颜色保留不一致的问题，导致结果不自然。作者希望解决这种不稳定的色调映射问题。
AI.method: 提出CanonCGT两阶段框架：1）规范阶段（Canonicalization）——去除输入图像内在的色调偏差，将其映射到风格中性的规范支点；2）调色阶段（Color Grading）——将规范表示映射到参考风格。训练采用DP-CGT双阶段方案：先监督预训练（preset learning），再在无配对照片上进行自监督精调。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，CanonCGT生成的照片级调色结果在色调一致性和视觉保真度上均优于现有最先进方法，稳定性更高。
AI.conclusion: 规范支点（canonical pivot）作为风格中性中间表示，能有效解耦输入图像的固有色调与参考风格，实现更稳定、自然的参考图像调色。代码已开源。

title: CRAM: Centroid-Routing and Adaptive MoE for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) unify heterogeneous vision-language tasks under a shared generative framework via instruction tuning, yet real-world deployment demands continuous capability expansion, making Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) essential. Existing methods either update all tasks with a shared parameter set or allocate dedicated modules for each new task. Shared updates force heterogeneous tasks to compete, causing forgetting of learned capabilities. Conversely, isolated expansion prevents interference but severely limits parameter efficiency over long task streams. To address this dilemma, we propose CRAM. Specifically, by isolating task-specific patterns into independent modules, CRAM mitigates catastrophic forgetting across tasks. To further boost parameter efficiency, we utilize adaptive-rank instantiation to identify the capability gap between existing expert capability and new task demands, and dynamically allocate only the necessary parameters. To ensure stable reuse among tasks, centroid-guided routing recognizes and activates existing experts' capabilities, while an orthogonality penalty confines new updates to task-specific directions, preventing re-learning general capability. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks consistently demonstrate its superiority over existing methods.

AI.tldr: 提出CRAM方法，通过自适应秩实例化和质心引导路由，解决多模态持续指令调优中任务竞争与参数效率的困境。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM持续指令调优方法存在两难：共享参数更新导致异构任务竞争和灾难性遗忘；隔离扩展虽避免干扰但参数效率低下，无法适应长任务流。
AI.method: CRAM包含三个核心：1) 自适应秩实例化动态识别能力缺口并分配必要参数；2) 质心引导路由识别并激活已有专家能力；3) 正交性惩罚约束新更新沿任务特定方向进行。
AI.result: 在多种基准上持续优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CRAM有效平衡了多模态持续指令调优中的遗忘抑制与参数效率。

title: From Performance to Viability: A Bootstrap Framework for Latent-Space Representation Learning in Adaptive Biological Systems
comment: 25 pages. Methodological framework for latent-space representation learning in adaptive biological systems
summary: Observable performance is commonly used to characterize biological systems. In adaptive systems, however, similar performances may arise from distinct organizations, and configurations that appear comparable at a given time may follow different longitudinal trajectories. This limitation motivates a methodological framework for moving beyond performance-based interpretation without assuming a complete mechanistic model in advance. This article proposes a bootstrap framework for latent-space representation learning in adaptive biological systems. Here, bootstrap is used in a methodological and epistemological sense: new analytical levels are introduced when the preceding representation becomes insufficient to account for observed adaptive dynamics. The framework is organized around five levels: observable performance, dynamic organization, latent organization, longitudinal viability, and internal predictive approximation. The framework is illustrated by three previously reported gait--occlusion studies, used here only as a methodological case sequence and not as new experimental evidence. The article formalizes how performance analysis led to latent organization, how static latent organization led to longitudinal viability, and how observed viability led to internal predictive approximation. The contribution is not a new learning algorithm, clinical protocol, or dataset, but a bootstrap framework for latent-space representation learning describing how increasingly informative representations can emerge from observational insufficiencies in adaptive biological data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自举式潜空间表征学习框架，用于超越基于性能的自适应生物系统分析，通过五个层级（可观察性能、动态组织、潜组织、纵向生存力、内部预测近似）逐步构建更具信息量的表征。
AI.motivation: 自适应生物系统中，相似性能可能源于不同组织状态，且当前表现相似的系统未来轨迹可能不同——仅基于性能的解读存在根本局限，亟需不预设完整机制模型就能挖掘深层组织信息的方法论框架。
AI.method: 提出一个五层级自举框架：(1) 可观察性能；(2) 动态组织；(3) 潜组织；(4) 纵向生存力；(5) 内部预测近似。每一层级在前一层级不足以解释自适应动态时引入新分析维度，形成递进式表征学习。
AI.result: 通过三个步态-遮挡案例序列展示了框架的运作逻辑：从性能分析推导出潜组织，从静态潜组织推导出纵向生存力，再从可观察的生存力推导出内部预测近似，验证了框架的可行性和方法论意义。
AI.conclusion: 贡献不在于新算法、临床协议或数据集，而在于一种认识论意义上的自举框架——阐明在自适应生物数据中，观察不足如何驱动更具信息量的表征涌现，为超越性能导向的分析提供方法论路径。

title: Edge-directed geometric partitioning for versatile video coding
comment: This paper has been published in IEEE ICME
summary: To improve the coding performance, geometric partition (GEO) was proposed for the upcoming VVC standard. GEO provides 140 partition candidates. The index of optimal GEO mode needs to be signaled explicitly. Considering different structural characteristics of different CUs and the correlation between spatial adjacent blocks and temporal collocated blocks, we propose a GEO mode prediction strategy by constructing a Most Probable Mode (MPM) list to reduce the overhead of GEO index and improve coding efficiency. Based on the observation of the high correlation between the partition mode and object boundaries, an edge-directed geometric partition scheme is proposed to construct the MPM list according to spatio-temporal edge information. The proposed method provides an objective BD-rate gain of 0.58% and 1.00% on average for RA and LDB configurations compared to VTM-6.0. Besides, it also promotes the visual quality of object boundaries.

AI.tldr: 针对VVC标准中几何分区模式索引开销大的问题，本文提出一种基于时空边缘信息的MPM列表构建策略，通过利用CU结构特征和时空相关性来预测最优GEO模式，在RA和LDB配置下分别获得0.58%和1.00%的BD-rate增益，并提升了物体边界的视觉质量。
AI.motivation: VVC标准中的几何分区(GEO)提供了140种分区候选，但最优GEO模式的索引需要显式传输，造成较大的编码开销。为减少该开销并提升编码效率，需要设计有效的模式预测策略。
AI.method: 提出一种GEO模式预测策略：1) 利用不同CU的结构特性以及空间相邻块与时域同位块之间的相关性；2) 基于分区模式与物体边界高度相关的观察，构建边缘导向的几何分区方案；3) 根据时空边缘信息构建最可能模式(MPM)列表来预测最优GEO模式。
AI.result: 与VTM-6.0相比，所提方法在RA和LDB配置下分别获得平均0.58%和1.00%的客观BD-rate增益，同时提升了物体边界的视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建基于时空边缘信息的MPM列表可有效降低GEO索引开销，提升编码效率，并改善物体边界的主观视觉质量。

title: When Rating Scales Fall Short: LLM-Assisted Discovery of ADHD Signals in Turkish Teacher Narratives
comment: 15 pages. Accepted to CLPsych 2026. Camera-ready author version. The final version will appear in the ACL Anthology
summary: Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) is one of the most common neurodevelopmental disorders in childhood, and its diagnosis relies on assessments combining clinician judgment with standardized rating scales and reports from parents and teachers. While structured instruments such as the Conners' Teacher Rating Scale-Revised Short Form (CTRS-R:S) quantify ADHD-related behaviors, teachers also provide open-ended narratives that may contain complementary signals not captured by structured assessments. However, it remains unclear to what extent teacher narratives encode signals overlooked by rating scales. In this study, we analyze de-identified Turkish teacher evaluation forms collected during clinical ADHD assessments, including both CTRS-R:S scores and open-ended teacher narratives. We compare predictive signals from structured scores and narrative text and identify cases where structured assessments fail to clearly distinguish ADHD from non-ADHD students while narrative-based models capture distinct behavioral patterns. Notably, these cases show minimal overlap with those missed by the narrative model, suggesting that structured and narrative information encode complementary signals. To interpret these differences, we apply a large language model (LLM)-assisted theme discovery pipeline that reveals distinct attention, behavioral, and family-related patterns, highlighting the potential of natural language processing (NLP) to uncover clinically relevant signals from teacher narratives and to complement traditional ADHD screening tools.

AI.tldr: 本研究分析了土耳其教师对ADHD学生的评估，发现结构化评分与开放式教师叙述包含互补的诊断信号，两者结合的NLP方法能更全面捕捉ADHD相关行为模式。
AI.motivation: 探究教师开放式叙述中是否包含结构化评分量表（如CTRS-R:S）未能捕捉到的ADHD诊断相关信号，以及两种信息源如何互补。
AI.method: 分析土耳其语教师评估表（含CTRS-R:S评分和开放式叙述），比较结构化评分与叙述文本的预测信号，利用LLM辅助的主题发现管道识别差异模式。
AI.result: 结构化评估与叙述模型各自遗漏不同的病例，两者编码互补信号；LLM主题分析揭示了注意力、行为和家庭相关的差异化模式。
AI.conclusion: 教师叙述蕴含结构化量表无法捕捉的临床相关信号，NLP技术可补充传统ADHD筛查工具，提升评估全面性。

title: Turning Back Without Forgetting: Selective Backward Refinement for Parameter-Efficient Continual Learning
summary: While prompt-based parameter-efficient continual learning mitigates catastrophic forgetting by isolating task-specific prompts, this isolation also limits later tasks from improving earlier ones, leaving backward knowledge transfer underexplored. We address this limitation by proposing Selective bAckward refinement for positive Backward knowledge transfER (SABER), a replay-free framework that enables controlled backward transfer in prompt-based continual learning. SABER determines when backward refinement is beneficial using complementary task-correlation criteria based on prompt-gradient geometry and loss-distribution similarity, and how to perform refinement safely by restricting updates to non-interfering directions in the prompt parameter space. Extensive experiments across multiple continual learning benchmarks and diverse pretrained backbones, including T5-Large, LLaMA, and Qwen, demonstrate that SABER consistently achieves positive backward transfer while maintaining strong overall average performance. Code is available at https://github.com/OptMN-Lab/SABER-ICML-2026/.

AI.tldr: SABER是一个无需回放的提示参数高效持续学习框架，通过选择性后向优化实现正向后向知识迁移，利用提示梯度几何和损失分布相似性判断何时进行后向优化，并限制更新方向以避免干扰。
AI.motivation: 现有基于提示的参数高效持续学习方法虽能缓解灾难性遗忘，但任务特定提示的隔离机制限制了后续任务对先前任务的改进，后向知识迁移未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出SABER框架：1) 基于提示梯度几何和损失分布相似性的互补任务相关性判据，决定何时进行后向优化；2) 通过限制提示参数空间中非干扰方向的更新，安全地进行后向优化。
AI.result: 在多个持续学习基准和不同预训练骨干网络（T5-Large、LLaMA、Qwen）上，SABER持续实现正向后向迁移，同时保持强大的平均性能。
AI.conclusion: SABER有效实现了提示式持续学习中的受控后向知识迁移，无需回放机制，为参数高效持续学习中的后向迁移问题提供了解决方案。

title: Conditional Collapse in Sign Language Production: A Diagnostic and a Scaling Argument
summary: Sign Language Production (SLP) is the task of generating avatar sign language motion from natural language text. The quality of the generated motion is typically evaluated by a motion-space Fréchet distance (FID) and back-translation (BT) BLEU score on benchmarks such as How2Sign. Both metrics can improve substantially while the underlying generator fails to faithfully represent the sign language gestures. In this work we propose to evaluate the generated motion at three independent levels: ($\tau1$) initial-pose conditioning, ($\tau2$) output diversity, and ($\tau3$) target faithfulness. We compute these as pairwise-distance ratios using latent representations of a frozen motion autoencoder (MoAE). We evaluate 14 SLP model checkpoints on the How2Sign dataset, including a re-implemented Neural Sign Actors (NSA), and show that $\tau3$ faithfulness is never attained, while FID varies by nearly two orders of magnitude and is uncorrelated with faithfulness. We show that on the isolated gloss dataset ASL3DWord favorable $\tau3$ can be attained, hence isolating the size of the sentence-level paired-dataset as the bottleneck.

AI.tldr: 本文发现现有手语生成评估指标（FID和BLEU）存在缺陷，提出三级评估体系（τ1初始姿态、τ2多样性、τ3忠实度），通过实验证明现有模型在忠实度上从未达标，并指出句子级配对数据集规模是主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标（FID、BLEU）存在严重缺陷：即使生成质量很差的动作，这些指标也可能表现良好，无法真实反映生成的手语手势是否准确表达了源文本的含义。
AI.method: 提出三级评估体系：τ1初始姿态条件、τ2输出多样性、τ3目标忠实度。使用冻结的运动自编码器（MoAE）的潜在表示计算成对距离比，在How2Sign数据集上评估了14个SLP模型检查点。
AI.result: 所有模型在τ3忠实度上均未达标；FID变化近两个数量级但与忠实度不相关；在孤立词汇数据集ASL3DWord上可实现较好τ3，说明句子级数据集规模是主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 现有SLP评估指标不可靠，所提出的三级评估体系能更全面反映生成质量，揭示了当前SLP领域需要更大规模的句子级配对数据集来提升生成质量。

title: FigSIM: A Dataset for Fine-grained Suicide Severity and Figurative Language in Suicide Memes
comment: Content warning: contains suicide-related content. Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: Suicide memes are memes used to express suicide-related thoughts or comment on suicide-related issues. Suicide memes are increasingly common on social media, yet remain poorly understood and potentially harmful. There is an urgent need to better understand their characteristics and to develop appropriate content moderation strategies that limits users' exposure to potentially harmful content. Currently, the absence of annotated datasets of suicide memes remains a key barrier to developing and evaluating automated moderation approaches. In this paper, we introduce FigSIM, the first dataset designed for fine-grained analysis of suicide memes. The dataset consists of 1049 memes, each annotated for (1) fine-grained suicide severity levels, (2) figurative phenomena (e.g., metaphors), and (3) suicide-related content (e.g., suicide method depiction). We benchmark 16 unimodal and multimodal models across three tasks: figurative language, suicide severity, and suicide-related content detection. Overall, FigSIM demonstrates that suicide memes pose unique challenges for both modeling and content moderation. Analysis revealed biases, such as underprediction of higher suicide severity levels, especially for figurative memes. The dataset (including splits used for analyses) is publicly available. Content Warning: This paper contains suicide-related content that may be triggering.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了FigSIM，首个用于自杀迷因细粒度分析的数据集，包含1049个标注了自杀严重程度、比喻现象和自杀相关内容的迷因，并基准测试了16个模型。
AI.motivation: 自杀迷因在社交媒体上日益常见，但缺乏深入理解和有效的自动化内容审核策略，而现有研究缺少标注数据集来支持自动化审核方法的开发与评估。
AI.method: 构建了FigSIM数据集（1049个迷因），进行三层细粒度标注（自杀严重程度、比喻现象、自杀相关内容），并在比喻语言、自杀严重程度和自杀内容检测三个任务上基准测试了16个单模态和多模态模型。
AI.result: FigSIM表明自杀迷因对建模和内容审核构成独特挑战；分析发现模型存在偏见，例如对较高自杀严重程度级别预测不足，尤其是对含有比喻的迷因。
AI.conclusion: 自杀迷因的细粒度分析对自动化审核至关重要，现有模型在捕捉高严重程度和比喻性内容方面存在局限性，数据集已公开以推动后续研究。

title: Efficient Exploration for Iterative Nash Preference Optimization
summary: Preference alignment is central to improving large language models, but standard reward-based formulations can be restrictive when human preferences are cyclic, non-transitive, or otherwise not representable by a scalar reward. Nash Learning from Human Feedback (NLHF) addresses this limitation by modeling alignment as a preference game and targeting a Nash equilibrium rather than a reward maximizer. However, the learning-theoretic foundations of scalable NLHF remain limited. Existing regret guarantees rely on oracle-based methods that estimate a general preference model and solve KL-regularized minimax problems, while iterative NLHF methods directly optimize policy-level preference losses and are easier to implement but lack regret guarantees. We study online iterative NLHF under general preference models and identify exploration as the key obstacle. First, we show that standard iterative NLHF can suffer an exponential dependence on the KL-regularization parameter, revealing that implicit exploration through policy updates is insufficient for controlling regret. Second, we propose an explicitly exploratory iterative NLHF algorithm that combines SFT-based regularization with adversarial policy exploration. The resulting method retains the direct policy optimization structure of iterative NLHF, avoids explicit preference model estimation, and achieves an $O(\sqrt{T})$ regret bound without an exponential dependence on the KL-regularization parameter. We show that the regret can be improved to $O(\log(T))$ with access to a minimax oracle, clarifying the computational-statistical tradeoff in learning general preference games. Finally, we instantiate our method for LLM fine-tuning and evaluate it on \texttt{Llama-3-8B-Instruct} across multiple benchmarks, where explicit exploration yields consistent improvements over existing NLHF baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究在线迭代式Nash Learning from Human Feedback (NLHF)在一般偏好模型下的理论基础，发现标准迭代NLHF存在指数级依赖KL正则化参数的问题，并提出一种结合SFT正则化与对抗性策略探索的显式探索算法，实现O(√T)遗憾界，并可通过minimax oracle改进至O(log T)，实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有偏好对齐方法多基于标量奖励函数，无法处理循环、非传递等复杂人类偏好；NLHF虽以纳什均衡替代奖励最大化来克服此局限，但其可扩展的学习理论基础仍不完善，在线迭代NLHF方法缺乏遗憾界保证。
AI.method: 首先理论分析指出标准迭代NLHF因隐式探索不足导致指数级KL依赖；进而提出结合SFT正则化与对抗性策略探索的显式探索迭代NLHF算法，保留直接策略优化结构，避免显式偏好模型估计，在一般偏好模型下建立O(√T)遗憾界，并给出计算-统计权衡分析。
AI.result: 理论方面：标准迭代NLHF存在指数级KL正则化依赖；所提算法实现O(√T)遗憾界，接入minimax oracle可改进至O(log T)。实验方面：使用Llama-3-8B-Instruct在多基准上验证，显式探索方法一致优于现有NLHF基线。
AI.conclusion: 探索是解决在线迭代NLHF遗憾问题的关键，显式探索算法在不牺牲直接策略优化结构的前提下有效控制了遗憾，揭示了计算效率与统计效率之间的权衡。

title: PhyScene3D: Physically Consistent Interactive 3D Tabletop Scene Generation
summary: Generating physically consistent 3D tabletop scenes is a fundamental yet underexplored problem for interactive and generalist robotic learning. The challenge stems from dense object hierarchies and irregular affordances. Here, an interactive scene denotes a physically valid, collision-free environment directly loadable into physics simulators. Existing methods, ranging from decoupled symbolic solvers to end-to-end regression models, often suffer from error propagation or overfitting to noisy supervision containing widespread physical violations. To address these limitations, we introduce PhyScene3D, a framework that reformulates generation as a Human-Mimetic Constructive Process. The proposed Cognitive Topological Reasoning Chain (CTRC) factorizes scene synthesis into a sequential, anchor-conditioned process. It employs a 3D AABB-based placement scheme that imposes a strong structural inductive bias. To address imperfect supervision and physical infeasibility, we introduce Physics-Aware Denoising Alignment (PADA). It integrates a differentiable Signed Distance Field (SDF) with Test-Time Optimization (TTO) to project generated scenes onto a physics-feasible manifold while preserving semantic intent. Experiments demonstrate that PhyScene3D outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both semantic accuracy and physical validity, achieving a 40% reduction in scene-wise collision rate relative to the human-annotated training data.

AI.tldr: 提出了PhyScene3D框架，通过认知拓扑推理链和物理感知去噪对齐，实现物理一致的3D桌面场景生成，场景碰撞率相比人类标注数据降低40%。
AI.motivation: 现有3D桌面场景生成方法（解耦符号求解器、端到端回归模型）存在误差传播或过拟合含广泛物理违例的噪声监督的问题，而物理一致的交互式场景对机器人学习至关重要但尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出PhyScene3D框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 认知拓扑推理链(CTRC)，将场景合成分解为基于锚点的序列化过程，采用3D AABB放置方案引入强结构归纳偏置；(2) 物理感知去噪对齐(PADA)，结合可微符号距离场(SDF)与测试时优化(TTO)，将生成场景投影到物理可行流形上同时保留语义意图。
AI.result: 在语义准确性和物理有效性上均优于现有方法，场景碰撞率相比人类标注训练数据降低40%。
AI.conclusion: PhyScene3D通过模仿人类构造过程的生成范式，有效解决了密集物体层级和不规则功能区域带来的物理一致性挑战，为交互式机器人学习提供了更可靠的场景生成方案。

title: SkillHarm: Lifecycle-Aware Skill-Based Attacks via Automated Construction
summary: Agent skills occupy a privileged position in the agent workflow, as agents are expected to implicitly follow and execute them, rendering third-party skills a vulnerable attack surface. Existing studies have revealed unsafe agent behaviors induced by skill-based attacks, but they primarily evaluate poisoned skills within a single task execution and enumerate harms through ad-hoc risk lists. To bridge these gaps, we introduce SkillHarm, a benchmark of skill-based attacks across the skill-use lifecycle, paired with a systematic taxonomy of skill-relevant risks. SkillHarm evaluates two attack scenarios: Fixed-Payload Poisoning (FPP), where a fixed poisoned skill package directly compromises any task session that invokes it, and Self-Mutating Poisoning (SMP), where an initially benign execution silently mutates persistent skill content, deferring harm until a subsequent reuse. It further defines 12 risk types based on the agent workflow component targeted by the harm: data pipelines, system environments, and agent autonomy. To instantiate these attacks at scale, we build AutoSkillHarm, an automated construction pipeline with coding agents driven by natural-language harnesses. The resulting benchmark contains 879 attack samples across 71 skills. Experiments show that current agents remain vulnerable with attack success rates up to 86.3% in FPP and 69.3% in SMP. Our analysis further reveals a latent risk: many apparent attack failures stem from the agent failing to engage with the poisoned file rather than genuine resistance, and current defenses still fail to reliably mitigate the threat.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillHarm基准，系统评估智能体在技能使用生命周期中面临的两种投毒攻击（固定载荷投毒FPP和自变异投毒SMP），涵盖12种风险类型，实验显示攻击成功率高达86.3%，且现有防御措施效果有限。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要评估单次任务执行中的技能投毒攻击，缺乏对技能使用全生命周期的系统分析，且风险分类依赖于临时性清单而非统一框架。
AI.method: 构建SkillHarm基准，定义FPP（固定恶意技能包）和SMP（良性执行后静默变异）两种攻击场景，划分12种风险类型（数据管道、系统环境、智能体自主性），并开发AutoSkillHarm自动化构建流水线生成879个攻击样本。
AI.result: FPP攻击成功率最高86.3%，SMP为69.3%；部分"失败"攻击实际是因智能体未接触投毒文件而非真正抵抗；现有防御措施无法可靠缓解威胁。
AI.conclusion: 技能投毒攻击对智能体构成严重安全威胁，需发展覆盖技能全生命周期的防御机制，当前防御手段尚不充分。

title: Neural Network Compression by Approximate Differential Equivalence
summary: Neural network compression is commonly achieved by pruning parameters based on local importance scores, e.g., magnitude-based pruning. We propose a complementary approach that compresses models by aggregating neurons with similar functional behavior rather than removing weights independently. Our method encodes a trained network as a polynomial ODE system and applies a lumping method called Approximate Forward Differential Equivalence to identify neurons with approximately matching induced dynamics. A single tolerance parameter, $\varepsilon$, controls the compression level and induces a smooth trade-off between model size and predictive accuracy. We evaluate the method on synthetic datasets derived from nonlinear dynamical systems with known ground-truth behavior and on public regression benchmarks. Across both settings, the proposed approach achieves substantial parameter reduction while preserving accuracy, and consistently compares favorably with magnitude-based pruning and Wanda at similar compression levels. These results suggest that differential equivalence-based aggregation is a principled and effective alternative to conventional weight-centric pruning.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于微分等价的神经元聚合压缩方法，通过将网络编码为多项式ODE系统并识别功能相似的神经元进行合并，在保持精度的同时实现参数缩减，效果优于传统剪枝方法。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法基于局部重要性分数（如幅度剪枝）独立移除权重，缺乏对神经元间功能相似性的考虑。
AI.method: 将训练好的网络编码为多项式ODE系统，应用近似前向微分等价（Approximate Forward Differential Equivalence）识别具有近似匹配诱发动态的神经元，通过单一容忍参数ε控制压缩水平。
AI.result: 在合成非线性动力系统数据集和公开回归基准上，该方法实现了显著的参数缩减同时保持精度，在相似压缩水平下持续优于幅度剪枝和Wanda方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于微分等价的神经元聚合是一种有原则且有效的替代传统权重剪枝的方法。

title: Restoring Initial Noise Sensitivity in Text-to-Image Distillation via Geometric Alignment
summary: Generative distillation significantly accelerates text-to-image (T2I) generation by compressing multi-step trajectories into few-step student models while preserving perceptual quality. However, existing methods primarily optimize efficiency and output fidelity, often neglecting critical properties of the original trajectory. In this work, we identify a key missing property: sensitivity to initial noise, whose degradation impairs downstream control methods relying on noise-based optimization and manipulation. We trace this issue to standard distillation objectives that enforce pointwise output alignment, inadvertently flattening the input-output landscape and suppressing the teacher's local geometric structure. To address this, we propose Geometry-Aware Distillation (GAD), a sensitivity-preserving framework that aligns the local functional behavior of teacher and student models. Specifically, GAD matches Jacobian-vector products with respect to input noise, enabling the student to reproduce the teacher's differential response to perturbations. Extensive experiments across multiple T2I paradigms and noise-driven control tasks demonstrate that GAD significantly restores sensitivity and improves diversity while maintaining high visual fidelity. Code is available at https://github.com/Hannah1102/GAD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出几何感知蒸馏（GAD），通过对齐教师模型对输入噪声的雅可比-向量积，恢复学生模型对初始噪声的敏感性，从而提升噪声驱动控制任务的表现和生成多样性，同时保持高视觉保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式蒸馏方法过于关注效率和输出保真度，忽略了学生模型对初始噪声的敏感性这一关键特性，导致依赖噪声优化的下游控制方法性能下降。
AI.method: 提出几何感知蒸馏（GAD），通过匹配教师和学生模型关于输入噪声的雅可比-向量积，对齐局部函数行为，保留教师模型的局部几何结构，从而恢复学生模型对噪声扰动的微分响应能力。
AI.result: 在多种T2I范式和噪声驱动控制任务上，GAD显著恢复了对初始噪声的敏感性，提升了生成多样性，同时保持了高视觉保真度。
AI.conclusion: GAD有效解决了蒸馏过程中噪声敏感性退化的问题，为保持学生模型对初始噪声的微分响应提供了可行方案，对噪声驱动的下游控制任务具有重要价值。

title: SimSD: Simple Speculative Decoding in Diffusion Language Models
comment: 13 pages, 4 figures, code available at https://github.com/airevo2/SimSD-release
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive (AR) LLMs, offering faster inference through parallel or blockwise decoding. However, their masked language modeling formulation remains incompatible with standard token-level speculative decoding, one of the most effective acceleration techniques for AR models. In AR decoding, the causal mask preserves temporally valid token-level contexts, enabling a target model to verify multiple drafted tokens in a single forward pass. In contrast, dLLMs rely on mask tokens and bidirectional attention, causing the effective context to change across denoising steps and preventing direct token-level speculative verification. To bridge this gap, we propose a simple but effective speculative decoding algorithm for diffusion language models, named SimSD, which mainly adopts a plug-and-play masking strategy that equips dLLMs with temporally valid token-level contexts for speculative decoding. Our method explicitly introduces reference tokens from draft-model predictions and designs an attention mask that regulates their interaction with current-step tokens, allowing dLLMs to compute valid logits for drafted tokens in a single forward pass. This restores the key verification ability provided by causal masking in AR models while preserving the parallel decoding advantages of dLLMs. The proposed method is training-free and can be flexibly integrated with other acceleration techniques such as KV cache and blockwise decoding. Experiments on SDAR-family dLLMs across four benchmarks show that our method achieves up to 7.46x higher decoding throughput while maintaining and even improving average generation quality.

AI.tldr: 提出了SimSD，一种即插即用的掩码策略，使扩散语言模型（dLLMs）具备类似自回归模型的令牌级投机解码能力，实现最高7.46倍的解码吞吐量提升且无需训练。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（dLLMs）虽然推理速度快，但其掩码语言建模与自回归模型中高效的令牌级投机解码不兼容——dLLMs的掩码令牌和双向注意力导致有效上下文在去噪步骤中变化，无法直接进行令牌级投机验证。
AI.method: 提出SimSD方法：引入草稿模型预测的参考令牌，并设计一种注意力掩码来调节参考令牌与当前步令牌的交互，使dLLMs能在单次前向传播中为草稿令牌计算有效logits，恢复因果掩码的验证能力。
AI.result: 在SDAR系列dLLMs的四个基准测试中，SimSD实现了最高7.46倍的解码吞吐量提升，同时保持甚至提升了平均生成质量。
AI.conclusion: SimSD是一种无需训练、即插即用的方法，可以灵活集成KV缓存和块状解码等其他加速技术，有效弥合了dLLMs与AR模型在投机解码能力上的差距。

title: GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA: A Near-optimal Algorithm for Low-precision Quantization with Low-rank Adaptation
summary: Post-training quantization is widely used for compressing large neural networks, but aggressive low-bit quantization can significantly degrade model quality. A common remedy is to augment the quantized weights with a low-rank correction, leading to approximations of the form $W\approx Q+LR$. In this paper, we study this low-precision plus low-rank representation through the layer-wise reconstruction objective $\|XW-X(Q+LR)\|_F^2$, where $X$ is a calibration matrix. We establish, to our knowledge, the first information-theoretic lower bounds for this problem under finite-alphabet and bounded low-rank compensation constraints. We then propose GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA, a training-free algorithm that incorporates the low-rank correction directly into a GPTQ-style quantization pass by appropriately augmenting the calibration Hessian. For the choice $L=V_r$, where $V_r$ contains the top right singular vectors of $X$, we prove layer-wise reconstruction error bounds in which the usual GPTQ dependence on $\|X\|_F^2$ is replaced by the rank-$r$ residual $\|X-X_r\|_F^2$, up to regularization terms. Under natural structural assumptions, these bounds match the information-theoretic lower bounds in their dominant scaling, up to constants and mild factors. We also introduce Bid-Up, a fixed-grid quantization refinement step that can be alternated with optimal low-rank compensation with guaranteed non-increasing layer-wise reconstruction error. Experiments on Qwen3 language models and DeiT vision transformers show that GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA improves over GPTQ and GPTQ followed by low-rank compensation, with additional gains from refinement loops.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA，一种将低秩校正直接融入GPTQ量化过程的无需训练算法，并给出了信息论下界和重构误差界，实验表明该方法优于GPTQ及先量化后低秩补偿的方案。
AI.motivation: 后训练量化在压缩大型神经网络时，低位量化会严重损害模型质量，现有方法通过低秩校正（W≈Q+LR）来缓解，但缺乏理论保证和统一的优化框架。
AI.method: 提出GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA算法：在GPTQ量化过程中通过增广校准Hessian直接融入低秩校正；对于L=V_r（X的顶部右奇异向量）给出重构误差界；引入Bid-Up固定网格量化精炼步骤，可与最优低秩补偿交替进行并保证误差非增。
AI.result: 在Qwen3语言模型和DeiT视觉Transformer上，GPTQ-intrinsic LoRA优于GPTQ和先量化后低秩补偿的方法，精炼循环带来额外收益。
AI.conclusion: 低精度加低秩表示在理论上有信息论下界保障，且所提算法在实际中有效，为后训练量化提供了更好的理论-实践结合方案。

title: RPCASSM: Robust PCA State Space Model For Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: The detection and segmentation of infrared small targets have important application significance in the fields of surveillance and security, maritime rescue and so on. Due to the low occupancy of these targets in long-distance imaging, the mainstream visual state space model is inefficient and difficult to accurately model the target edge. The existing infrared state space models do not deviate from the mainstream visual state space structure framework from the structural properties of infrared small targets. In order to solve this problem, this paper proposes the RPCASSM network based on the model paradigm of robust principal component analysis(RPCA), which aims to design the background state space module(BSSM) and the target state space module(TSSM) by the nature of the infrared small target in the spatial domain. The BSSM aims to use the saliency of spatial heterogeneous signals to design a spatial probe scanning mechanism(SPCM) to model background information. The TSSM designs a deformable prompt scanning mechanism(DPCM) by using the sparsity and local highlight of the target to focus on the deformable space of the target for state space modeling. According to the above design, we effectively solve the problem that the existing mainstream vision state space model is difficult to accurately model the edge structure of infrared small target. Experimental results on the existing benchmark data sets prove the effectiveness of the RPCASSM design. Our code will be made public at \href{https://github.com/PepperCS/RPCASSM}{RPCASSM}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RPCASSM网络，基于鲁棒主成分分析范式，通过设计背景状态空间模块(BSSM)和目标状态空间模块(TSSM)，分别利用空间异质信号显著性和目标稀疏局部高亮特性，解决现有视觉状态空间模型难以准确建模红外小目标边缘结构的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有主流视觉状态空间模型在处理红外小目标时效率低下，难以精确建模目标边缘；而现有的红外状态空间模型也未能从小目标的结构特性出发脱离主流框架，因此需要设计专门针对红外小目标特性的状态空间模型。
AI.method: 基于RPCA模型范式，提出RPCASSM网络：(1) 背景状态空间模块(BSSM)，利用空间异质信号显著性设计空间探针扫描机制(SPCM)建模背景；(2) 目标状态空间模块(TSSM)，利用目标稀疏性和局部高亮特性设计可变形提示扫描机制(DPCM)，聚焦目标可变空间进行状态空间建模。
AI.result: 在现有基准数据集上的实验结果证明了RPCASSM设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RPCASSM通过将RPCA思想引入状态空间模型，分别对背景和目标进行针对性建模，有效解决了红外小目标边缘结构难以准确建模的问题。

title: Transferable Self-Harm Surveillance from Emergency Department Triage Notes Using an Evidence-Augmented Machine Learning Approach
summary: Self-harm is a major public health concern, but current surveillance relying on hospital presentations is inadequate due to the low sensitivity of diagnostic codes. Emergency Department (ED) triage notes, recorded at the initial point of contact, provide a succinct summary of presentations and an opportunity to identify self-harm. We developed a three-stage approach, augmenting traditional machine learning with large language model-based screening and evidence extraction to detect self-harm in ED triage notes. We assessed model transferability across three Australian hospitals. Our approach showed AUPRCs of 0.887 +/- 0.016 and 0.884 +/- 0.012 during internal and external validation. Prospectively, it achieved AUPRC of 0.881 +/- 0.008 at the development site, and 0.879 +/- 0.012 and 0.816 +/- 0.015 at two external sites without site-specific retraining. A key advantage of the approach is that it enables identification of the primary self-harm method with an accuracy of 95%, supporting more granular surveillance beyond binary classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种三阶段方法，结合传统机器学习与大语言模型，用于从急诊科分诊记录中检测自伤行为，并在三家澳大利亚医院验证了模型的可迁移性，取得了较高的AUPRC值，且能以95%的准确率识别自伤方式。
AI.motivation: 当前依赖医院诊断编码的自伤监测灵敏度低，无法有效捕捉自伤病例，亟需一种更敏感的检测方法。
AI.method: 三阶段方法：传统机器学习 + 大语言模型筛查与证据提取，用于分析急诊科分诊记录中的自伤信息。
AI.result: 内部验证AUPRC 0.887±0.016，外部验证0.884±0.012；前瞻性测试中，开发站点0.881±0.008，两个外部站点分别为0.879±0.012和0.816±0.015；自伤方式识别准确率达95%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在多个站点间具有良好的可迁移性，且能超越二分类，实现更细粒度的自伤监测。

title: Target localization, identification and sensing using latent symmetries
comment: Submitted to SIAM Journal on Imaging Sciences
summary: We show that an array of scatterers which has been designed to have latent ("hidden") symmetries can be used as a sensor. We use the capacitance matrix as a canonical model for three-dimensional hybridisation and study how the introduction of an "intruder'' scatterer breaks the latent symmetries. By analysing the degree to which each symmetry is broken, we identify the radius of the intruder and localize its position. This can be achieved using a dictionary-based approach, however Bayesian inference or an artificial neural network (multi-layer perceptron) perform better in the presence of measurement noise. To our knowledge, this is the first time latent symmetries have been exploited successfully for sensing problems. It is also the first time latent symmetries have been observed in a three-dimensional open system that cannot be approximated by a sparse graph.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了具有潜在（隐藏）对称性的散射体阵列可作为传感器使用。通过电容矩阵模型研究入侵者如何打破这些对称性，并利用对称性破缺程度来识别入侵者半径和定位其位置。字典方法、贝叶斯推断或神经网络均能实现，其中后两者在噪声环境下表现更优。这是首次将潜在对称性成功应用于传感问题，也是在三维开放系统中观测到潜在对称性。
AI.motivation: 探索如何利用设计好的具有潜在对称性的散射体阵列作为传感器，通过入侵者打破对称性的现象来实现感知功能。
AI.method: 采用电容矩阵作为三维杂化模型，分析入侵者散射体如何打破潜在对称性；通过量化各对称性的破缺程度来识别入侵者半径和定位；比较了字典方法、贝叶斯推断和多层感知机神经网络三种方法。
AI.result: 成功利用潜在对称性破缺实现入侵者半径识别和位置定位；贝叶斯推断和神经网络在测量噪声环境下表现优于字典方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次将潜在对称性成功应用于传感问题，也是首次在无法用稀疏图近似的三维开放系统中观测到潜在对称性。

title: Understanding Identity Continuity in Thermal Video through Scene-Level Consistency
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Workshop on SVC. Published in CVPR Workshops proceedings
summary: Thermal pedestrian MOT remains challenging because weak appearance cues and frequent detection interruptions cause severe trajectory fragmentation. We study whether lightweight post-processing can recover identity continuity without relying on heavy re-identification models or complex online association. Starting from a YOLOv8 and SORT baseline, we add a modular identity-repair backend consisting of online short-gap remapping and offline tracklet relinking based on temporal, spatial, motion, and border cues. Controlled ablations on a fixed validation split and evaluation on the official PBVS Thermal Pedestrian MOT benchmark show that the main identity gains arise from conservative relinking, improving IDF1 from 82.25 to 84.93 while preserving MOTA, whereas many heuristic thresholds remain stable across broad operating ranges. These results suggest that, in low-information thermal imagery, robust identity recovery can be achieved more effectively through high-precision trajectory relinking than through increasing tracker complexity. These results provide a controlled analysis of identity recovery in thermal video, showing that scene-level spatial-temporal consistency plays a dominant role in identity continuity compared to local frame-to-frame association.

AI.tldr: 针对热成像行人多目标跟踪中身份断裂问题，提出轻量级后处理方案，通过在线短间隙重映射和离线轨迹重链接，在无需复杂重识别模型情况下将IDF1从82.25提升至84.93，证明了高精度轨迹重链接比增加跟踪器复杂度更有效。
AI.motivation: 热成像行人多目标跟踪中，弱外观线索和频繁检测中断导致严重的轨迹碎片化（身份断裂），现有方案依赖重型重识别模型或复杂在线关联，效率较低。
AI.method: 在YOLOv8+SORT基线基础上，添加模块化身份修复后端：(1) 在线短间隙重映射；(2) 基于时空、运动、边界线索的离线轨道路径重链接。
AI.result: 在PBVS热成像行人MOT基准上，IDF1从82.25提升至84.93，同时保持MOTA不变；主要增益来自保守的重链接策略，且大多数启发式阈值在较宽范围内保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 在低信息热成像场景中，通过高精度轨迹重链接实现身份恢复比增加跟踪器复杂度更有效；场景级时空一致性对身份连续性起主导作用，而非局部帧间关联。

title: SN-WER: Script-Normalized WER for Multi-Script Indic ASR Evaluation
summary: Word Error Rate (WER) is the dominant metric for automatic speech recognition (ASR), but it can overestimate errors when references and hypotheses encode the same words in different scripts. This issue is common in multilingual settings where ASR models may emit romanized text. We propose Script-Normalized WER (SN-WER), a training-free, evaluation-only scoring method that transliterates both reference and hypothesis text into a language-specific canonical script before computing WER. We evaluate SN-WER on 5 Indic languages, 2 datasets, and 3 ASR models. On curated FLEURS data, SN-WER reduces inflated model gaps by up to 12%, while on noisier Common Voice data the reductions are smaller or inconsistent, indicating genuine recognition weaknesses rather than only script mismatch. Controlled stress tests show a 67% attenuation of artificial romanization-induced WER inflation, while lexical-substitution controls show near-identical sensitivity to semantic errors, with Delta SN-WER / Delta WER approximately 1.09. SN-WER is robust to transliterator choice, normalization changes, and shows low token-collision rates below 0.1% in the evaluated Indic setting. We argue that SN-WER should be reported alongside WER and CER as a companion metric for script-insensitive ASR evaluation, especially when transcripts feed downstream search, indexing, or multilingual LLM pipelines.

AI.tldr: 提出Script-Normalized WER (SN-WER)，一种在评估前将参考文本和假设文本转写为标准文字的方法，用于减少因文字系统差异导致的WER通胀，在5种印度语言上验证有效。
AI.motivation: WER在多语言场景下会因参考文本和假设文本使用不同文字（如罗马化转写）而高估错误率，缺乏对文字不敏感的评估指标。
AI.method: 提出SN-WER：在计算WER之前，将参考文本和假设文本都转写为语言特定的规范文字，无需重新训练模型，仅修改评估流程。
AI.result: 在FLEURS上模型间差距降低最多12%；人工罗马化导致WER通胀衰减67%；对语义错误敏感度与WER接近（Delta SN-WER / Delta WER ≈ 1.09）；文字碰撞率低于0.1%。
AI.conclusion: SN-WER应作为WER和CER的补充指标用于多语言ASR评估，尤其当转录文本用于下游搜索、索引或多语言LLM流水线时。

title: Learning-based Directed Graph Abstraction of Combinatorial Spaces for Order-Preserving Search in Mixed-Combinatorial Nonlinear Optimization
comment: Accepted for presentation at 2026, ASME IDETC
summary: Mixed-combinatorial nonlinear programming (MCNLP) problems arise in many engineering design and planning applications, e.g., due to categorical, component, and geometric design choices, as well as joint task and motion planning. Traditional representations of combinatorial spaces, such as integer or binary encoding, often introduce spurious relations, increase dimensionality, and require additional compatibility constraints. Instead, this paper draws on recent developments in robot planning and vehicle/network routing domains that aim to learn search heuristics over combinatorial spaces using graph neural networks (GNNs). More specifically, this paper presents a first-of-its-kind structured abstraction of the combinatorial space by learning a mapping from an undirected fully connected graph of combinations to a directed graph indicating improvement directions using an Edge Field Graph Network (EFGN). To demonstrate the utility of this new way of abstracting the combinatorial space in solving MCNLPs, we adopt a recent optimization framework that purely searches over the non-combinatorial (e.g., continuous) variables and retrieves the best-suited combination for each candidate design by using the abstraction model, akin to a recommender system. The presented direction-aware abstraction model provides a potentially more scalable and interpretable retrieval of combinations compared to the original recommendation system in that framework. For evaluation, the proposed method is integrated with a well-known particle swarm optimization and genetic algorithm solvers on three benchmark nonlinear problems with varying numbers of combinations and variables. Compared to baseline solvers using indexified combinations, the GNN-based recommender consistently achieves better mean optimum values and robustness across multiple runs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的结构化抽象方法，用Edge Field Graph Network（EFGN）将组合空间映射为有向图，并作为推荐系统嵌入到非组合变量搜索框架中，以更高效、可解释地求解混合组合非线性规划（MCNLP）问题。
AI.motivation: 传统MCNLP求解中使用整数/二进制编码表示组合空间，会引入虚假关系、增加维度并需要额外兼容性约束。本文旨在开发一种更高效、可扩展且可解释的组合空间抽象方法。
AI.method: 1) 使用Edge Field Graph Network (EFGN) 将无向完全组合图映射为有向图，指示改进方向；2) 将抽象模型作为推荐系统，嵌入到仅搜索连续变量的优化框架中；3) 与粒子群优化和遗传算法结合，在三个基准非线性问题上进行验证。
AI.result: 与使用索引化组合的基线求解器相比，基于GNN的推荐系统在多个运行中持续获得更优的均值最优值，并展现出更好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方向感知抽象模型相比原始推荐系统更具可扩展性和可解释性，为MCNLP问题提供了一种新的有效求解范式。

title: Learning Label-Efficient Interpretable Medical Image Diagnosis via Semi-supervised Hypergraph Concept Bottleneck Model
summary: Deep learning has revolutionized medical image analysis, delivering exceptional diagnostic accuracy across diverse applications. Yet, the lack of interpretability in its decision-making hinders clinical adoption, particularly in high-stakes medical contexts where transparency is paramount for trustworthiness. For example, in Placenta Accreta Spectrum (PAS), subtle cues in ultrasound imaging challenge reliable diagnosis, rendering black-box models untrustworthy for accurate scoring. To address this, Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) offer a promising avenue by embedding clinically meaningful intermediate concepts into the diagnosis pipeline, enabling clinicians to scrutinize and refine model outputs. However, conventional CBMs falter in capturing complex inter-concept dependencies and demand costly, expert-driven concept annotations, limiting their scalability. This study introduces a novel semi-supervised CBM framework designed for medical imaging, which leverages dual-level hypergraph learning to model high-order concept dependencies and generate domain-adaptive pseudo-labels. Our approach achieves superior interpretability and performance by integrating a concept-level hypergraph for enhanced reasoning and an image-level hypergraph for robust pseudo-label generation. Experiments on a newly annotated PAS ultrasound dataset and a breast ultrasound public dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed concept label-efficient interpretable framework. Its universality is further validated on the dermoscopic image dataset SkinCon. The code is available at https://github.com/scott-yjyang/HyperCBM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HyperCBM，一个半监督概念瓶颈模型框架，通过双层级超图学习来建模医学影像中高阶概念依赖关系并生成伪标签，在胎盘植入谱系、乳腺超声和皮肤镜数据集上验证了其可解释性和有效性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学影像分析中表现优异，但缺乏可解释性阻碍了临床采用。传统概念瓶颈模型(CBM)虽能提供可解释性，但难以捕捉复杂的概念间依赖关系，且需要昂贵的专家标注概念，限制了其可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出半监督CBM框架：(1) 概念层级超图学习，建模高阶概念依赖关系以增强推理能力；(2) 图像层级超图学习，生成领域自适应的伪标签，降低对专家概念标注的依赖。
AI.result: 在新标注的PAS超声数据集、乳腺超声公开数据集以及皮肤镜数据集SkinCon上验证了方法的有效性，在概念标签效率高的情况下实现了优越的可解释性和性能。
AI.conclusion: 双层级超图学习能有效解决CBM在建模概念依赖和标签成本方面的局限，为医学影像提供了一种更实用、可扩展的可解释AI方案。

title: HERO'S JOURNEY: Testing Complex Rule Induction with Text Games
summary: We introduce HERO'S JOURNEY, a benchmark for rule induction in goal-directed episodic tasks, where agents must infer hidden rules from demonstrations and act on them through multi-step execution. HERO'S JOURNEY covers eight tasks across attribute and procedural induction families, each with four structural rule forms, controllable lexical grounding, and identifiability conditions. Evaluating state-of-the-art LLMs, we find that models show evidence of rule induction, but the ability is limited and uneven across tasks. Meanwhile, process execution adds an execution bottleneck for models, whereas surface semantics has minimal effect. Induction-specific steering methods improve performance on attribute tasks but show no reliable gains on procedural tasks, suggesting the gap in procedural induction remains an open challenge.

AI.tldr: HERO'S JOURNEY是一个用于评估目标导向情景任务中规则归纳能力的基准测试，包含8个任务和4种规则形式。评估发现大语言模型规则归纳能力有限且不均匀，过程执行是瓶颈，而表面语义影响较小；归纳引导方法仅在属性任务上有效，程序化归纳仍是挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对目标导向情景任务中规则归纳能力的系统评估，尤其是在多步执行和可控规则结构条件下的测试。
AI.method: 设计了包含8个任务（涵盖属性归纳和程序归纳两大类）的基准，每个任务有4种结构规则形式，并引入可控制词法基础和可辨识性条件。
AI.result: LLMs表现出一定的规则归纳能力，但能力有限且任务间不均衡；过程执行是主要瓶颈，表面语义影响较小；归纳引导方法仅在属性任务上有效。
AI.conclusion: 程序化归纳仍然是一个未解决的开放挑战，现有模型的规则归纳能力与人类水平存在差距。

title: Leaf Spectral Reflectance Prediction Using Multi-Head Attention Neural Networks
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Author-accepted version of the SPIE conference paper
summary: Accurate modeling of leaf spectral reflectance from physiological and biochemical traits is essential for advancing remote sensing applications in plant science and precision agriculture. Widely used radiative transfer models, such as PROSPECT-PRO, rely on generalized trait-reflectance relationships developed from a wide range of species, which may not fully capture the spectral behavior of specific crops like grapevines. In this study, we developed a trait-to-spectra prediction model using a multi-head attention neural network trained on a grapevine-specific dataset that includes 16 leaf traits measured across multiple varieties, growth stages, and years. The model was evaluated using stratified 5-fold cross-validation and achieved an average coefficient of determination (R^2) of 0.84 and normalized root mean squared error (NRMSE) of 1.52 percent, demonstrating high accuracy and generalizability. When compared to PROSPECT-PRO in forward mode, the neural network exhibited lower mean absolute error (MAE), especially in the near-infrared (NIR) and shortwave-infrared (SWIR) regions. These results emphasize the importance of species-specific modeling approaches and show that integrating biochemical and structural traits into data-driven architectures can significantly improve spectral prediction. The proposed model provides a robust framework for generating accurate leaf-level reflectance data, with potential applications in canopy trait retrieval, vineyard monitoring, and remote sensing-driven crop management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多头注意力神经网络的葡萄叶片反射率预测模型，利用16个叶片性状（涵盖多品种、生长阶段和年份）实现了高精度（R²=0.84, NRMSE=1.52%）的光谱预测，性能优于传统PROSPECT-PRO模型，强调了物种特异性建模在遥感应用中的重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有辐射传输模型（如PROSPECT-PRO）基于广义物种开发，难以准确捕捉特定作物（如葡萄）的光谱行为，需要构建物种特异性的性状-光谱预测模型。
AI.method: 采用多头注意力神经网络，以16个叶片性状为输入，在包含多个葡萄品种、生长阶段和年份的数据集上训练，使用分层5折交叉验证评估。
AI.result: 平均R²为0.84，NRMSE为1.52%；相比PROSPECT-PRO正向模式，在NIR和SWIR区域MAE更低。
AI.conclusion: 物种特异性建模能显著提升光谱预测精度，数据驱动架构结合生化与结构性状为葡萄园监测和遥感驱动作物管理提供了稳健框架。

title: MixerSENet: A Lightweight Framework for Efficient Hyperspectral Image Classification
comment: Accepted and Published in IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters (GRSL)
summary: In this paper, a novel framework, MixerSENet, is introduced for hyperspectral image (HSI) classification, designed to address the challenges of computational efficiency and limited labeled data. The proposed model processes hyperspectral image patches while maintaining consistent size and resolution throughout the network, effectively decoupling the mixing of spatial and channel dimensions. Notably, MixerSENet is lightweight and computationally efficient, requiring fewer parameters compared to traditional models, making it suitable for resource-constrained environments. A squeeze and excitation block is incorporated into the model to refine feature extraction, enhancing the network's ability to capture more informative features. Experimental results on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that MixerSENet achieves superior performance, reaching an overall accuracy (OA) of 82.47% on Houston13 dataset and 96.70% on the Qingyun dataset, outperforming state-of-the-art methods including 3D-CNN, HybridKAN, HSIFormer, SimPoolFormer, and MorphMamba. Furthermore, a detailed analysis of computational efficiency shows that MixerSENet achieves a favorable balance between accuracy and efficiency, with only 53,146 parameters and an low inference time, confirming its practicality for real-world applications. At publication, source code will be publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/MixerSENet.

AI.tldr: MixerSENet是一种轻量级高光谱图像分类框架，通过解耦空间与通道维度、引入SE模块，在保持计算效率的同时，在Houston13和Qingyun数据集上分别达到82.47%和96.70%的总体准确率，参数量仅53,146。
AI.motivation: 解决高光谱图像分类中计算效率低和标注数据有限的问题，传统模型参数过多且计算开销大，难以应用于资源受限场景。
AI.method: 提出MixerSENet框架，保持图像patch在网络中尺寸和分辨率一致，解耦空间和通道维度的混合；引入Squeeze and Excitation(SE)模块强化特征提取。
AI.result: 在Houston13数据集上OA达82.47%，Qingyun数据集上OA达96.70%，优于3D-CNN、HybridKAN、HSIFormer等方法；模型仅53,146个参数，推理时间短。
AI.conclusion: MixerSENet在精度与效率之间取得了良好平衡，验证了其在实际应用中的实用性，尤其适用于资源受限环境。

title: From Layers to Submodules: Rethinking Granularity in Replacement-Based LLM Compression
summary: Post-training compression of Large Language Models (LLMs) removes entire architectural components, either deleting them or replacing them with fitted modules. Existing replacement-based methods share two design constraints: full-layer granularity and contiguous selection. We argue that this is overly restrictive: in fact, redundancy in pretrained transformers is not confined to contiguous regions, nor does it evenly distribute between Attention and FeedForward outputs, implying that different strategies best approximate different submodule types and that removable components need not cluster within contiguous depth ranges. Based on this intuition, we introduce SubFit (Submodule-level Fitted residual replacement), which compresses LLMs at the submodule level: Attention and FeedForward submodules are selected non-contiguously, and each receives its own lightweight fitted residual bypass. SubFit operates post-training and requires only calibration data. Across ten LLMs (five base, five instruction-tuned), five sparsity levels from 12.5% to 37.5%, and four replacement-based baselines, SubFit achieves the best aggregate perplexity-accuracy trade-off across the evaluated sparsity levels, with larger gains under aggressive compression. At 25% sparsity, it retains 84.6% of dense downstream accuracy and incurs 2.42x perplexity degradation, against 81.6% and 4.34x for the strongest baselines, while delivering measurable inference speedup and KV-cache savings. Code is available at https://github.com/eliacunegatti/SubFit.

AI.tldr: 提出SubFit方法，在子模块级别（注意力和前馈网络）非连续地选择可替换组件，用轻量级残差旁路替代，实现比全层连续替换更好的压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM压缩方法局限于全层粒度和连续选择，忽略了注意力层和前馈层的冗余分布差异以及可移除组件不必连续分布的特点。
AI.method: SubFit：在子模块级别（Attention和FFN）非连续选择可替换组件，为每个选中的子模块配备轻量级拟合残差旁路，仅需校准数据即可完成后训练压缩。
AI.result: 在10个LLM（5个基座+5个指令微调）、5种稀疏度（12.5%-37.5%）和4个基线方法上，SubFit达到最优的困惑度-准确率权衡；25%稀疏度下保留84.6%下游准确率（基线81.6%），困惑度退化2.42x（基线4.34x）。
AI.conclusion: 子模块级别的非连续替换压缩策略优于传统的全层连续替换方法，尤其是在高压缩率场景下优势更明显。

title: CEAR: Certified Ensemble Adversarial Robustness in DNNs
comment: This is the preprint of the work accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 39th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence (Canadian AI 2026); 19 Pages
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are highly susceptible to adversarial perturbations, leading to extensive research on robustness for safety-critical applications. State-of-the-art empirical defense mechanisms improve the robustness of DNNs through the training phase, but still struggle against adaptive white-box attacks. On the other hand, certified defenses offer provable guarantees of robustness within a specified perturbation bound. These guarantees hold regardless of the level of perturbations, even if the attacker is given full knowledge of the model. In this paper, we propose CEAR, an ensemble-based robust method that utilizes a hybrid of empirical and certified defense mechanisms. CEAR trains each network within the ensemble using varying Gaussian noise and temperatures to obfuscate gradients and logits, making the model more resistant to stronger gradient-based attacks. We then use noisy logits and propose two different voting mechanisms to further improve robustness. Furthermore, we extend randomized smoothing to verify the robustness of ensemble-based classifiers. Our experimental evaluations on MNIST, CIFAR10, and TinyImageNet datasets demonstrate superior certified accuracy on average, increased robustness radius, and decreased transferability compared to baseline methods.

AI.tldr: CEAR是一种结合经验性防御和认证性防御的集成方法，通过在集成网络中引入高斯噪声、温度调节、噪声logits及两种投票机制来提升鲁棒性，并在MNIST、CIFAR10、TinyImageNet上验证了平均认证准确率、鲁棒半径和迁移性上的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有DNN对对抗扰动高度敏感，经验性防御在面对自适应白盒攻击时仍不足，而认证性防御虽能提供可证明的鲁棒性保证但在实际性能上有限，因此需要一种结合两者优势的方法。
AI.method: 提出CEAR框架：1）集成网络中每个子网络使用不同高斯噪声和温度进行训练以混淆梯度与logits；2）使用噪声logits并设计两种不同投票机制；3）将随机平滑扩展到集成分类器以验证鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR10、TinyImageNet数据集上，相比基线方法，CEAR实现了更高的平均认证准确率、更大的鲁棒半径以及更低的迁移性。
AI.conclusion: CEAR通过混合经验性与认证性防御机制，有效提升了DNN在面对对抗攻击时的鲁棒性，是一种有前景的鲁棒集成方法。

title: Spatio-Temporal Correlation Guided Geometric Partitioning for Versatile Video Coding
summary: Geometric partitioning has attracted increasing attention by its remarkable motion field description capability in the hybrid video coding framework. However, the existing geometric partitioning (GEO) scheme in Versatile Video Coding (VVC) causes a non-negligible burden for signaling the side information. Consequently, the coding efficiency is limited. In view of this, we propose a spatio-temporal correlation guided geometric partitioning (STGEO) scheme to efficiently describe the object information in the motion field of video coding. The proposed method can economize the bits consumed for side information signaling, including the partitioning mode and motion information. We firstly analyze the characteristics of partitioning mode decision and motion vector selection in a statistically-sound way. Based on the observed spatio-temporal correlation, we design a mode prediction and coding method to reduce the overhead for representing the above mentioned side information. The main idea is to predict the STGEO modes and motion candidates that have higher selection possibilities, which can guide the entropy coding, i.e., representing the predicted high-probability modes and motion candidates with fewer bits. In particular, the high-probability STGEO modes are predicted based on the edge information and history modes of adjacent STGEO-coded blocks. The corresponding motion information is represented by the index in a merge candidate list, which is adaptively inferred based on the off-line trained merge candidate selection probability. Simulation results show that the proposed approach achieves 0.95% and 1.98% bit-rate savings on average compared to VTM-8.0 without GEO for Random Access and Low-Delay B configurations, respectively.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种时空相关性的几何划分（STGEO）方案，通过利用时空相关性预测高概率划分模式和运动候选，减少边信息信令开销，在VVC框架下提升编码效率，分别实现0.95%和1.98%的平均码率节省。
AI.motivation: 现有VVC中的几何划分（GEO）方案因边信息信令负担过重，限制了编码效率。本文旨在通过减少划分模式和运动信息等边信息的比特消耗，提升编码性能。
AI.method: 首先统计性分析划分模式决策和运动矢量选择的特性，基于观察到的时空相关性，设计模式预测和编码方法；通过边缘信息和相邻块历史模式预测高概率STGEO模式，并基于离线训练的运动候选选择概率自适应推断融合候选列表索引，以此指导熵编码用更少比特表示高概率信息。
AI.result: 相比无GEO的VTM-8.0，在Random Access配置下平均节省0.95%码率，Low-Delay B配置下平均节省1.98%码率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的STGEO方案能有效利用时空相关性减少边信息开销，提升视频编码效率，验证了基于相关性预测的几何划分方法在混合视频编码框架中的实用价值。

title: Pramana: Fine-Tuning Large Language Models for Epistemic Reasoning through Navya-Nyaya
comment: 52 pages + appendices, comprehensive treatment of Navya-Nyaya computational formalization
summary: Large language models produce fluent text but struggle with systematic reasoning, often hallucinating confident but unfounded claims. When Apple researchers added irrelevant context to mathematical problems, LLM performance degraded by 65% Apple Machine Learning Research, exposing brittle pattern-matching beneath apparent reasoning. This epistemic gap, the inability to ground claims in traceable evidence, limits AI reliability in domains requiring justification. We introduce Pramana, a novel approach that teaches LLMs explicit epistemological methodology by fine-tuning on Navya-Nyaya logic, a 2,500-year-old Indian reasoning framework. Unlike generic chain-of-thought prompting, Navya-Nyaya enforces structured 6-phase reasoning: SAMSHAYA (doubt analysis), PRAMANA (evidence source identification), PANCHA AVAYAVA (5-member syllogism with universal rules), TARKA (counterfactual verification), HETVABHASA (fallacy detection), and NIRNAYA (ascertainment distinguishing knowledge from hypothesis). This integration of logic and epistemology provides cognitive scaffolding absent from standard reasoning approaches. We fine-tune Llama 3.2-3B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B on 55 Nyaya-structured logical problems (constraint satisfaction, Boolean SAT, multi-step deduction). Stage 1 achieves 100% semantic correctness on held-out evaluation despite only 40% strict format adherence revealing that models internalize reasoning content even when structural enforcement is imperfect. Ablation studies show format prompting and temperature critically affect performance, with optimal configurations differing by stage. We release all models, datasets, and training infrastructure on Hugging Face to enable further research on epistemic frameworks for AI reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pramana方法，通过对Llama 3.2-3B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B模型微调2500年前的印度Navya-Nyaya逻辑（包含6阶段推理：怀疑分析、证据溯源、五支论式、反事实验证、谬误检测和确定判断），来解决LLM在系统推理中的认知缺陷。在55个逻辑问题上达到100%语义正确率，但格式遵守率仅40%，表明模型内化了推理内容。
AI.motivation: LLM虽然能生成流畅文本，但在系统推理上表现脆弱——添加无关上下文会导致性能下降65%，暴露出其依赖表面模式匹配而非真正推理。这种无法将主张追溯到可验证证据的认知鸿沟，限制了AI在需要论证的领域的可靠性。
AI.method: 对Llama 3.2-3B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B进行微调，采用Navya-Nyaya逻辑框架的6阶段结构化推理：SAMSHAYA（怀疑分析）、PRAMANA（证据识别）、PANCHA AVAYAVA（五支论式）、TARKA（反事实验证）、HETVABHASA（谬误检测）和NIRNAYA（确定判断）。训练数据为55个Nyaya结构的逻辑问题（约束满足、布尔SAT、多步演绎）。
AI.result: 在保留集上达到100%语义正确率，但严格格式遵守率仅40%。消融实验表明格式提示和温度参数对性能至关重要，且不同训练阶段的最佳配置不同。
AI.conclusion: 模型即使在不完美遵守格式的情况下也能内化推理内容，表明将认知方法论框架融入LLM训练是可行的。所有模型、数据集和训练基础设施已在Hugging Face上开源。

title: UR-JEPA: Uniform Rectifiability as a Regularizer for Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures
summary: A central difficulty in training Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) is preventing representation collapse. LeJEPA addresses this by enforcing an isotropic Gaussian target on the embeddings via Sketched Isotropic Gaussian Regularization (SIGReg). This target is in tension with the manifold hypothesis, which expects embeddings to concentrate on a low-dimensional subset of the ambient space. We propose \emph{UR-JEPA}, which targets a uniformly $n$-rectifiable measure of local tangent dimension $n$ at small scales, realized through a Gaussian-kernel smoothed Carleson-type square function $\mathcal{L}^{\text{CGLT}}$, with a complementary Jones $β$-number formulation. On Inet10, UR-JEPA($\mathcal{L}^{\text{CGLT}}$) attains $0.9141 \pm 0.0014$ for a $+0.83$\,pp gain over LeJEPA($\mathcal{L}^{\text{SIGReg}}$) with $\sim 30\%$ lower seed standard deviation; on matched-recipe Galaxy10~SDSS, a single-seed ImageNet-$100$ run, and a $3$-seed EuroSAT remote-sensing run, the two methods lie in the same peak-accuracy band at convergence, with UR-JEPA retaining its lower-seed-variance signature. On EuroSAT the in-domain pair is competitive at $96.0$ to $96.1\%$ with large remote-sensing foundation-model transfer at a $25\times$ smaller backbone. The distinction is geometric: direct visualization of the projector output distribution shows that on all four datasets UR--JEPA($\mathcal{L}^{\text{CGLT}}$) produces a global PCA spectrum with a $4$ to $5$ order-of-magnitude drop at index $\sim 20$ to $25$ out of $D = 32$, while LeJEPA's spectrum is near-flat (top-to-bottom ratio at most $3.6$). Per-dimension marginals are simultaneously near-Gaussian for both methods (mean Shapiro-Wilk $W \in [0.992, 0.996]$) as a Diaconis-Freedman consequence. At matched accuracy the two regularizers therefore yield structurally distinct projected representations.

AI.tldr: UR-JEPA通过Carleson型平方函数正则化替代LeJEPA的各向同性高斯约束，在防止表示坍塌的同时更好地遵循流形假设，在多个数据集上达到更高或相当的精度，并产生具有明显低维结构的投影表示。
AI.motivation: LeJEPA使用各向同性高斯目标正则化来防止表示坍塌，但这与流形假设（嵌入应集中在低维子集上）存在矛盾。作者希望提出一种更符合流形假设的正则化方法。
AI.method: 提出UR-JEPA，使用均匀n-可整流测度作为目标，通过高斯核平滑的Carleson型平方函数L^CGLT实现，并辅以Jones β-数公式，替代LeJEPA的各向同性高斯正则化。
AI.result: 在Inet10上UR-JEPA达到0.9141±0.0014，比LeJEPA高0.83个百分点，种子标准差降低约30%。在Galaxy10、ImageNet-100、EuroSAT上两者处于相同精度区间，但UR-JEPA方差更低。PCA谱显示UR-JEPA在索引20-25处有4-5个数量级的下降，而LeJEPA近乎平坦。
AI.conclusion: UR-JEPA的正则化方法在保持精度的同时产生几何结构更合理的低维表示，两种正则化在相同精度下产生结构上不同的投影表示。

title: Density-Aware Translation of Spurious Correlations in Zero-Shot VLMs
summary: Vision-Language models (VLMs), such as CLIP, achieve powerful zero-shot classification. However, their predictions remain sensitive to spurious correlations, where contextual cues dominate over semantic content.
