AI.method: DiCoME框架分为两阶段：(1) Divide阶段——几何视图净化，通过几何投影分解纠缠的表征空间，抑制语义干扰，得到去相关且互补的语义视图和伪影视图；(2) Conquer阶段——不确定性感知证据学习，显式建模语义与伪影线索之间的"认知冲突"，提供校准的不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在泛化性能上持续优于现有方法，并能提供可靠的不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: DiCoME通过解耦语义与伪影信息并建模二者的认知冲突，有效解决了深度伪造检测中的语义掩盖问题，实现了更可信的检测结果。

title: FedMTFI: Feature Importance Based Optimized Multi Teacher Knowledge Distillation in Heterogeneous Federated Learning Environment
summary: Federated learning (FL) is a decentralized approach that enables collaborative model training without exposing raw data. Instead of transferring sensitive data, it allows devices to share only model weights, keeping personal data locally and secure. However, in real world settings, the data held by devices is often not evenly distributed and devices mostly differ in computing power and memory capacity. These differences make FL harder to maintain consistent performance across the system. To address these issues, we propose FedMTFI, a novel architecture that combines multi-teacher knowledge distillation (MTKD) with feature importance to improve the FL process in heterogeneous environments. In FedMTFI, clients are clustered based on similar hardware and model types. Each cluster trains a specific model on not independently and identically distributed (non-IID) data. Within a cluster, every client updates that model using only its own local private data. The server then aggregates the locally trained models in each cluster using FedAvg to form multiple prototype models. Then these prototypes serve as teacher models to train a global generalized student model using MTKD. What makes FedMTFI more unique is the integration of Shapley values (SHAP) to emphasize important features during distillation, which enhances both accuracy and interpretability. Experimental results show that FedMTFI achieves higher accuracy than traditional FL algorithms and performs more effectively under non-IID data conditions.

AI.tldr: FedMTFI是一种结合多教师知识蒸馏（MTKD）与特征重要性（SHAP值）的联邦学习架构，通过客户端聚类、原型模型聚合及基于重要特征的蒸馏策略，有效解决了异构环境下的非IID数据与设备差异问题，在准确率和可解释性上优于传统FL算法。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习在真实场景中面临两大挑战：设备间数据分布不均（非IID）以及计算能力、内存容量差异大，导致系统难以维持一致的性能表现。
AI.method: 将客户端按硬件与模型类型聚类，每个集群在非IID数据上训练特定模型；集群内各客户端用本地私有数据更新模型，服务器通过FedAvg聚合集群模型形成多个原型模型；将这些原型作为教师模型，利用MTKD训练全局通用学生模型；引入SHAP值在蒸馏过程中强调重要特征。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FedMTFI在非IID数据条件下相比传统FL算法取得了更高的准确率，且整体性能更优。
AI.conclusion: FedMTFI通过多教师知识蒸馏与特征重要性机制，有效提升了异构联邦学习在非IID环境下的模型精度与可解释性，为解决联邦学习中的异质性难题提供了可行方案。

title: Adversarial Attacks on Robot Localization Systems via Deep Feature Perturbation
summary: Robot localization systems are critical for autonomous navigation and safety. Adversarial perturbations can mislead these systems, resulting in mislocalization, navigation errors, or unsafe interactions, especially in mission-critical scenarios. This paper investigates the vulnerability of deep learning based localization pipelines to adversarial attacks. We propose a novel framework for generating adversarial queries that specifically target Product Quantization (PQ) in visual localization systems. Our method employs a Lightweight Product Quantization Network (LPQN) to perturb query feature encodings, misleading the retrieval process by returning semantically irrelevant database entries. Adversarial queries are generated via a two-phase procedure: a forward pass that perturbs feature distributions and a backward pass that refines the perturbation through optimization. The lightweight design of LPQN allows the creation of subtle yet highly effective perturbations with minimal computational overhead. Extensive experiments in both controlled and real-world robotic environments demonstrate that our approach substantially degrades PQN performance, exposing critical vulnerabilities in practical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于深度学习的视觉定位系统对对抗攻击的脆弱性，提出了一种轻量级乘积量化网络（LPQN），通过两阶段过程生成对抗查询，成功欺骗定位系统中的乘积量化模块，导致检索结果不相关。
AI.motivation: 机器人定位系统对自主导航和安全至关重要，而对抗扰动可能导致定位错误和安全隐患。现有研究缺乏针对视觉定位系统中乘积量化模块的对抗攻击方法，因此需要探索这一漏洞。
AI.method: 提出轻量级乘积量化网络（LPQN），通过两阶段过程生成对抗查询：前向传播扰动特征分布，反向传播通过优化细化扰动。LPQN轻量设计使扰动细微且高效，计算开销低。
AI.result: 在受控环境和真实机器人环境中的广泛实验表明，该方法显著降低了PQN性能，暴露了实际应用中的关键漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的视觉定位系统存在严重的对抗攻击脆弱性，LPQN可有效利用乘积量化模块的漏洞，需引起对定位系统安全性的重视。

title: IMWM: Intuition Models Complement World Models for Latent Planning
summary: Planning with a learned latent world model is a promising route to control from raw pixels, but a strong world model alone is not enough. We show this experimentally: even with a perfect world model (operationalized by replacing the learned forward predictor with an idealized rollout of the true environment dynamics), a finite-budget sample-based planner still fails on some tasks, indicating that the bottleneck can lie in search rather than in world-model accuracy. Motivated by this gap, we propose IMWM (Intuition Model + World Model), which pairs the world model with an intuition model trained from demonstrations to recognize promising actions. The two models collaborate through three lightweight components: (i) Retrieval Initialization, which initializes the planner's action proposal from a retrieved demonstration; (ii) Hybrid Cost, which combines the intuition score with the world-model rollout cost; and (iii) a Reliability Gate, which adjusts how much the planner trusts intuition in each setting. Across four pixel-based goal-reaching tasks (Two-Room, Reacher, Push-T, and OGBench-Cube), IMWM has higher mean success than the world-model-only planner on all four, with the largest gains on Two-Room (99.2%, +11.5 percentage points) and OGBench-Cube (94.7%, +28.5 percentage points).

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMWM框架，将直觉模型（从示范中学习）与世界模型结合，通过检索初始化、混合成本和可靠性门控三个组件提升基于采样的规划器性能。实验表明，即使世界模型完美，规划瓶颈仍可能在搜索而非模型精度，而IMWM在四个像素级任务上均优于纯世界模型方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于潜在世界模型的规划方法中，即使使用完美的世界模型（真实环境动力学回滚），有限预算的采样规划器仍会在某些任务上失败，说明瓶颈在于搜索而非世界模型精度。因此需要引入额外的引导机制来提升搜索效率。
AI.method: IMWM包含两个模型：世界模型（预测未来状态）和直觉模型（从示范中学习识别有前景的动作）。两者通过三个轻量级组件协作：(i) 检索初始化——从检索到的示范中初始化规划器的动作建议；(ii) 混合成本——结合直觉评分与世界模型回滚成本；(iii) 可靠性门控——动态调整规划器对直觉的信任程度。
AI.result: 在Two-Room、Reacher、Push-T和OGBench-Cube四个像素级目标到达任务上，IMWM的平均成功率均高于纯世界模型规划器。最大提升在Two-Room（99.2%，+11.5个百分点）和OGBench-Cube（94.7%，+28.5个百分点）。
AI.conclusion: 规划中的搜索瓶颈可通过直觉引导有效缓解，将直觉模型与世界模型结合是一种实用且有效的改进方向。

title: Collaborative Space Object Detection with Multi-Satellite Viewpoints in LEO Constellations
summary: With the growing number of satellites in low Earth orbit (LEO) constellations, the near-Earth space environment has become increasingly congested, making space object detection (SOD) a pressing challenge for space safety and sustainability. To mitigate collision risks and ensure the continuity of space operations, SOD systems must deliver fast and accurate detection under stringent onboard constraints. In this paper, we investigate the potential of multi-viewpoint observation fusion within a deep learning (DL) framework to enhance SOD performance. We design a practical multi-view pipeline and several input representations for feeding multi-view data into YOLO-based detectors. Our experiments show that using multi-view inputs is feasible in most cases and typically produces better results for mAP50 and mAP50-95. For example, in model YOLOv9-m, single-view compared to a three-view fused RGB setting, mAP50 increases from 0.638 to 0.732, while mAP50-95 improves from 0.227 to 0.276. Compared with the single-view setting, the best three-view grayscale configuration improves mAP50 by 36.3% and mAP50-95 by 46.5%. These findings establish multi-view fusion as a viable and effective strategy for SOD, with broad implications for space situational awareness in LEO constellation deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在低轨卫星星座日益拥挤的背景下，利用多视角观测融合与深度学习框架（特别是YOLO检测器）来提升空间目标检测性能。实验表明，多视角输入在多数情况下可行且效果优于单视角，例如三视图灰度配置相比单视图可将mAP50提升36.3%，mAP50-95提升46.5%。
AI.motivation: 近地轨道卫星数量激增导致空间环境日益拥挤，碰撞风险加剧，亟需在星上严苛约束条件下实现快速、准确的空间目标检测，以保障空间安全与可持续运行。
AI.method: 设计了一种实用的多视角检测流程，将多视角数据以不同输入表示方式馈入YOLO系列检测器（如YOLOv9-m），通过融合多视角观测信息来增强检测性能。
AI.result: 在YOLOv9-m模型上，三视图RGB融合相比单视图，mAP50从0.638提升至0.732，mAP50-95从0.227提升至0.276；最佳三视图灰度配置相比单视图，mAP50提升36.3%，mAP50-95提升46.5%。
AI.conclusion: 多视角融合是一种可行且有效的空间目标检测策略，对低轨星座部署中的空间态势感知具有广泛意义。

title: E4GEN: Event-level Explainable Extreme-Enhanced Time-series Generation
summary: Generating realistic time series is essential for scientific research and real-world applications. However, existing methods often emphasize overall distributional fidelity while failing to faithfully capture extreme events. To advance existing research, we propose E4GEN, an explainable diffusion framework for extreme event-aware time-series generation. E4GEN provides systematic insights into when, what, and how to control extreme-event generation through three key components. First, E-Activator learns the dataset-adaptive extreme-control signal activation step during the denoising process without interfering with regular temporal components, including trend and seasonality. Second, E-Predictor determines what control signal to enforce through Self-Driven Semantic Prediction, where each sample derives its own control signal by inferring latent extreme-event information during generation. It also includes a novel Data-Conditioned Training, Noise-Initiated Sampling mechanism to address the issue of unavailable training labels. Third, E-Control specifies how to control extreme-event generation through a trainable Extreme Control Network, which transforms the semantic control signal into layer-wise signals and injects it into the denoising process. We evaluate E4GEN on six datasets with 17 metrics, and extensive experiments show that E4GEN outperforms state-of-the-art models across multiple dimensions, including overall fidelity, extreme-event fidelity, and downstream utility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出E4GEN，一种可解释的扩散框架，用于生成包含极端事件的时间序列。它通过三个组件（E-Activator、E-Predictor、E-Control）系统性地控制极端事件的生成时机、内容和方式，在6个数据集上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列生成方法虽然能保持整体分布 fidelity，但无法准确捕获极端事件，这限制了其在科学研究和实际应用中的价值。
AI.method: E4GEN包含三个组件：1) E-Activator：自适应学习去噪过程中极端控制信号的激活步骤；2) E-Predictor：通过自驱动语义预测推断潜在极端事件信息，并采用数据条件训练和噪声初始化采样解决标签缺失问题；3) E-Control：通过可训练的极端控制网络将语义信号注入去噪过程。
AI.result: 在6个数据集上使用17个评估指标进行实验，E4GEN在整体 fidelity、极端事件 fidelity 和下游任务实用性等多个维度均优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: E4GEN通过可解释的扩散框架有效解决了时间序列生成中极端事件捕获难题，为相关领域提供了新的解决方案。

title: Train, Test, Re-evaluate: Schedule-Sensitive Evaluation of Generative Data for Hand Detection
summary: Generated (or synthetic) image data is increasingly used to augment or replace real training datasets when target imagery is scarce, expensive, or biased. For hand detection, particularly in occupational safety settings, public datasets mostly contain bare hands. This under-represents the variation in hand appearance introduced by gloves, tattoos, jewelry, and other personal protective equipment, creating a distribution shift that safety-critical applications encounter at deployment. We test whether generative inpainting, editing only the hand region of a real photograph to introduce accessories, can close this shift gap. On a paired dataset of real images and their synthetic counterparts, we train YOLOv8n hand detectors under six training-and-scheduling regimes (Experiments A-F, three random seeds each), evaluate every detector on a real test set and on a real-gloves-only test split, and report the mean average precision (mAP) at two overlap thresholds (mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.95) along with paired statistical tests. A two-stage experiment: train on real U synthetic data, then fine-tune the resulting weights on real-only at a lower learning rate, increases mAP@0.5 compared to the real-only baseline model on the standard real test set, and improves the real-gloves out-of-distribution gap. Another three-stage experiment preserves box-tightness best, reaching the highest mAP@0.5:0.95 of any other experiment in the study. The synthetic-data utility for safety-critical hand detection is determined by the training procedure, and simple multi-stage experiments extract substantial real-deployment benefit from inpainted accessory data.

AI.tldr: 本文通过生成式图像修复技术在真实手部图像上添加手套等配饰，生成合成数据并设计多阶段训练策略，显著提升了安全关键场景下手部检测的mAP指标，缩小了分布偏移差距。
AI.motivation: 公共手部检测数据集大多只包含裸手，忽略了手套、纹身、珠宝等配饰带来的外观变化，导致安全关键应用部署时出现分布偏移。作者希望用生成式修复技术生成合成数据来弥补这一差距。
AI.method: 使用生成式图像修复技术仅在真实照片的手部区域编辑添加配饰，构建配对数据集；基于YOLOv8n训练六种不同训练与调度策略（实验A-F，每种3个随机种子）；在真实测试集和仅戴手套的真实测试集上评估mAP@0.5和mAP@0.5:0.95，并进行配对统计检验。
AI.result: 两阶段实验（先真实+合成数据训练，再低学习率真实数据微调）相比纯真实基线在标准测试集上提高了mAP@0.5，并缩小了真实手套分布外差距。三阶段实验在框紧致性上表现最佳，获得了所有实验中最高mAP@0.5:0.95。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据对安全关键手部检测的效用取决于训练流程设计，简单的多阶段实验就能从修复生成的配饰数据中提取出显著的部署收益。

title: Gate the Filter, Not the Message: Node-Channel Mixtures for Pre-Propagation GNNs
summary: Pre-propagation graph neural networks (PPGNNs) push all graph-dependent computation into a preprocessing step and train only on the resulting dense hop features, which makes them highly scalable. A puzzle in this regime is that more complex hop aggregators do not reliably outperform simpler ones: on many benchmarks, a plain MLP-based aggregator matches or beats hop-attention variants. We revisit this behavior from a graph-filter perspective. Over a precomputed diffusion basis, existing PPGNNs differ mainly in how filter coefficients are shared across nodes and feature channels, rather than simply in raw aggregator capacity. MLP-based architectures learn channel-dependent filters that are largely shared across nodes, while hop-attention-based architectures learn node-dependent mixtures that are largely shared across channels. This reveals a missing regime in standard PPGNN designs: joint node- and channel-adaptive filtering under the pre-propagation computational contract. We propose FilterMoE, a mixture-of-experts PPGNN in which a small bank of learnable Chebyshev filter experts is routed jointly over nodes and channels by a 3D gating tensor. Across eleven homophilic and heterophilic benchmarks, FilterMoE outperforms strong PPGNN baselines on nine datasets and ranks first on all three large-scale benchmarks, improving the average test score by 1.53 points. These results establish joint node-channel filter routing as a robust alternative to dataset-specific hop-aggregator selection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FilterMoE，一种混合专家预传播图神经网络，通过联合节点-通道自适应滤波来解决PPGNN中复杂跳聚合器不如简单MLP的谜团，在11个基准上超越基线。
AI.motivation: 现有PPGNN中，复杂的跳聚合器并不比简单的MLP聚合器表现更好，这一反直觉现象缺乏理论解释。作者从图滤波器视角重新审视，发现现有设计要么是通道自适应但节点共享，要么是节点自适应但通道共享，缺少联合节点-通道自适应滤波的机制。
AI.method: 提出FilterMoE，一种混合专家PPGNN。核心思想是使用小型可学习Chebyshev滤波器专家库，通过3D门控张量在节点和通道两个维度上联合路由专家，实现联合节点-通道自适应滤波，同时保持预传播的计算高效性。
AI.result: 在同质和异质共11个基准上，FilterMoE在9个数据集上超越强PPGNN基线，在所有3个大规模基准上排名第一，平均测试分数提升1.53个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 联合节点-通道滤波器路由是替代数据集特定跳聚合器选择的鲁棒方案，填补了PPGNN设计中的一个缺失范式。

title: Auteur: Language-Driven Cinematographic Framing for Human-Centric Video Generation
summary: Generative video models have achieved remarkable visual fidelity and temporal coherence, yet intentional camera control remains elusive. Existing frameworks treat camera motion as a byproduct of pixel synthesis, producing trajectories that are stochastic, spatially inconsistent, and indifferent to the human subject driving the scene. In this work, we present Auteur, a method for language-driven, human-centric camera framing in generative video. Our core insight is that professional filmmakers conceive shots not as world-space trajectories but as framings defined relative to the actor, encoding shot size, angle, and composition as functions of human pose and motion. We formalize this intuition as a human-centric camera parameterization and introduce a Domain-Specific Language (DSL) that is convertible to standard 6-DoF camera parameters. A fine-tuned multimodal large language model then acts as a virtual director, mapping natural language descriptions and coarse human motion to sparse DSL keyframes that are deterministically interpolated into continuous camera trajectories, which are then provided as input to video generators. We train and evaluate Auteur on a new dataset of 34K aligned text, human motion, and DSL-annotated camera trajectories drawn from procedural synthesis and real-world movie footage from the CondensedMovies dataset. Auteur enables cinematographic framing of human-centered scenes, a capability largely absent in prior generative models. To assess this behavior, we propose new framing-focused metrics, and our experiments show that Auteur consistently outperforms existing methods

AI.tldr: 本文提出Auteur，一种基于语言驱动的、以人为中心的视频生成摄像机控制方法。通过将摄像机参数化为与人体姿态相关的专业电影语言（DSL），并利用微调的多模态大语言模型将自然语言描述映射为稀疏关键帧，再插值为连续轨迹，从而实现符合电影拍摄规范的人物场景构图。实验表明该方法在构图质量上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式视频模型虽在视觉质量和时间一致性上表现优异，但缺乏有意图的摄像机控制——摄像机运动往往是像素合成的副产物，轨迹随机、空间不一致，且不考虑场景中的人物主体。作者希望将专业电影摄影师"以演员为中心构图"的理念引入生成式视频，实现语言驱动的、以人为中心的摄像机操控。
AI.method: 1) 提出以人为中心的摄像机参数化方法，将镜头大小、角度和构图定义为人体姿态和运动的函数；2) 设计可转换为标准6自由度摄像机参数的领域特定语言（DSL）；3) 微调多模态大语言模型作为虚拟导演，将自然语言描述和粗略人体运动映射为稀疏DSL关键帧，再确定性插值为连续轨迹；4) 构建包含34K条文本、人体运动和DSL标注摄像机轨迹的数据集（来自程序合成和CondensedMovies真实电影数据）。
AI.result: 提出了新的构图评估指标，实验表明Auteur在人物场景的摄像机构图控制上 consistently 优于现有方法，实现了此前生成模型缺失的电影化构图能力。
AI.conclusion: Auteur成功将专业电影摄影中"以人为中心"的构图理念引入生成式视频模型，通过语言驱动的方式实现了对摄像机运动的精细控制，填补了现有生成模型在人物场景构图方面的空白。

title: Quantifying the Energy Floor: Direct Measurement and Replay Buffer Bias in SAC-Based HVAC Control on sbsim
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Presented at AI-DEEDS 2026 Workshop, ACM Sustainability Week, Banff, Canada (non-archival)
summary: We quantify the energy floor -- the minimum achievable cost given action space constraints -- for Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) HVAC control on the sbsim calibrated building simulator. Through minimum-action experiments, we directly measure this floor at USD 35.51/day, dominated by continuous electrical loads (USD 35.44, 99.8%) with negligible gas consumption. The standard SAC baseline, initialized with schedule-policy replay buffer transitions, converges to USD 37.18/day, 4.7% above the floor. We identify buffer initialization as the dominant source of sub-optimality in this scenario: training from an empty buffer reduces cost to USD 35.57/day, eliminating 96% of the gap. Expanding the supply water temperature range by 10 K yields negligible additional savings (USD 0.03/day), and further expansion triggers physical constraint violations. We additionally uncover a discount factor coupling (gamma_eff = 0.891) shrinking the effective planning horizon from 8.3 h to 46 min -- a benchmark-wide issue warranting audit. Systematic ablation across planning horizon, reward weights, and observation enrichment confirms all pre-filled-buffer configurations cluster within 0.7% (USD 37.18--USD 37.42), demonstrating that equipment minimum power -- not algorithmic design -- imposes the binding constraint.

AI.tldr: 本文量化了SAC HVAC控制中的能量地板（最小可达成本），发现标准SAC基线成本（37.18美元/天）比地板（35.51美元/天）高4.7%，而缓冲区初始化是主要次优源（空缓冲区训练消除96%差距），并揭示了折扣因子耦合导致规划视野大幅缩短的问题。
AI.motivation: 量化SAC在HVAC控制中的能量地板，识别SAC基线次优性的根本原因，并系统评估各因素（缓冲区初始化、水温范围、折扣因子等）对成本的影响。
AI.method: 通过最小动作实验直接测量能量地板；使用SAC基线（预填充调度策略缓冲区）进行训练；进行空缓冲区训练、水温范围扩展、折扣因子分析及系统消融实验。
AI.result: 能量地板为35.51美元/天（99.8%为电力负载）；SAC基线为37.18美元/天（高出4.7%）；空缓冲区训练降至35.57美元/天（消除96%差距）；水温范围扩展仅节省0.03美元/天；发现折扣因子耦合（gamma_eff=0.891）导致规划视野从8.3h缩至46min；预填充缓冲区配置均聚类在37.18-37.42美元/天（0.7%内）。
AI.conclusion: 设备最小功率（而非算法设计）是HVAC控制的根本约束；缓冲区初始化是当前场景下SAC次优性的主导因素；折扣因子耦合问题值得整个基准测试审计。

title: The Image Reconstruction Game: Drawing Common Ground Through Iterative Multimodal Dialogue
summary: We introduce the Image Reconstruction Game, a fully automated benchmark in which a vision-language model issues corrective instructions to an image generator across multiple turns, making accumulated common ground directly observable as a rendered image. Benchmarking two Describer models crossed with two Generator models across seven image categories, we find that the describer is the dominant factor in reconstruction quality, while the generator determines whether iterative refinement helps or hurts. Mathematical and geometric images pose the greatest challenge. The describer's token budget strongly affects convergence: shorter budgets yield sparser first renderings with more room for visible improvement, while longer budgets raise absolute quality but leave less to fix. Stronger describers use a richer correction vocabulary spanning spatial, numeric, and structural categories, while weaker describers concentrate on surface properties and tend to stop after a few turns. Human validation shows that the best automated judge reaches only slight-to-fair agreement with human preferences, and automated scores require human recalibration to be used reliably.

AI.tldr: 本文提出图像重建游戏（Image Reconstruction Game），一种全自动的视觉-语言模型多轮交互基准测试。通过让描述器（Describer）向图像生成器（Generator）发出多轮修正指令，评估两者协作重建图像的质量。实验发现：描述器是重建质量的主导因素；数学与几何图像最难；描述器的token预算显著影响收敛；强描述器使用更丰富的修正词汇；自动评估与人类偏好一致性较低。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型的评估多关注单轮任务，缺乏对多轮交互中"共同基础（common ground）"累积过程的量化评测。作者希望通过可观测的渲染图像，直接衡量多轮语言交互中的信息传递与修正效果。
AI.method: 构建Image Reconstruction Game全自动基准：两个描述器模型（强弱）与两个生成器模型交叉组合，在7类图像（含数学、几何等）上进行多轮交互。描述器根据目标图像生成修正指令，生成器据此更新图像，重复多轮直至收敛。使用自动评分和人工评估结合的方式衡量重建质量。
AI.result: 1) 描述器是重建质量的主导因素，生成器决定迭代优化是否有益；2) 数学和几何图像最难重建；3) 短token预算使初始渲染稀疏但改进空间大，长预算绝对质量高但改进余地小；4) 强描述器使用空间、数值、结构等多类别修正词汇，弱描述器集中于表面属性且过早停止；5) 最佳自动评判与人类偏好仅达轻微到一般一致性，自动分数需人类重新校准。
AI.conclusion: 多轮交互中描述器能力比生成器能力更关键；当前自动评估方法尚不能可靠替代人类判断，需要进一步校准；该基准为评估视觉-语言模型的多轮协作能力提供了新范式。

title: DOT-MoE: Differentiable Optimal Transport for MoEfication
summary: The scaling of Large Language Models (LLMs) has driven significant performance gains but created substantial challenges in inference efficiency. While Mixture of Experts (MoEs) architectures address this by decoupling model size from inference cost, training MoEs from scratch is often unstable and compute intensive. Conversion of pre-trained dense models into sparse MoEs has emerged as an alternative solution; however, existing methods typically rely on heuristic neuron clustering or random splitting to partition the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) into experts. In this work, we propose DOT-MoE, a novel framework that formulates the decomposition of dense layers as a Differentiable Optimal Transport (DOT) problem. Instead of static heuristics, we model neuron assignment as a balanced transport problem, utilizing differentiable Sinkhorn-Knopp iterations to enforce strict expert capacity constraints. Furthermore, we utilize Straight-Through Estimators (STE) to jointly learn the discrete neuron-to-expert assignment and the token-to-expert routing policy end-to-end. Extensive experiments across multiple architectures and benchmarks demonstrate that DOT-MoE significantly outperforms structured pruning, heuristic clustering, and random-split baselines, retaining 90% of the original dense model's performance while reducing active parameters by 50%.

AI.tldr: 提出DOT-MoE框架，利用可微最优传输将稠密模型转换为稀疏MoE，在减少50%活跃参数的同时保留90%原模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有将稠密模型转换为稀疏MoE的方法依赖启发式神经元聚类或随机分割，缺乏理论保证和可学习性。
AI.method: 将稠密层分解建模为可微最优传输问题，利用Sinkhorn-Knopp迭代施加专家容量约束，并通过Straight-Through Estimators联合学习神经元分配和路由策略。
AI.result: 在多个架构和基准上显著优于结构化剪枝、启发式聚类和随机分割基线，活跃参数减少50%时保留90%的稠密模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 可微最优传输为稠密转稀疏MoE提供了理论更优、效果更好的端到端学习方案。

title: Residual Decoder Adapter: ID-Preserving Tokenizer Adaption for Autoregressive Text Rendering
summary: Visual Autoregressive (AR) models generate images by predicting discrete tokens that are decoded by a visual tokenizer. Despite demonstrating strong overall image generation ability, they still underperform on text rendering with blur strokes and disrupt letter shapes. In this work, we trace this limitation to the visual tokenizer, which struggles to reconstruct fine-grained detail. Improving the tokenizer is straightforward but expensive, as it necessitates retraining both the tokenizer and the AR model. Can we improve text rendering performance of AR models without retraining the existing tokenizer and AR model? To achieve this, we propose the Residual Decoder Adapter(RDA) that upgrades an existing tokenizer post-hoc without changing its token space. Specifically, it refines the decoder output of the visual tokenizer by introducing two novel components: (i) a paired codebook that shares the token distribution with the original one; (ii) a parallel branch to learn the tiny differences (residual) between the reconstructed image and the ground-truth images in the pixel space. This residual design allows us to enhance the tokenizer non-invasively while preserving compatibility with prior AR models. RDA substantially improves text rendering significantly by a large margin. For instance, we boost finetuned Janus-Pro OCR accuracy rises from 24.52% to 58.26% (TextVisionBlend), from 12.75% to 36.81% (StyledTextSynth) on competitive TextAtlas benchmark. The code is available at https://github.com/CSU-JPG/RDA

AI.tldr: 本文提出残差解码适配器(RDA)，在不重训练视觉分词器的情况下，通过配对码本和平行分支学习像素级残差，显著提升自回归模型的文字渲染能力。OCR准确率在TextAtlas基准上从24.52%提升至58.26%。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉自回归模型在文字渲染任务中存在模糊笔触和字形破坏的问题，根本原因在于视觉分词器对细粒度细节的重建能力不足。直接改进分词器需重训练整个模型，成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出RDA，包含两个核心组件：(1) 配对码本，共享原始码本的token分布；(2) 并行分支，在像素空间学习重建图像与真实图像之间的微小残差，以非侵入方式增强分词器，保持与已有AR模型的兼容性。
AI.result: 在TextAtlas基准上，微调后的Janus-Pro OCR准确率从24.52%提升至58.26%（TextVisionBlend），从12.75%提升至36.81%（StyledTextSynth）。
AI.conclusion: RDA无需重训练即可显著提升AR模型的文字渲染性能，是一种高效且兼容性强的增强方案。

title: ATLAS: Agentic Test-time Learning-to-Allocate Scaling
summary: Test-time scaling has become a major way to improve large language model reasoning, but its orchestration has remained designer-engineered: a fixed sample budget, a fixed refinement loop, a fixed scoring rule, or a fixed search policy decides how compute is spent, leaving the model in charge of solving but not of orchestration. We introduce ATLAS, an agentic test-time scaling framework in which an LLM orchestrator owns the control loop end-to-end. Through a single action, explore, which dispatches a fresh independent solver on the original problem, the orchestrator decides whether to gather more evidence, when to stop, and how to synthesize the final answer; the action space is extensible, with each explore call optionally specifying solver, reasoning effort, or prompting strategy. We evaluate ATLAS on four benchmarks covering scientific question answering, code generation, and multimodal reasoning under a Claude Sonnet 4.6 backbone, where it reaches 56.00% on HLE-Verified, 82.29% on LiveCodeBench, 85.75% on GPQA-Diamond, and 23.71% on BabyVision while using far fewer API calls than fixed-workflow baselines. A multi-model extension, ATLAS-MM, that exposes solver choice as an additional action dimension further improves HLE-Verified to 60.00% and LiveCodeBench to 85.63%, with consistent gains on GPQA-Diamond and BabyVision. Ablations replacing the orchestrator's direct synthesis with a separate integrator degrade or fail to improve accuracy on three of four benchmarks, consistent with the role of stateful evidence management in producing the gains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ATLAS框架，让LLM作为编排器（orchestrator）端到端自主控制测试时计算缩放，通过单一的"explore"动作决定何时收集更多证据、何时停止以及如何综合最终答案，在多个基准上超越固定工作流基线，且使用更少的API调用。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型测试时计算缩放方法需要人工设计固定策略（如固定采样预算、固定精炼循环、固定评分规则或固定搜索策略），模型只能解决任务但无法自主编排计算过程。作者希望让模型自身拥有对计算资源分配的控制权。
AI.method: 提出ATLAS框架，核心是一个LLM编排器（orchestrator），通过单一的"explore"动作端到端控制测试时计算。每次explore调度的独立求解器可以灵活指定求解器类型、推理努力程度或提示策略。编排器负责决定何时收集更多证据、何时停止以及如何综合最终答案。还提出了多模型扩展ATLAS-MM，将求解器选择作为额外的动作维度。
AI.result: 基于Claude Sonnet 4.6骨干，在HLE-Verified上达56.00%，LiveCodeBench上82.29%，GPQA-Diamond上85.75%，BabyVision上23.71%，且API调用远少于固定工作流基线。ATLAS-MM进一步提升至HLE-Verified 60.00%和LiveCodeBench 85.63%。消融实验表明，用独立积分器替代编排器的直接综合会导致性能下降。
AI.conclusion: ATLAS证明了让LLM自主编排测试时计算缩放是有效的，有状态证据管理是带来性能提升的关键因素，且该框架的动作空间是可扩展的，为未来更灵活的推理计算分配提供了新范式。

title: Pool-Select-Refine: Allocation-Aware Generative Dataset Distillation with Soft-Label-Guided Latent Refinement
summary: Diffusion-based dataset distillation has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for condensing large-scale datasets into compact synthetic sets. By leveraging pretrained generative priors, these methods can produce realistic class-conditional samples more efficiently than traditional matching-based approaches. However, most existing diffusion-based methods still adopt a rigid ``Generate-and-Use'' strategy, where the generated samples are directly treated as the final distilled set under a fixed images-per-class budget. Such a design tightly couples candidate generation with final budget allocation, which may result in redundant waste of the limited budget or insufficiently informative samples. In this paper, we propose ``Pool-Select-Refine'', a two-stage framework for allocation-aware generative dataset distillation. First, instead of directly using a fixed number of generated samples, we construct an over-complete candidate pool and select a compact subset under the target budget. Second, we refine the selected samples in latent space using soft-label supervision derived from the teacher model, improving semantic alignment while preserving the generative prior. This design explicitly decouples generation, selection, and refinement, enabling more effective use of the distillation budget. Experiments on large-scale and fine-grained image classification benchmarks show that the proposed framework delivers consistent gains over diffusion-based baselines. The results suggest that introducing a curation stage before refinement is a simple yet effective way to improve diffusion-based dataset distillation.

AI.tldr: 提出"Pool-Select-Refine"两阶段框架，通过过完备候选池构建、子集选择与潜在空间精炼，解耦生成与分配过程，提升扩散模型数据集蒸馏效果。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散式数据集蒸馏采用僵硬的"生成即用"策略，候选生成与预算分配紧密耦合，导致预算浪费或信息不足。
AI.method: 构建过完备候选池→在目标预算下选择紧凑子集→在潜在空间利用教师模型的软标签监督对所选样本进行精炼，显式解耦生成、选择与精炼三个阶段。
AI.result: 在大规模与细粒度图像分类基准上，该方法持续优于扩散式基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 在精炼之前引入候选策划（curation）阶段，是一种简单有效提升扩散式数据集蒸馏性能的方式。

title: RDA: Reward Design Agent for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning has enabled the acquisition of impressive robotic skills, but typically requires hand-crafted reward functions that are slow to design and difficult to align with human intentions. Recent work, such as Eureka, automates reward design by using an LLM to iteratively generate and refine reward code from task descriptions. However, they rely on coarse feedback signals such as success rate, which provide little semantic insight into the learned behavior. As a result, their trained policies achieve the final goal but are frequently poorly aligned with task instructions. We introduce the Reward Design Agent (RDA), a VLM-based agentic framework that injects semantic understanding into reward design. RDA decomposes tasks, visually evaluates trajectories, summarizes failure modes, and iteratively revises reward code to better align with task instructions. Across 12 tabletop manipulation tasks from ManiSkill and 4 whole-body manipulation tasks from HumanoidBench, RDA produces policies substantially more instruction-aligned than those of other baselines, while achieving comparable task success rates. Videos and the generated reward code are available on https://nitinkamra1992.github.io/reward-design-agent.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RDA（奖励设计智能体），一种基于VLM的框架，通过视觉语义理解来设计奖励函数，使机器人策略比Eureka等方法更符合任务指令，同时保持相当的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化奖励设计方法（如Eureka）依赖粗粒度反馈信号（如成功率），缺乏对习得行为的语义洞察，导致策略虽能达成目标但常与任务指令不一致。
AI.method: RDA是一种VLM驱动的智能体框架，通过任务分解、视觉评估轨迹、总结失败模式、迭代修正奖励代码四个步骤，将语义理解注入奖励设计过程。
AI.result: 在ManiSkill的12个桌面操作任务和HumanoidBench的4个全身操作任务上，RDA生成的策略相比基线方法显著更符合指令对齐，同时任务成功率相当。
AI.conclusion: 引入VLM的语义理解能力可以有效改善奖励函数与任务指令的对齐程度，为自动化奖励设计提供了新的方向。

title: 3rd Place at CVPR 2026 CASTLE Challenge: Agentic Multi-View Long-Context Video Understanding via Hierarchical Knowledge Graph Retrieval
summary: This paper presents our winning methodology for the CASTLE 2026 Challenge at the CVPR 2026 EgoVis Workshop, where our team secured third place globally. The challenge tasks participants with answering highly complex visual, spatiotemporal, and verbal questions, including visual counting, action localization, multi-view tracking and speaker temporal reasoning, within massive, multimodal video streams. The underlying dataset consists of over 600 hours synchronized footage captured by 15 ego and exo camera sources. To tackle the extreme scale and long-context demands of this environment, we introduce a training-free agentic framework optimized for long-form video understanding. Our framework introduces two core architectural components: i) a Video Knowledge Graph that maps static and dynamic entities, their temporal relationships, and intersecting events to enable multi-hop relational reasoning, and ii) an adaptive agentic workflow that resolves complex queries through a hierarchical retrieval and indexing. Empirical results demonstrate that our framework achieves high zero-shot reasoning accuracy on long-context multi-view streams. Our code will be released at https://github.com/RaghadKhaled/CASTLE-Challenge-Framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的自适应代理框架，通过视频知识图谱和分层检索机制，在CASTLE 2026 Challenge中取得第三名，支持多视角、长视频流的复杂时空推理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理超过600小时、15个摄像头同步拍摄的多模态视频流中极高复杂度的视觉、时空和语言问答任务，因此需要一种无需训练、可扩展的长视频理解框架。
AI.method: 提出两个核心组件：1）视频知识图谱，建模静态/动态实体、时间关系及事件交叉，支持多跳关系推理；2）自适应代理工作流，通过分层检索与索引机制解析复杂查询。
AI.result: 在CASTLE 2026 Challenge中取得全球第三名，在长上下文多视角流上实现了高零样本推理准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该无训练代理框架有效应对了大规模多模态视频理解中的长上下文挑战，验证了知识图谱+分层检索在复杂时空推理任务中的潜力。

title: CANARY: Zero-Label Detection of Fine-Tuning Contamination in Language Models
summary: Adversaries can implant latent harmful behavior by poisoning as few as 1% of fine-tuning examples. The contamination is invisible to every output-level defense: harmful behavior lies dormant in the model's hidden-state geometry and does not appear in generated text until contamination exceeds 7.5%. We introduce CANARY (Contamination Auditor via Neural Activation Representation Yield), a zero-label checkpoint auditor that detects this hidden shift directly from two forward passes over an unlabeled prompt set. CANARY projects the hidden-state difference through a Sparse Autoencoder, filtering style noise to isolate meaningful semantic drift. It achieves AUROC = 1.000 at 1% contamination (95% CI = [0.997, 1.000]; Cohen's d = 3.28) across four model architectures and two training paradigms, 7.5x below where any output-level method fires, with zero false positives on benign fine-tuning and full robustness to style-matching and gradient-noise adaptive attacks. The same SAE feature basis drives a complete governance pipeline: SAE-filtered amplification surfaces latent harm at a 5x higher rate than standard generation; score-ranked prompts yield 4.2x red-teaming lift; and suppressing a handful of contamination-specific features at inference time reduces harm from 70% to 10% with no perplexity penalty. CANARY is the first zero-label framework to detect, verify, prioritize, and remediate supply-chain contamination from hidden states alone.

AI.tldr: 提出CANARY方法，通过稀疏自编码器分析隐藏状态差异，在仅1%投毒率下以AUROC=1.000检测后门攻击，远早于输出级检测方法（7.5%投毒率），并实现检测、验证、优先级排序和修复的完整治理管线。
AI.motivation: 攻击者可通过仅1%微调数据投毒植入潜伏有害行为，现有输出级防御方法在污染低于7.5%时完全失效，需要一种能从隐藏状态层面早期检测污染的方法。
AI.method: CANARY通过对未标注提示集进行两次前向传播，计算隐藏状态差异，再通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）投影过滤风格噪声，提取有意义的语义漂移信号，实现零标签检测。
AI.result: 在四种模型架构和两种训练范式下，1%投毒率AUROC=1.000（95%CI=[0.997,1.000]，Cohen's d=3.28），零假阳性；SAE过滤放大后潜伏危害生成率提升5倍；评分排名提示实现4.2倍红队攻击提升；抑制特定特征可将危害从70%降至10%且不损失困惑度。
AI.conclusion: CANARY是首个仅从隐藏状态实现供应链污染检测、验证、优先级排序和修复的零标签框架，在极低投毒率下显著优于输出级方法。

title: Unified Driving Tokens: Representation- and Geometry-Guided Discrete Tokenizer for Driving World Models and Planning
summary: Discrete visual tokens should provide a compact representation for both token-based world modeling and planning in autonomous driving. However, most tokenizers are inherited from image generation and are optimized mainly for pixel reconstruction, which may leave a gap between what is easy to generate and what is useful to decode for driving decisions. We present a representation-guided and geometry-enhanced tokenizer that learns discrete tokens under joint supervision. The tokenizer aligns its discrete bottleneck with a frozen DINO feature space through feature decoding, while preserving appearance via RGB reconstruction with perceptual and adversarial losses. To inject geometric state-related cues, we add adjacent-frame depth and relative-pose supervision during training and stabilize joint objectives with multi-codebook quantization. We evaluate the same learned tokens with a lightweight planning readout and a GPT-style next-token world model. Experiments on NAVSIM show improved reconstruction fidelity and representation consistency, competitive planning performance under a fixed decoder, and better generative quality under matched settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合监督的离散视觉分词器，通过特征解码对齐DINO空间、RGB重建、深度和相对位姿监督，并采用多码本量化，在NAVSIM上提升了重建质量、表征一致性和规划性能。
AI.motivation: 现有离散分词器主要继承自图像生成领域，优化目标偏向像素重建，导致"易生成"与"对驾驶决策有用"之间存在差距，缺乏对驾驶决策有用的表征引导。
AI.method: 提出表示引导+几何增强的分词器：(1) 通过特征解码对齐冻结DINO特征空间；(2) 通过感知损失和对抗损失进行RGB重建；(3) 加入相邻帧深度和相对位姿监督；(4) 采用多码本量化稳定联合训练目标。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM上，该方法在重建保真度、表征一致性、规划性能（固定解码器下）和生成质量（同等设置下）方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合监督将几何信息和表征引导注入离散瓶颈，能够缩小分词器重建目标与驾驶决策需求之间的差距，提升token在规划与世界模型中的实用性。

title: Two-Fidelity Best-Action Identification for Stochastic Minimax Tree
summary: We study fixed-confidence best-action identification (BAI) in stochastic minimax trees. This problem is increasingly relevant in modern AI planning, where deep minimax search and Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with language model long rollouts face a fundamental tradeoff: heuristic evaluations are cheap but biased, while accurate rollouts are reliable but prohibitively expensive. We propose 2FFS, a two-fidelity tree-search algorithm that brings multi-fidelity flat bandit ideas into trees. The algorithm combines minimax-style fast expansion with MCTS-style stochastic sampling, adaptively deciding when to exploit cheap biased evaluations and when to invoke expensive accurate evaluations for local certification. We prove fixed-confidence correctness, establish finite stopping for exact identification, and give a polynomial-depth cost upper bound for general-depth trees. Across numerical stochastic-tree experiments, 2FFS uses substantially fewer samples and computational operations comparing to existing BAI-MCTS baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出2FFS算法，一种结合快速启发式评估与精确rollout的双保真度树搜索方法，用于随机minimax树中的最优动作识别，在保证固定置信度正确性的同时显著降低样本和计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现代AI规划中（如深度minimax搜索和MCTS结合语言模型长rollout）面临关键权衡：启发式评估便宜但有偏，精确rollout可靠但成本高昂，亟需一种能自适应选择评估策略的高效方法。
AI.method: 提出2FFS（双保真度树搜索算法），将多保真度平面赌博机思想引入树结构。算法结合minimax式快速扩展与MCTS式随机采样，自适应决定何时利用便宜的偏估计、何时调用昂贵的精确评估进行局部验证。
AI.result: 证明了固定置信度下的正确性，建立了精确识别下的有限停止保证，给出了任意深度树的多项式深度代价上界。数值实验中，与现有BAI-MCTS基线相比，2FFS在样本和计算操作上均大幅减少。
AI.conclusion: 2FFS有效解决了树搜索中启发式效率与精确可靠性的矛盾，为大规模AI规划（如语言模型引导的搜索）提供了理论保障且实用的双保真度解决方案。

title: SAVMap: Structure-Aided Visual Mapping of Large-Scale 2.5D Manhattan Wireframes from Panoramic Video
summary: Precise 3D representations of industrial environments enable tasks such as robot localization and digital twin generation. We propose SAVMap, a method for generating a semantic wireframe map of warehouse shelf and light structures using only a panoramic video camera as the sensor input. Sequences of rectified images with shelf and ceiling-facing views are extracted from a panoramic video captured along the warehouse aisles. Using a semantic segmentation network front end, a set of sparse, semantic structure feature points (e.g., corners of shelf structures, centers of lights) are extracted from each image and tracked across the sequences. By accounting for real-world geometric relationships among the points such as Manhattan grids, a constrained structure-from-motion algorithm yields the 3D points that form a wireframe map. We demonstrate the scalability and accuracy of our proposal in a warehouse with 46 shelving rows, each with faces spanning 55\,m by 7\,m. From an hour of panoramic video content, we create wireframe maps for over 5000 shelf elements across the rows, achieving an aggregate mean absolute error of 4.8\,cm with respect to ground-truth.

AI.tldr: SAVMap利用全景视频和语义分割，通过约束运动恢复结构算法生成仓库货架与照明结构的语义线框地图，在46排货架、超5000个元素上实现4.8cm的平均绝对误差。
AI.motivation: 工业环境（如仓库）需要精确的3D表示以支持机器人定位和数字孪生生成，但现有方法在效率和精度上存在不足，且传感器设置复杂。
AI.method: 从全景视频中提取货架和天花板视角的校正图像，利用语义分割网络提取稀疏语义结构特征点（如货架角点、灯中心），通过考虑曼哈顿网格等几何约束，采用约束运动恢复结构算法生成3D线框地图。
AI.result: 在46排货架（每排55m×7m）的仓库中，从1小时全景视频生成超5000个货架元素的线框地图，聚合平均绝对误差为4.8cm。
AI.conclusion: SAVMap仅依靠全景视频即可高效、准确地生成仓库环境的语义线框地图，具有良好的可扩展性和实用性。

title: Decentralized Instruction Tuning: Conflict-Aware Splitting and Weight Merging
comment: 32 pages, 5 figures. Accepted for publication at ICML 2026
summary: Instruction tuning aligns large language models, including multimodal ones, with diverse user intents, but scaling to heterogeneous mixtures is hindered by gradient interference and bandwidth-heavy synchronization. We ask whether these two bottlenecks can be addressed jointly by training parts of the mixture independently and reconciling them once in parameter space. We develop a local quadratic theory inside a shared flat basin that yields three results: weight merging produces a curvature-weighted variance reduction; PCA-aligned conflict splitting maximizes this gain along high-curvature directions; and merging additionally acts as spectral filtering with implicit norm regularization. These results directly motivate MERIT, a decentralized merge-ready instruction-tuning pipeline that estimates dataset-level gradient conflicts, partitions the mixture along the top PCA conflict axes, fine-tunes each partition independently with no inter-partition communication, and merges once via token-weighted averaging. On Qwen2.5-VL-3B with 136 Vision-FLAN tasks, MERIT improves the 8-benchmark average from 54.3 (joint training) to 57.0. The same recipe scales to a 7B model on a 1.6M-example, 176-source mixture -- matching or exceeding centralized joint training with minimal cost overhead -- and transfers to text-only FLAN. Our code is available at https://github.com/naver-ai/merit.

AI.tldr: MERIT提出了一种去中心化的指令微调方法，通过PCA分析任务冲突、独立微调各分区、再一次性权重合并，解决了多任务微调中的梯度干扰和通信带宽瓶颈，在多模态和纯文本任务上均优于传统联合训练。
AI.motivation: 指令微调需要对齐多样化用户意图，但扩展至异构混合数据时面临两大瓶颈：梯度干扰（不同任务梯度相互冲突）和带宽密集型同步（分布式训练通信成本高）。作者希望探索是否可以通过独立训练各任务分区并一次性参数合并来同时解决这两个问题。
AI.method: 1) 理论层面：提出局部二次型理论，证明在共享平坦盆地中权重合并可产生曲率加权方差缩减；PCA对齐的冲突分裂能最大化高曲率方向的增益；合并还能作为谱滤波并隐含范数正则化。2) 算法层面：MERIT流水线包括估计数据集级梯度冲突、沿PCA主冲突轴划分任务、各分区独立微调无需通信、最后通过token加权平均一次性合并权重。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL-3B上，使用136个Vision-FLAN任务，MERIT将8个基准平均分从54.3（联合训练）提升至57.0。扩展到7B模型、1.6M样本、176个数据源时，MERIT匹配或超越集中式联合训练，且成本开销极小。方法也可迁移至纯文本FLAN任务。
AI.conclusion: 梯度冲突较大的多任务场景下，分而治之的独立微调+参数合并策略比传统联合训练更有效，同时解决了梯度干扰和通信带宽两大瓶颈，为大规模指令微调提供了实用的去中心化方案。

title: SCAPO: Self-Supervised Category-Level Articulated Pose Estimation from a Single 3D Observation
summary: Existing methods for category-level object articulation from a single 3D observation often rely on dense supervision, multi-frame inputs, or CAD templates, and still struggle to disentangle geometry from articulation or to recover explicit joint parameters. We propose SCAPO, a self-supervised framework that estimates canonical geometry, rigid part segmentation, and joint pivots, axes, and articulation states from a single RGB-D observation without ground-truth labels or category-specific models. Our SCAPO first uses an SE(3)-equivariant vector-neuron autoencoder to factor out global pose and align diverse instances into a shared canonical space. On this aligned shape, a joint-aware blend-skinning module is then designed to model part motion. We learn this representation through cycle reconstruction between observed and canonical shapes and cross-space alignment with a learnable canonical template that decouples shared category geometry from instance-specific residual shape. Experiments on synthetic and real articulated-object datasets show that our SCAPO recovers consistent part structure and accurate articulation parameters and outperforms all self-supervised baselines.

AI.tldr: SCAPO是一个自监督框架，能从单张RGB-D观测中估计物体的规范几何、刚性部件分割、关节枢轴/轴和关节状态，无需真实标签或类别特定模型，在合成和真实数据集上优于所有自监督基线。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖密集监督、多帧输入或CAD模板，难以解耦几何与关节结构，且无法恢复显式关节参数。
AI.method: 使用SE(3)-等变向量神经元自编码器消除全局姿态，将多样实例对齐到共享规范空间；再通过关节感知的蒙皮模块建模部件运动；通过观测-规范形状的循环重建和跨空间对齐（可学习规范模板解耦共享类别几何与实例残差形状）来学习表示。
AI.result: 在合成和真实铰接物体数据集上，SCAPO恢复了一致的部件结构和准确的关节参数，优于所有自监督基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SCAPO证明了无需密集监督即可从单帧观测中有效解耦几何与关节结构，实现准确的铰接物体分析。

title: Fair Finetuning Mitigates Distribution Inference Attacks
summary: Machine learning models trained on sensitive data can inadvertently leak population-level information about their training distributions -- a threat known as distribution inference attack (DIA). An adversary with black-box access can infer sensitive demographic properties, such as subgroup proportions, without observing any training data directly. While defenses such as differential privacy and property unlearning have been proposed, the link between fairness constraints and distributional leakage remains unexplored. We propose Fair Fine-tuning (FFt): a trained model is fine-tuned on samples from the complementary distribution under an Equalized Odds (EO) constraint. We provide a complete theoretical characterization, proving the tight bound $\text{Adv}(\mathcal{A},M_f) \le Δ_{\text{EO}} \cdot W$, where $W$ quantifies how distinguishable the two training distributions are by their sensitive-attribute composition. We also establish a necessary condition for FFt to reduce adversarial advantage and prove tightness of the bound. We evaluate across six datasets spanning tabular (ACS Income, COMPAS, German Credit), image (UTKFaces), and NLP (Bias in Bios) modalities. Rehearsal-based FFt consistently reduces the adversarial accuracy gap below the detection threshold $τ!=!0.1$ across all settings; on ACS Income, the gap falls from $\sim!15%$ to under $4%$. Our work provides the first formal bound connecting a model's measured EO disparity directly to its adversarial advantage in the DIA game, opening a new avenue for unified fairness-and-privacy defenses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出公平微调（FFt）方法，通过在互补分布上以等几率约束进行微调，来防御分布推断攻击。理论证明了攻击优势与等几率差距之间的紧界，实验表明该方法能显著降低攻击精度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究关注差分隐私和属性遗忘等防御手段，但公平性约束与分布泄露之间的关联尚未被探索。作者希望填补这一空白，建立公平性与隐私保护之间的理论联系。
AI.method: 提出Fair Fine-tuning (FFt)：在训练好的模型上，从互补分布中采样数据，并在等几率（Equalized Odds）约束下进行微调。理论推导了攻击优势的上界 Adv ≤ Δ_EO · W，并证明了该界的紧性。
AI.result: 在表格数据（ACS Income、COMPAS、German Credit）、图像（UTKFaces）和NLP（Bias in Bios）六个数据集上验证，基于重放的FFt将对抗精度差降至检测阈值0.1以下；在ACS Income上从~15%降至4%以下。
AI.conclusion: 首次建立了模型等几率差距与分布推断攻击优势之间的形式化界，为统一公平性与隐私防御开辟了新方向。

title: Beyond Low-Rank: Low-Rank Sparse Prompting via Spiking Neural Network and Prompt Factorization
summary: Visual Prompting (VP) has emerged as an efficient paradigm for adapting large-scale pre-trained vision models to downstream tasks by incorporating learnable prompts at the input level. However, existing VP methods typically employ dense pixel-level prompts, which often suffer from redundant perturbations, limited generalization and energy inefficiency. To overcome these limitations, we propose to integrate brain-inspired spiking learning into visual prompt learning tasks. As we know that spiking neuron can perform inexpensive information processing by transmitting the input data into discrete spike trains and return sparse outputs. Inspired by this, we propose \textbf{Lo}w-\textbf{R}ank visual \textbf{S}pike \textbf{P}rompting (LoRSP), a novel framework that learns dynamic low-rank sparse visual prompts naturally via a Spiking neuron learning mechanism. The core idea of LoRSP is to exploit the brain-inspired sparse firing mechanism of spiking neurons to generate pixel-level sparse prompt for each instance. To be specific, we first construct a series of prompt factors via low-rank factorization to capture distinct prompt subspaces. These prompt factors are then fed into an SNN architecture, which performs the integrate-and-fire process to emit spikes. As a result, our LoRSP generates a \emph{sparse} visual prompt while maintaining the low-rank constraint. This design enables instance-specific selective prompting, leading to more compact and robust adaptation across diverse downstream tasks. Extensive experiments on five heterogeneous vision backbones and multiple benchmarks demonstrate that LoRSP achieves competitive performance while requiring fewer tunable parameters compared to existing VP methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoRSP框架，利用脉冲神经元的稀疏放电机制生成低秩稀疏视觉提示，替代传统的密集像素级提示，在减少可调参数的同时实现有竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉提示方法依赖密集像素级提示，存在冗余扰动、泛化能力有限且能效低的问题，亟需更高效、更紧凑的提示学习范式。
AI.method: LoRSP首先通过低秩分解构建提示因子，捕捉不同提示子空间；然后将这些因子输入脉冲神经网络（SNN），通过整合-发放过程生成离散脉冲，最终得到稀疏的视觉提示，保持低秩约束的同时实现实例级选择性提示。
AI.result: 在五种异构视觉骨干网络及多个基准测试上，LoRSP在需要更少可调参数的条件下取得了与现有方法相当的竞争性能。
AI.conclusion: 脑启发式脉冲学习机制可有效提升视觉提示的稀疏性和紧凑性，为高效视觉提示学习提供了一种新范式。

title: A Note on Stability for Orthogonalized Matrix Momentum with Client Sampling
summary: We study finite-sample generalization for a client-sampled distributed optimization scheme with matrix-valued parameters and orthogonalized momentum updates. The central quantity is the gap between the population and empirical objectives at the returned model when only a subset of clients participates in each round. Under independent heterogeneous client data, unequal local sample counts, and fixed aggregation weights, we derive a finite-round upper-tail guarantee from a coupled-neighbor stability recursion and a weighted concentration step. The bound keeps the client-selection counts through the amplification factor \(Y_i(\mathcal C)\); in the uniform full-participation full-batch regime, it yields \(\widetilde{\mathcal O}(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})\) scaling whenever the horizon-dependent amplification terms are controlled. The matrix-orthogonalization rule is required to be Lipschitz along paired trajectories, a condition satisfied by regularized polar-type maps and normalized finite-step Newton--Schulz orthogonalizers. For the unregularized matrix sign, the same argument requires coupled spectral separation, whereas Gaussian smoothing gives a finite-round smoothed variant. A one-dimensional counterexample shows why a gap, smoothing, or regularity condition is necessary.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了客户端采样分布式优化方案在矩阵参数和正交化动量更新下的有限样本泛化界，推导了有限轮次的上尾保证，并分析了不同正交化规则的条件要求。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式优化研究多集中于标量参数或均匀参与场景，对矩阵参数、正交化动量更新及非均匀客户端采样下的泛化行为缺乏理论保证。
AI.method: 采用耦合邻域稳定性递归和加权浓度步骤推导有限轮次上尾界；通过放大因子Y_i(C)捕捉客户端选择计数；分析矩阵正交化规则的Lipschitz条件（正则化极坐标映射、归一化有限步Newton-Schulz正交化器）及未正则化情况下的谱分离条件。
AI.result: 在均匀全参与全批量机制下，当依赖于轮次的放大项受控时，得到Õ(n^{-1}+n^{-1/2})的缩放界；揭示了间隙、平滑或正则性条件对保证成立的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 矩阵正交化规则需满足Lipschitz条件；未正则化矩阵符号需耦合谱分离或高斯平滑；一维反例证明缺乏上述条件时界可能不成立。

title: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Large Pretrained Models for Instance Segmentation Tasks
comment: Published by the Machine Learning and Knowledge Extraction Journal
summary: Research and applications in artificial intelligence have recently shifted with the rise of large pretrained models, which deliver state-of-the-art results across numerous tasks. However, the substantial increase in parameters introduces a need for parameter-efficient training strategies. Despite significant advancements, limited research has explored parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods in the context of transformer-based models for instance segmentation. Addressing this gap, this study investigates the effectiveness of PEFT methods, specifically adapters and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), applied to two models across four benchmark datasets. Integrating sequentially arranged adapter modules and applying LoRA to deformable attention--explored here for the first time--achieves competitive performance while fine-tuning only about 1-6% of model parameters, a marked improvement over the 40-55% required in traditional fine-tuning. Key findings indicate that using 2-3 adapters per transformer block offers an optimal balance of performance and efficiency. Furthermore, LoRA, exhibits strong parameter efficiency when applied to deformable attention, and in certain cases surpasses adapter configurations. These results show that the impact of PEFT techniques varies based on dataset complexity and model architecture, underscoring the importance of context-specific tuning. Overall, this work demonstrates the potential of PEFT to enable scalable, customizable, and computationally efficient transfer learning for instance segmentation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在基于Transformer的实例分割模型中，使用适配器和LoRA等参数高效微调方法，仅用1-6%参数即可达到与传统微调40-55%参数相竞争的性能。
AI.motivation: 大型预训练模型参数激增带来训练效率问题，而现有研究缺乏对实例分割任务中参数高效微调方法的系统探索。
AI.method: 将适配器模块顺序集成到Transformer块中，以及首次将LoRA应用于可变形注意力机制，在两个模型、四个基准数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: 仅微调1-6%参数即可达到竞争性能；每Transformer块使用2-3个适配器效果最优；LoRA在可变形注意力上表现优异，部分超越适配器。
AI.conclusion: PEFT方法在实例分割任务中具有巨大潜力，能够实现可扩展、可定制且计算高效的迁移学习，但效果受数据集复杂度和模型架构影响。

title: Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems: A New Foundation for Trustworthy Autonomous Infrastructure
summary: For decades, distributed systems have typically assumed that correct participants execute protocol-specified behavior with stable, externally defined, and deterministic semantics. Classical theory has extensively parameterized network timing, communication topologies, and failure domains, but this participant model has remained comparatively fixed. The integration of autonomous reasoning engines, stochastic model-driven agents, and policy-driven actors into cloud control planes, incident response systems, and financial infrastructure challenges the universality of this assumption. These agents often produce divergent reasoning paths, distinct operational traces, and heterogeneous internal representations while achieving semantically equivalent and correct outcomes. In this paper, we introduce Post-Deterministic Distributed Systems (PDDS) as a research and engineering model for coordinating heterogeneous environments where deterministic code, stochastic models, and autonomous agents coexist. We show that classical distributed computing models form a zero-ambiguity special case of this participant-general model. We do not argue that deterministic systems disappear; rather, deterministic execution can no longer serve as the universal participant assumption for autonomous infrastructure. Finally, we outline five architectural pillars of post-deterministic infrastructure: Protocol-Driven Development, Verifiable Agentic Infrastructure, Autonomous State Control Planes, Semantic Quorum Assurance, and Epistemic State Replication. Epistemic State Replication extends persistence and consistency models from data visibility to knowledge visibility, enabling agentic memory, Verifiable Semantic Rollback, and coherence across reasoning participants. We also define a taxonomy of failure classes that arise in this setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出后确定性分布式系统（PDDS）模型，挑战了传统分布式系统中参与者执行确定性行为的假设，为协调包含确定性代码、随机模型和自主智能体的异构环境提供了新框架，并定义了五大架构支柱和新的故障分类。
AI.motivation: 传统分布式系统假设所有参与者执行协议规定的确定性行为，但云控制面、事件响应系统和金融基础设施中集成了自主推理引擎、随机驱动模型和策略驱动参与者，这些智能体常产生不同的推理路径和操作轨迹却达成语义等价结果，动摇了原有假设的通用性。
AI.method: 提出PDDS模型，将经典分布式计算模型视为零歧义特例；定义五大架构支柱：协议驱动开发、可验证智能体基础设施、自主状态控制面、语义仲裁保证和认知状态复制；扩展一致性模型从数据可见性到知识可见性；提出新故障分类体系。
AI.result: 证明了经典分布式计算模型是参与者通用模型的一个零歧义特例；指出确定性执行不能再作为自主基础设施的通用参与者假设；定义了认知状态复制等新概念，使智能体记忆、可验证语义回滚和推理参与者间的连贯性成为可能。
AI.conclusion: 确定性系统不会消失，但确定性执行已不能作为自主基础设施的通用假设；需要后确定性思维来设计、协调和推理包含异构参与者的分布式系统。

title: Contrastive Augmented Transformer with Domain-specific Enhancement for Robust Multi-scenario Metal Surface Defect Detection
summary: Metal surface defect detection is critical for maintaining product quality in industrial manufacturing. However, it faces significant challenges, including limited annotated data, difficulty in identifying subtle multi-scale defects, and poor generalization across diverse scenarios. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel Contrastive Augmented Transformer (CAT) framework for robust defect detection. CAT employs a hierarchical Swin Transformer backbone and redesigns the feature pyramid network to effectively fuse low-level textures with high-level semantics, enabling precise modeling of subtle and multi-scale defect patterns. To enhance robustness under real-world noise conditions, we propose a domain-specific droplet augmentation algorithm. Furthermore, we incorporate a hard negative mining strategy into the contrastive loss to strengthen the model's discrimination ability in ambiguous defect regions. Experimental results on the KolektorSDD2 dataset demonstrate that CAT achieves a pixel-level AUROC of 99.54%, outperforming existing methods. In addition, CAT exhibits superior generalization and robustness on three unseen datasets, including KSDD1, MTD for tile defects, and MSDD for rail surface defects, demonstrating its potential for wide-scale industrial deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出对比增强Transformer（CAT）框架，通过改进Swin Transformer骨干网络、特征金字塔融合、液滴增强算法和难负样本挖掘策略，解决金属表面缺陷检测中数据有限、多尺度缺陷难识别、泛化性差的问题，在多个数据集上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 金属表面缺陷检测面临三大挑战：标注数据有限、细微多尺度缺陷难以识别、跨场景泛化能力差。现有方法在这类复杂工业场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出CAT框架：1）采用层次化Swin Transformer作为骨干网络；2）重新设计特征金字塔网络融合低层纹理与高层语义；3）提出领域特定液滴增强算法模拟真实噪声；4）在对比损失中引入难负样本挖掘策略增强判别能力。
AI.result: 在KolektorSDD2数据集上像素级AUROC达99.54%，超越现有方法；在KSDD1、MTD瓷砖缺陷、MSDD轨道表面缺陷三个未见数据集上展现了优异的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: CAT框架有效解决了金属表面缺陷检测的核心难题，具备大规模工业部署的潜力。

title: Shortcut to Nowhere: Demystifying Deep Spurious Regression
summary: Real-world regression often exhibits shortcuts: attributes that are spuriously correlated with continuous targets in training, yet unreliable under deployment shifts; regressing targets using such shortcuts may fail catastrophically at test time. Existing studies on spurious correlations focus primarily on classification, where labels are categorical and groups are naturally defined. However, many real-world tasks require continuous prediction, where hard label boundaries or discrete group-label pairs do not exist. We define Deep Spurious Regression (DSR) as learning from regression data with attribute-label confounding, addressing continuous spurious correlations, and generalizing to all attribute-label combinations at test time. Motivated by the intrinsic difference between classification and regression shortcuts, we propose to exploit the similarity among spurious attributes in both label and feature spaces, thereby accounting for nearby targets and related groups while calibrating both label and learned feature distributions across attributes. Extensive experiments on common real-world DSR datasets that span computer vision, environmental sensing, and large language model (LLM) regression verify the superior performance of our strategies. Our work fills the gap in benchmarks and techniques for studying spurious correlations in continuous prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文定义了深度虚假回归（DSR）问题，即连续预测中属性与标签存在虚假相关，并提出了利用标签空间和特征空间中虚假属性的相似性来校准分布的方法，在视觉、环境感知和LLM回归任务上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假相关研究主要针对分类任务（离散标签、自然定义组别），但现实世界很多任务需要连续预测（回归），其中同样存在属性与标签的虚假相关，且缺乏明确的组别边界。因此需要专门研究连续预测中的虚假相关性问题。
AI.method: 利用虚假属性在标签空间和特征空间中的相似性，同时校准标签分布和所学特征分布，以同时考虑邻近目标和相关组别。
AI.result: 在计算机视觉、环境感知和大语言模型（LLM）回归等多个真实世界DSR数据集上，所提策略取得了优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 填补了连续预测中虚假相关性研究的基准和技术空白，证明了所提方法在多种回归任务上的有效性。

title: Generalization Limits in Vehicle Re-Identification
summary: Vehicle re-identification focuses on retrieving images of the same vehicle from a gallery given a query image. Upon closer inspection of commonly used datasets, we observe that vehicles with few visual differences-e.g., the same make, model, and color-appear in both the training and test sets. As a result, methods that effectively memorize the training data tend to perform well on these test sets but struggle to generalize to other datasets. In this paper, we address this issue by proposing a novel evaluation approach that more effectively measures generalization capability to unseen vehicle types. To further study generalization performance, we also propose splitting the evaluation based on view, allowing us to differentiate the effect of viewpoint robustness from that of same-view re-identification. Our findings reveal that most state-of-the-art methods struggle with unseen vehicle types, and that their robustness to viewpoint changes and attention to detail are limited to vehicle types seen during training.

AI.tldr: 本文指出车辆再识别数据集存在训练集和测试集车辆类型重叠的问题，导致模型虽然能在测试集上表现良好但泛化能力差。作者提出了新的评估方法来衡量对未见车辆类型的泛化能力，并引入了基于视角的评估拆分。发现多数先进方法在未见车辆类型上表现不佳，且视角鲁棒性和细节关注能力仅限于训练中见过的车辆类型。
AI.motivation: 现有车辆再识别数据集存在训练集和测试集车辆类型重叠的问题，导致模型实际上是通过记忆训练数据来取得高分，而非真正的泛化能力。需要一种新的评估方法来更有效地衡量模型对未见车辆类型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出了一个新的评估方法，通过区分训练集和测试集中的车辆类型来更准确地衡量泛化能力；同时提出了基于视角的评估拆分，将视角鲁棒性和同视角再识别分开评估。
AI.result: 多数先进方法在未见车辆类型上表现不佳；模型对视角变化的鲁棒性和对细节的注意力仅局限于训练中见过的车辆类型。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法过度依赖记忆训练数据中的车辆类型，缺乏对未见车辆类型的真正泛化能力，需要在评估和模型设计上做出改进。

title: Adaptive Auto-Harness: Sustained Self-Improvement for Agentic System Deployment on Open-Ended Task Streams
summary: Auto-harness systems such as A-Evolve, GEPA, and Meta-Harness improve LLM agents by optimizing prompts, skills, tools, memories, and supporting infrastructure from execution feedback, but they are typically evaluated on fixed offline benchmarks. Real deployments instead present open-ended task streams: histories grow without a fixed endpoint, heterogeneous tasks require different harnesses, and problem distributions shift over time. These challenges make a single repeatedly and densely updated harness brittle, causing performance degradation as accuracy peaks early and then declines. This motivates sustained harness construction with task-wise adaptation. We introduce Adaptive Auto-Harness, a framework and system for such streams. The framework decomposes the gap to an oracle harness into evolution loss and adaptation loss. The system addresses these losses with a stateful multi-agent evolver, a harness tree with solve-time routing, and human-steering hooks for cases where history lacks the needed signal. Across prediction-market, security-competition, and event-forecasting streams, Adaptive Auto-Harness outperforms five existing auto-harness baselines and ablations attribute gains to better construction, routing, or targeted human steering. Code is available in https://github.com/A-EVO-Lab/AdaptiveHarness .

AI.tldr: 本文提出Adaptive Auto-Harness框架，用于LLM智能体在开放式任务流中自适应地优化prompt、技能、工具等组件，解决了传统自动装备系统在固定离线评估中的性能退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动装备系统（如A-Evolve、GEPA、Meta-Harness）在固定离线基准上表现良好，但真实部署场景面临开放任务流——历史无限增长、任务异构、分布漂移，导致单一密集更新装备易出现性能退化（精度先升后降），需要任务自适应的持续装备构建。
AI.method: 将装备与oracle之间的差距分解为演化损失和适应损失；提出包含三个核心组件的系统：状态化多智能体演化器、带有路由机制的装备树（solve-time routing）、以及在历史信号不足时引导的人类干预钩子（human-steering hooks）。
AI.result: 在预测市场、安全竞赛和事件预测三个任务流上，Adaptive Auto-Harness优于五个现有自动装备基线；消融实验表明性能提升归因于更好的装备构建、路由机制或针对性的人类引导。
AI.conclusion: 任务流中的自适应装备构建至关重要，状态化多智能体演化+装备树路由+有限人类干预的组合策略可有效应对开放动态环境中的性能退化问题。

title: MT-EditFlow: Reinforcement Learning for Multi-Turn Image Editing with Flow Matching
summary: Recent breakthroughs in instruction-based image editing have captured significant attention, as models are now capable of handling real-world editing demands with the practicality required by everyday users. However, editing models trained primarily for single-turn edits often break down in multi-turn editing--the natural interactive setting where a user iteratively refines an image based on the model's own previous outputs. This failure stems from the all-or-nothing requirement, where a single failed turn compromises the entire sequence, and error propagation, where exposure bias leads to compounding editing errors. To address these challenges, we introduce MT-EditFlow, a flow-matching reinforcement learning framework designed to optimize reward signals for sequential image editing. MT-EditFlow integrates a multi-turn perspective with a multi-reward formulation to provide a unified structure applicable to both GRPO and NFT-based reinforcement learning methods. We systematically analyze and optimize the reward signal by investigating effective scoring strategies for turn-level aggregation, VLM reasoning modes to trade off reward bias and variance, and advantage fusion levels to prevent reward hacking. Our findings reveal that broadcasting the aggregated advantage across the entire editing trajectory effectively bridges the gap between local planning and global multi-turn task success. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MT-EditFlow significantly improves performance across diverse base models. Notably, it boosts FLUX.1-Kontext-dev by 6.85 points in turn-3 overall performance, surpassing state-of-the-art open-source models such as Qwen-Image-Edit. By maintaining high marginal success rates and reducing exposure bias, MT-EditFlow provides a foundation for more reliable and natural human-AI collaboration in visual content creation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MT-EditFlow，一个基于流匹配强化学习的框架，用于优化多轮图像编辑中的奖励信号。通过多奖励公式和优势传播机制，有效解决了单轮编辑模型在多轮编辑中失败传播和误差累积的问题。实验表明，MT-EditFlow显著提升了多种基础模型的多轮编辑性能，在FLUX.1-Kontext-dev上turn-3整体性能提升6.85分，超越了Qwen-Image-Edit等现有开源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有指令式图像编辑模型主要针对单轮编辑训练，在多轮迭代编辑场景中表现不佳。问题根源在于：(1) 全有或全无要求——单次失败会破坏整个编辑序列；(2) 误差传播——曝光偏差导致编辑错误逐轮累积。这限制了人机协作中自然、可靠的交互体验。
AI.method: MT-EditFlow是一个流匹配强化学习框架，核心贡献包括：(1) 多轮视角与多奖励公式统一结构，适用于GRPO和NFT两种强化学习方法；(2) 系统分析和优化奖励信号，包括轮次级聚合策略、VLM推理模式以权衡奖励偏差与方差、优势融合层级以防止奖励黑客行为；(3) 提出跨整个编辑轨迹广播聚合优势的策略，弥合局部规划与全局多轮任务成功之间的差距。
AI.result: 大量实验表明MT-EditFlow在多种基础模型上显著提升了多轮编辑性能。尤其突出的是，在FLUX.1-Kontext-dev上turn-3整体性能提升6.85分，超越了Qwen-Image-Edit等现有最先进开源模型。同时保持了高边际成功率，并有效减少了曝光偏差。
AI.conclusion: MT-EditFlow通过流匹配强化学习框架有效解决了多轮图像编辑中的失败传播和误差累积问题，为人机视觉内容协作提供了更可靠、更自然的基础。该方法为多轮交互场景下的图像编辑任务建立了新的性能标杆。

title: FLARE: Diffusion for Hybrid Language Model
summary: Autoregressive (AR) large language models (LLMs) have achieved broad practical success, but sequential decoding remains a key bottleneck for low-latency deployment. Recent efficient-inference work has progressed along two axes: reducing the cost of each model invocation through efficient architectures, and reducing serial decoding steps through parallel generation. Hybrid attention backbones address the former, while diffusion language models (dLLMs) pursue the latter via iterative parallel denoising. Combining these advantages remains challenging: AR-to-dLLM conversion often fails to preserve seed-checkpoint capability, and hybrid-attention recurrent states and masking constraints make diffusion training and serving nontrivial. We present FLARE, a systematic conversion framework for hybrid-attention LLMs. Our analysis identifies transfer data quality as the primary determinant of capability preservation, outweighing loss formulation and attention-mask design. The resulting framework combines a token-equal AR-and-diffusion objective, hardware-aware kernels, and unified inference, enabling one checkpoint to support both AR-style verified decoding and diffusion-style parallel denoising. Starting from strong AR checkpoints with limited post-training data, FLARE is competitive with leading open-source dLLMs across model scales and delivers consistent throughput gains over open-source dLLM baselines in single-GPU concurrent serving. Our results further suggest that practical dLLMs are limited not only by decoding algorithms, but also by transfer data quality and the training inefficiency of current block-diffusion objectives, motivating joint design of data, objectives, architectures, and inference systems.

AI.tldr: FLARE 提出了一种系统化的转换框架，将混合注意力架构的高效性与扩散语言模型的并行解码优势相结合，通过token均衡的AR-扩散联合目标、硬件感知内核和统一推理，实现了单个检查点同时支持自回归验证解码和扩散式并行去噪，在模型规模和吞吐量上均优于现有开源dLLM基线。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归LLM的序列解码效率低，而扩散语言模型虽然能实现并行解码，但将其与高效的混合注意力架构结合存在困难：AR到dLLM的转换难以保留种子检查点能力，且混合注意力的循环状态和掩码约束使扩散训练和服务复杂化。
AI.method: FLARE 框架包含三个关键组件：(1) token均衡的AR与扩散联合训练目标；(2) 硬件感知的推理内核；(3) 统一推理机制，使单个检查点同时支持AR式验证解码和扩散式并行去噪。研究还发现，迁移数据质量是决定能力保留的首要因素，优于损失函数设计和注意力掩码选择。
AI.result: FLARE 在多个模型规模上与领先的开源dLLM竞争力相当，并在单GPU并发服务场景下相比开源dLLM基线取得了持续的吞吐量提升。
AI.conclusion: 实际dLLM的局限性不仅来自解码算法，还来自迁移数据质量和当前块扩散目标的训练效率低下，需要数据、目标、架构和推理系统的联合设计。

title: A Structured Benchmark for Text-Guided Anomaly Detection: When Language Stops Conditioning the Decision
summary: Industrial anomaly detection has historically been a unimodal task. Recent multimodal vision-language models have produced systems that admit textual input alongside the image and are presented as enabling text-guided zero- and few-shot inspection. Yet these methods are evaluated with protocols inherited from unimodal benchmarks that hold the textual condition constant and therefore cannot measure whether language conditions the decision; whether reported gains reflect text guidance or strong pretrained visual features remains open. We introduce Text-Guided Anomaly Detection (TGAD), a structured benchmark that progressively increases the functional role of language across three scenarios: a controlled prompt-sensitivity setting on MVTec AD; a component-tagged extension of MVTec AD that requires the model to restrict its assessment to an instructed part; and the new Assembled Panel Dataset (APD), a realistic industrial setting that requires both defect-type and component-location knowledge. We evaluate one representative model per paradigm: generative large vision-language, training-free discriminative, and embedding-adaptive discriminative. In all three, the textual interface conditions the decision only superficially: prompt content is absorbed unless the object noun is removed (the generative model's I-AUROC drops from 97.4 to 82.6); component-level instructions do not constrain the decision once defects outside the instructed part are admitted as normal (from 90.3 to 66.3); and when both combine on APD, image-level discrimination collapses below the MVTec level, in one case below chance (71.2, 50.5, 31.5). These results suggest that standard benchmarks overstate the text-guided capabilities of current multimodal anomaly detection systems, and that a protocol of this kind is a prerequisite for models that can be reliably controlled through language for industrial deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文发现现有多模态异常检测基准夸大了文本引导能力，通过TGAD基准测试表明语言仅表面性地影响决策，当文本条件变化时模型性能显著下降（如移除物体名词时I-AUROC从97.4降至82.6），质疑了当前方法的真实可控性。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态异常检测方法被宣传支持文本引导的零样本和少样本检测，但评估协议继承自单模态基准，文本条件保持不变，无法衡量语言是否真正影响决策。研究者怀疑性能提升源于强大的预训练视觉特征而非文本引导。
AI.method: 提出TGAD结构化基准，逐步增加语言功能角色：1）MVTec AD上的提示敏感性控制实验；2）带组件标注的MVTec AD扩展，要求模型限定评估到指定部件；3）新构建的Assembled Panel Dataset (APD)，同时要求缺陷类型和组件位置知识。评估三类代表模型：生成式大视觉语言模型、免训练判别模型、嵌入自适应判别模型。
AI.result: 三类模型中文本接口仅表面性影响决策：生成模型去掉物体名词后I-AUROC从97.4降至82.6；组件级指令不约束决策，将指定部件外缺陷视为正常后从90.3降至66.3；APD上图像级判别崩溃至71.2、50.5、31.5。
AI.conclusion: 标准基准夸大了当前多模态异常检测系统的文本引导能力，TGAD这类协议是工业部署中实现可靠语言控制模型的必要条件。

title: Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit: A Unified Framework of Best Arm Identification and Regret Minimization for Dueling Bandits
summary: We study $N$-armed stochastic dueling bandits under the Condorcet-winner assumption, where three widely adopted objectives are considered: best-arm identification (BAI), weak regret, and strong regret. We propose Tree-Guided Identify-Then-Exploit (TG-ITE), the first unified framework to tackle all these objectives to our knowledge. Without requiring stronger assumptions, we propose a shared tree-guided identification approach to find a high-confidence incumbent within $O(N)$ comparisons. We further propose varied exploitation strategies to utilize this warm-start stage to optimize the specific objectives at hand. This methodology enables our approach to (1) achieve $O(N)$ sample complexity in BAI without commonly adopted stronger assumptions; (2) build the first winner-stays-style algorithm to achieve $O(N)$ weak regret; (3) enjoy the same $O(N \log T)$ guarantee as specialized strong-regret approaches; (4) realize the joint optimization of BAI and weak regret with $O(N)$ guarantees for both, eliminating the sub-optimal gap of $O(\log N)$ in the existing approach. Our results provide evidence that the trade-off between BAI and regret minimization is relatively benign in dueling bandits.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TG-ITE，首个统一框架解决Condorcet胜者假设下的N臂随机对决赌博机问题中的最优臂识别(BAI)、弱遗憾和强遗憾三种目标。通过树引导识别方法在O(N)次比较内找到高置信度候选臂，并设计不同的利用策略优化各目标，实现了多种目标下的最优或接近最优的保证。
AI.motivation: 现有对决赌博机问题中对BAI、弱遗憾和强遗憾三种目标的研究通常是分离的，缺乏统一框架。同时，现有BAI方法通常需要更强的假设条件，弱遗憾也无法达到O(N)的最优界。本文希望提供一个统一框架，揭示不同目标之间的权衡关系实际上相对温和。
AI.method: 提出TG-ITE框架，包含两阶段：(1) 树引导识别阶段：通过树形结构进行对决比较，在O(N)次比较内找到高置信度的当前优胜者；(2) 特定目标利用阶段：根据BAI、弱遗憾或强遗憾等不同目标，设计不同的利用策略来优化具体目标。该框架无需比Condorcet胜者假设更强的条件。
AI.result: (1) BAI样本复杂度达到O(N)，无需更强假设；(2) 首个达到O(N)弱遗憾的winner-stays-style算法；(3) 强遗憾达到O(N log T)的相同保证；(4) 实现BAI与弱遗憾的联合优化，均达到O(N)保证，消除了现有方法中O(log N)的次优差距。
AI.conclusion: 对决赌博机中BAI与遗憾最小化之间的权衡相对温和，可以通过统一框架同时优化多个目标，且各目标均能达到接近最优的性能。

title: Towards 3D-Aware Video Diffusion Models: Render-Free Human Motion Control with Mesh Tokenization
summary: Diffusion models have shown remarkable success in video generation. However, whether such models are truly aware of the 3D structure underlying visual observations, rather than simply reproducing plausible 2D projections, remains an open question. In this work, we investigate this question through human motion control, a task that requires precise modelling of 3D human geometry, motion, camera viewpoint, and scene context. Unlike prior methods that rely on rendered 2D motion guidance videos, we propose a render-free framework that conditions video generation directly on compressed 3D human mesh tokens. This representation preserves full 3D geometric information while enabling a unified token-based generation pipeline that processes video tokens jointly with motion tokens in a DiT-based architecture. This design requires the model to reason jointly about appearance, 3D structure, and camera viewpoint during video generation. Experimental results demonstrate strong performance on human motion control benchmarks, while reducing artifacts induced by view-dependent 2D guidance and trajectory-pose mismatches during editing. These findings suggest that video diffusion models, when equipped with mesh tokenization, can better capture complex 3D human structures and their interactions with the surrounding environment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需渲染的3D人体网格令牌化方法，直接将压缩的3D人体网格令牌与视频令牌联合输入DiT架构，使视频扩散模型能更好地捕捉3D人体结构及其与环境的交互，在人体运动控制任务上表现优异，减少了2D引导产生的伪影和轨迹-姿态不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 探究视频扩散模型是否真正理解底层3D结构，而不仅仅是生成合理的2D投影。现有方法依赖渲染的2D运动引导视频，存在视角依赖伪影和轨迹-姿态不匹配问题。
AI.method: 提出无渲染框架，使用压缩的3D人体网格令牌（Mesh Tokens）作为条件，在DiT架构中联合处理视频令牌和运动令牌，实现统一基于令牌的生成流程。
AI.result: 在人体运动控制基准上表现强劲，减少了视角依赖2D引导产生的伪影及轨迹-姿态不匹配问题。
AI.conclusion: 当配备网格令牌化技术时，视频扩散模型能够更好地捕捉复杂3D人体结构及其与环境的交互。

title: Learning Implicit Bias in Generative Spaces for Accelerating Protein Dynamics Emulation
summary: Generative emulators of protein dynamics produce plausible trajectories at a fraction of the cost of molecular dynamics, but they inherit their training distribution and tend to revisit known states rather than reach rare ones under long-horizon extrapolation. Inspired by classical enhanced sampling, we introduce an implicit, history-dependent bias in the generative space of a pretrained emulator. Specifically, a history-aware score estimator augments the frozen emulator with a distance-weighted bias that steers reverse-time sampling away from previously generated structures, regularized by an environment-support term. To preserve structural validity at long horizons, a score-based refinement step re-projects drifted samples onto the data manifold using the frozen emulator. Our experiments demonstrate that the method (i) raises diversity by $35\%$ on DynamicPDB-80; (ii) on $12$ zero-shot Fast-Folding proteins, the learned bias alone reaches the unbiased emulator's coverage up to ${\sim}15\times$ faster, and pairing it with refinement reaches the coverage up to ${\sim}37\times$ faster while covering ${\sim}3\times$ as many low-energy states. Code will be released soon.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于历史依赖隐式偏置的生成式蛋白质动力学仿真方法，通过距离加权偏置引导反向采样避免重复状态，并利用基于分数的精炼步骤保持结构有效性，在多个基准上显著提升了生成轨迹的多样性与稀有状态覆盖能力。
AI.motivation: 生成式蛋白质动力学仿真器虽然高效，但受限于训练分布，在长时域外推中倾向于访问已知状态而难以到达稀有状态，亟需增强其探索能力。
AI.method: 在预训练生成式仿真器中引入历史感知的分数估计器，通过距离加权隐式偏置引导反向采样远离已生成结构，并加入环境支持项正则化；同时使用基于分数的精炼步骤将漂移样本重新投影回数据流形。
AI.result: 在DynamicPDB-80上多样性提升35%；在12个零样本Fast-Folding蛋白上，偏置单独使用达到无偏置仿真器覆盖度快约15倍，结合精炼步骤快约37倍，同时覆盖约3倍的低能态。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了生成式蛋白质动力学仿真的长时域探索能力，兼具高效性与结构有效性，为增强采样与生成模型的结合提供了新思路。

title: Distortion-Aware Fusion of Statistical and Vision-Language Features for Blind Image Quality Assessment
summary: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) aims to predict perceived image quality without access to a reference image. Classical natural scene statistics (NSS) descriptors and modern vision-language model (VLM) embeddings address this problem from fundamentally different perspectives, yet whether combining them yields complementary benefits and how to weight their contributions per input image remains unexplored. We propose a distortion-aware fusion framework that integrates a 138-dimensional NSS descriptor with two complementary VLM embeddings, SigLIP and CLIP-H, through a multiplicative gating mechanism that learns per-input stream weights conditioned on image content. Unlike static concatenation fusion, the proposed gating network suppresses or amplifies each stream's contribution based on the input, producing weights that correlate positively (Spearman rank correlation rho=0.33) with the per-distortion NSS contribution measured by independent ablation on KADID-10k. The framework requires no end-to-end fine-tuning of the VLM backbones and is trained with a hybrid loss combining mean squared error, Pearson linear correlation, and pairwise ranking objectives. We evaluate on three standard benchmarks: KonIQ-10k (SROCC=0.9142, PLCC=0.9279), KADID-10k (SROCC=0.9715, PLCC=0.9733, surpassing recent state-of-the-art methods), and LIVE Challenge in-the-Wild (SROCC=0.8527, PLCC=0.8802 with cross-dataset pretraining and fine-tuning). A per-distortion analysis on KADID-10k reveals that NSS features contribute most on noise and color-shift distortions where pixel statistics are directly affected, and least on perceptual distortions such as color saturation changes. The learned gate values validate these findings, confirming that the model autonomously discovers distortion-stream affinity patterns consistent with the manual per-distortion study.

AI.tldr: 提出一种失真感知融合框架，通过乘法门控机制动态加权NSS特征与VLM嵌入（SigLIP和CLIP-H），无需微调VLM主干，在三个标准BIQA基准上取得领先性能，并发现门控网络能自主发现NSS与不同失真类型的匹配模式。
AI.motivation: 传统NSS描述符与现代VLM嵌入在BIQA中互补性尚未被探索，现有静态融合方法无法根据输入图像自适应调整各特征流贡献权重。
AI.method: 1) 提取138维NSS特征 + SigLIP和CLIP-H两种VLM嵌入；2) 通过乘法门控机制学习每输入图像的流权重，动态抑制或放大各特征贡献；3) 使用MSE、Pearson相关系数和成对排序的混合损失训练，无需微调VLM主干。
AI.result: KonIQ-10k: SROCC=0.9142, PLCC=0.9279; KADID-10k: SROCC=0.9715, PLCC=0.9733 (SOTA); LIVE Challenge: SROCC=0.8527, PLCC=0.8802。NSS在噪声和颜色偏移失真贡献最大，在饱和变化等感知失真贡献最小。
AI.conclusion: 门控机制能自主发现NSS与不同失真类型的亲和模式，验证了NSS与VLM嵌入的互补性，为BIQA提供了一种无需微调主干的高效自适应融合范式。

title: ContinuousBench: Can Differentially Private Synthetic Text Improve Capabilities?
comment: Datasets: https://huggingface.co/ContinuousBench ; Eval Harness: https://github.com/plau666/ContinuousBenchEval ; Blog post: https://peihanliu.com/posts/continuousbench.html
summary: Differentially private (DP) text synthesis promises to unlock sensitive corpora for model training, but it remains unclear whether DP synthetic data transmits genuinely new knowledge and capabilities present only in those corpora. This is because existing evaluations rely on tasks that are nearly solvable without training, so strong benchmark performance does not establish that DP synthesis can substitute original data access. Thus, we introduce ContinuousBench, a continuously and automatically-regenerated benchmark that measures capability gain from DP synthetic text. Each quarter, a new release pairs a never-before-seen training corpus with a derived QA set, constructed to be: (1) unsolvable sans-corpus; and (2) learnable under DP, as the tested knowledge is supported by hundreds of independent records. Researchers produce DP synthetic data from the training corpus and run our standardized training and evaluation harness on their synthetic data to measure gains. We instantiate two tracks: Geminon, a procedurally-generated dataset about fictional creatures; and News, a stream of newly crawled public news articles. Although standard benchmarks are nearly saturated, on ContinuousBench we find that non-private synthesis transfers substantial knowledge from the original corpus, while state-of-the-art DP synthesis methods generally fail to do so, even at $\varepsilon=100$.
