To address these issues, we introduce BlockGen, a blockwise sequence model that we instantiate with both masked and uniform diffusion. BlockGen trains on a mixture of block sizes and its likelihood interpolates between AR and pure diffusion more finely than models with a fixed block size. BlockGen enables AR-informed predictor-corrector sampling (ARPC), which combines AR and diffusion predictions to re-generate unlikely tokens without an auxiliary verifier. Under ancestral sampling, uniform outperforms masked in the block-by-block setting, especially in the few-step regime. Under ARPC, the gap closes and reverses at high NFE. With block size $16$ on GSM8K, MDMs reach slightly higher accuracy than USDMs, and we observe a similar trend in Generative Perplexity on OpenWebText. Find our code at https://github.com/jdeschena/blockgen.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BlockGen，一种分块序列生成框架，用于比较均匀扩散与掩码扩散在分块生成场景下的表现。结合自回归信息指导的预测-校正采样（ARPC），发现掩码扩散在高NFE下反超均匀扩散，挑战了均匀扩散更优的既有结论。
AI.motivation: 现有工作对均匀扩散与掩码扩散的比较存在两个缺陷：1）使用盲目的校正器（随机位置注入噪声）而非针对最可能出错的token；2）仅在全序列扩散场景下比较，不清楚分块生成时的结论是否一致。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出BlockGen框架，支持均匀扩散和掩码扩散两种分块序列模型，使用混合块大小训练；并提出ARPC（自回归信息指导的预测-校正采样），融合AR预测与扩散预测来重新生成不合理的token。
AI.result: 在祖先采样下，均匀扩散在分块场景中优于掩码扩散，尤其在少步数情况下。但在ARPC下，掩码扩散在高NFE时缩小差距并反超。在GSM8K上块大小为16时，MDM准确率略高于USDM。
AI.conclusion: 均匀扩散并非在所有场景下都优于掩码扩散；分块生成和ARPC采样策略会影响两者的相对优劣。未来工作需要更精细的校正策略和分块机制设计。

title: Honey, I Shrunk the Arc de Triomphe!
summary: Metric scale monocular geometry estimation has seen significant progress through large-scale data aggregation, yet current foundation models suffer from a persistent ''scale-collapse'' phenomenon: distant landmarks and vast landscapes are metrically underestimated. We hypothesize that this performance gap stems from a training data bottleneck, where existing metric-scale datasets are hardware-constrained to homogenous vehicle-captured LiDAR or short-range indoor scans, or consist of synthetic data that lacks the semantic complexity of the physical world. To bridge this gap, we curate a new metrically-grounded, in-the-wild dataset that we call MetricScenes, gathered from a variety of sources including Internet photo collections and stereo imagery. We estimate camera poses and initial depth maps for each scene using off-the-shelf methods, and recover absolute scale from geo-tagged metadata as well as known stereo camera baselines. We also improve the quality of depth maps derived from MetricScenes via a new two-stage Poisson completion method. Fine-tuning MoGe-2 on our dataset significantly mitigates scale-collapse and achieves superior metric accuracy in unconstrained, open-domain scenes while maintaining state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetricScenes数据集，通过互联网照片和立体图像收集大规模野外场景，结合地理标签和立体基线恢复绝对尺度，采用两阶段泊松补全方法提升深度质量。微调MoGe-2模型后有效缓解了单目几何估计中的"尺度坍缩"问题，在开放场景中显著提升度量精度。
AI.motivation: 现有单目度量尺度几何估计模型存在"尺度坍缩"问题（远处地标和广阔景观被度量低估），根源在于训练数据瓶颈：现有度量尺度数据集受硬件限制，要么是车辆LiDAR或室内扫描的同质数据，要么是缺乏真实世界语义复杂性的合成数据。
AI.method: (1) 构建MetricScenes数据集，从互联网照片集和立体图像中收集在野场景；(2) 利用现成方法估计相机位姿和初始深度图；(3) 通过地理标签元数据和已知立体相机基线恢复绝对尺度；(4) 提出两阶段泊松补全方法提升深度图质量；(5) 在MetricScenes上微调MoGe-2模型。
AI.result: 微调后的MoGe-2显著缓解了尺度坍缩现象，在无约束开放域场景中实现了更优的度量精度，同时在标准基准测试上保持最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建大规模、多样化的真实世界度量尺度数据集MetricScenes，有效弥补了训练数据瓶颈，为提升单目度量几何估计在开放场景中的泛化能力提供了可行方案。

title: ArrythML: An Autoencoder-Based TinyML Approach for On-Device Arrhythmia Detection on Resource-Constrained Embedded Systems
summary:
Our work presents a method for ECG segmentation and arrhythmia detection using Tiny Machine Learning (TinyML) models for real-time, on-device inference on resource-constrained embedded systems. We develop INT8 quantized autoencoder-based TinyML models with minimal layers and parameters for embedded deployment. These models are evaluated using a custom dataset derived from the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database and validated in both PC-based simulations and on-device environments.
  For the evaluations, over 95,000 ECG segments are processed on an ESP32-S3 microcontroller running the TensorFlow Lite Micro runtime. Post-evaluation, detailed analysis, including annotation-wise and record-wise failure analysis, is conducted to characterize model behavior across diverse ECG morphologies and rhythm patterns and to explain missed detections. In several cases, apparent misclassifications may correspond to early or subtle anomaly patterns labeled as normal in the reference annotations, highlighting the model's sensitivity. A refined evaluation by filtering out ambiguous cases in the dataset shows that the best-performing DNN-based autoencoder achieves a recall of 84%, an F1-score of 79%, a model size of approximately 180 KB, and an inference latency of 9 ms on-device. These results demonstrate the feasibility of low-power, privacy-preserving embedded wearable systems capable of performing accurate arrhythmia detection entirely on-device.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于TinyML的ECG分割和心律失常检测方法，使用INT8量化的轻量级自编码器模型在ESP32-S3微控制器上实现实时、低功耗的片上推理。在MIT-BIH数据集上，最佳DNN自编码器在设备上达到84%召回率、79%F1分数，模型仅180KB，推理延迟9ms。
AI.motivation: 传统心律失常检测依赖云端或服务器端推理，存在高延迟、高功耗和隐私泄露风险。本文旨在实现资源受限的嵌入式设备上运行高效的ECG分割与心律失常检测，以支持低功耗、隐私保护的实时可穿戴医疗系统。
AI.method: 使用INT8量化的自编码器TinyML模型，具有极少的层数和参数量。模型在自定义的MIT-BIH心律失常数据集上训练，部署在ESP32-S3微控制器上，运行TensorFlow Lite Micro运行时。评估中对超过95,000个ECG片段进行逐注释和逐记录的失败分析，并排除模糊案例后重新评估。
AI.result: 最佳DNN自编码器在排除模糊案例后达到84%召回率、79%F1分数，模型大小约180KB，在设备上推理延迟为9ms。部分看似误分类的案例实际上对应了被参考标注标记为正常的早期或微小异常模式，表明模型具有良好的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，在资源受限的嵌入式系统上部署轻量级TinyML模型进行实时心律失常检测是可行的。该方法兼具低功耗和隐私保护优势，适合用于可穿戴医疗设备。

title: Explainable Forensics of Manipulated Segments in Untrimmed Long Videos
summary: The rapid advancement of AI-driven video generation has transformed content creation, while simultaneously increasing the risk of misinformation through localized manipulations in long-form videos. Existing video forensic methods predominantly operate on short, independent clips, and thus fail to capture realistic scenarios where AI-generated content is sparsely embedded within otherwise authentic footage. To bridge this gap, we formulate the task of Temporal AI-Generated Segment Localization and Explanation, which targets authenticity detection, temporal localization, and interpretable analysis of manipulated segments in untrimmed long videos. We further introduce TASLE, a large-scale benchmark comprising 12,472 untrimmed videos with diverse manipulation patterns and rich annotation signals, including temporal boundaries, authenticity labels, and segment-level rationales. In addition, we propose MSLoc, a coarse-to-fine forensic baseline that combines a boundary-sensitive proposal generation module for efficient long-video scanning with an MLLM-based refinement module for precise boundary localization and interpretable reasoning. Experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed baseline, highlighting the importance of segment-level explainable forensics for long-form AI-generated video analysis. Our dataset and code are publicly available at https://debby-0527.github.io/TASLE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TASLE基准（含12,472个未修剪长视频）和MSLoc方法，用于检测、定位和解释长视频中稀疏嵌入的AI生成片段，填补了现有视频取证方法仅处理短独立片段的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有AI视频取证方法仅处理短独立片段，无法应对真实场景中AI生成内容稀疏嵌入长视频的问题，因此需要针对长视频的时序AI生成片段定位与解释任务。
AI.method: 提出MSLoc，一种粗到细的取证基线方法：1) 边界敏感提案生成模块用于高效扫描长视频；2) MLLM精炼模块用于精确边界定位和可解释推理。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提基线的有效性，证明片段级可解释取证对长视频AI生成内容分析的重要性。数据集含12,472个未修剪视频，提供时序边界、真实性标签和片段级理由等丰富标注信号。
AI.conclusion: TASLE基准和MSLoc方法为长视频AI生成内容的时序定位与解释分析提供了有效方案，填补了现有视频取证研究的重要空白。

title: A combination of noise and bilateral filters achieve supralinear and scalable adversarial robustness in CNNs
comment: Main: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 Tables. Supplement: 10 pages, 7 figures, 6 Tables
summary: The vulnerability of deep neural networks to adversarial examples poses a significant challenge for real-world deployment. Existing techniques to enhance deep network robustness rely on adversarial training, an approach that is powerful but computationally intensive and typically tailored to specific attack types. To address these limitations, existing works have explored techniques such as adding gaussian noise or filtering images, both of which can boost the network robustness to various adversarial attacks, albeit modestly. Here, we theoretically demonstrate that these two approaches enhance robustness against adversarial attacks through complementary mechanisms, resulting in supralinear robustness when combined. Building on this insight, we experimentally show that a simple preprocessor combining Gaussian noise and bilateral filtering yields supralinear improvements in adversarial robustness with minimal computational cost. Next, we combine our preprocessor with adversarial training and test on RobustBench to assess its supralinear improvement over state-of-the-art defenses. First, this combination ranks second on AutoAttack and third overall, while using only $\sim$35% of the training FLOPs, using a model with $\sim$50% less parametets, trained with $\sim$33% of the epochs and $\sim$15% the data compared to state-of-the-art defenses. Second, our method scales efficiently, matching the accuracy of competing models with roughly 2-8x less total compute across 3 orders of magnitude. Overall, our approach provides a principled and easily integrable framework for enhancing adversarial robustness, offering negligible computational overhead and a simple yet theoretically grounded design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合高斯噪声和双边滤波的预处理方法，通过互补机制显著提升深度神经网络对抗鲁棒性，与对抗训练结合后以极低计算成本达到SOTA水平。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法计算成本高且针对特定攻击类型；高斯噪声和滤波虽能提升鲁棒性但效果有限。本文动机是找到一种简单、计算高效且能泛化到多种攻击的鲁棒性增强方法。
AI.method: 理论证明高斯噪声与双边滤波通过互补机制提升鲁棒性；实验上将两者组合作为预处理器，并与对抗训练结合，在RobustBench上评估。
AI.result: 组合预处理器在AutoAttack上排名第二，整体第三；仅用SOTA约35%的训练FLOPs、50%参数、33% epoch和15%数据；计算效率提升2-8倍。
AI.conclusion: 该预处理方法提供了一个简单、理论扎实、易于集成的框架，以极小计算开销显著增强对抗鲁棒性。

title: Edge Prediction for Roof Wireframe Reconstruction with Transformers
comment: Presented at the 3rd Urban Scene Modeling (USM3D) Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: This paper presents a competitive solution to the S23DR Challenge 2026, which aims to reconstruct 3D house roof wireframe models from sparse SfM point clouds and ground-level semantic segmentations and depth maps. Our proposed method utilizes an end-to-end Transformer encoder-decoder architecture inspired by DETR. To effectively process the geometric and semantic data, the sparse SfM point cloud input is dynamically subsampled based on semantic priority and augmented with Gestalt and ADE20k class features. To further increase segmentation context, we fuse the point features with additional Gestalt feature encodings which are obtained by projecting the points into latent feature maps produced by a frozen autoencoder. Learned query embeddings are then decoded directly into 3D wireframe edges via cross-attention mechanisms. Evaluated on the "HoHo 22k" dataset, our approach significantly outperforms both handcrafted and learned baselines, achieving a Hybrid Structure Score (HSS) of 0.6476 and securing the second-highest position on the challenge's private leaderboard.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer编码器-解码器架构（受DETR启发）的端到端方法，用于从稀疏SfM点云和地面语义分割/深度图中重建3D房屋屋顶线框模型。该方法通过语义优先级动态子采样点云，融合Gestalt和ADE20k特征，利用交叉注意力机制直接解码出3D线框边。在HoHo 22k数据集上取得HSS 0.6476，获得挑战赛第二名。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D屋顶线框重建方法在处理稀疏SfM点云和地面语义数据时效果不佳，传统手工方法和已有的学习方法难以充分利用几何与语义信息。挑战赛（S23DR Challenge 2026）提出了从稀疏点云和语义分割/深度图中重建屋顶线框的任务，亟需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 采用端到端的Transformer编码器-解码器架构（受DETR启发）；2) 对稀疏SfM点云进行基于语义优先级的动态子采样；3) 融合Gestalt和ADE20k类别特征增强点特征；4) 通过将点投影到冻结自编码器的潜在特征图中获得额外Gestalt特征编码；5) 利用可学习查询嵌入通过交叉注意力机制直接解码为3D线框边。
AI.result: 在HoHo 22k数据集上，该方法显著优于手工方法和现有学习方法，Hybrid Structure Score (HSS)达到0.6476，在挑战赛私人排行榜上获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的Transformer架构能够有效融合稀疏几何信息与语义特征，实现高质量的3D屋顶线框重建。该方法的成功证明了端到端学习在结构重建任务中的潜力，也为后续研究提供了新的方向。

title: CityTrajBench: A Unified Benchmark for City-Scale Vehicle Trajectory Generation
summary: Urban trajectory generation is a fundamental task for transportation simulation, urban planning, and mobility analytics. However, systematic comparison across trajectory generation methods remains difficult because existing studies often rely on different datasets, preprocessing pipelines, trajectory representations, and evaluation metrics. This fragmentation makes it unclear whether reported performance differences arise from the generation mechanism itself or from inconsistent experimental protocols. To address this issue, we present CityTrajBench, a unified benchmark framework and protocol for city-scale vehicle trajectory generation. CityTrajBench standardizes data ingestion, trajectory normalization, feature construction, model adaptation, map-aware post-processing, model selection, and multi-level evaluation under a common setting. It supports heterogeneous generators, including statistical baselines, VAE-based, GAN-based, diffusion-based, and flow-matching-based models, and evaluates them on three real-world urban trajectory datasets. The benchmark measures global spatial realism, trip-level distribution fidelity, trajectory-level geometric similarity, conditional mobility consistency, and efficiency. Experiments reveal clear trade-offs across model families: DiffTraj is strongest on trajectory-level geometric fidelity, DiffRNTraj is competitive on structure-sensitive global realism, and TrajFlow provides a strong balance across realism, quality, conditional consistency, and efficiency. Meanwhile, a simple Markov baseline remains competitive on coarse-grained trip and local-movement statistics. These findings show that urban trajectory generation quality is inherently multi-objective, that no single model dominates all criteria equally, and that CityTrajBench provides a reproducible benchmark protocol and testbed for future research on urban mobility generation.

AI.tldr: 提出了CityTrajBench，一个统一的城市轨迹生成基准框架，标准化了数据处理、模型适配和评估流程，系统比较了多种生成模型在多个真实数据集上的表现，发现不同模型在不同指标上各有优劣，没有单一模型全面占优。
AI.motivation: 现有城市轨迹生成研究因使用不同数据集、预处理流程、轨迹表示和评估指标，导致难以进行系统性对比，无法判断性能差异源于生成机制本身还是实验协议不一致。
AI.method: 构建了CityTrajBench统一基准框架，标准化数据摄入、轨迹归一化、特征构建、模型适配、地图感知后处理、模型选择和多层级评估流程，支持统计基线、VAE、GAN、扩散模型和流匹配模型等多种生成器，在三个真实轨迹数据集上进行评估。
AI.result: DiffTraj在轨迹级几何保真度最强，DiffRNTraj在结构敏感的全局真实性上表现优异，TrajFlow在真实性、质量、条件一致性和效率之间实现了良好平衡；简单的马尔可夫基线在粗粒度行程和局部运动统计上仍有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 城市轨迹生成质量本质上是多目标的，没有单一模型在所有指标上都占优；CityTrajBench为未来研究提供了可复现的基准协议和测试平台。

title: GC-MoE: Genomics-Guided Cell-Type-Specific Mixture of Experts for Histology-Based Single-Cell Spatial Transcriptomics
summary: Histology-based single-cell spatial transcriptomics (ST) estimation aims to predict gene expression for individual cells from histopathological images and cell locations, reducing the need for costly single-cell ST measurements. Unlike existing histology-to-ST methods that mainly predict spot-level profiles for local regions containing multiple cells, this task requires modeling cell-to-cell expression variability, which is strongly structured by cell type. We propose Genomics-Guided Cell-Type-Specific Mixture-of-Experts (GC-MoE), which estimates cell-type probabilities with a routing network and softly combines cell-type-specific experts for gene expression prediction. To further encode cell-type-dependent gene programs, we introduce the Cell-Type-Specific Co-Expression-Aware Predictor (CAP), together with a lightweight Cell-to-Cell Interaction Attention (C2CA) module for neighboring-cell context. Experiments and ablations on public single-cell ST datasets show consistent improvements over existing single-cell and adapted spot-level baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出GC-MoE模型，通过细胞类型特化的混合专家网络和共表达感知预测器，从组织病理图像和细胞位置预测单细胞空间转录组，在公开数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有组织学-to-ST方法主要预测包含多个细胞的局部区域的spot级表达谱，无法建模细胞间表达变异（这种变异强烈受细胞类型结构影响），因此需要能预测单细胞级基因表达的方法。
AI.method: 1) GC-MoE：用路由网络估计细胞类型概率，软组合细胞类型特化专家预测基因表达；2) CAP（细胞类型特化共表达感知预测器）编码细胞类型依赖的基因程序；3) C2CA（轻量级细胞间交互注意力模块）建模邻域细胞上下文。
AI.result: 在公开单细胞ST数据集上的实验和消融研究显示，GC-MoE在单细胞预测和改编的spot级基线方法上均有一致改进。
AI.conclusion: GC-MoE通过细胞类型特化的MoE结构和共表达感知机制，有效弥合了组织学图像到单细胞转录组预测的差距，为降低单细胞ST测量成本提供了可行方案。

title: Massive Spikes in LLMs are Bias Vectors: Mechanistic Uncovering and Spike-Free Quantization
summary: Massive activation spikes in Large Language Models (LLMs) severely degrade quantization by stretching dynamic ranges. While prior hypotheses characterize these as high-level scalar biases, we argue that they are merely the scalar intermediates of rigid, structural vector biases in the spike-carrying tokens. We show that these tokens converge to constant vectors after normalization that drive the attention sink and value-state drain mechanisms. We geometrically substantiate this by analyzing the coordination of projection weights: $W_K$ contrastively amplifies the vector, $W_Q$ aligns semantic tokens toward it, and $W_V$ projects it into the spectral null-space. Furthermore, we reveal that the model actively preserves these structural biases against Rotary Positional Embedding (RoPE) perturbations by localizing them in "zones of rotational stability" utilizing low-frequency bands and coherent channel pairs. Leveraging this, we propose INSERTQUANT, a post-training quantization (PTQ) framework that clamps spikes and restores their function via pre-computed template vectors. This renders activations strictly spike-free, enabling robust low-bit quantization with high fidelity. INSERTQUANT achieves parity with state-of-the-art per-tensor quantization methods on LLMs and uniquely generalizes beyond text to other modalities such as ViTs.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了LLM中激活值尖峰的根源是结构性向量偏差（而非标量偏差），并通过分析W_K/W_Q/W_V的几何协调作用以及RoPE下的旋转稳定区域机制加以验证。基于此提出INSERTQUANT后训练量化框架，通过钳制尖峰并恢复其功能实现无尖峰激活，在LLM和ViT上均达到SOTA水平。
AI.motivation: 先前研究将激活尖峰归因于标量偏差，作者认为这是不充分的。本文旨在从几何和结构向量偏差的角度重新理解尖峰的成因，并利用该理解设计更好的量化方法。
AI.method: 1) 理论分析：证明激活尖峰是结构性向量偏差的标量中间产物，揭示注意力下沉和值状态排空机制。2) 几何验证：分析W_K（对比放大向量）、W_Q（对齐语义token）、W_V（映射到谱零空间）的协调作用。3) 揭示模型通过低频带和相干通道对在旋转稳定区域中保持这些偏差以抵抗RoPE扰动。4) 提出INSERTQUANT框架：钳制尖峰，通过预计算模板向量恢复其功能，实现无尖峰激活的PTQ。
AI.result: INSERTQUANT实现了严格的无尖峰激活，支持低比特量化且保真度高。在LLM上达到与SOTA每张量量化方法相当的性能，并独特地泛化到文本以外的模态（如ViT）。
AI.conclusion: LLM中的激活尖峰本质上是结构性向量偏差，而非标量偏差。INSERTQUANT利用这一洞察，通过钳制尖峰并恢复功能实现高效PTQ，且跨模态泛化能力强。

title: Geometry-Aware Implicit Memory for Video World Models
summary: Video world models aim to simulate controllable visual environments, but long-horizon rollouts depend on what the model remembers after observations leave its native context window. Explicit memories retain frames or online 3D reconstructions, which can suffer from heuristic retrieval errors, redundant appearance storage, or reconstruction artifacts. Implicit memories compress history into a compact state, but existing designs are not explicitly constrained to encode cross-view scene geometry. We propose GIM-World, a geometry-aware implicit memory framework for video world models. A lightweight transformer encoder compresses variable-length history into fixed-size memory tokens, a camera-queryable geometry head distills 3D scene structure from a frozen foundation model into the memory during training, and an information-guided pruning rule keeps encoding cost bounded as history grows. The geometry teacher is discarded at inference, leaving a lightweight memory module. Experiments on MIND show that GIM-World better preserves long-horizon geometric and visual consistency than both explicit- and implicit-memory baselines.

AI.tldr: GIM-World提出了一种几何感知的隐式记忆框架，通过轻量Transformer编码器将变长历史压缩为固定大小记忆令牌，并利用相机可查询的几何头从冻结基础模型中蒸馏3D场景结构，在推理时丢弃教师模型，从而在长时域视频世界模型中更好地保持几何和视觉一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型的长时域 rollout 受限于记忆机制：显式记忆（如保留帧或在线3D重建）存在检索错误、冗余存储或重建伪影；隐式记忆虽能压缩历史，但缺乏对跨视角场景几何结构的显式约束。作者希望设计一种轻量、几何感知的隐式记忆来克服上述问题。
AI.method: 1) 轻量Transformer编码器将变长历史观测压缩为固定大小的记忆令牌；2) 相机可查询的几何头在训练时从冻结基础模型中蒸馏3D场景结构到记忆令牌中；3) 信息引导的剪枝规则在历史增长时控制编码成本有界；4) 推理时丢弃几何教师模型，保留轻量记忆模块。
AI.result: 在MIND数据集上的实验表明，GIM-World在长时域几何一致性和视觉一致性上均优于显式记忆和隐式记忆基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GIM-World通过几何感知的隐式记忆有效解决了视频世界模型长时域 rollout 中的场景保持问题，兼顾了记忆效率与几何一致性，且推理时无额外开销。

title: Regularized Large Neighborhood Search
summary: Operations research practitioners typically tackle NP-hard combinatorial problems using large neighborhood search (LNS), a scalable heuristic that iteratively refines a current solution by locally re-optimizing subsets of its variables. In contrast, most existing approaches for integrating combinatorial optimization layers into neural networks still assume access to an exact global solution, which is computationally intractable. We bridge this gap by introducing regularized LNS (RLNS). By regularizing or perturbing local subproblems, we turn the LNS heuristic into an efficient MCMC sampler over the combinatorial set of feasible solutions, with associated Fenchel-Young losses. Under entropic regularization, we prove that RLNS performs exact block Gibbs sampling. Furthermore, adjusting the number of RLNS iterations allows us to interpolate between pseudolikelihood and exact maximum likelihood estimation, for end-to-end learning without global solvers. We demonstrate our approach on $k$-subset selection, generalized assignment, and stochastic vehicle scheduling problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出正则化大邻域搜索（RLNS），通过正则化局部子问题将LNS启发式转化为高效的MCMC采样器，并关联Fenchel-Young损失，实现无需全局求解器的端到端学习。
AI.motivation: 现有集成组合优化层到神经网络的方法通常需要可精确求解的全局解，这对于NP难问题计算上不可行。作者希望弥合运筹学中LNS启发式与深度学习之间的差距。
AI.method: 对LNS中的局部子问题进行正则化或扰动，将其转化为MCMC采样器；采用熵正则化实现精确的块Gibbs采样；通过调整RLNS迭代次数在伪似然和精确最大似然估计之间插值。
AI.result: 在k子集选择、广义分配和随机车辆调度问题上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RLNS提供了一种可扩展的端到端学习框架，将LNS启发式与概率建模结合，避免了全局求解器的计算瓶颈。

title: Spatial-Temporal Decoupled Reference Conditioning for Identity-Preserving Text-to-Video Generation
summary: Identity-preserving video generation (IPVG) aims to synthesize high-fidelity videos that follow text prompts while faithfully preserving a reference identity. Despite recent progress, existing IPVG methods still struggle to balance high-level semantic control and low-level identity fidelity. To bridge this gap, we propose ST-DRC, an effective Spatial-Temporal Decoupled Reference Conditioning framework for identity-preserving text-to-video generation. At the framework level, ST-DRC performs latent in-context feature injection by encoding the reference image with the video VAE and concatenating it with noisy video latents, enabling rich low-level identity details to be accessed without additional adapters. To separate identity-aware reference retrieval from appearance copying, we introduce TASS-RoPE, a Temporal-Adjacent Spatial-Shifted RoPE scheme that places reference tokens near the video sequence in time but shifts them in space, allowing reference information to flow through spatio-temporal attention while suppressing pixel-level copy-paste shortcuts. To further prevent shortcut learning and strengthen the otherwise diluted identity supervision in the diffusion objective, we combine appearance-invariant reference augmentation with face-guided identity objectives, encouraging the model to preserve identity under variations in color, pose, and layout. At inference time, we introduce a three-stream reference classifier-free guidance strategy that independently controls text adherence and reference fidelity. Experiments demonstrate that ST-DRC achieves strong identity preservation, prompt alignment, temporal consistency, and video quality with a lightweight design built on LTX-2.3. Our method ranks among the top submissions in the facial identity-preserving video generation track, validating the effectiveness of spatial-temporal decoupled reference conditioning.

AI.tldr: ST-DRC是一个用于身份保持视频生成的时空解耦参考条件框架，通过潜在上下文特征注入、TASS-RoPE位置编码、外观不变增强和三流参考CFG策略，在轻量级LTX-2.3上实现了强身份保持、提示对齐和时间一致性，在面部身份保持视频生成赛道中排名前列。
AI.motivation: 现有IPVG方法难以平衡高层语义控制和低层身份保真度，需要弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 1) 潜在上下文特征注入：参考图像经VAE编码后与噪声视频潜变量拼接；2) TASS-RoPE：时间相邻但空间偏移的位置编码，抑制像素级复制粘贴；3) 外观不变参考增强+人脸引导身份目标；4) 三流参考CFG推理策略。
AI.result: 在LTX-2.3上实现强身份保持、提示对齐和时间一致性，在面部身份保持视频生成赛道排名前列。
AI.conclusion: 时空解耦参考条件框架有效平衡了身份保真与语义控制，验证了该设计范式的有效性。

title: Measurement Geometry and Design for Trustworthy Generative Inverse Problems
summary: Generative models are increasingly used as priors for inverse problems, but their ability to produce realistic images creates a basic trust problem: a plausible reconstruction may be supported by the measurements, or it may be filled in by the prior along unobserved directions. This distinction is especially important in medical imaging, where acquisition operators are designed under scan-time, dose, and calibration constraints. We study generative inverse problems from a measurement-geometry perspective. The central question is whether a fixed measurement operator can distinguish nearby images that are plausible under the generative prior, and whether this relationship can guide better measurements. We introduce a local measurement-manifold compatibility measure that quantifies how well the operator observes prior-relevant tangent directions. Under local regularity assumptions, we prove that this quantity controls the stable part of the reconstruction error, while the generative prior controls off-manifold drift. This worst-direction certificate motivates practical fixed and sequential acquisition rules based on overall local volume preservation, including a posterior-cloud design that adapts measurements at test time without training a sampling policy. Across row-sampling, tomographic, and MR acquisition settings, the proposed scores predict failure modes, explain measurement-induced hallucinations, and guide better sampling. In fastMRI Cartesian sampling, posterior-cloud measurement design improves over strong non-learned ACS-preserving baselines, including variable-density and Poisson-like masks.

AI.tldr: 本文从测量几何角度研究生成逆问题，提出局部测量-流形兼容性度量，该度量控制重建误差的稳定部分，并基于局部体积保持推导出固定和自适应采集规则，在多种医学成像设置中验证了该方法能预测失败模式、解释测量引起的幻觉并指导更好的采样。
AI.motivation: 生成模型作为逆问题先验能产生逼真图像，但存在信任问题：重建结果可能由测量支撑，也可能由先验在未观测方向上填充。尤其在医学成像中，采集受扫描时间、剂量和校准约束，需要区分这两种情况，并理解测量算子能否区分生成先验下相似的近邻图像。
AI.method: 定义局部测量-流形兼容性度量来量化测量算子对先验相关切方向的观测能力；基于局部正则性假设证明该度量控制重建误差的稳定部分，生成先验控制离流形漂移；提出基于局部体积保持的固定和自适应采集规则，包括后验云设计（测试时自适应调整测量）。
AI.result: 在行采样、断层成像和MR采集设置中，所提出的分数能预测失败模式、解释测量引起的幻觉，并指导更好的采样。在fastMRI笛卡尔采集中，后验云测量设计优于强非学习基线（包括变密度和泊松掩模）。
AI.conclusion: 测量几何视角为生成逆问题提供了理论保证和实用指导，局部兼容性度量可作为预测工具和采集优化依据，后验云设计方法无需训练采样策略即可在测试时自适应调整。

title: Reason-Then-Retrieve for CoVR-R with Structured Edit Prompts and Dense-Sparse Fusion
summary: CoVR-R studies reason-aware composed video retrieval: given a reference video and an edit instruction, the system must retrieve the target video that satisfies the edit. The main difficulty is that the target is not described directly; it must be inferred from fine-grained changes in object identity, action order, final state, hand interaction, and scene transition. We build a zero-shot reason-then-retrieve pipeline around Qwen3.5-27B. For each gallery video, the model generates a retrieval-oriented structured description and a dense embedding by pooling generated-token hidden states with token-dependent weights. For each query, the model first performs edit reasoning over the reference video and instruction, then generates a target-video description whose hidden states serve as the query embedding. We complement dense retrieval with a TF-IDF branch over the generated texts and fuse the two rankings with split-specific weights. On validation, the current best submission reaches 80.81 at R@1, 94.86 at R@5, 97.11 at R@10, and 98.59 at R@50. On the blind test split, it reaches 89.73 at R@1, 95.79 at R@5, 96.63 at R@10, and 97.98 at R@50.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoVR-R，一个零样本的推理驱动视频检索方法，通过推理编辑指令生成目标视频描述，结合密集检索和TF-IDF分支进行排名融合，在基准上达到SOTA表现。
AI.motivation: 传统视频检索无法处理基于编辑指令的细粒度变化推理，目标视频不直接描述，需推断对象身份、动作顺序、状态、手势和场景转换等细粒度变化。
AI.method: 基于Qwen3.5-27B构建零样本"推理-检索"流水线：对查询进行编辑推理生成目标描述，对每个图库视频生成结构化描述和密集嵌入；采用token依赖权重的隐藏状态池化；融合密集检索与TF-IDF分支，使用分集权重进行排名融合。
AI.conclusion: 零样本推理-检索范式在细粒度编辑视频检索任务上有效，生成的结构化描述结合双分支检索机制显著提升性能。

title: Repurposing Adversarial Perturbations for Continual Learning: From Defense to Active Alignment
summary: In dynamic environments, large language models need to keep adapting to new tasks, but continual learning often suffers from forgetting, limited transfer, and vulnerability to adversarial perturbations. To address this, we present AdvCL, which repurposes adversarial perturbations as a geometric control signal for stable continual adaptation. AdvCL combines three plug-in modules: Intra-Smooth promotes local smoothness via small adversarial perturbations; Proto-Clip uses similarity clipping to prevent excessive alignment to current task prototype; and Inter-Align applies directional alignment toward previous task prototype to reduce representational gaps. Experiments show consistent gains in both standard performance and robustness, with lower forgetting and stronger transfer. We further analyze key mechanisms by quantifying the sensitivity of Intra-Smooth to perturbation settings and the effect of Inter-Align on task similarity and geometric distance. In summary, the modules provide complementary gains when combined, and each can also be integrated individually into diverse CL paradigms, including replay, regularization, and dynamic architectures, thereby offering a geometric control mechanism for continual learning.

AI.tldr: AdvCL提出利用对抗扰动作为几何控制信号，通过三个即插即用模块（Intra-Smooth、Proto-Clip、Inter-Align）提升大语言模型在持续学习中的稳定性、鲁棒性和迁移能力，有效缓解遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在动态环境中需要持续适应新任务，但现有的持续学习方法面临遗忘、迁移受限以及对对抗扰动脆弱等问题。
AI.method: 提出AdvCL框架，包含三个模块：(1) Intra-Smooth：通过小幅度对抗扰动促进局部平滑性；(2) Proto-Clip：使用相似性裁剪防止过度对齐当前任务原型；(3) Inter-Align：通过方向对齐减少与前任务原型的表征差距。三者即插即用，可集成到回放、正则化、动态架构等多种持续学习范式。
AI.result: 在标准性能和鲁棒性方面均取得一致提升，遗忘率更低，迁移能力更强。实验分析了Intra-Smooth对扰动设置的敏感性以及Inter-Align对任务相似性和几何距离的影响。
AI.conclusion: 三个模块组合使用时具有互补增益，每个模块也可单独集成到不同的持续学习范式中，为持续学习提供了一种几何控制机制。

title: Initialization is Half the Battle: Generating Diverse Images from a Guidance Potential Posterior
summary: Despite the remarkable fidelity of generative models, they frequently suffer from mode collapse. Existing strategies for enhancing diversity predominantly focus on intervening during the generation trajectory. We identify a critical oversight that the standard Gaussian initialization often causes trajectories to collapse into dominant modes because it is agnostic to the guidance potential landscape. In this work, we formulate selecting the initial noise from a guidance potential posterior, which effectively re-weights the prior towards diversity-rich regions. To sample from this distribution efficiently, we introduce Diversity-inducing Initialization (DivIn), which leverages Langevin dynamics to actively navigate the initialization landscape, steering initial noise away from collapsing regions while anchoring them to the valid data manifold. Our method serves as an inference-time diversity enhancement compatible with both diffusion and flow matching models. Extensive experiments show that DivIn exhibits a superior performance in both class-to-image and text-to-image scenarios. Furthermore, we highlight that as DivIn is orthogonal to trajectory-based methods, combining them significantly expands the diversity-quality Pareto frontier beyond what either achieves in isolation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DivIn方法，通过从引导势后验中采样初始噪声，利用朗之万动力学引导初始化避免模式坍缩，显著提升了生成模型的多样性，且与轨迹级方法正交互补。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型虽保真度高但常出现模式坍缩，标准高斯初始化对引导势景观不敏感，导致轨迹坍缩到主导模式，亟需一种能感知势景观的初始化策略。
AI.method: 将初始噪声选择建模为从引导势后验中采样，提出DivIn方法，利用朗之万动力学主动导航初始化景观，将初始噪声引离坍缩区域同时锚定在有效数据流形上。
AI.result: 在类别到图像和文本到图像场景中均表现优越，且与轨迹级方法正交结合后显著扩展了多样性-质量帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: DivIn是一种推理时的多样性增强方法，兼容扩散模型和流匹配模型，与现有轨迹干预方法互补，为提升生成多样性提供了新视角。

title: Riemannian Gradient Descent for Low-Rank Architectures
summary: We explore Riemannian optimization techniques for rank-factored matrix parameters, targeting contemporary deep learning applications. We examine ten points in the algorithm design space: two geometries for rank-$r$ matrices, three geometries for rank-$r$ partial isometries, and block-matrix variants of these five, where factors are shared across block-rows and block-columns. We apply our methods to the multihead attention parameters in small language models. After tuning learning rates, our methods do not conclusively outperform an AdamW baseline. Our implementations are available online.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了针对低秩矩阵参数的黎曼优化方法，应用于小型语言模型的多头注意力参数，经过调参后未能显著超越AdamW基线。
AI.motivation: 将黎曼优化从传统低秩矩阵恢复推广到深度学习中的参数优化，探索其在深度网络中的适用性。
AI.method: 在算法设计空间中考察了10个关键点：2种秩r矩阵几何、3种秩r部分等距几何，以及它们的块矩阵变体，应用于小语言模型的多头注意力参数。
AI.result: 经过学习率调优后，所提出的黎曼优化方法未能明显优于AdamW基线。
AI.conclusion: 当前设定的黎曼优化方法在深度学习任务中尚未展现超越AdamW的优势，但开放了代码供后续研究参考。

title: Active Exploring like a Pigeon: Reinforcing Spatial Reasoning via Agentic Vision-Language Models
summary: Enabling Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to perform spatial reasoning remains challenging. Existing approaches treat VLMs as passive observers, which is difficult for real-world applications. Moreover, reinforcement learning methods rely on sparse rewards, limiting their effectiveness for complex reasoning tasks. Inspired by pigeons' building and exploiting cognitive maps for navigation, we propose a novel agentic pipeline for spatial reasoning. First, we introduce a new \emph{dynamic cognitive map} parameterizing scene layout as object positions and orientations, serving as persistent memory for new observations. Second, we propose a novel \emph{Spatial Assertion Codes (SAC)}, Python expressions programmatically describing spatial relationships. By collaborating with the dynamic cognitive map, SAC enables verification of intermediate reasoning steps, providing dense reward signals. We optimize the model via supervised and reinforcement finetuning. Experiments on the MindCube benchmark demonstrate state-of-the-art performance with \emph{80.5\%} overall accuracy, outperforming the best current method by \emph{29.5} accuracy points (a relative improvement of \emph{53.2\%}) on the challenging \textsc{Rotation} subset. Our code and data are open-sourced at https://github.com/dw-dengwei/active-spatial-reasoning.git.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受鸽子认知地图启发的空间推理管线，通过动态认知地图和空间断言代码（SAC）实现密集奖励信号，在MindCube基准上达到80.5%的准确率，相对提升53.2%。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM将自身视为被动观察者，难以应对真实世界的空间推理任务；强化学习方法依赖稀疏奖励，在复杂推理上效果有限。受鸽子构建认知地图导航的启发，提出主动推理方案。
AI.method: 1) 提出动态认知地图，将场景布局参数化为物体位置和朝向，作为持久记忆；2) 提出空间断言代码（SAC），用Python表达式程序化描述空间关系，与认知地图协作提供密集奖励信号；3) 通过监督学习和强化学习微调优化模型。
AI.result: 在MindCube基准上达到80.5%的整体准确率，在最具挑战性的Rotation子集上超越当前最优方法29.5个百分点（相对提升53.2%）。
AI.conclusion: 动态认知地图结合空间断言代码能有效提升VLM的空间推理能力，从被动观察转向主动推理，开源代码和数据集可促进该方向研究。

title: Entropy Minimization without Model Collapse: Mitigating Prediction Bias in Medical Imaging
summary: Entropy minimization (EM) is the dominant objective for test-time adaptation, yet its failure mode, model collapse, remains poorly understood. In this work, we show that distribution shifts can cause feature clusters corresponding to distinct classes in the model's representation space to merge, while the decision boundary remains fixed. This induces a systematic skew in the predicted class distribution, referred to as prediction bias. Prediction bias refers to a shift in the predicted class distribution, with some classes overrepresented and others suppressed. We show that entropy minimization amplifies this prediction bias by tightening the existing clusters, reinforcing the incorrect groupings until all predictions collapse to a trivial solution. Next, to demonstrate the significance of prediction bias and mitigate it, we further propose Distribution Shift Bias Reduction (DSBR), a bias-correcting objective that specifically targets this failure mode by equalizing the contribution of each predicted class to the unsupervised entropy minimization loss. To study this failure mode, we design suitable adaptation settings using four medical-imaging datasets and additionally evaluate on ImageNet-C. We find that DSBR consistently stabilizes test-time adaptation, prevents model collapse, and matches or outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, DSBR operates solely at test-time.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了测试时自适应中熵最小化导致模型坍塌的机制——预测偏差，并提出DSBR方法通过均衡各类别损失贡献来稳定自适应过程，在医学影像和ImageNet-C上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 熵最小化是测试时自适应的主流方法，但其失败模式——模型坍塌的机制尚不明确，理解并解决这一问题对提升模型鲁棒性至关重要。
AI.method: 提出分布偏移偏差减少(DSBR)，通过均衡每个预测类别对无监督熵最小化损失的贡献来矫正预测偏差，直接针对模型坍塌这一失败模式。
AI.result: 在四个医学影像数据集和ImageNet-C上，DSBR稳定了测试时自适应，防止了模型坍塌，性能达到或超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 预测偏差是熵最小化导致模型坍塌的关键因素，DSBR通过偏差矫正有效缓解了该问题，且仅需测试时运行。

title: MASER: Modality-Adaptive Specialist Routing for Embodied 3D Spatial Intelligence
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026 Foundation Models Meet Embodied Agents Workshop
summary: In 3D environments, Embodied Agents answer spatially relevant questions through reasoning from a mixture of modalities including natural language, RGB images, point clouds, depth maps and camera poses. Existing Vision-Language models (VLMs) are fine-tuned over a single modality. This completely ignores the question semantics which may favor a different modality than the finetuned modality. To address this, we propose MASER (Modality-Adaptive SpEcialist Routing), a lightweight framework that trains five different modality adapters of a shared VLM backbone and learns a neural routing policy that selects the best adapter based on the question during inference. We encode each question with a frozen sentence transformer and pass the embedding through a small Multi-layer Perceptron (MLP) trained on oracle adapter-accuracy labels. We evaluate our methodology over the Open3D-VQA benchmark and our evaluations show that no single modality is universally optimal -- point-cloud answers are best in 51.5% of cases. MASER routes with 51.3% oracle agreement, outperforming a Random-Forest ablation (43.5%), with only a single adapter call per question.

AI.tldr: MASER是一个轻量级框架，通过训练共享VLM骨干的五个模态适配器，并学习基于问题语义的神经路由策略，在推理时动态选择最佳模态，在Open3D-VQA基准上达到51.3%的oracle一致性，优于随机森林消融（43.5%）。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM模型仅针对单一模态进行微调，完全忽略了问题语义可能偏好不同模态的事实，导致无法根据问题灵活选择最优模态。
AI.method: 提出MASER框架，训练五个不同模态适配器（共享VLM骨干），学习一个基于冻结句子编码器+小型MLP的神经路由策略，根据问题嵌入选择最佳适配器，每次推理仅调用一个适配器。
AI.result: 在Open3D-VQA上，没有单一模态是普遍最优的（点云在51.5%情况下最佳）；MASER路由达到51.3% oracle一致性，优于随机森林消融的43.5%。
AI.conclusion: MASER证明了根据问题语义动态选择模态的有效性，仅需单次适配器调用即可接近oracle性能，为多模态推理中的模态自适应提供了轻量级解决方案。

title: Local Preferential Bayesian Optimization
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a popular and effective approach for tuning expensive, noisy experiments, but requires the formulation of an explicit objective function. Preferential BO (PBO) removes this requirement by learning from pairwise human feedback, yet existing methods struggle to efficiently optimize beyond low- and medium-dimensional problems due to their global search approaches. We address this limitation by developing a family of local PBO methods that transfer key ideas from high-dimensional BO to the preferential setting. In particular, we introduce local PBO methods which adapt trust-region and derivative-informed local search to pairwise preference feedback, where the latter exploits first- and second-order derivatives of the Laplace-approximated GP posterior. Our benchmark on GP sample paths, standard optimization benchmark functions, and policy-search tasks shows that local PBO methods are especially effective in high-dimensional and complex landscapes with steep optima. Compared with global preference-based baselines, they can substantially reduce cumulative regret, making them particularly useful for real-world preference-based optimization tasks such as policy search.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一类局部偏好贝叶斯优化（Local PBO）方法，通过将信任域和导数信息引入偏好学习，有效解决了高维优化问题，相比全局方法显著降低了累积遗憾。
AI.motivation: 现有偏好贝叶斯优化（PBO）方法主要采用全局搜索，在高维问题上效率低下，无法满足实际中高维偏好优化任务（如策略搜索）的需求。
AI.method: 提出局部PBO方法家族，将信任域（trust-region）和基于导数信息的局部搜索（derivative-informed local search）扩展到成对偏好反馈场景，利用拉普拉斯近似GP后验的一阶和二阶导数指导局部搜索。
AI.result: 在GP样本路径、标准优化基准函数和策略搜索任务上的实验表明，局部PBO方法在高维、复杂且具有陡峭最优值的地形上表现尤为出色，相比全局偏好基线方法显著降低了累积遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 局部PBO方法为高维偏好优化提供了一种高效解决方案，特别适用于策略搜索等真实世界偏好优化任务。

title: Retrieve What's Missing: Coverage-Maximizing Retrieval for Consistent Long Video Generation
summary: Maintaining long-term geometric consistency remains challenging for long-horizon autoregressive video generation. Memory-augmented generative models address this by retrieving historical frames, but their effectiveness depends on two key design choices: what 3D-geometric evidence should represent past observations, and how memory frames should be selected from this evidence. Existing methods often rely on camera poses or field-of-view overlap, which are lightweight but too coarse to reason about pixel-wise visibility, or use explicit 3D reconstruction, which provides fine-grained evidence but is costly to maintain over long rollouts. We propose Coverage-Maximizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (COVRAG), a depth-based memory retrieval framework that uses pretrained 3D priors to construct a target-view coverage map as lightweight 3D memory evidence. For frame selection, COVRAG maximizes residual coverage gain, iteratively retrieving frames that explain target-view regions not covered by the current context or previously selected memories. To improve scalability in long-video generation, we introduce sliding-window depth caching for efficient geometry estimation. Experiments on RealEstate10K and DL3DV10K show that COVRAG improves long-horizon geometric consistency while maintaining low latency compared to baselines.

AI.tldr: COVRAG提出了一种基于深度的记忆检索框架，通过预训练3D先验构建目标视角覆盖图作为轻量级3D记忆证据，并采用残差覆盖最大化的帧选择策略，在保持低延迟的同时提升了长视频生成的几何一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖相机位姿或视场重叠（轻量但过于粗糙，无法推理像素级可见性），要么使用显式3D重建（能提供细粒度证据，但在长序列中维护成本高）。需要一种既轻量又有效的3D记忆证据表示和帧选择方法。
AI.method: 1) 利用预训练3D先验构建目标视角覆盖图作为轻量级3D记忆证据；2) 采用残差覆盖增益最大化策略，迭代检索能解释目标视角中未被当前上下文或已选记忆覆盖区域的帧；3) 引入滑动窗口深度缓存以提高长视频生成中的几何估计效率。
AI.result: 在RealEstate10K和DL3DV10K数据集上，COVRAG在提升长时几何一致性的同时，相比基线方法保持了低延迟。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度的记忆检索框架能在轻量和有效之间取得良好平衡，为长序列自回归视频生成中的几何一致性维护提供了可行方案。

title: Minimax-Optimal Policy Regret in Partially Observable Markov Games
summary: We study sequential decision-making in partially observable environments against strategic, adaptive opponents, modeled as partially observable Markov games (POMGs). The central challenge is to learn latent dynamics from partial observations while facing an adversary whose behavior depends on the learner's strategy, making standard regret notions inadequate. We prove that an epoch-based optimistic maximum-likelihood algorithm achieves $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ policy regret for fixed problem parameters, with explicit dependence on the horizon, adversary memory, confidence radius, and the aggregate Eluder dimension of the observable-operator class. The algorithm selects one policy per geometrically growing epoch using confidence sets built cumulatively from past data, which keeps the cost of comparing adversary responses across policies logarithmic in $T$. We also prove a lower bound matching the $\sqrt{T}$ and aggregate-Eluder-dimension dependence, up to problem-dependent and logarithmic factors. Finally, we extend the framework to horizon-adaptive guarantees and adversaries with geometric fading memory.

AI.tldr: 本文研究部分可观测马尔可夫博弈(POMGs)中的序贯决策问题，提出了一种基于epoch的乐观最大似然算法，实现了$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$的策略后悔界，并给出了匹配的下界。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测环境中对抗策略性、自适应对手进行序贯决策时，标准后悔概念不适用，需要学习具有对抗性依赖的潜在动力学。
AI.method: 采用基于几何增长epoch的乐观最大似然算法，利用从过去数据累积构建的置信集，每个epoch选择一个策略，将比较对手响应跨策略的成本控制在$\log T$量级。
AI.result: 实现了$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$的策略后悔界（依赖于视界、对手记忆、置信半径和可观测算子类的聚合Eluder维数），并证明了匹配的下界。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可扩展至视界自适应保证和具有几何衰减记忆的对手场景。

title: Places in the Wild: A Large, High-Resolution RAW Photograph Dataset for Ecologically Valid Vision Research
summary: Large image datasets have accelerated progress in cognitive neuroscience and computer vision. However, most datasets are low-resolution, internet-sourced JPEGs with unknown capture conditions and limited spatial context. Places in the Wild is a dataset of 67,574 high-resolution photographs collected in situ across 810 physical locations spanning 260 basic-level scene categories, including indoor, urban, and natural environments. At each location, a 45-megapixel Canon EOS R5 mounted on a panoramic tripod captured 72 images at 5-degree horizontal intervals plus 12 images at varying elevations, yielding dense 360-degree viewpoint sampling. All images were recorded simultaneously as 14-bit RAW (CR3) files and compressed JPEGs, preserving sensor-level detail for analyses of luminance, contrast, color, and other image statistics. The dataset is accompanied by complete EXIF metadata and a suite of image-quality metrics. Places in the Wild supports research on viewpoint-dependent recognition in humans and models, training and evaluation of scene-understanding systems under realistic conditions, characterization of natural scene statistics, and experiments requiring near-full-field visual displays.

AI.tldr: Places in the Wild是一个包含67,574张高分辨率全景照片的数据集，覆盖810个实际地点和260种场景类别，提供360度视角采样和RAW格式原始数据，用于支持场景理解、视点依赖识别和自然场景统计研究。
AI.motivation: 现有大规模图像数据集多为低分辨率、来源不明的JPEG图片，缺乏真实拍摄条件和空间上下文信息，难以支持对视点依赖识别、自然场景统计等前沿问题的深入研究。
AI.method: 在810个物理地点使用45百万像素Canon EOS R5相机和全景三脚架，以5度水平间隔拍摄72张图像，加上不同仰角的12张图像，同时保存14-bit RAW（CR3）和压缩JPEG格式，提供完整EXIF元数据和图像质量指标。
AI.result: 构建了包含67,574张高分辨率照片的数据集，覆盖260个基础级场景类别（室内、城市、自然环境），实现了密集的360度视角采样，并提供了传感器级别的图像细节和元数据。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集可支持视点依赖识别、场景理解系统在真实条件下的训练与评估、自然场景统计特征分析以及需要近全视野视觉显示的实验等多种研究方向。

title: FOAM: Frequency and Operator Error-Based Adaptive Damping Method for Reducing Staleness-Oriented Error for Shampoo
summary: Shampoo is attracting considerable attention for its superior performance on large-scale optimization benchmarks; yet it faces a significant practical bottleneck: the prohibitive computational overhead of matrix inversion. To mitigate this, practitioners typically rely on stale preconditioner updates, creating a fundamental trade-off between computational efficiency and optimization fidelity. In this work, we provide a theoretical study of staleness through the complementary lenses of convergence and stability. While staleness improves computational efficiency, it inherently degrades performance and introduces numerical instability. Crucially, we identify that damping, acting as a numerical stabilizer, can effectively suppress these negative effects. Guided by this analysis, we propose FOAM, an adaptive algorithm that stabilizes training by dynamically controlling both the damping factor and the eigendecomposition frequency based on an approximation of the staleness-oriented error. Experimental results demonstrate that FOAM reduces wall-clock time compared to standard Shampoo while maintaining robust convergence.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Shampoo优化器中矩阵求逆计算开销大的问题，从收敛性和稳定性角度理论研究了预条件器更新滞后（staleness）的影响，发现阻尼（damping）可有效抑制数值不稳定性，并提出自适应算法FOAM，通过动态控制阻尼因子和特征分解频率来减少计算时间并保持稳健收敛。
AI.motivation: Shampoo在大规模优化中表现优异，但矩阵求逆的计算开销成为实际应用的瓶颈。现有方法使用滞后更新（staleness）来降低计算成本，但缺乏对其收敛性和稳定性的理论理解。
AI.method: 从收敛性和稳定性两个角度理论分析滞后的影响，识别阻尼作为数值稳定器的作用；提出FOAM算法，基于滞后误差近似动态调整阻尼因子和特征分解频率。
AI.result: FOAM相比标准Shampoo减少了实际运行时间（wall-clock time），同时保持了稳健的收敛性能。
AI.conclusion: 滞后更新虽提升计算效率但损害性能并引入数值不稳定，阻尼可有效抑制这些负面效应；FOAM通过自适应策略平衡了效率与稳定性。

title: X-Stream: Exploring MLLMs as Multiplexers for Multi-Stream Understanding
summary: While video streaming understanding has made significant strides, real-world applications, such as live sports broadcasting, autonomous driving, and multi-screen collaboration, inherently demand continuous, multi-stream interactions. However, existing benchmarks are confined to single-stream paradigms, leaving a critical gap in evaluating online, cross-stream reasoning. To bridge this, we introduce X-Stream, the first benchmark dedicated to multi-stream streaming understanding. Comprising 4,220 rigorously curated QA pairs across 932 videos, X-Stream evaluates 11 subtasks across multi-window, multi-view, and multi-device scenarios. Crucially, our dataset is constructed using a novel dual-verification pipeline that prevents over-reliance on a single stream. Furthermore, we pioneer the conceptualization of multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) as naive multiplexers, systematically evaluating their performance through the lens of Signal Multiplexing Theory. Our extensive online inference experiments reveal a stark reality: state-of-the-art MLLMs struggle significantly with concurrent streams, achieving only about 50% score and exhibiting poor proactive ability. Ultimately, X-Stream exposes the trade-off of current multiplexing schemes, providing both a practical evaluation protocol and empirical guidance for next-generation multi-stream agents.

AI.tldr: X-Stream是首个专注于多流视频流式理解的基准，包含4220个QA对和932个视频，评估11个子任务。实验发现当前最先进的MLLMs在多流场景下表现不佳（仅约50%得分），缺乏主动推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解基准局限于单流范式，无法评估在线跨流推理能力，而真实应用（如体育直播、自动驾驶、多屏协作）天然需要连续的多流交互。
AI.method: 构建了包含4220个QA对、932个视频的基准，覆盖多窗口、多视角、多设备三类场景共11个子任务；采用新颖的双验证流水线防止模型过度依赖单一流；将MLLMs概念化为"朴素复用器"，基于信号复用理论系统评估其性能。
AI.result: 最先进的MLLMs在多流并发场景下表现极差，仅获得约50%的分数，且缺乏主动推理能力。
AI.conclusion: X-Stream揭示了当前复用方案的权衡，为下一代多流智能体提供了评估协议和实证指导。

title: When Do Attention Circuits Form? Developmental Trajectories of Capability and Attention-Sink Emergence Across Three 1B-ClassArchitectures
summary:
We track the developmental trajectory of attention-head circuit formation across three 1B-class language models spanning two architecture families (dense transformer, mixture-of-experts) and two pretraining corpora (The Pile, DCLM): Pythia 1B, OLMo 1B-0724-hf, and OLMoE 1B-7B-0924. At each of 10 log-spaced revisions per model -- 30 mechanistic-interpretability runs in total -- we apply a participation-ratio (PR) spectral signal and an all-head capability-specific selectivity screen to track induction, previous-token, and BOS-attractor heads as they emerge.
  Five findings. (F1) Layers 0 and 1 produce zero BOS-classified heads at every revision in every model: the L0/L1 zero-BOS floor is an architectural property, not a learned outcome. (F2) The whole-model BOS-attractor fraction follows three distinct emergence shapes -- a gradual ramp in Pythia 1B, a sharp phase transition in OLMo 1B (7% to 70% between adjacent checkpoints), and a gradual ramp in OLMoE 1B-7B. (F3) In DCLM models, induction-circuit formation precedes BOS-attractor formation by 10-20x in tokens; capability-circuit formation and attention-sink formation are two transitions, not one. (F4) The capability-specific screen converges to the final induction circuit within 0.3-2% of total training tokens -- circuit identification does not require the final model. (F5) For every final-checkpoint induction head sampled across all three models, per-head PR is elevated at or before the first revision at which that head crosses its capability-selectivity threshold.
  The results refine the induction-phase-transition framing: in 1B-class models trained on DCLM, the induction transition and the attention-sink transition are separated by an order of magnitude in tokens and have qualitatively different shapes.

AI.tldr: 本文追踪了三个1B级语言模型（Pythia 1B、OLMo 1B、OLMoE 1B-7B）中注意力头电路的发育轨迹，发现：（1）L0/L1层零BOS头是架构属性；（2）BOS吸引子头的出现形状因模型而异；（3）在DCLM模型中，归纳电路形成早于BOS吸引子形成10-20倍；（4）电路识别可在训练早期完成（0.3-2%的token）；（5）每个归纳头的参与比在达到选择性阈值时或之前就已升高。这些结果修正了"归纳阶段转移"的框架，证明归纳转移和注意力汇转移在token数量上相差一个数量级，且形状不同。
AI.motivation: 理解1B级语言模型中注意力头电路（归纳头、前序token头、BOS吸引子头）形成的发育轨迹，探究这些电路何时以及如何在学习过程中涌现。
AI.method: 对三个1B级模型（Pythia 1B、OLMo 1B、OLMoE 1B-7B）的10个对数间隔检查点（共30次机械可解释性分析），应用参与比（PR）谱信号和全头能力特异性选择性筛选来追踪注意力头的涌现。
AI.result: （1）L0/L1层零BOS头是架构固有属性；（2）BOS吸引子头的涌现形状因模型而异（渐变/相变）；（3）DCLM模型中归纳电路形成早于BOS吸引子10-20倍；（4）电路识别可在训练早期（0.3-2% token）完成；（5）归纳头的PR在达到选择性阈值前或同时升高。
AI.conclusion: 修正了"归纳阶段转移"的单一框架：在基于DCLM训练的1B模型中，归纳转移和注意力汇转移在token数量上相差一个数量级，具有不同的形状，表明它们是两个分离的转变过程。

title: MORPHOS: Autoregressive 4D Generation with Temporal Structured Latents
summary: We present MORPHOS, a novel autoregressive framework that generates dynamic 3D assets from videos across diverse representations, including meshes, 3D Gaussians, and radiance fields. Existing methods are typically limited to a single representation, struggle to model topological changes, or fail to maintain temporal consistency over long videos. To address these limitations, we introduce the Temporal Structured Latents (T-SLAT), a unified 4D representation that jointly encodes geometry and appearance along the temporal dimension. Leveraging T-SLAT, MORPHOS autoregressively generates dynamic 3D assets via causal attention, conditioning each frame on its preceding history to ensure temporal consistency while handling evolving topologies. We also propose a temporal-structural augmentation to mitigate error accumulation in autoregressive generation. MORPHOS achieves state-of-the-art performance in appearance and competitive results in geometry across multiple benchmarks, demonstrating superior generalization across various representations and robustness in long-horizon generation.

AI.tldr: MORPHOS 是一个自回归框架，能够从视频生成动态3D资产（网格、3D高斯、辐射场），通过提出的Temporal Structured Latents (T-SLAT)统一4D表示，利用因果注意力确保时序一致性，并采用时序-结构增强缓解误差累积，在多个基准上取得SOTA外观性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常局限于单一表示、难以建模拓扑变化、或在长视频中无法保持时序一致性，缺乏一个统一的动态3D生成框架。
AI.method: 提出Temporal Structured Latents (T-SLAT)统一4D表示，结合因果注意力的自回归生成框架，以及时序-结构增强技术来减轻自回归生成中的误差累积。
AI.result: 在多个基准上外观指标达到SOTA，几何指标具有竞争力，展现出跨多种表示的泛化能力和长时生成的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MORPHOS通过统一4D表示和自回归框架，有效解决了动态3D生成中表示多样、拓扑变化、时序一致性三大挑战。

title: TabPrep: Closing the Feature Engineering Gap in Tabular Benchmarks
summary: Progress in tabular machine learning has largely focused on increasingly sophisticated model architectures. At the same time, feature engineering remains a critical yet underexplored component of real-world modeling pipelines that is entirely absent from modern benchmarks, which creates an unquantified evaluation gap. In this work, we introduce TabPrep, a lightweight preprocessing pipeline composed of feature generators that are carefully designed to target three specific structural data patterns. We show that many widely used model classes exhibit predictable blind spots to these patterns and that systematic feature engineering alone can establish new peak performance. Across the TabArena benchmark, integrating TabPrep into model training and tuning consistently improves performance for tree-based, neural, linear, and foundation models, often surpassing gains achieved by model-centric innovations alone. TabPrep outperforms previous automated feature engineering approaches in performance, efficiency, and applicability across datasets, enabling integration into large-scale benchmarks. By releasing TabPrep (see https://github.com/atschalz/tabprep), we enable researchers to integrate feature engineering into their benchmarking setup, filling a longstanding gap in tabular evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TabPrep，一个轻量级特征工程流水线，通过针对三种特定数据结构模式设计特征生成器，系统性地提升了各类表格模型（树模型、神经网络、线性模型、基础模型）的性能，填补了现有基准测试中缺失特征工程环节的评估空白。
AI.motivation: 现有表格机器学习研究过度聚焦于模型架构创新，而特征工程这一实际建模管线中至关重要的环节被现代基准测试完全忽略，造成了未量化的评估差距。
AI.method: 设计TabPrep轻量级预处理流水线，包含针对三种特定数据结构模式精心设计的特征生成器；将该流水线集成到模型训练和调优过程中。
AI.result: 在TabArena基准测试中，TabPrep一致提升了树模型、神经网络、线性模型和基础模型的性能；优于以往自动化特征工程方法在性能、效率和适用性方面的表现；效果常常超越仅依靠模型中心创新的收益。
AI.conclusion: 特征工程作为被忽视的重要环节，系统性地填补可带来显著性能提升；TabPrep可作为标准化工具集成到大规模基准测试中，弥补表格评估中的长期空白。

title: GloResNet: A lightweight 3D CNN with global topological features for preterm brain injury prediction
summary: This study introduces an automated deep learning framework for predicting brain injury (BI) in preterm infants from T2-weighted MRI (dHCP dataset). We propose GloResNet, a lightweight 3D CNN based on ResNet-10, pretrained on MedicalNet to address data scarcity. A global manifold mapping strategy first resamples each 3D volume to 128x128x128 and then applies subject-wise z-score intensity normalization, thereby preserving global topology while standardizing appearance. Training integrates mixup, class weighting, and test-time augmentation for robustness. In 5-fold cross-validation, GloResNet achieved 75.18% average accuracy (peak 81.82%), with specificity 0.81 and sensitivity 0.76. Results demonstrate that a topology-aware lightweight CNN has the capability to effectively predict neonatal BI, offering a non-invasive screening tool. The source code of this paper can be obtained from the GitHub repository: https://github.com/ICL-SUST/GloResNet-Preterm-Brain

AI.tldr: 本文提出GloResNet，一种基于ResNet-10的轻量级3D CNN框架，结合全局流形映射策略和多种增强技术，用于从T2加权MRI预测早产儿脑损伤，在dHCP数据集上达到75.18%的平均准确率。
AI.motivation: 早产儿脑损伤的早期诊断对临床干预至关重要，但传统方法依赖人工解读MRI，耗时且主观。现有深度学习方法面临数据稀缺、计算成本高以及忽视全局拓扑结构等问题，亟需一种轻量级、自动化且鲁棒的预测工具。
AI.method: 提出GloResNet框架：1) 基于ResNet-10的轻量级3D CNN结构；2) 在MedicalNet上预训练以缓解数据稀缺；3) 全局流形映射策略：将3D体积重采样至128x128x128，并进行逐样本z-score强度归一化，保持全局拓扑；4) 集成mixup数据增强、类别权重和测试时增强以提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在5折交叉验证中，GloResNet平均准确率75.18%（峰值81.82%），特异性0.81，敏感性0.76，表明轻量级拓扑感知CNN能有效预测新生儿脑损伤。
AI.conclusion: GloResNet提供了一种非侵入性的早产儿脑损伤自动化筛查工具，验证了拓扑感知的轻量级3D CNN在医学影像分析中的可行性，代码已开源。

title: Policy and World Modeling Co-Training for Language Agents
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) improves large language model (LLM) agents by teaching them which actions lead to high rewards, but provides little supervision on what those actions do to the environment. World modeling (WM) can fill this gap, yet existing approaches often require separate simulators, extra training stages, or additional inference-time computation. We observe that on-policy RL rollouts already contain the needed signal: each transition pairs an action with its resulting next observation. Based on this observation, we propose PaW, a Policy and World modeling co-training framework that adds auxiliary WM supervision to the same policy during RL, without changing the inference paradigm. To make auxiliary WM supervision informative and stable, PaW introduces three components: action-entropy-based WM data selection, noise-tolerant WM loss, and reward-adaptive loss balancing. Experiments on three agentic task benchmarks show consistent improvements over strong RL baselines across models and RL algorithms. These results suggest that standard RL rollouts are a practical source of WM supervision for language-agent training.

AI.tldr: PaW提出了一种策略与世界模型协同训练框架，通过在强化学习过程中添加辅助的世界模型监督信号，无需改变推理范式，显著提升了语言智能体的任务表现。
AI.motivation: 强化学习虽然能教会LLM智能体哪些动作带来高奖励，但无法提供动作对环境产生何种影响（即世界模型）的监督信号。现有世界建模方法需要额外模拟器、训练阶段或推理计算，成本高昂。
AI.method: PaW在on-policy RL的rollout中提取(动作, 下一观测)配对作为世界模型监督信号，并引入三个组件：基于动作熵的WM数据选择、噪声容忍的WM损失函数、以及奖励自适应的损失平衡机制。
AI.result: 在三个智能体任务基准上，PaW在不同模型和RL算法下均持续优于强RL基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 标准的RL rollouts是训练语言智能体世界模型监督信号的实用来源，无需额外计算开销即可提升智能体能力。

title: Question-Aware Evidence Ledgers for Video Relational Reasoning
comment: Technical report for the VRR Challenge at the VideoLLMs Workshop, CVPR 2026
summary: The VRR-QA challenge evaluates visual relational reasoning in videos, where answers often depend on implicit spatial relations, event boundaries, target identity, and dialogue context rather than a single salient frame. We present a test-time reasoning pipeline built around a strong GPT-5.5 video QA solver and a set of question-aware evidence ledgers. The initial solver answers each question from a uniform video representation, while routed ledgers are prompted to make the required targets, count units, reference frames, and temporal or spatial scope explicit for counting, spatial, endpoint, viewpoint, and dialogue reasoning. External tools such as open-vocabulary detection, depth cues, pair crops, ASR, and scene-graph ledgers are used only as evidence sources. A conservative gate keeps the current answer unless independent evidence uniquely supports a different option. The final evidence-gated pipeline achieves 92.95% overall accuracy and 93.79% macro accuracy on the challenge test split.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于GPT-5.5的测试时推理流水线，利用问题感知的证据账本和保守门控机制，在VRR-QA视频关系推理任务上达到92.95%准确率。
AI.motivation: VRR-QA挑战中，视频关系推理的答案往往依赖于隐式的空间关系、事件边界、目标身份和对话上下文，而非单一显著帧，现有方法难以处理这些复杂情况。
AI.method: 构建一个以GPT-5.5为核心的视频QA求解器，配合一组问题感知的证据账本（路由账本），用于显式化计数、空间、端点、视角和对话推理所需的目标、计数单元、参考帧及时空范围。外部工具（开放词汇检测、深度线索、成对裁剪、ASR、场景图账本）仅作为证据源。采用保守门控机制，除非独立证据唯一支持其他选项，否则保留当前答案。
AI.result: 在挑战测试集上达到92.95%的整体准确率和93.79%的宏平均准确率。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的证据门控流水线有效提升了视频关系推理的性能，验证了测试时推理和外部证据源结合的有效性。

title: Not All Points Are Equal: Uncertainty-Aware 4D LiDAR Scene Synthesis
comment: CVPR 2026 E2E3D Workshop; GitHub at https://github.com/worldbench/U4D
summary: Constructing faithful 4D worlds from LiDAR-acquired sequences is crucial for embodied AI, yet current generative frameworks apply uniform modeling capacity across all spatial regions. This ignores that perceptual difficulty varies dramatically within a single scan: distant surfaces, occluded boundaries, and small-scale objects carry far higher uncertainty than well-observed structures. We present U4D, a new framework that explicitly leverages spatial uncertainty to guide LiDAR scene generation in a "hard-to-easy" schedule. U4D derives per-point uncertainty maps via Shannon Entropy from a pretrained segmentor, then applies an unconditional diffusion stage to synthesize high-entropy areas with precise geometry, followed by a conditional completion stage that fills in the remaining regions using these structures as priors. A MoST (Mixture of Spatio-Temporal) block further maintains cross-frame coherence by dynamically balancing spatial detail and temporal continuity. Extensive experiments on nuScenes and SemanticKITTI demonstrate state-of-the-art scene fidelity, temporal consistency, and downstream performance.

AI.tldr: U4D提出了一种利用空间不确定性引导LiDAR场景生成的框架，采用"由难到易"的策略：先扩散生成高不确定区域（远距离、遮挡边界、小物体），再用条件完成填充剩余区域，并引入MoST模块保证跨帧一致性。在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有4D生成框架对所有空间区域采用统一建模能力，忽略了单帧LiDAR点云中不同区域的感知难度差异巨大（如远距离表面、遮挡边界、小物体比良好观测结构具有更高不确定性），导致生成质量不均。
AI.method: 1) 从预训练分割器通过Shannon熵导出逐点不确定性图；2) 无条件扩散阶段先合成高熵区域（难的部分）；3) 条件完成阶段以这些结构为先验填充剩余区域（易的部分）；4) MoST（时空混合）模块动态平衡空间细节与时间连续性，保持跨帧一致性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI数据集上，场景保真度、时间一致性和下游任务性能均达到最优。
AI.conclusion: 显式利用空间不确定性按"由难到易"调度生成，能有效提升LiDAR 4D场景重建的质量，为具身智能提供了更可靠的4D世界构建方法。

title: ToolFG: Towards Well-Grounded Fine-Grained Image Classification
summary: Fine-grained image classification (FGIC) has broad applications and has attracted significant research attention. In this paper, we explore a novel paradigm for solving FGIC by proposing \textbf{ToolFG}, the first tool-integrated MLLM-based framework tailored to FGIC. ToolFG enables MLLMs to autonomously and flexibly use external tools during the reasoning process, actively interact with images, and collect verifiable visual cues for distinguishing highly similar categories in a more \textit{reliable} and \textit{well-grounded} manner. To equip the model with such tool-use ability, we design a novel \textbf{MCTS-guided tool-use knowledge distillation mechanism}, which effectively mines tool-use- and FGIC-relevant knowledge from advanced proprietary MLLMs for model training. Furthermore, we propose a \textbf{model-tool co-evolution mechanism} that jointly refines the toolset and the model's tool-use policy, driving them toward a mutually adapted and FGIC-specialized state. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework.

AI.tldr: 提出ToolFG，首个面向细粒度图像分类的集成工具MLLM框架，通过MCTS指导的工具使用知识蒸馏和模型-工具协同进化机制，让MLLM能自主调用外部工具收集可靠视觉线索进行分类。
AI.motivation: 细粒度图像分类中类别间差异极其微小，传统方法难以可靠区分，需要更可靠、有充分依据的视觉线索收集方式。
AI.method: 1) MCTS引导的工具使用知识蒸馏机制，从高级专有MLLM中挖掘相关知识；2) 模型-工具协同进化机制，联合优化工具集和模型工具使用策略。
AI.result: 大量实验证明了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ToolFG通过让MLLM自主灵活使用外部工具进行推理，为细粒度图像分类提供了一种可靠且充分的新范式。

title: Speculative Sampling For Faster Molecular Dynamics
comment: Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026). 32 pages, 14 figures, 8 tables
summary: Molecular dynamics (MD) is a key tool for simulating the dynamical behavior of atomic systems. However, MD is inherently serial, which makes it difficult to increase single-system throughput with concurrent compute. To address this, we introduce Langevin Speculative Dynamics (LSD), a distributed and model-agnostic speculative sampler for accelerating MD without adding relative error. Inspired by speculative methods in language and diffusion modeling, LSD uses a draft model to propose fast simulation steps and verifies them in parallel with a slower target model, applying a transport map from the draft to the target distribution. We extend speculative sampling to second-order Langevin dynamics, derive the achievable speedup as a function of physical parameters, show that LSD generalizes across different systems and draft-target combinations with a 3-9x speedup, and confirm theoretically and empirically that LSD samples trajectories from its target model distribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Langevin Speculative Dynamics (LSD)，一种分布式、模型无关的推测性采样方法，通过草稿模型快速提议模拟步骤并由目标模型并行验证，在不增加相对误差的情况下加速分子动力学模拟，实验显示3-9倍加速。
AI.motivation: 分子动力学(MD)本质上是串行的，难以通过并发计算提高单系统吞吐量，因此需要一种并行加速方法。
AI.method: 借鉴语言模型和扩散模型中的推测性方法，使用草稿模型快速提议模拟步骤，目标模型并行验证，并引入从草稿分布到目标分布的传输映射；将推测性采样扩展到二阶Langevin动力学。
AI.result: 在不同系统和草稿-目标组合下实现3-9倍加速；从理论和实验上验证了LSD采样轨迹与目标模型分布一致。
AI.conclusion: LSD能在不引入额外误差的情况下有效加速分子动力学模拟，且具有通用性。

title: Moment-Video: Diagnosing Temporal Fidelity of Video MLLMs on Momentary Visual Events
summary: Video multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have made rapid progress on general and long-form video understanding, yet their ability to preserve brief answer-critical visual evidence remains underexplored. Many practical questions are determined by momentary visual events: localized actions or state transitions that may last only a few frames. Such evidence can be skipped by sparse frame sampling, suppressed by visual-token compression, or diluted by coarse temporal aggregation, causing failures that language-side reasoning cannot reliably recover. We introduce Moment-Video, a benchmark for diagnosing the temporal fidelity of video MLLMs through momentary visual event understanding. Each question is grounded in a localized, visually observable, and sampling-sensitive event, requiring models to notice, count, describe, or reason about transient evidence rather than rely on persistent objects, global scene context, or language priors. Moment-Video contains 1,000 human-verified video-QA pairs across 7 domains and 25 fine-grained subcategories, covering four task types: Temporal Occurrence, Temporal Counting, Action Description, and Temporal Reasoning. We evaluate 33 proprietary and open-source MLLMs on Moment-Video. The best-performing model, Seed-2.0-Pro, achieves only 39.6% overall accuracy, while most open-source models remain below 25%, revealing a substantial gap in momentary visual event understanding. Diagnostic analyses show that denser frame sampling improves some models but does not eliminate the bottleneck, and longer videos introduce stronger temporal-localization challenges. These findings suggest that current video MLLMs still lack temporally faithful representations for capturing, preserving, and using brief but decisive visual evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Moment-Video 基准，专门诊断视频多模态大模型在短暂视觉事件理解上的能力。该基准包含 1,000 个人工验证的问答对，覆盖 7 个领域和 4 类任务。评估 33 个模型后发现，最佳模型 Seed-2.0-Pro 准确率仅 39.6%，多数开源模型低于 25%，揭示当前视频大模型在捕捉短暂但关键的视觉证据方面存在严重不足。
AI.motivation: 现有视频 MLLM 在通用和长视频理解上进步显著，但模型是否能够保留决定答案的短暂视觉证据（仅几帧的局部动作或状态变化）仍未得到充分探究。这类证据容易被稀疏采样、视觉标记压缩或粗粒度时序聚合所忽略，且语言侧推理难以弥补。
AI.method: 构建 Moment-Video 基准，包含 1,000 个人工验证的视频问答对，覆盖 7 个领域和 25 个细分子类别，设计四类任务：时间出现、时间计数、动作描述、时间推理。每个问题都基于局部化、视觉可观察且对采样敏感的短暂事件。评估了 33 个专有和开源 MLLM。
AI.result: 最佳模型 Seed-2.0-Pro 仅达 39.6% 总体准确率，多数开源模型低于 25%。更密集的帧采样对部分模型有帮助，但无法消除瓶颈；更长的视频带来更强的时间定位挑战。
AI.conclusion: 当前视频 MLLM 仍缺乏时间上保真的表示能力来捕获、保留和利用短暂但决定性的视觉证据。

title: Expressivity of congruence-based architectures for DNNs on positive-definite matrices
summary: This work studies neural architectures for classifying symmetric positive-definite matrices, focusing on congruence-like layers, in which the input matrix is multiplied on the left and right by a (possibly rectangular) weight matrix $W$ and its transpose. Such layers lie at the core of the celebrated SPDNet and have also been employed independently for dimensionality reduction on positive-definite data. We show that the (semi)-orthogonality constraint commonly imposed on $W$ limits the expressivity of these layers: for certain activation functions, the resulting architecture collapses to a one-hidden-layer equivalent. This lack of expressivity follows from a loss of spectral diversity in congruence-like layers for semi-orthogonal $W$ and is a direct consequence of Poincaré's separation theorem. We then examine the choice of the final classifier, comparing several Riemannian classifiers and discussing their compatibility with the feature maps produced by congruence-like layers.

AI.tldr: 本文研究对称正定矩阵分类的神经网络架构，发现常施加的半正交约束会严重限制其表达能力，导致网络退化为单隐层等价的浅层结构，并分析了不同黎曼分类器与特征映射的兼容性。
AI.motivation: 探索SPDNet中congruence-like层的表达能力上限，揭示半正交约束对网络深度优势的负面影响。
AI.method: 理论分析结合Poincaré分离定理，证明半正交W会导致谱多样性丧失；对比多种黎曼分类器与congruence-like层特征图的兼容性。
AI.result: 半正交约束使congruence-like层在特定激活函数下表达能力崩塌，网络退化为单隐层等效模型；不同黎曼分类器对特征图有不同兼容性表现。
AI.conclusion: 应谨慎使用或重新设计半正交约束，以保留深层网络的表达能力优势。

title: Why Not Hyperparameter-Friendly Optimisation? A Monotonic Adaptive Norm Rescaling Approach For Long-Tailed Recognition
summary: Long-tailed recognition poses a significant challenge for deep learning. The two-stage decoupling paradigm, which separates representation learning from classifier retraining, offers a promising solution. During the classifier retraining stage, adaptive norm rescaling is a popular technique. It adjusts the per-class weight norms via parameter regularization, which inevitably introduces hyperparameters. However, many studies report that long-tailed recognition is sensitive to these hyperparameters, as their setup significantly impacts performance. In this paper, we first provide a class-conditional distribution perspective to support norm rescaling methods. Furthermore, we propose a simple but effective approach called Self-Adaptive Monotonic Normalization (SAMN). SAMN avoids the need for parameter regularization. It directly enforces monotonicity on per-class weight norms using the Pool Adjacent Violators Algorithm, making the method hyperparameter-friendly. SAMN is a universal strategy that integrates seamlessly with other methods for enhanced performance. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method significantly boosts long-tailed recognition performance, often achieving state-of-the-art results.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需超参数的自适应单调归一化方法（SAMN），通过保留类别权重视范的单调性来解决长尾识别问题，在多个基准数据集上取得了最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有的两阶段解耦范式中的自适应范数重新缩放方法依赖于超参数调节，而长尾识别对超参数非常敏感，导致性能不稳定。作者希望提出一种无需超参数调整的简单有效方法。
AI.method: 提出Self-Adaptive Monotonic Normalization (SAMN)，利用Pool Adjacent Violators Algorithm直接对类别权重视范施加单调性约束，避免了参数正则化，无需引入额外超参数。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著提升了长尾识别性能，常达到state-of-the-art水平，且能与其他方法无缝集成进一步提升效果。
AI.conclusion: SAMN是一种超参数友好的通用策略，通过分布视角为范数重新缩放提供理论支撑，有效解决了长尾识别中超参数敏感的问题。

title: A Biconvex Formulation for Stable Transport of Mixture Models with a Unique Solution
summary: Optimal transport (OT) provides a principled framework for mapping between probability distributions. Despite extensive progress, applying OT to large-scale data remains computationally demanding, and the resulting pointwise transport plans are often difficult to interpret. We introduce Optimal Mixture Transport (OMT), a scalable framework that shifts the transport paradigm from individual samples to mixtures of subpopulations, reformulating the transport problem as a strictly biconvex optimization with a unique global minimizer. We further establish theoretical guarantees on the stability of the OMT map, showing that bounded perturbations of the underlying distributions lead to bounded changes in the transport plan. By formulating subpopulations as exponential-family distributions, OMT decouples computational complexity from the sample size, scaling solely with the number of mixture components. We demonstrate the effectiveness and practicality of OMT on a wide range of synthetic benchmarks and real-world datasets, including image data and large-scale single-cell RNA sequencing measurements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出最优混合传输（OMT），将传统最优传输从样本层面扩展到混合子群体层面，通过严格双凸优化实现唯一全局最优解，计算复杂度仅与混合成分数相关而非样本量，并证明了传输映射的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统最优传输在处理大规模数据时计算成本高，且逐点传输结果难以解释。作者希望将传输范式从个体样本提升到子群体混合层面，以提高可扩展性和可解释性。
AI.method: 将传输问题重新表述为严格双凸优化问题，具有唯一全局最小化器；将子群体建模为指数族分布，使计算复杂度仅与混合成分数相关，与样本量解耦。
AI.result: 在合成基准测试及真实数据集（包括图像数据和大规模单细胞RNA测序数据）上验证了OMT的有效性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: OMT通过子群体层面的传输实现了可扩展且可解释的最优传输框架，具有理论上的稳定性保证和计算优势。

title: Improving Combined Detection and Classification of TEM Defects via Mask-Conditioned Latent Diffusion Augmentation
summary: Analyzing microstructural defects in transmission electron microscopy (TEM) images, particularly in irradiated metal alloys, is often limited by the availability of high-quality, labeled data. To address this, we introduce a generative data augmentation approach using a mask-conditioned latent diffusion model (LDM) for synthesizing realistic TEM images with controllable, automatically labeled multi-class defect masks. Without requiring manual annotations for generation, our method enables the creation of synthetic image-mask pairs by sampling distributions learned from experimental masks. These generated data were used to augment small experimental datasets of varying sizes (10, 50, and 100 labeled experimental images) to train a Mask Regional Convolutional Neural Network (R-CNN) model for defect detection and classification. Our results show that generative augmentation yields small overall model performance improvements, with up to a 0.02 gain in the harmonic mean of detection and classification F1 scores. However, we also find that the relative contributions to detection and classification improvement depend on the specific train/test data split. These findings highlight the potential of targeted generative models to enhance deep learning performance in data-scarce microscopy-based image quantification tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码条件潜在扩散模型（LDM）的生成式数据增强方法，用于合成带自动标注的透射电镜（TEM）图像缺陷数据。在仅有10、50、100张标注实验图像的小样本场景下，该方法使Mask R-CNN模型的检测与分类F1分数调和均值最高提升0.02，但提升效果因数据划分方式而异。
AI.motivation: 透射电镜图像中微观缺陷分析受限于高质量标注数据稀缺，人工标注成本高且难以大规模获取，亟需自动化的数据增强方法以提升深度学习模型在数据匮乏场景下的性能。
AI.method: 采用掩码条件潜在扩散模型（LDM），通过学习实验缺陷掩码的分布自动生成合成图像-掩码对（无需人工标注），生成的合成数据用于增强小规模实验数据集（10/50/100张），并训练Mask R-CNN模型进行缺陷检测与分类。
AI.result: 生成式增强在整体模型性能上带来小幅提升，检测与分类F1分数的调和均值最高提升0.02，但检测和分类各自的改善幅度依赖于具体的训练/测试数据划分方式。
AI.conclusion: 生成式数据增强在数据稀缺的显微图像量化任务中具有提升深度学习模型性能的潜力，尤其适合结合针对性生成模型来弥补标注数据不足的问题。

title: Drifting Preference Optimization for One-Step Generative Models
summary: One-step text-to-image generators are attractive for deployment because they generate an image with a single forward pass, but preference finetuning them remains difficult: standard alignment methods often rely on policy likelihoods, denoising trajectories, differentiable reward gradients, or test-time optimization. We propose Drifting Preference Optimization (DrPO), an online preference-finetuning method for deterministic one-step generators. For each prompt, DrPO samples candidates from the current generator, ranks them with a target reward, and uses high- and low-scoring samples to synthesize a feature-space update direction. The update is a non-parametric dipole preference field plus a reference drift estimated from the frozen base generator, and is optimized through a detached feature-space regression target. The target reward is used only for ranking, so DrPO can train with large, black-box, or non-differentiable rewards while inference remains a single generator call. We evaluate DrPO on SD-Turbo and SDXL-Turbo with multiple target rewards and benchmarks, including HPSv3 and GenEval. DrPO improves alignment over reward-gradient-free one-step preference baselines and reduces HPSv3 training computation by $3.51\times$ under the matched effective-batch setting by removing reward-model backpropagation. Initial offline experiments suggest that sample-based gradient synthesis can also be used beyond online reward ranking.

AI.tldr: DrPO是一种针对确定性一步式文本到图像生成器的在线偏好微调方法，通过从当前生成器采样候选图像、用目标奖励排序并合成特征空间更新方向（非参数偶极偏好场+参考漂移），实现了无需奖励梯度反向传播的高效对齐训练，在SD-Turbo和SDXL-Turbo上优于现有方法，且训练计算量降低3.51倍。
AI.motivation: 一步式文本到图像生成器虽然推理高效，但偏好微调困难——标准对齐方法依赖策略似然、去噪轨迹、可微奖励梯度或测试时优化，这些方法不适用于确定性一步式生成器。作者希望设计一种无需这些依赖的在线偏好微调方法。
AI.method: DrPO方法包括：(1) 从当前生成器采样多个候选图像；(2) 用目标奖励对候选进行排序；(3) 从高/低分样本合成特征空间更新方向（非参数偶极偏好场+来自冻结基础生成器的参考漂移）；(4) 通过分离的特征空间回归目标进行优化。奖励仅用于排序，因此支持黑盒、不可微奖励。
AI.result: 在SD-Turbo和SDXL-Turbo上使用HPSv3和GenEval等奖励进行评测，DrPO在一步式偏好微调基线中表现更优；在匹配有效批大小设置下，由于去除了奖励模型反向传播，HPSv3训练计算量减少3.51倍。
AI.conclusion: DrPO有效解决了一步式生成器的偏好对齐难题，且启示样本驱动的梯度合成可能不仅限于在线奖励排序场景。

title: LL-Bench: Rethinking Low-Level Vision Evaluation in the Era of Large-Scale Generative Models
summary: Large-scale generative models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across image generation and editing tasks. However, their performance in low-level vision tasks, which require pixel-wise control, remains insufficiently studied. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{LL-Bench}, a comprehensive \textbf{Benchmark} for evaluating the capabilities of large-scale generative models on \textbf{L}ow-\textbf{L}evel vision tasks. The benchmark comprises 2,469 real-world degraded images covering 16 low-level degradation tasks, and 28,919 restored images produced by 10 state-of-the-art large-scale generative models and 21 conventional restoration models, which are annotated with 152,020 expert-level pairwise human preferences and 28,334 quality scores. Built upon LL-Bench, we present a systematic diagnosis that reveals the performance boundaries and unique failure modes of large-scale generative models across diverse low-level vision tasks, compared with conventional representative restoration approaches. Moreover, we investigate the effectiveness of current quality evaluation metrics on LL-Bench, which exhibit significant discrepancy with human ratings. To better align restored-image quality assessment with human preferences, we further propose \textbf{LL-Score}, an MLLM-based evaluator that captures both restoration quality and hallucination existence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LL-score not only outperforms existing image quality assessment metrics, but also serves as a promising reward model for training generative models on low-level vision tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LL-Bench基准，包含2469张真实退化图像和28919张恢复图像，用于评估大规模生成模型在低层视觉任务上的表现；并进一步提出LL-Score评估器，该评估器基于多模态大语言模型，能更好地与人类偏好对齐。
AI.motivation: 大规模生成模型在图像生成和编辑方面表现出色，但在需要像素级控制的低层视觉任务（如图像恢复）上的能力尚未得到充分研究，缺乏系统的评估基准。
AI.method: 1) 构建LL-Bench基准：包含16种低层退化任务的2469张真实退化图像，以及由10个生成模型和21个传统恢复模型产生的28919张恢复图像，并配有152020对人类偏好标注和28334个质量分数。2) 基于该基准进行系统诊断，对比生成模型与传统模型的性能边界和失败模式。3) 提出LL-Score：基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的评估器，同时捕捉恢复质量和幻觉存在性。
AI.result: 现有质量评估指标与人类评分存在显著差异；LL-Score不仅优于现有图像质量评估指标，还能作为有效的奖励模型用于训练低层视觉任务的生成模型。
AI.conclusion: 大规模生成模型在低层视觉任务中有潜力但存在独特失败模式；LL-Score可作为更符合人类偏好的评估工具和训练奖励模型。

title: IntraShuffler: A Privacy Preserving Framework for Heterogeneous DP Federated Learning
summary:
Heterogeneous Differential Privacy (HDP) in Federated Learning (FL) allows clients to select individual privacy budgets ($\varepsilon_i$) according to institutional policies and data sensitivity. In practice, many HDP-FL systems employ $\varepsilon$-aware server aggregation to improve model utility by re-weighting client updates according to their declared privacy budgets. However, gradient updates in FL retain structural patterns induced by non-independent and identically-distributed (non-IID) data, and these additional signals exposed by $\varepsilon$-aware aggregation create new opportunities for inference by an honest-but-curious server. In this work, we first show that a server equipped with gradient denoising and surrogate modeling can mount a \emph{Privacy Inference Attack} that infers distributional attributes of clients and links updates from the same client across training rounds, measured via surrogate inference accuracy and linkage success, under realistic knowledge constraints.
  The Shuffle-Model has been widely studied as a defense against such inference risks by anonymizing update sources, but it is fundamentally incompatible with HDP-FL $\varepsilon$-aware aggregation. To address this challenge, we propose \textbf{IntraShuffler}, a middleware defense framework designed for HDP-FL systems.
